papers.title: Efficient Spatio-Temporal Vegetation Pixel Classification with Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Plant phenology-the study of recurrent life cycle events-is essential for understanding ecosystem dynamics and their responses to climate change impacts. While Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and near-surface cameras enable high-resolution monitoring, identifying plant species across time remains computationally challenging. State-of-the-art approaches, specifically Multi-Temporal Convolutional Networks (CNNs), rely on rigid multi-branch architectures that scale poorly with longer time series and require large spatial context windows. In this paper, we present an extensive study on optimizing Vision Transformers (ViTs) for efficient spatio-temporal vegetation pixel classification. We conducted a comprehensive ablation study analyzing seven key design dimensions, including: (i) data normalization; (ii) spectral arrangement; (iii) boundary handling; (iv) spatial context window shape and size; (v) tokenization strategies; (vi) positional encoding; and (vii) feature aggregation strategies. Our method was evaluated on two datasets from the Brazilian Cerrado biome, Serra do Cipó (aerial imagery) and Itirapina (near-surface imagery). Experimental results demonstrate that our ViT approach offers a substantial improvement in computational efficiency while maintaining competitive classification performance. Notably, our ViT reduces Floating Point Operations (FLOPs) by an order of magnitude and maintains constant parameter complexity regardless of the time series length, whereas the CNN baseline scales linearly. Our findings confirm that ViTs are a robust, scalable solution for resource-constrained phenological monitoring systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出用Vision Transformer高效进行时空植被像素分类，计算量比CNN降低一个数量级。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于CNN的多时相植被分类方法计算成本高、扩展性差，难以适应长时间序列和资源受限的物候监测场景。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的Vision Transformer架构，在保持分类性能的同时大幅降低计算复杂度，实现时空植被像素分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CNN基线方法随时间序列长度线性增加参数和计算量，而ViT可保持常数参数复杂度。
analysis.method: 对Vision Transformer进行七个关键设计维度的消融研究，包括数据归一化、光谱排列、边界处理、空间上下文窗口形状与大小、令牌化策略、位置编码和特征聚合策略。
contributions: 首次系统研究ViT在时空植被像素分类中的设计选择，涵盖七个关键维度。
提出的ViT方法相比CNN基线将FLOPs降低一个数量级，且参数复杂度不随序列长度增加。
analysis.experiments: 在巴西塞拉多生物群落的两个数据集（Serra do Cipó航拍影像和Itirapina近地表影像）上评估，ViT在保持竞争性分类性能的同时显著提升计算效率。
limitations: 仅评估了巴西塞拉多生物群落，可能不直接推广到其他生态系统。
未与最新Transformer变体（如Swin Transformer）进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用Vision Transformer高效进行时空植被像素分类，计算量比CNN降低一个数量级。

papers.title: Caracal: Causal Architecture via Spectral Mixing
papers.abstract: The scalability of Large Language Models to long sequences is hindered by the quadratic cost of attention and the limitations of positional encodings. To address these, we introduce Caracal, a novel architecture that replaces attention with a parameter-efficient, O(L log(L)) Multi-Head Fourier (MHF) module. Our contributions are threefold: (1) We leverage the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) for sequence mixing, inherently addressing both bottlenecks mentioned above. (2) We apply a frequency-domain causal masking technique that enforces autoregressive capabilities via asymmetric padding and truncation, overcoming a critical barrier for Fourier-based generative models. (3) Unlike efficient models relying on hardware-specific implementations (e.g., Mamba), we uses standard library operators. This ensures robust portability, eliminating common deployment barriers. Evaluations demonstrate that Caracal performs competitively with Transformer and SSM baselines, offering a scalable and simple pathway for efficient long-sequence modeling. Code is available in Appendix.

analysis.tldr: 提出用傅里叶变换替代注意力机制的长序列建模架构，实现O(L log L)复杂度与因果掩码。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer在长序列上受限于注意力的二次复杂度和位置编码的局限性，现有高效模型如Mamba依赖硬件特定实现，部署不便。
analysis.problem: 设计一种参数高效、复杂度低且可移植的长序列建模架构，同时支持自回归生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Caracal架构，用多头傅里叶（MHF）模块替代注意力，通过快速傅里叶变换（FFT）实现序列混合，并采用频域因果掩码（非对称填充与截断）实现自回归能力。
contributions: 利用FFT实现O(L log L)复杂度的序列混合，同时解决注意力和位置编码瓶颈。
提出频域因果掩码技术，克服傅里叶生成模型的自回归关键障碍。
使用标准库算子，确保模型可移植性，避免硬件特定实现的部署问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及与Transformer和SSM基线竞争。
limitations: 频域因果掩码可能引入信息泄露或精度损失。
在极长序列或特定任务上可能不如注意力机制灵活。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用傅里叶变换替代注意力机制的长序列建模架构，实现O(L log L)复杂度与因果掩码。

papers.title: An End-to-End Decision-Aware Multi-Scale Attention-Based Model for Explainable Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: The application of computer vision is gradually increasing across various domains. They employ deep learning models with a black-box nature. Without the ability to explain the behavior of neural networks, especially their decision-making processes, it is not possible to recognize their efficiency, predict system failures, or effectively implement them in real-world applications. Due to the inevitable use of deep learning in fully automated driving systems, many methods have been proposed to explain their behavior; however, they suffer from flawed reasoning and unreliable metrics, which have prevented a comprehensive understanding of complex models in autonomous vehicles and hindered the development of truly reliable systems. In this study, we propose a multi-scale attention-based model in which driving decisions are fed into the reasoning component to provide case-specific explanations for each decision simultaneously. For quantitative evaluation of our model's performance, we employ the F1-score metric, and also proposed a new metric called the Joint F1 score to demonstrate the accurate and reliable performance of the model in terms of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI). In addition to the BDD-OIA dataset, the nu-AR dataset is utilized to further validate the generalization capability and robustness of the proposed network. The results demonstrate the superiority of our reasoning network over the classic and state-of-the-art models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种端到端、决策感知的多尺度注意力模型，用于可解释自动驾驶，在BDD-OIA和nu-AR数据集上优于经典和SOTA模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶中深度学习模型的黑箱特性导致无法解释其决策过程，现有可解释方法存在推理缺陷和不可靠指标，阻碍了可靠系统的开发。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可解释的自动驾驶模型，能够同时提供准确的驾驶决策和每个决策的案例特定解释，并具备可靠的定量评估指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有可解释方法存在推理缺陷和不可靠指标，无法全面理解复杂模型。
analysis.method: 提出多尺度注意力模型，将驾驶决策输入推理组件，为每个决策同时生成案例特定解释；并引入新的评估指标Joint F1 score。
contributions: 提出一种端到端、决策感知的多尺度注意力模型，实现可解释自动驾驶。
提出Joint F1 score指标，用于更准确可靠地评估XAI模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在BDD-OIA和nu-AR数据集上评估，使用F1-score和Joint F1 score，结果显示所提推理网络优于经典和SOTA模型。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在极端场景或噪声下的鲁棒性。
可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种端到端、决策感知的多尺度注意力模型，用于可解释自动驾驶，在BDD-OIA和nu-AR数据集上优于经典和SOTA模型。

papers.title: Elimination Templates in Macaulay2
papers.abstract: We introduce the package \texttt{EliminationTemplates} for the Macaulay2 computer algebra system, which provides tools for constructing automatic solvers for families of zero-dimensional radical ideals depending on algebraically independent parameters. This article provides a self-contained description of how elimination templates are constructed for such families and their specialization properties. Additionally, we describe the main functionality and datatypes provided by our package, and illustrate its usage on several examples, including applications from computer vision from which elimination templates originated.

analysis.tldr: 介绍Macaulay2的EliminationTemplates包，用于构建零维根理想族的自动求解器。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机视觉等领域需要高效求解参数化多项式方程组，但现有方法缺乏系统化的自动求解工具。
analysis.problem: 如何为代数无关参数族构建自动化的消元模板求解器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发Macaulay2包EliminationTemplates，提供消元模板的构造、特化性质及数据类型。
contributions: 实现EliminationTemplates包，支持零维根理想族的自动求解器构建。
提供消元模板的构造方法和特化性质的理论描述。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅适用于零维根理想族，可能不适用于一般多项式系统。
依赖Macaulay2环境，可移植性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 介绍Macaulay2的EliminationTemplates包，用于构建零维根理想族的自动求解器。

papers.title: Agentic AI for Trip Planning Optimization Application
papers.abstract: Trip planning for intelligent vehicles increasingly requires selecting optimal routes rather than merely producing feasible itineraries, as interacting factors such as travel time, energy consumption, and traffic conditions directly affect plan quality. Yet existing systems are largely designed for feasibility-oriented planning, and current benchmarks provide only reference answers without ground truth, preventing objective evaluation of optimization performance. In our paper, we address these limitations with an agentic AI framework that enables dynamic refinement through an orchestration agent coordinating specialized agents for traffic, charging, and points of interest, and with the Trip-planning Optimization Problems Dataset, which supplies definitive optimal solutions and category-level task structure for fine-grained analysis. Experiments show that our system achieves 77.4\% accuracy on the TOP Benchmark, significantly outperforming single-agent and workflow-based multi-agent baselines, demonstrating the importance of orchestrated agentic reasoning for robust trip planning optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个智能体AI框架和优化数据集，用于车辆行程规划中的路线优化，在TOP基准上达到77.4%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有行程规划系统主要关注可行性而非最优性，且缺乏带真实最优解的基准，无法客观评估优化性能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现智能车辆行程规划中的路线优化，并建立可客观评估优化性能的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个编排智能体协调多个专业智能体（交通、充电、兴趣点）进行动态优化的框架，并构建包含最优解和类别级任务结构的TOP数据集。
contributions: 提出一个编排智能体框架，通过协调专业智能体实现行程规划的动态优化。
构建Trip-planning Optimization Problems Dataset，提供真实最优解和细粒度任务结构。
analysis.experiments: 在TOP基准上达到77.4%准确率，显著优于单智能体和基于工作流的多智能体基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于车辆行程规划场景，泛化性未验证。
数据集规模或多样性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个智能体AI框架和优化数据集，用于车辆行程规划中的路线优化，在TOP基准上达到77.4%准确率。

papers.title: When Do Diffusion Models learn to Generate Multiple Objects?
papers.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models achieve impressive visual fidelity, yet they remain unreliable in multi-object generation. Despite extensive empirical evidence of these failures, the underlying causes remain unclear. We begin by asking how much of this limitation arises from the data itself. To disentangle data effects, we consider two regimes across different dataset sizes: (1) concept generalization, where each individual concept is observed during training under potentially imbalanced data distributions, and (2) compositional generalization, where specific combinations of concepts are systematically held out. To study these regimes, we introduce mosaic (Multi-Object Spatial relations, AttrIbution, Counting), a controlled framework for dataset generation. By training diffusion models on mosaic, we find that scene complexity plays a dominant role rather than concept imbalance, and that counting is uniquely difficult to learn in low-data regimes. Moreover, compositional generalization collapses as more concept combinations are held out during training. These findings highlight fundamental limitations of diffusion models and motivate stronger inductive biases and data design for robust multi-object compositional generation.

analysis.tldr: 扩散模型在多物体生成中的失败主要源于场景复杂度和组合泛化能力不足，而非概念不平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在多物体生成中不可靠，但失败的根本原因尚不明确，需要系统分析数据效应。
analysis.problem: 探究扩散模型在多物体生成中失败的根本原因，特别是数据分布和组合泛化的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 场景复杂度主导失败，而非概念不平衡；计数在低数据场景下特别难学；组合泛化随训练中概念组合的缺失而崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出Mosaic框架，通过控制数据集生成来分离概念泛化和组合泛化两种数据效应，并在不同数据集规模下训练扩散模型。
contributions: 揭示了场景复杂度而非概念不平衡是扩散模型多物体生成失败的主因
发现计数任务在低数据场景下特别困难，且组合泛化随缺失组合增多而崩溃
analysis.experiments: 在Mosaic框架生成的数据集上训练扩散模型，观察不同数据规模和组合缺失下的生成性能。
limitations: Mosaic框架可能无法完全模拟真实数据分布
仅分析了扩散模型，未涉及其他生成模型
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩散模型在多物体生成中的失败主要源于场景复杂度和组合泛化能力不足，而非概念不平衡。

papers.title: REALM: An RGB and Event Aligned Latent Manifold for Cross-Modal Perception
papers.abstract: Event cameras provide several unique advantages over standard frame-based sensors, including high temporal resolution, low latency, and robustness to extreme lighting. However, existing learning-based approaches for event processing are typically confined to narrow, task-specific silos and lack the ability to generalize across modalities. We address this gap with REALM, a cross-modal framework that learns an RGB and Event Aligned Latent Manifold by projecting event representations into the pretrained latent space of RGB foundation models. Instead of task-specific training, we leverage low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to bridge the modality gap, effectively unlocking the geometric and semantic priors of frozen RGB backbones for asynchronous event streams. We demonstrate that REALM effectively maps events into the ViT-based foundation latent space. Our method allows us to perform downstream tasks like depth estimation and semantic segmentation by simply transferring linear heads trained on the RGB teacher. Most significantly, REALM enables the direct, zero-shot application of complex, frozen image-trained decoders, such as MASt3R, to raw event data. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in wide-baseline feature matching, significantly outperforming specialized architectures. Code and models are available upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: REALM通过LoRA将事件相机数据对齐到RGB基础模型潜空间，实现跨模态零样本迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件相机具有高时间分辨率、低延迟等优势，但现有学习方法局限于特定任务，缺乏跨模态泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将事件相机数据有效映射到预训练RGB基础模型的潜空间，实现跨模态感知和零样本迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用低秩适配（LoRA）将事件表示投影到冻结的RGB基础模型（如ViT）的潜空间，形成对齐的潜流形，然后直接复用RGB任务的头或解码器。
contributions: 提出REALM框架，首次将事件数据对齐到RGB基础模型潜空间，实现跨模态泛化。
在宽基线特征匹配任务上达到SOTA，并展示了零样本迁移到深度估计、语义分割等任务的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在宽基线特征匹配任务上验证，显著优于专用架构；深度估计和语义分割通过线性头迁移实现。
limitations: 依赖预训练RGB基础模型的质量和可用性。
可能对极端事件噪声或低光照场景的鲁棒性未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: REALM通过LoRA将事件相机数据对齐到RGB基础模型潜空间，实现跨模态零样本迁移。

papers.title: Are You the A-hole? A Fair, Multi-Perspective Ethical Reasoning Framework
papers.abstract: Standard methods for aggregating natural language judgments, such as majority voting, often fail to produce logically consistent results when applied to high-conflict domains, treating differing opinions as noise. We propose a neuro-symbolic aggregation framework that formalizes conflict resolution through Weighted Maximum Satisfiability (MaxSAT). Our pipeline utilizes a language model to map unstructured natural language explanations into interpretable logical predicates and confidence weights. These components are then encoded as soft constraints within the Z3 solver, transforming the aggregation problem into an optimization task that seeks the maximum consistency across conflicting testimony. Using the Reddit r/AmItheAsshole forum as a case study in large-scale moral disagreement, our system generates logically coherent verdicts that diverge from popularity-based labels 62% of the time, corroborated by an 86% agreement rate with independent human evaluators. This study demonstrates the efficacy of coupling neural semantic extraction with formal solvers to enforce logical soundness and explainability in the aggregation of noisy human reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号聚合框架，用MaxSAT解决道德判断中的冲突，生成逻辑一致的裁决。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准聚合方法（如多数投票）在高冲突领域（如道德判断）中常产生逻辑不一致的结果，将不同意见视为噪声，缺乏公平性和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然语言解释中提取逻辑约束，并通过优化求解得到逻辑一致且公平的聚合结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数投票在道德争议中常与独立人类评估不一致，摘要显示系统在62%的情况下偏离流行标签，且与人类评估者一致率达86%。
analysis.method: 使用语言模型将自然语言解释映射为逻辑谓词和置信权重，然后编码为Z3求解器中的软约束，通过加权最大可满足性（MaxSAT）求解最优一致裁决。
contributions: 提出神经符号聚合框架，结合LLM语义提取和形式化求解器，实现逻辑一致的多视角道德推理。
在Reddit r/AmItheAsshole数据集上验证，系统生成逻辑连贯的裁决，与人类评估者一致率达86%。
analysis.experiments: 在Reddit r/AmItheAsshole论坛数据上测试，系统输出与多数投票标签62%不同，与独立人类评估者一致率86%。
limitations: 依赖语言模型提取逻辑谓词的准确性，可能引入误差。
仅在一个特定论坛数据集上验证，泛化性有待检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号聚合框架，用MaxSAT解决道德判断中的冲突，生成逻辑一致的裁决。

papers.title: Jailbroken Frontier Models Retain Their Capabilities
papers.abstract: As language model safeguards become more robust, attackers are pushed toward developing increasingly complex jailbreaks. Prior work has found that this complexity imposes a "jailbreak tax" that degrades the target model's task performance. We show that this tax scales inversely with model capability and that the most advanced jailbreaks effectively yield no reduction in model capabilities. Evaluating 28 jailbreaks on five benchmarks across Claude models ranging in capability from Haiku 4.5 to Opus 4.6, we find Haiku 4.5 loses an average of 33.1% on benchmark performance when jailbroken, while Opus 4.6 at max thinking effort loses only 7.7%. We also observe that across all models, reasoning-heavy tasks display considerably more degradation than knowledge-recall tasks. Finally, Boundary Point Jailbreaking, currently the strongest jailbreak against deployed classifiers, achieves near-perfect classifier evasion with near-zero degradation across safeguarded models. We recommend that safety cases for frontier models should not rely on a meaningful capability degradation from jailbreaks.

analysis.tldr: 越狱攻击对前沿模型的能力影响随模型能力增强而减小，最强越狱几乎不降低模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着语言模型安全防护的增强，攻击者开发出越来越复杂的越狱方法，但先前工作认为这种复杂性会带来“越狱税”降低模型任务性能，这一假设需要重新验证。
analysis.problem: 评估越狱攻击对前沿模型实际能力的影响，特别是复杂越狱是否真的会显著降低模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 越狱税与模型能力成反比：弱模型（Haiku 4.5）在越狱后平均损失33.1%的基准性能，而强模型（Opus 4.6）仅损失7.7%；推理密集型任务比知识回忆任务退化更明显；最强越狱（Boundary Point Jailbreaking）几乎零退化地绕过分类器。
analysis.method: 在5个基准上评估28种越狱方法对Claude模型（Haiku 4.5到Opus 4.6）的影响，分析越狱后模型性能变化。
contributions: 发现越狱税与模型能力成反比，最强越狱几乎不降低模型能力。
揭示推理任务比知识回忆任务在越狱后退化更显著。
建议前沿模型的安全案例不应依赖越狱导致的能力退化。
analysis.experiments: 在5个基准上评估28种越狱方法，覆盖Claude模型系列（Haiku 4.5到Opus 4.6），包括推理和知识回忆任务。
limitations: 仅评估Claude模型，可能不适用于其他架构。
未探讨越狱后模型在真实世界场景中的行为。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 越狱攻击对前沿模型的能力影响随模型能力增强而减小，最强越狱几乎不降低模型性能。

papers.title: Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Chartered Accountancy
papers.abstract: The inception of Large Language Models (LLMs) has catalyzed AI adoption in the finance sector, yet their reliability in complex, jurisdiction-specific tasks like Indian Chartered Accountancy (CA) remains limited. The models display difficulty in executing numerical tasks which require multiple steps while also needing advanced knowledge about legal regulations and the method of scaling their operations is not feasible in settings which have limited access to resources. We present CA-ThinkFlow as a parameter-efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework which operates with a 14B, 4-bit-quantized reasoning model, 14B-DeepSeek-R1, and a layout-aware Docling extraction system which maintains document structure during extraction. CA-ThinkFlow uses a basic RAG method which automatically adds retrieved information into the prompt, while it depends on the model's built-in Chain-of-Thought (CoT) functions to create context and produce correct answers. The system we developed system operates at performance levels which match large proprietary models when we tested it on the multi-level CA-Ben benchmark, achieving Scholastic Reliability Coefficient (SRC) results which equal 68.75\% of GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. The framework shows high efficiency and strength in handling parameters, but essential reasoning abilities fail to process complex regulatory texts which exist in fields such as Taxation.

analysis.tldr: 提出CA-ThinkFlow框架，通过检索增强生成和量化推理模型提升印度特许会计师任务的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在金融领域应用广泛，但在处理印度特许会计师这类复杂、司法管辖特定的任务时，可靠性不足，尤其在多步数值计算、法律知识整合和资源受限场景下表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在印度特许会计师任务中执行多步数值计算、依赖高级法规知识以及资源受限环境下的可扩展性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型在复杂数值任务中表现困难，需要多步推理和法规知识，且大规模部署在资源受限环境中不可行。
analysis.method: 提出CA-ThinkFlow框架，采用参数高效的检索增强生成方法，结合14B 4-bit量化推理模型（14B-DeepSeek-R1）和布局感知的Docling文档提取系统，通过基础RAG自动将检索信息注入提示，并依赖模型内置的思维链功能生成答案。
contributions: 提出CA-ThinkFlow，一个针对印度特许会计师任务的参数高效RAG框架。
在CA-Ben基准上达到与GPT-4o和Claude 3.5 Sonnet相当的68.75%的学术可靠性系数。
analysis.experiments: 在CA-Ben基准上测试，与GPT-4o和Claude 3.5 Sonnet比较，SRC达到68.75%。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 在处理税务等领域的复杂监管文本时，基本推理能力不足。
仅针对印度特许会计师任务，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CA-ThinkFlow框架，通过检索增强生成和量化推理模型提升印度特许会计师任务的性能。

papers.title: Remote SAMsing: From Segment Anything to Segment Everything
papers.abstract: SAM2 produces high-quality zero-shot segmentation on natural images, but applying it to large remote sensing scenes exposes two problems: (1) its mask generator faces an inherent quality-coverage trade-off: strict thresholds yield precise masks but leave most of the image unsegmented, while relaxed thresholds increase coverage at the cost of mask quality; and (2) large images must be tiled, fragmenting objects across tile boundaries. We propose Remote SAMsing, an open-source pipeline that solves both problems without modifying SAM2 or requiring training data. For coverage, a multi-pass algorithm runs SAM2 repeatedly on each tile, painting accepted masks black between passes to simplify the scene for the next iteration, and relaxing quality thresholds only when coverage gains stagnate, ensuring that the most precise masks are always captured first. For spatial consistency, contextual padding and a parameter-free best-match merge reconstruct objects fragmented across tile boundaries. Evaluated on seven scenes (5~cm to 4.78~m GSD), the pipeline raises coverage from 30--68\% (single-pass SAM2) to 91--98\%. Ablation experiments quantify the contribution of each component to coverage and detection quality. Per-class evaluation shows that SAM2 transfers well to discrete RS objects (buildings 95\%, cars 82--93\% Det@0.5) with segment boundaries 3--8$\times$ more precise than SLIC and Felzenszwalb baselines. Tile size functions as an implicit scale parameter: reducing it from $1{,}000$ to 250 raises Det@0.5 from 56\% to 85\%, outperforming SAM2's built-in multi-scale mechanism. The pipeline generalizes to MNF false-color imagery without retraining (99.5\% ASA) and scales to production-sized images: a 1.94 billion pixel Potsdam mosaic achieved 97\% coverage without quality degradation.

analysis.tldr: 提出Remote SAMsing流水线，通过多轮涂黑和上下文填充合并，将SAM2在遥感大图上的分割覆盖率从30-68%提升至91-98%。
analysis.research_motivation: SAM2在自然图像上表现优异，但直接应用于大尺度遥感场景时存在质量-覆盖权衡和跨瓦片对象碎片化问题，限制了其实际部署。
analysis.problem: 解决SAM2在遥感大图上因质量-覆盖权衡和瓦片边界碎片化导致的分割覆盖率低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：严格阈值产生精确掩码但覆盖率低，宽松阈值增加覆盖率却降低质量；大图必须分块导致对象被截断。
analysis.method: 多轮涂黑算法：每轮用SAM2分割当前瓦片，将接受掩码涂黑后进入下一轮，仅当覆盖率增长停滞时放松质量阈值；上下文填充和最佳匹配合并修复跨瓦片碎片。
contributions: 提出无需修改SAM2或训练数据的开源流水线，解决遥感大图分割的覆盖率和碎片问题
在7个场景（5cm-4.78m GSD）上将覆盖率从30-68%提升至91-98%，并量化各组件贡献
analysis.experiments: 在7个遥感场景（5cm-4.78m GSD）上评估，覆盖率从30-68%提升至91-98%；消融实验量化各组件贡献；类别级评估显示建筑95% Det@0.5，汽车82-93% Det@0.5；边界精度比SLIC和Felzenszwalb高3-8倍；瓦片大小作为隐式尺度参数，从1000降至250时Det@0.5从56%升至85%；泛化至MNF假彩色图像（99.5% ASA）；处理19.4亿像素Potsdam拼接图达97%覆盖率。
limitations: 依赖SAM2的零样本能力，对极端异质场景可能仍需微调
多轮算法可能增加计算开销，实时性未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Remote SAMsing流水线，通过多轮涂黑和上下文填充合并，将SAM2在遥感大图上的分割覆盖率从30-68%提升至91-98%。

papers.title: Rethinking Network Topologies for Cost-Effective Mixture-of-Experts LLM Serving
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures have turned LLM serving into a cluster-scale workload in which communication consumes a considerable portion of LLM serving runtime. This has prompted industry to invest heavily in expensive high-bandwidth scale-up networks. We question whether such costly infrastructure is strictly necessary. We present the first systematic cross-layer analysis of network cost-effectiveness for MoE LLM serving, comparing four representative XPU (e.g., GPU/TPU) topologies (scale-up, scale-out, 3D torus, and 3D full-mesh). We find that lower-cost switchless topologies are more cost-effective than the scale-up topology across all serving scenarios explored, improving cost-effectiveness by 20.6-56.2%. In particular, the 3D full-mesh topology is Pareto-optimal in terms of the performance-cost tradeoff. We also find that current scale-up link bandwidths are over-provisioned: reducing the link bandwidth improves throughput per cost by up to 27%. A forward-looking analysis of upcoming GPU generations indicates that the cost-performance advantage of switchless networks will likely persist.

analysis.tldr: MoE大模型推理中，低成本无交换机拓扑比昂贵的高带宽scale-up网络更具成本效益。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE架构使LLM推理成为集群级工作负载，通信开销巨大，促使业界投资昂贵的高带宽scale-up网络，但这类基础设施是否必要尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估不同网络拓扑在MoE LLM推理中的成本效益，并探索是否可以用低成本拓扑替代昂贵的scale-up网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现当前scale-up链路带宽过度配置，降低带宽可提升每成本吞吐量达27%；3D full-mesh拓扑在性能-成本权衡中帕累托最优。
analysis.method: 对四种代表性XPU拓扑（scale-up、scale-out、3D torus、3D full-mesh）进行系统性的跨层成本效益分析。
contributions: 首次对MoE LLM推理进行网络成本效益的跨层系统分析。
发现低成本无交换机拓扑在所有场景下成本效益优于scale-up拓扑，提升20.6-56.2%。
揭示当前scale-up链路带宽过度配置，降低带宽可提升吞吐量/成本。
前瞻分析表明无交换机网络的成本优势在未来GPU代际中可能持续。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了成本效益提升百分比和带宽降低带来的吞吐量提升。
limitations: 分析可能基于特定MoE模型和硬件配置，泛化性需验证。
未考虑实际部署中的其他因素如可靠性、可维护性等。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoE大模型推理中，低成本无交换机拓扑比昂贵的高带宽scale-up网络更具成本效益。

papers.title: CellxPert: Inference-Time MCMC Steering of a Multi-Omics Single-Cell Foundation Model for In-Silico Perturbation
papers.abstract: In this work, we introduce CellxPert, a scalable multimodal foundation model that unifies single-cell and spatial multi-omics within a common representation space. CellxPert jointly encodes transcriptomic (scRNA-seq), chromatin-accessibility (ATAC-seq), and surface-proteomic (CITE-seq) measurements, while directly incorporating MERFISH and imaging mass-cytometry data as 2D or 3D spatial-visual layers. CellxPert facilitates four key downstream tasks out of the box: (i) cell-type annotation across a broad ontology of 154 largely overlapping identities -- the largest label space addressed to date and a stringent test of fine-grained discrimination, (ii) efficient fine-tuning using Low Rank Adaptation (LoRA), (iii) genome-wide transcriptomic response prediction to in-silico perturbations (ISP), and (iv) seamless multi-omic integration across various assays and platforms. Unlike current single-cell foundation models, which approximate gene perturbations by deleting or reordering tokenized gene expression ranks, CellxPert employs a Metropolis-Hastings sampler whose proposal kernel uses the model's masked conditional distributions to transition to new transcriptomic states conditioned on the perturbed genes. This Markov-chain procedure mitigates out-of-distribution artifacts introduced by abrupt token manipulation and produces trajectories that are biologically interpretable. Evaluations on PBMC68K, Replogle Perturb-seq, Systema, and BMMC benchmarks show that CellxPert surpasses classical and state-of-the-art baselines in cell-type annotation, perturbation response prediction, and multi-omic integration.

analysis.tldr: CellxPert 是一个多模态单细胞基础模型，通过 MCMC 采样实现生物上可解释的基因扰动预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单细胞基础模型通过直接删除或重排基因表达 token 来模拟基因扰动，容易产生分布外伪影，且缺乏生物可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入分布外伪影的前提下，对单细胞数据进行准确的基因扰动响应预测和多模态整合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建统一多模态单细胞基础模型，使用 Metropolis-Hastings 采样器，其提议核利用模型的掩码条件分布，在扰动基因条件下过渡到新的转录组状态，形成马尔可夫链轨迹。
contributions: 提出 CellxPert，一个可扩展的多模态单细胞基础模型，统一了多种单细胞和空间组学数据。
引入基于 MCMC 的推理时扰动方法，避免了直接 token 操作导致的分布外伪影，生成生物可解释的轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在 PBMC68K、Replogle Perturb-seq、Systema 和 BMMC 基准上，CellxPert 在细胞类型注释、扰动响应预测和多组学整合方面超越了经典和最新基线。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模高质量多组学数据，数据稀缺时性能受限。
MCMC 采样计算开销较大，可能影响推理效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CellxPert 是一个多模态单细胞基础模型，通过 MCMC 采样实现生物上可解释的基因扰动预测。

papers.title: Information-geometric adaptive sampling for graph diffusion
papers.abstract: Standard diffusion models for graph generation typically rely on uniform time-stepping, an approach that overlooks the non-homogeneous dynamics of distributional evolution on complex manifolds. In this paper, we present an information-geometric framework that reinterprets the diffusion sampling trajectory as a parametric curve on a Riemannian manifold. Our key observation is that the Fisher-Rao metric provides a principled measure of the intrinsic distance. By analyzing this metric, we derive the Drift Variation Score (DVS), a geometry-aware indicator that quantifies the instantaneous rate of distributional change. Unlike prior heuristic-based adaptive samplers, our DVS solver enforces a constant informational speed on the statistical manifold, automatically maintaining a uniform rate of distributional change along the sampling trajectory. This equal arc-length strategy ensures that each discretization step contributes equally to the information speed. Theoretical analysis verifies that DVS characterizes the local stiffness of the sampling dynamics in the Fisher-Rao sense. Experimental results on molecule and social network generation show that DVS significantly improves structural fidelity and sampling efficiency. Code is at https://github.com/kunzhan/DVS

analysis.tldr: 提出信息几何自适应采样方法DVS，通过Fisher-Rao度量保持恒定信息速度，提升图扩散模型采样效率与结构保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准图扩散模型使用均匀时间步长，忽略了复杂流形上分布演化的非均匀动力学，导致采样效率低、结构保真度不足。
analysis.problem: 图扩散模型中采样步长固定，无法适应分布变化速率，需要一种几何感知的自适应采样策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Fisher-Rao度量可量化分布演化的内在距离，均匀步长会导致信息速度变化，而恒定信息速度策略能更均匀地贡献每一步。
analysis.method: 基于信息几何框架，将扩散采样轨迹视为黎曼流形上的参数曲线，利用Fisher-Rao度量推导Drift Variation Score (DVS)，实现恒定信息速度的自适应采样。
contributions: 提出信息几何视角重新解释扩散采样轨迹，并推导出几何感知指标DVS。
设计等弧长采样策略，自动保持均匀分布变化速率，提升采样效率与结构保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在分子和社交网络生成任务上实验，DVS显著提升了结构保真度和采样效率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于图扩散模型，对其他模态的扩散模型适用性未知。
计算Fisher-Rao度量可能带来额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出信息几何自适应采样方法DVS，通过Fisher-Rao度量保持恒定信息速度，提升图扩散模型采样效率与结构保真度。

papers.title: Causal Foundations of Collective Agency
papers.abstract: A key challenge for the safety of advanced AI systems is the possibility that multiple simpler agents might inadvertently form a collective agent with capabilities and goals distinct from those of any individual. More generally, determining when a group of agents can be viewed as a unified collective agent is a foundational question in the study of interactions and incentives in both biological and artificial systems. We adopt a behavioral perspective in answering this question, ascribing collective agency to a group when viewing the group's joint actions as rational and goal-directed successfully predicts its behavior. We formalize this perspective on collective agency using causal games -- which are causal models of strategic, multi-agent interactions -- and causal abstraction -- which formalizes when a simple, high-level model faithfully captures a more complex, low-level model. We use this framework to solve a puzzle regarding multi-agent incentives in actor-critic models and to make quantitative assessments of the degree of collective agency exhibited by different voting mechanisms. Our framework aims to provide a foundation for theoretical and empirical work to understand, predict, and control emergent collective agents in multi-agent AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 用因果博弈和因果抽象为集体能动性提供形式化基础，并用于分析多智能体激励和投票机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 高级AI系统中多个简单智能体可能无意中形成具有不同能力和目标的集体智能体，这对安全性构成挑战；理解何时一组智能体可被视为统一集体智能体是生物和人工系统中交互与激励的基础问题。
analysis.problem: 如何从行为视角形式化定义和量化集体能动性，即何时一组智能体的联合行动可被视为理性且目标导向的。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用因果博弈（因果模型化的策略多智能体交互）和因果抽象（形式化高层模型是否忠实捕捉低层模型）来形式化集体能动性。
contributions: 提出基于因果博弈和因果抽象的集体能动性形式化框架。
用该框架解决演员-评论家模型中多智能体激励的谜题，并量化不同投票机制的集体能动性程度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能依赖于因果模型的准确构建，实际中可能难以获得。
对集体能动性的量化可能仅适用于特定类型的交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用因果博弈和因果抽象为集体能动性提供形式化基础，并用于分析多智能体激励和投票机制。

papers.title: ARMOR 2025: A Military-Aligned Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Model Safety Beyond Civilian Contexts
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are now being explored for defense applications that require reliable and legally compliant decision support. They also hold significant potential to enhance decision making, coordination, and operational efficiency in military contexts. These uses demand evaluation methods that reflect the doctrinal standards that guide real military operations. Existing safety benchmarks focus on general social risks and do not test whether models follow the legal and ethical rules that govern real military operations. To address this gap, we introduce ARMOR 2025, a military aligned safety benchmark grounded in three core military doctrines the Law of War, the Rules of Engagement, and the Joint Ethics Regulation. We extract doctrinal text from these sources and generate multiple choice questions that preserve the intended meaning of each rule. The benchmark is organized through a taxonomy informed by the Observe Orient Decide Act (OODA) decision making framework. This structure enables systematic testing of accuracy and refusal across military relevant decision types. This benchmark features a structured 12-category taxonomy, 519 doctrinally grounded prompts, and rigorous evaluation procedures applied to 21 commercial LLMs. Evaluation results reveal critical gaps in safety alignment for military applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向军事场景的LLM安全基准ARMOR 2025，揭示现有模型在军事法律与伦理合规方面的严重缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM正被探索用于国防决策支持，但现有安全基准仅覆盖通用社会风险，无法评估模型是否遵循军事行动中的法律与伦理规则。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个基于军事教义（战争法、交战规则、联合伦理条例）的LLM安全评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从三大军事教义中提取文本，生成多项选择题，并基于OODA决策框架构建12类分类体系，对21个商用LLM进行准确性和拒绝率评估。
contributions: 提出首个军事对齐的安全基准ARMOR 2025，包含519个教义驱动的问题和12类分类体系。
系统评估21个商用LLM，揭示其在军事应用中的安全对齐关键缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 对21个商用LLM进行准确性和拒绝率评估，发现军事安全对齐存在关键缺陷。
limitations: 基准仅基于美国军事教义，可能不适用于其他国家或国际联合行动。
多项选择题形式可能无法完全模拟真实军事决策的复杂性和动态性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向军事场景的LLM安全基准ARMOR 2025，揭示现有模型在军事法律与伦理合规方面的严重缺陷。

papers.title: Lucid-XR: An Extended-Reality Data Engine for Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract: We introduce Lucid-XR, a generative data engine for creating diverse and realistic-looking multi-modal data to train real-world robotic systems. At the core of Lucid-XR is vuer, a web-based physics simulation environment that runs directly on the XR headset, enabling internet-scale access to immersive, latency-free virtual interactions without requiring specialized equipment. The complete system integrates on-device physics simulation with human-to-robot pose retargeting. Data collected is further amplified by a physics-guided video generation pipeline steerable via natural language specifications. We demonstrate zero-shot transfer of robot visual policies to unseen, cluttered, and badly lit evaluation environments, after training entirely on Lucid-XR's synthetic data. We include examples across dexterous manipulation tasks that involve soft materials, loosely bound particles, and rigid body contact. Project website: https://lucidxr.github.io

analysis.tldr: Lucid-XR 是一个基于 XR 头显的生成式数据引擎，通过物理仿真和视频生成管道为机器人操作任务生成多样化多模态数据，实现零样本策略迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实机器人训练需要大量多样化数据，但收集真实数据成本高、风险大，现有仿真数据缺乏真实感和多样性，且难以覆盖复杂场景。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成逼真且多样化的多模态数据，以支持机器人操作策略的零样本迁移到真实环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Lucid-XR 系统，包含基于 XR 头显的 web 物理仿真环境 vuer，集成人体到机器人姿态重定向，并通过自然语言引导的物理感知视频生成管道增强数据。
contributions: 提出 Lucid-XR，一个基于 XR 头显的生成式数据引擎，支持互联网级访问和沉浸式交互。
集成物理仿真、姿态重定向和视频生成，实现零样本策略迁移到未见过的杂乱和光照不良环境。
analysis.experiments: 在涉及软材料、松散颗粒和刚体接触的灵巧操作任务上展示了零样本迁移效果，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 XR 头显硬件，普及性受限。
视频生成管道的真实感和多样性可能仍有局限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Lucid-XR 是一个基于 XR 头显的生成式数据引擎，通过物理仿真和视频生成管道为机器人操作任务生成多样化多模态数据，实现零样本策略迁移。

papers.title: MAEPose: Self-Supervised Spatiotemporal Learning for Human Pose Estimation on mmWave Video
papers.abstract: Millimetre-wave (mmWave) radar offers a more privacy-preserving alternative to RGB-based human pose estimation. However, existing methods typically rely on pre-extracted intermediate representations such as sparse point clouds or spectrogram images, where the rich spatiotemporal information naturally present in radar video streams is discarded for model learning, while such signal processing adds system complexity. In addition, existing solutions are mainly conducted in an end-to-end supervised manner without leveraging unlabelled raw video streams to learn generalized representations. In this study, we present MAEPose, a masked autoencoding-based human pose estimation approach that operates directly on mmWave spectrogram videos. MAEPose learns spatiotemporal motion-aware generalized representations from unlabelled radar video, and leverages its heatmap decoder for multi-frame pose estimation predictions. We evaluate it across three datasets based on leave-one-person-out cross-validation with rigorous statistical testing. MAEPose consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 22.1% in MPJPE p<0.05, and maintains robust accuracy under zero-shot bystander interference with only a 6.5% error increase. Ablation studies confirm that both the pre-training and the heatmap decoder contribute substantially, while modality analysis indicates that leveraging Range-Doppler video as input achieves better pose estimation performance than Range-Azimuth or their fusion, with lower computational cost.

analysis.tldr: MAEPose 提出基于掩码自编码器的自监督时空学习框架，直接在毫米波雷达频谱视频上进行人体姿态估计，无需中间表示提取，性能显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 毫米波雷达相比 RGB 摄像头更具隐私保护性，但现有方法依赖预提取的稀疏点云或频谱图等中间表示，丢弃了雷达视频流中丰富的时空信息，且需要端到端监督学习，无法利用未标注数据。
analysis.problem: 如何直接从毫米波雷达频谱视频中学习时空运动感知的通用表征，实现高效且鲁棒的人体姿态估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MAEPose，采用掩码自编码器（MAE）直接在雷达频谱视频上进行自监督预训练，学习时空运动感知表征，并通过热图解码器进行多帧姿态估计。
contributions: 首次提出直接在毫米波雷达频谱视频上进行掩码自编码自监督学习的人体姿态估计方法，无需中间表示提取。
在三个数据集上通过留一人交叉验证，MAEPose 在 MPJPE 指标上比现有最优方法提升高达 22.1%，且零样本干扰下误差仅增加 6.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集上采用留一人交叉验证和严格统计检验，与多个基线比较，并进行了消融研究和模态分析。
limitations: 可能对雷达硬件参数或场景变化敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
自监督预训练的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MAEPose 提出基于掩码自编码器的自监督时空学习框架，直接在毫米波雷达频谱视频上进行人体姿态估计，无需中间表示提取，性能显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: Attention Is Where You Attack
papers.abstract: Safety-aligned large language models rely on RLHF and instruction tuning to refuse harmful requests, yet the internal mechanisms implementing safety behavior remain poorly understood. We introduce the Attention Redistribution Attack (ARA), a white-box adversarial attack that identifies safety-critical attention heads and crafts nonsemantic adversarial tokens that redirect attention away from safety-relevant positions. Unlike prior jailbreak methods operating at the semantic or output-logit level, ARA targets the geometry of softmax attention on the probability simplex using Gumbel-softmax optimization over targeted heads. Across LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct, Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1, and Gemma-2-9B-it, ARA bypasses safety alignment with as few as 5 tokens and 500 optimization steps, achieving 36% ASR on Mistral-7B and 30% on LLaMA-3 against 200 HarmBench prompts, while Gemma-2 remains at 1%. Our principal mechanistic finding is a dissociation between ablation and redistribution: zeroing out the top-ranked safety heads produces at most 1 flip among 39 to 50 baseline refusals, while ARA targeting the corresponding safety-heavy layers flips 72/200 prompts on Mistral-7B and 60/200 on LLaMA-3. This suggests that safety is not localized in these heads as removable components, but emerges from the attention routing they perform. Removing a head allows compensation through the residual stream, while redirecting its attention propagates a corrupted signal downstream.

analysis.tldr: 通过重定向安全注意力头实现高效越狱攻击，揭示安全行为源于注意力路由而非局部头。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全对齐的LLM虽能拒绝有害请求，但其内部安全机制尚不明确，现有越狱方法多基于语义或输出logit层面，缺乏对注意力几何结构的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何通过操纵注意力分布绕过LLM的安全对齐，并揭示安全行为的内部机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融安全头几乎不影响拒绝行为（最多1次翻转），而重定向其注意力可大幅翻转拒绝（72/200），表明安全行为源于注意力路由而非局部头。
analysis.method: 提出注意力重分布攻击（ARA），识别安全关键注意力头，使用Gumbel-softmax优化生成非语义对抗token，将注意力从安全相关位置重定向。
contributions: 提出一种针对注意力几何结构的白盒对抗攻击方法ARA，仅需5个token和500步优化即可绕过安全对齐。
通过消融与重定向的对比实验，揭示安全行为源于注意力路由而非局部头的新机制。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct、Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1和Gemma-2-9B-it上测试，使用200个HarmBench提示，Mistral-7B ASR达36%，LLaMA-3达30%，Gemma-2仅1%。
limitations: 仅针对白盒场景，黑盒或闭源模型可能不适用。
Gemma-2鲁棒性高，攻击效果有限，方法泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过重定向安全注意力头实现高效越狱攻击，揭示安全行为源于注意力路由而非局部头。

papers.title: Adaptive Geodesic Conformal Prediction for Egocentric Camera Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Egocentric pose estimation for Augmented Reality (AR) and assistive devices requires not just accurate predictions but guaranteed uncertainty regions. Conformal prediction (CP) provides such guarantees without retraining, but we show that standard CP with a single fixed threshold achieves nominal 90% overall coverage while covering only ~60% of the hardest 25% of frames (Q4) -- a ~30 percentage-point conditional coverage gap consistent across 12 participants, 3 predictors, and 3 horizons (108 evaluations) on EPIC-Fields. We further show that a geodesic SE(3) nonconformity score identifies physically harder frames than Euclidean scoring, with only 15-26% Q4 overlap and 2-3x higher ground-truth camera displacement for geodesic Q4 frames. To close the coverage gap, we propose DINOv2-Bridge adaptive CP: a two-stage difficulty estimator trained on a single source participant that transfers cross-participant without any images at test time, improving Q4 coverage from ~0.75 to ~0.93 while maintaining overall coverage at the 90% target.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应测地线共形预测方法，缩小了自我中心相机位姿估计中条件覆盖差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 增强现实和辅助设备中的自我中心位姿估计不仅需要准确预测，还需要保证不确定性区域，但标准共形预测存在条件覆盖差距，对困难帧覆盖不足。
analysis.problem: 标准共形预测在自我中心相机位姿估计中，对困难帧（Q4）的覆盖比例远低于整体覆盖目标，存在约30个百分点的条件覆盖差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准共形预测在EPIC-Fields数据集上，12名参与者、3个预测器和3个时间范围（共108次评估）中，整体覆盖率达到90%时，最困难的25%帧（Q4）仅覆盖约60%，条件覆盖差距约30个百分点。测地线SE(3)非一致性分数比欧氏分数更能识别物理上更困难的帧，Q4重叠仅15-26%，且测地线Q4帧的真实相机位移高出2-3倍。
analysis.method: 提出DINOv2-Bridge自适应共形预测：一个两阶段难度估计器，在单个源参与者上训练，无需测试时图像即可跨参与者迁移，动态调整阈值以缩小条件覆盖差距。
contributions: 揭示了标准共形预测在自我中心位姿估计中的条件覆盖差距问题，并进行了系统评估。
提出测地线SE(3)非一致性分数，比欧氏分数更能识别困难帧。
提出DINOv2-Bridge自适应共形预测方法，无需测试图像即可跨参与者迁移，将Q4覆盖率从约0.75提升至约0.93，同时保持整体覆盖率在90%目标。
analysis.experiments: 在EPIC-Fields数据集上进行了实验，涉及12名参与者、3个预测器和3个时间范围，共108次评估。摘要未提供具体实验结果细节。
limitations: 方法在单个源参与者上训练，可能对源参与者的代表性敏感。
未讨论在更广泛场景或不同传感器设置下的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应测地线共形预测方法，缩小了自我中心相机位姿估计中条件覆盖差距。

papers.title: Why Do LLMs Struggle in Strategic Play? Broken Links Between Observations, Beliefs, and Actions
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly tasked with strategic decision-making under incomplete information, such as in negotiation and policymaking. While LLMs can excel at many such tasks, they also fail in ways that are poorly understood. We shed light on these failures by uncovering two fundamental gaps in the internal mechanisms underlying the decision-making of LLMs in incomplete-information games, supported by experiments with open-weight models Llama 3.1, Qwen3, and gpt-oss. First, an observation-belief gap: LLMs encode internal beliefs about latent game states that are substantially more accurate than their own verbal reports, yet these beliefs are brittle. In particular, the belief accuracy degrades with multi-hop reasoning, exhibits primacy and recency biases, and drifts away from Bayesian coherence over extended interactions. Second, a belief-action gap: The implicit conversion of internal beliefs into actions is weaker than that of the beliefs externalized in the prompt, yet neither belief-conditioning consistently achieves higher game payoffs. These results show how analyzing LLMs' internal processes can expose systematic vulnerabilities that warrant caution before deploying LLMs in strategic domains without robust guardrails.

analysis.tldr: LLM在战略博弈中表现不佳，源于内部信念与观察、行动之间的断裂。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被用于不完全信息下的战略决策（如谈判、政策制定），但失败原因尚不明确，需要深入理解其内部机制缺陷。
analysis.problem: 揭示LLM在不完全信息博弈中决策失败的根本原因，即观察-信念和信念-行动两个关键环节的断裂。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现两个关键断裂：1）观察-信念断裂：LLM内部编码的信念比口头报告更准确，但脆弱，随多跳推理退化，存在首因/近因偏差，偏离贝叶斯一致性；2）信念-行动断裂：内部信念到行动的转换弱于提示中外部化信念，但两者均不能稳定获得更高收益。
analysis.method: 通过分析开源LLM（Llama 3.1, Qwen3, gpt-oss）在不完全信息博弈中的内部表征，对比内部信念与口头报告、行动之间的差异。
contributions: 首次系统揭示LLM在战略博弈中观察-信念和信念-行动两个断裂机制。
通过内部表征分析暴露LLM决策的系统性脆弱性，为安全部署提供警示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于开源模型，可能不适用于闭源模型。
博弈类型有限，未覆盖所有战略场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在战略博弈中表现不佳，源于内部信念与观察、行动之间的断裂。

papers.title: TUR-DPO: Topology- and Uncertainty-Aware Direct Preference Optimization
papers.abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences is commonly done via reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) or, more simply, via Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). While DPO is stable and RL-free, it treats preferences as flat winner vs. loser signals and is sensitive to noisy or brittle preferences arising from fragile chains of thought. We propose TUR-DPO, a topology- and uncertainty-aware variant of DPO that rewards how answers are derived, not only what they say, by eliciting lightweight reasoning topologies and combining semantic faithfulness, utility, and topology quality into a calibrated uncertainty signal. A small learnable reward is factorized over these signals and incorporated into an uncertainty-weighted DPO objective that remains RL-free and relies only on a fixed or moving reference policy. Empirically, across open 7-8B models and benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, factual question answering, summarization, and helpful/harmless dialogue, TUR-DPO improves judge win-rates, faithfulness, and calibration relative to DPO while preserving training simplicity and avoiding online rollouts. We further observe consistent gains in multimodal and long-context settings, and show that TUR-DPO matches or exceeds PPO on reasoning-centric tasks while maintaining operational simplicity.

analysis.tldr: TUR-DPO通过拓扑感知和不确定性加权改进DPO，提升LLM对齐的鲁棒性和推理质量。
analysis.research_motivation: DPO将偏好视为扁平胜负信号，对噪声和脆弱推理链敏感，需要更鲁棒的对齐方法。
analysis.problem: 如何改进DPO以利用推理拓扑结构并处理偏好噪声，实现更鲁棒的对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DPO忽略推理过程，偏好信号易受噪声和脆弱思维链影响。
analysis.method: 提出TUR-DPO，引入轻量推理拓扑，结合语义忠实性、效用和拓扑质量校准不确定性，并分解为可学习奖励，融入不确定性加权的DPO目标。
contributions: 提出拓扑和不确定性感知的DPO变体TUR-DPO，利用推理拓扑结构。
通过不确定性加权和分解奖励提升对齐鲁棒性，无需在线采样。
analysis.experiments: 在7-8B模型上，涵盖数学推理、事实问答、摘要和对话基准，TUR-DPO相比DPO提升胜率、忠实性和校准，在多模态和长上下文场景也有效。
limitations: 依赖轻量推理拓扑的获取质量。
未在更大规模模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TUR-DPO通过拓扑感知和不确定性加权改进DPO，提升LLM对齐的鲁棒性和推理质量。

papers.title: VkSplat: High-Performance 3DGS Training in Vulkan Compute
papers.abstract: We present VkSplat, a high-performance, cross-vendor 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) training pipeline implemented fully in Vulkan compute, addressing performance and compatibility limitation of existing training pipelines. With various optimizations, we achieve $3.3\times$ speed and $33\%$ VRAM reduction over CUDA+PyTorch baseline, maintaining quality, and demonstrating compatibility across GPU vendors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first fully-Vulkan-based 3DGS training pipeline that achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code: \href{https://github.com/harry7557558/vksplat}{https://github.com/harry7557558/vksplat}

analysis.tldr: VkSplat 是首个完全基于 Vulkan Compute 的高性能 3DGS 训练管线，相比 CUDA+PyTorch 基线实现 3.3 倍加速和 33% 显存节省。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3DGS 训练管线依赖 CUDA+PyTorch，存在跨厂商兼容性差和性能瓶颈，限制了其在多种 GPU 上的部署和效率。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个跨平台、高性能的 3DGS 训练管线，以克服 CUDA 生态的兼容性限制并提升训练速度与显存效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 完全基于 Vulkan Compute 实现 3DGS 训练管线，并采用多种优化策略（如内存管理、计算调度等）提升性能。
contributions: 首个完全基于 Vulkan Compute 的 3DGS 训练管线，实现跨厂商兼容性。
通过优化实现 3.3 倍训练加速和 33% 显存降低，同时保持渲染质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 GPU 上测试了训练速度和显存占用，与 CUDA+PyTorch 基线对比，未提供具体数据集或质量指标细节。
limitations: 可能仅针对 3DGS 训练场景，未验证在其他 3D 表示上的泛化性。
Vulkan 生态的调试和工具链可能不如 CUDA 成熟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VkSplat 是首个完全基于 Vulkan Compute 的高性能 3DGS 训练管线，相比 CUDA+PyTorch 基线实现 3.3 倍加速和 33% 显存节省。

papers.title: CTM-AI: A Blueprint for General AI Inspired by a Model of Consciousness
papers.abstract: Despite remarkable advances, today's AI systems remain narrow in scope, falling short of the flexible, adaptive, and multisensory intelligence that characterizes human capabilities. This gap has fueled longstanding debates about whether AI might one day achieve human-like generality or even consciousness, and whether theories of consciousness can inspire new architectures for AI. This paper presents an early blueprint for implementing a general AI system, CTM-AI, combining the Conscious Turing Machine (CTM), a formal machine model of consciousness, with today's foundation models. CTM-AI contains an enormous number of powerful processors ranging from specialized experts (e.g., vision-language models and APIs) to unspecialized general-purpose learners poised to develop their own expertise. Crucially, for whatever problem must be dealt with, information from many processors is selected, integrated, and exchanged appropriately to solve the task. CTM-AI achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on MUStARD (72.28) and UR-FUNNY (72.13), outperforming multimodal and multi-agent frameworks. On tool-using and agentic tasks, CTM-AI achieves 10+ points of improvement on StableToolBench and WebArena-Lite. Overall, CTM-AI offers a principled, testable blueprint for general AI inspired by a model of consciousness.

analysis.tldr: 受意识模型启发的通用AI蓝图CTM-AI，结合意识图灵机与基础模型，在多模态和工具使用任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI系统范围狭窄，缺乏人类智能的灵活性、适应性和多感官能力，而意识理论可能为通用AI架构提供新灵感。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个受意识模型启发的通用AI系统，使其能够灵活整合多模态信息并解决多样化任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CTM-AI架构，包含大量处理器（专用专家如视觉-语言模型和API，以及通用学习器），通过选择、整合和交换信息来解决问题。
contributions: 提出CTM-AI，一个受意识模型启发的通用AI蓝图，结合意识图灵机与基础模型。
在MUStARD、UR-FUNNY、StableToolBench和WebArena-Lite上取得SOTA或显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在MUStARD（72.28）和UR-FUNNY（72.13）上取得SOTA，在StableToolBench和WebArena-Lite上提升10+分。
limitations: 可能依赖大量处理器导致计算开销大。
意识模型的理论基础可能引发争议。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受意识模型启发的通用AI蓝图CTM-AI，结合意识图灵机与基础模型，在多模态和工具使用任务上取得SOTA。

papers.title: RSAT: Structured Attribution Makes Small Language Models Faithful Table Reasoners
papers.abstract: When a language model answers a table question, users have no way to verify which cells informed which reasoning steps. We introduce RSAT, a method that trains small language models (SLMs, 1-8B) to produce step-by-step reasoning with cell-level citations grounded in table evidence. Phase 1 (SFT) teaches a structured JSON output format from verified reasoning traces. Phase 2 (GRPO) optimizes a composite reward centered on NLI-based faithfulness, alongside citation validity and parsimony. Across six models from two families-Qwen 2.5 (1.5B/3B/7B) and Llama 3 (1B/3B/8B)-RSAT improves faithfulness 3.7$\times$ over SFT alone (0.224$\rightarrow$0.826), with near-perfect citation validity (0.992). Post-hoc attribution collapses below 13% format success, confirming that attribution must be integrated into reasoning, not retrofitted. Ablations show the faithfulness reward is essential: removing it drops faithfulness from 0.97 to 0.03.

analysis.tldr: RSAT通过结构化归因训练，使小语言模型在表格推理中实现高忠实度与可验证性。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户无法验证语言模型在表格问答中使用了哪些单元格信息，缺乏可解释性和可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何让小语言模型在表格推理中生成带有单元格级引用的可验证推理步骤。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 事后归因的格式成功率低于13%，表明归因必须集成到推理过程中而非事后添加；消融实验显示忠实度奖励至关重要，移除后忠实度从0.97降至0.03。
analysis.method: 两阶段训练：阶段1用SFT学习结构化JSON输出格式，阶段2用GRPO优化基于NLI忠实度、引用有效性和简洁性的复合奖励。
contributions: 提出RSAT方法，通过结构化归因训练使小语言模型在表格推理中实现高忠实度。
在6个模型上验证RSAT将忠实度提升3.7倍（0.224→0.826），引用有效性接近完美（0.992）。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen 2.5（1.5B/3B/7B）和Llama 3（1B/3B/8B）共6个模型上进行实验，报告了忠实度、引用有效性等指标。
limitations: 仅针对表格推理任务，可能不适用于其他推理场景。
依赖NLI模型评估忠实度，可能引入额外偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RSAT通过结构化归因训练，使小语言模型在表格推理中实现高忠实度与可验证性。

papers.title: The $\textit{Silicon Society}$ Cookbook: Design Space of LLM-based Social Simulations
papers.abstract: Studies attempting to simulate human behavior with $\textit{Silicon Societies}$ grow in numbers while LLM-only social networks have started appearing outside of controlled settings. However, the design space of these networks remains under-studied, which contributes to a gap in validating model realism. To enable future works to make more informed design decisions, we perform a systematic analysis of the consequences and interactions of key design choices in simulated social networks, including the choice of base model used to model individual agents, and how they are connected to each other. Using surveys as a proxy for agent opinions, our findings suggest that the geometry of the design space is non-trivial, with some parameters behaving in additive ways while others display more complex interactions. In particular, the choice of the base LLM is the most important variable impacting the simulation outcomes.

analysis.tldr: 系统分析了基于LLM的社会模拟（硅基社会）设计空间，发现基础模型选择是最关键变量。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM社会模拟研究快速增长，但设计空间缺乏系统研究，导致模型真实性验证存在差距。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分析LLM社会模拟中关键设计选择（如基础模型、连接方式）的后果与交互作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 设计空间几何结构非平凡：部分参数呈加性效应，部分显示复杂交互；基础LLM选择是影响模拟结果的最重要变量。
analysis.method: 通过问卷调查作为代理获取智能体意见，系统分析不同基础模型和连接方式等设计选择对模拟结果的影响。
contributions: 首次对LLM社会模拟的设计空间进行系统分析
揭示了基础模型选择是最关键变量，以及参数间的加性与交互效应
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及使用问卷调查作为代理。
limitations: 仅以问卷调查作为代理，可能无法完全反映真实社会交互
未涉及动态交互或长期演化效应
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统分析了基于LLM的社会模拟（硅基社会）设计空间，发现基础模型选择是最关键变量。

papers.title: Fair Dataset Distillation via Cross-Group Barycenter Alignment
papers.abstract: Dataset Distillation aims to compress a large dataset into a small synthetic one while maintaining predictive performance. We show that as different demographic groups exhibit distinct predictive patterns, the distillation process struggles to simultaneously preserve informative signals for all subgroups, regardless of whether group sizes are mildly or severely imbalanced. Consequently, models trained on distilled data can experience substantial performance drops for certain subgroups, leading to fairness gaps. Crucially, these gaps do not disappear by merely correcting group imbalance, since they stem from fundamental mismatches in subgroup predictive patterns rather than from sample-size disparities alone. We therefore formally analyze the interaction between these two sources of bias and cast the solution as identifying a group-imbalance-agnostic barycenter of the predictive information that induces similar representations across all subgroups. By distilling toward this shared aggregate representation, we show that group fairness concerns can be reduced. Our approach is compatible with existing distillation methods, and empirical results show that it substantially reduces bias introduced by dataset distillation.

analysis.tldr: 通过跨组重心对齐减少数据集蒸馏中的公平性差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据集蒸馏在压缩数据时可能对不同人口统计子组产生不公平的性能下降，且这种偏差无法仅通过纠正组间不平衡消除，需要新的公平性方法。
analysis.problem: 数据集蒸馏过程中，不同子组的预测模式差异导致蒸馏难以同时保留所有子组的信息，从而产生公平性差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使组间规模轻度或严重不平衡，蒸馏过程也难以同时保留所有子组的信息信号，导致模型在特定子组上性能显著下降。这种公平性差距源于子组预测模式的根本不匹配，而非仅样本量差异。
analysis.method: 提出跨组重心对齐方法，通过识别与组间不平衡无关的预测信息重心，蒸馏到共享的聚合表示，从而减少公平性偏差。
contributions: 形式化分析了数据集蒸馏中两种偏差来源（组间不平衡和预测模式不匹配）的相互作用。
提出跨组重心对齐方法，兼容现有蒸馏方法，有效减少蒸馏引入的公平性偏差。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分类任务，对其他任务（如回归）的公平性效果未知。
重心对齐的计算开销可能较大，尤其在大规模数据集上。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过跨组重心对齐减少数据集蒸馏中的公平性差距。

papers.title: PhaseNet++: Phase-Aware Frequency-Domain Anomaly Detection for Industrial Control Systems via Phase Coherence Graphs
papers.abstract: Multivariate time series anomaly detection in ICS has attracted growing attention due to the increasing threat of cyber-physical attacks on critical infrastructure. State-of-the-art methods model inter-sensor relationships from raw time-domain amplitude values, using graph neural networks, Transformers. However, these methods discard the phase spectrum produced by time frequency transformations, We argue that phase information constitutes a complementary and previously overlooked detection modality for ICS anomaly detection. We present PhaseNet++, a frequency-domain autoencoder that operates on the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) of sliding sensor windows, retaining both magnitude and phase spectra. A Phase Coherence Index (PCI), inspired by the Phase Locking Value from neuroscience, summarizes pairwise phase consistency across frequency bins into a continuous adjacency matrix. This matrix guides a graph attention network that propagates information preferentially among phase-synchronized sensors. A sensor-token Transformer encoder captures system-wide structure, and a dual-head decoder reconstructs magnitude and phase jointly via circular and coherence-aware objectives. Evaluated on the Secure Water Treatment (SWaT) benchmark, PhaseNet++ achieves an F1-score of 90.98%, ROC-AUC of 95.66%, and average precision of 91.51%. Ablation studies show that the phase-aware front-end and PCI graph module together add only 264,816 parameters, demonstrating that the phase inductive bias is lightweight. While the absolute F1-score is second best than that of all recent raw-value methods evaluated under different protocols, we position this work as the first systematic study of phase-domain anomaly detection for ICS.

analysis.tldr: 提出PhaseNet++，利用相位信息进行工业控制系统多变量时间序列异常检测，在SWaT基准上取得有竞争力的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有ICS异常检测方法仅使用时域幅度值建模传感器间关系，忽略了时频变换产生的相位谱，而相位信息可能提供互补的检测模态。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用相位信息进行工业控制系统的多变量时间序列异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PhaseNet++是一个频域自编码器，对滑动传感器窗口的STFT保留幅度和相位谱；利用相位锁定值启发相位相干指数（PCI）构建连续邻接矩阵，引导图注意力网络在相位同步传感器间传播信息；传感器token Transformer编码器捕获系统级结构；双头解码器通过循环和相干感知目标联合重建幅度和相位。
contributions: 首次系统研究ICS异常检测中的相位域方法。
提出PhaseNet++，利用相位相干图引导图注意力网络，实现轻量级相位归纳偏置。
analysis.experiments: 在SWaT基准上评估，F1-score为90.98%，ROC-AUC为95.66%，平均精度为91.51%；消融研究表明相位感知前端和PCI图模块仅增加264,816参数。
limitations: 绝对F1-score略低于某些近期原始值方法（在不同协议下评估）。
可能对STFT参数敏感，需要进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PhaseNet++，利用相位信息进行工业控制系统多变量时间序列异常检测，在SWaT基准上取得有竞争力的性能。

papers.title: FieryGS: In-the-Wild Fire Synthesis with Physics-Integrated Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: We consider the problem of synthesizing photorealistic, physically plausible combustion effects in in-the-wild 3D scenes. Traditional CFD and graphics pipelines can produce realistic fire effects but rely on handcrafted geometry, expert-tuned parameters, and labor-intensive workflows, limiting their scalability to the real world. Recent scene modeling advances like 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enable high-fidelity real-world scene reconstruction, yet lack physical grounding for combustion. To bridge this gap, we propose FieryGS, a physically-based framework that integrates physically-accurate and user-controllable combustion simulation and rendering within the 3DGS pipeline, enabling realistic fire synthesis for real scenes. Our approach tightly couples three key modules: (1) multimodal large-language-model-based physical material reasoning, (2) efficient volumetric combustion simulation, and (3) a unified renderer for fire and 3DGS. By unifying reconstruction, physical reasoning, simulation, and rendering, FieryGS removes manual tuning and automatically generates realistic, controllable fire dynamics consistent with scene geometry and materials. Our framework supports complex combustion phenomena -- including flame propagation, smoke dispersion, and surface carbonization -- with precise user control over fire intensity, airflow, ignition location and other combustion parameters. Evaluated on diverse indoor and outdoor scenes, FieryGS outperforms all comparative baselines in visual realism, physical fidelity, and controllability. Project page can be found at https://pku-vcl-geometry.github.io/FieryGS/.

analysis.tldr: FieryGS 将物理燃烧模拟与 3DGS 结合，实现真实场景中可控的逼真火焰合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统 CFD 和图形管线依赖手工几何和专家调参，难以扩展到真实世界场景；而 3DGS 虽能高质量重建场景，但缺乏燃烧的物理基础。
analysis.problem: 如何在真实 3D 场景中自动生成逼真且物理合理的火焰效果，同时保持用户可控性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 FieryGS 框架，紧密耦合三个模块：基于多模态大语言模型的物理材料推理、高效体积燃烧模拟、以及统一渲染器（融合火焰与 3DGS）。
contributions: 首次将物理燃烧模拟与 3DGS 集成，实现真实场景的逼真火焰合成。
提出多模态大语言模型驱动的材料推理，自动获取场景物理属性。
支持火焰传播、烟雾扩散、表面碳化等复杂燃烧现象，并提供用户控制参数。
analysis.experiments: 在多种室内外场景上评估，FieryGS 在视觉真实感、物理保真度和可控性上优于所有对比基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量场景重建，对重建误差敏感。
燃烧模拟的计算开销可能较大，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FieryGS 将物理燃烧模拟与 3DGS 结合，实现真实场景中可控的逼真火焰合成。

papers.title: DPU or GPU for Accelerating Neural Networks Inference -- Why not both? Split CNN Inference
papers.abstract: Video and image streaming on edge devices requires low latency. To address this, Neural Networks (NNs) are widely used, and prior work mainly focuses on accelerating them with single hardware units such as Graphics Processing Units (GPUs), Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs), and Deep Learning Processing Units (DPUs). However, further reductions in latency can be observed by combining these units. In this paper, partitioning CNN inference across DPU and GPU (Split CNN Inference) is proposed. The first partition runs on the AI engines (DPU) of a Versal VCK190, which consists of initial CNN layers processing the input images. The DPU processes the first partition near the source of the data. Pipelined asynchronously, a GPU runs the remaining layers. The GPU (NVIDIA RTX 2080) processes the second partition, albeit having reduced the data transfer between the data source (storage/camera) and the GPU. Furthermore, a Graph Neural Network (GNN)-based partition index prediction method is proposed to automate the partitioning of CNNs needed for the Split Inference. Well established models such as LeNet-5, ResNet18/50/101/152, VGG16, and MobileNetv2 are analyzed. Results demonstrate up to 2.48x latency improvement over DPU-only execution and up to 3.37x over GPU-only execution. The trained GNN model splits the layers between the appropriate devices with 96.27% accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出将CNN推理拆分到DPU和GPU上异步流水线执行，并利用GNN自动预测最优分割点，实现显著加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 边缘设备上的视频和图像流需要低延迟，现有工作主要使用单一硬件（GPU、FPGA、DPU）加速神经网络推理，但组合使用这些单元可以进一步降低延迟。
analysis.problem: 如何通过将CNN推理拆分到DPU和GPU上执行，并自动确定最优分割点，以降低端到端推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Split CNN Inference方法：将CNN推理分为两个分区，第一个分区在Versal VCK190的DPU上处理初始层，第二个分区在NVIDIA RTX 2080 GPU上处理剩余层，两者异步流水线执行；同时提出基于GNN的分割索引预测方法来自动化分割点选择。
contributions: 提出Split CNN Inference架构，将CNN推理拆分到DPU和GPU上异步执行，减少数据传输延迟。
提出基于GNN的分割点预测方法，以96.27%的准确率自动确定最优分割层。
analysis.experiments: 在LeNet-5、ResNet18/50/101/152、VGG16、MobileNetv2等模型上评估，相比纯DPU执行延迟提升最高2.48倍，相比纯GPU执行延迟提升最高3.37倍。
limitations: 仅针对CNN模型，未涉及Transformer等其他架构。
硬件组合固定为特定DPU和GPU型号，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将CNN推理拆分到DPU和GPU上异步流水线执行，并利用GNN自动预测最优分割点，实现显著加速。

papers.title: From Images2Mesh: A 3D Surface Reconstruction Pipeline for Non-Cooperative Space Objects
papers.abstract: On-orbit inspection imagery is crucial as it enables characterization of non-cooperative resident space objects, providing the geometry and structural condition essential for active debris removal and on-orbit servicing mission planning. However, most existing neural implicit surface reconstruction methods have been confined to synthetic or hardware-in-the-loop data with known camera poses and controlled illumination. In this work, we present a pipeline for neural implicit surface reconstruction of non-cooperative space objects from monocular inspection imagery. We demonstrate it on publicly released ISS inspection footage from the STS-119 mission and publicly released on-orbit inspection footage of an H-IIA rocket upper stage. We find that segmentation-based background removal is essential for successful camera pose estimation from real on-orbit footage, where background variation between frames caused direct processing to fail entirely. We further incorporate photometric correction of per-frame exposure variations and analyze its behavior across datasets, finding that performance in shadowed regions varies with the illumination characteristics of the input footage.

analysis.tldr: 提出从单目在轨图像重建非合作空间物体3D表面的神经隐式表面重建流程，并验证了分割去除背景和光度校正的必要性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在轨检测图像对空间碎片清除和在轨服务任务规划至关重要，但现有神经隐式表面重建方法多局限于已知相机位姿和受控光照的合成或硬件在环数据，缺乏针对真实在轨图像（非合作目标、未知位姿、光照变化）的实用流程。
analysis.problem: 如何从真实单目在轨图像（非合作空间物体、未知相机位姿、光照变化大、背景复杂）中重建出准确的3D表面几何。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现真实在轨图像中帧间背景变化导致直接相机位姿估计完全失败，而基于分割的背景去除是成功的关键；此外，阴影区域的性能受输入图像光照特性影响，光度校正可缓解曝光变化问题。
analysis.method: 提出一个完整流程：先对单目图像序列进行分割去除背景，然后进行相机位姿估计，再结合光度校正（补偿每帧曝光差异），最后使用神经隐式表面重建方法（如NeRF类）从校正后的图像中重建3D表面。
contributions: 首个针对非合作空间物体从真实在轨单目图像进行神经隐式表面重建的完整流程。
系统分析了背景去除和光度校正对重建性能的影响，并验证了其在真实ISS和火箭上面级数据上的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在STS-119任务的ISS检测视频和H-IIA火箭上面级的在轨检测视频上进行了实验，评估了背景去除和光度校正的效果，但摘要未提供定量指标。
limitations: 仅验证了两个特定数据集，泛化性需更多测试。
依赖分割质量，复杂背景或遮挡可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从单目在轨图像重建非合作空间物体3D表面的神经隐式表面重建流程，并验证了分割去除背景和光度校正的必要性。

papers.title: Real-Time Frame- and Event-based Object Detection with Spiking Neural Networks on Edge Neuromorphic Hardware: Design, Deployment and Benchmark
authors: Udayanga G. W. K. N. Gamage
papers.abstract: Real-time object detection on energy-constrained platforms is critical for applications such as UAV-based inspection, autonomous navigation, and mobile robotics. Spiking neural networks (SNNs) on neuromorphic hardware are believed to be significantly more energy-efficient than conventional artificial neural networks (ANNs). In this work, we present a comprehensive methodology for designing general SNN detection architectures targeting neuromorphic platforms, along with the engineering adaptations required to deploy them on the state-of-the-art Neuromorphic processor, Intel Loihi 2. We benchmark SNN-based object detection on Loihi 2 using both frame-based and event-based datasets, comparing performance with ANN-based detection on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, NVIDIA Jetson Nano B01, and the Apple M2 CPU. Our results show that SNNs on Loihi 2 can perform real-time detection while achieving the lowest per-inference dynamic energy among all platforms. Also, Loihi 2 outperforms the other platforms in terms of power consumption, though ANNs on Jetson Orin Nano achieve higher inference rates. Furthermore, our ANN-to-SNN distillation-aware training enables SNNs to recover 87-100% of the detection accuracy of their ANN counterparts while maintaining lower inference latency; without distillation, SNNs exhibit an 11-27% accuracy drop. These results highlight the potential of neuromorphic systems for energy-efficient, real-time object detection at the edge.

analysis.tldr: 在边缘神经形态硬件上使用脉冲神经网络实现实时帧/事件目标检测，能耗最低但精度接近传统ANN。
analysis.research_motivation: 能量受限平台（如无人机、移动机器人）上的实时目标检测至关重要，传统ANN能耗高，而SNN在神经形态硬件上被认为更节能，但缺乏完整的部署方法和系统基准。
analysis.problem: 如何设计、部署并基准测试基于SNN的通用目标检测架构，使其在神经形态处理器Loihi 2上实现实时、低能耗且高精度的检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出面向神经形态平台的通用SNN检测架构设计方法，包括工程适配（部署到Loihi 2）和ANN-to-SNN蒸馏感知训练，以恢复检测精度。
contributions: 提出完整的SNN目标检测架构设计方法及在Loihi 2上的部署流程。
在帧和事件数据集上系统基准测试，证明Loihi 2上SNN每推理动态能耗最低，功耗优于其他平台。
蒸馏感知训练使SNN恢复87-100%的ANN精度，同时保持更低推理延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在Loihi 2上使用帧和事件数据集进行目标检测基准测试，与NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano、Jetson Nano B01和Apple M2 CPU上的ANN检测对比，评估精度、能耗、功耗和推理速率。
limitations: ANN在Jetson Orin Nano上推理速率更高，SNN在速率上仍有差距。
仅针对Loihi 2平台，泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在边缘神经形态硬件上使用脉冲神经网络实现实时帧/事件目标检测，能耗最低但精度接近传统ANN。

papers.title: Technical Report: Activation Residual Hessian Quantization (ARHQ) for Low-Bit LLM Quantization
papers.abstract: We present Activation Residual Hessian Quantization (ARHQ), a post-training weight splitting method designed to mitigate error propagation in low-bit activation-weight quantization. By constructing an input-side residual Hessian from activation quantization residuals (G_x), ARHQ analytically identifies and isolates error-sensitive weight directions into a high-precision low-rank branch. This is achieved via a closed-form truncated SVD on the scaled weight matrix W G^{1/2}_x . Experimental results on Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507 demonstrate that ARHQ significantly improves layer-wise SNR and preserves downstream reasoning performance on ZebraLogic even under aggressive quantization. The code is available at https://github.com/BeautMoonQ/ARHQ.

analysis.tldr: ARHQ通过激活残差Hessian引导的低秩分支，缓解低比特量化中的误差传播。
analysis.research_motivation: 低比特激活-权重量化中误差逐层传播严重，现有方法难以在极低比特下保持模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何通过后训练权重分裂方法，在低比特量化中有效抑制误差传播并保留推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 激活量化残差会导致权重方向上的误差敏感度差异，通过Hessian可识别这些方向。
analysis.method: 构建激活残差Hessian，对缩放后的权重矩阵进行截断SVD，将误差敏感方向分离到高精度低秩分支。
contributions: 提出激活残差Hessian量化（ARHQ）方法，利用激活量化残差的Hessian指导权重分裂。
在Qwen3-4B模型上验证了ARHQ在极低比特下显著提升层SNR和下游推理性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507模型上评估，报告了层SNR提升和ZebraLogic推理性能保持。
limitations: 仅在一个模型上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他低比特量化方法进行详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ARHQ通过激活残差Hessian引导的低秩分支，缓解低比特量化中的误差传播。

papers.title: Linking spatial biology and clinical histology via Haiku
papers.abstract: Integrating molecular, morphological, and clinical data is essential for basic and translational biomedical research, yet systematic frameworks for jointly modeling these modalities remain limited. Here we present Haiku, a tri-modal contrastive learning model trained on multiplexed immunofluorescence (mIF). It comprises 26.7 million spatial proteomics patches from 3,218 tissue sections across 1,606 patients spanning 11 organ types, with matched hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) histology and clinical metadata aligned in a shared embedding space. Haiku enables three-way cross-modal retrieval, improves downstream classification and clinical prediction tasks over unimodal baselines, and supports zero-shot biomarker inference through fusion retrieval conditioned on clinical metadata-only text descriptions. Across tasks, Haiku outperforms competing approaches, achieving cross-modal retrieval (Recall@50 up to 0.611 versus near-zero baseline), survival prediction (C-index 0.737, +7.91% relative improvement), and zero-shot biomarker inference (mean Pearson correlation 0.718 across 52 biomarkers). Furthermore, we introduce a counterfactual prediction framework in which modifying only clinical metadata while fixing tissue morphology surfaces niche-specific molecular shifts associated with breast cancer stage progression and lung cancer survival outcomes. In a lung adenocarcinoma case study, the counterfactual analysis recovers niche-specific shifts characterized by increased CD8 and granzyme B, reduced PD-L1, and decreased Ki67, broadly consistent with patterns reported for favorable outcomes. We present these counterfactual results as exploratory, hypothesis-generating signals rather than mechanistic claims. These capabilities demonstrate that tri-modal alignment via Haiku enables integrative analysis of spatial biology, bridging molecular measurements with clinical context for biological exploration.

analysis.tldr: Haiku 通过三模态对比学习对齐空间蛋白质组学、组织学与临床元数据，实现跨模态检索与零样本生物标志物推断。
analysis.research_motivation: 分子、形态和临床数据的整合对基础与转化研究至关重要，但缺乏系统性框架来联合建模这些模态。
analysis.problem: 如何将空间蛋白质组学、组织学图像和临床元数据对齐到共享嵌入空间，以支持跨模态检索和下游预测任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Haiku，一个基于多路复用免疫荧光（mIF）的三模态对比学习模型，使用 2670 万空间蛋白质组学 patches 训练，将 H&E 组织学与临床元数据对齐到共享嵌入空间。
contributions: 构建了大规模三模态数据集（mIF、H&E、临床元数据），涵盖 11 种器官类型。
提出三模态对比学习框架 Haiku，实现跨模态检索、下游分类和零样本生物标志物推断。
引入基于反事实预测的分析框架，通过仅修改临床元数据揭示组织微环境特异性分子变化。
analysis.experiments: 在跨模态检索（Recall@50 0.611 vs 近零基线）、生存预测（C-index 0.737，相对提升 7.91%）和零样本生物标志物推断（52 个生物标志物平均 Pearson 相关系数 0.718）上优于竞争方法。
limitations: 反事实分析结果仅为探索性假设生成，非机制性结论。
模型依赖 mIF 数据，可能限制在仅有 H&E 或临床数据的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Haiku 通过三模态对比学习对齐空间蛋白质组学、组织学与临床元数据，实现跨模态检索与零样本生物标志物推断。

papers.title: Are Tools All We Need? Unveiling the Tool-Use Tax in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Tool-augmented reasoning has become a popular direction for LLM-based agents, and it is widely assumed to improve reasoning and reliability. However, we demonstrate that this consensus does not always hold: in the presence of semantic distractors, tool-augmented reasoning does not necessarily outperform native CoT. To explain this performance gap, we propose a Factorized Intervention Framework that isolates the cost of prompt formatting, the overhead of the tool-calling protocol, and the actual gain from executing tools. Our analysis reveals a critical tradeoff: under semantic noise, the gains from tools often fail to offset the "tool-use tax", which is the performance degradation introduced by the tool-calling protocol itself. To address this, we introduce G-STEP, a lightweight inference-time gate to mitigate protocol-induced errors. While this yields partial recovery, our findings suggest that more substantial improvements still require strengthening the model's intrinsic reasoning and tool-interaction capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 工具增强推理在语义干扰下可能不如原生CoT，存在“工具使用税”现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM Agent广泛采用工具增强推理，但该范式在语义干扰场景下的性能瓶颈尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 揭示并量化工具增强推理中协议开销导致的性能退化（工具使用税），并探索缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在语义干扰下，工具增强推理并不总是优于原生CoT，工具调用协议本身会引入性能退化。
analysis.method: 提出因子化干预框架（Factorized Intervention Framework）分离提示格式化成本、工具调用协议开销和工具执行收益；并设计轻量级推理时门控机制G-STEP缓解协议错误。
contributions: 发现并命名了“工具使用税”现象，即工具调用协议本身导致的性能退化。
提出因子化干预框架，系统分解工具增强推理中的成本与收益。
设计G-STEP门控机制，部分缓解协议引入的错误。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: G-STEP仅能部分恢复性能，根本改进仍需增强模型内在推理能力。
分析可能局限于特定语义干扰设置，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 工具增强推理在语义干扰下可能不如原生CoT，存在“工具使用税”现象。

papers.title: Smart Profit-Aware Crop Advisory System: Kisan AI
papers.abstract: Modern crop advisory systems exhibit a critical limitation termed \textit{economic blindness}. These systems primarily optimize for biological yield, often overlooking market price, which can lead farmers toward agronomically sound yet financially unviable decisions. In this paper, we develop Kisan AI, a smart profit-aware crop advisory system that resolves the above-mentioned limitation through a research-driven, full-stack application. We train the Random Forest(RF) classifier model on a nine-feature benchmark dataset, the standard seven agronomic attributes augmented with a \textit{market\_price} variable, and evaluated against eight baseline models, considering the evaluation matrices, such as, accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and Log Loss. The RF model achieves the highest accuracy of 99.3\% and the lowest Log Loss, confirming that the inclusion of market price as a predictive feature is both valid and impactful. We then implement the RF model within a multilingual progressive Web App alongside a Facebook Prophet six-month price forecasting engine and a MobileNetV2 disease detection module. A nine-language AI chatbot powered by the Anthropic Claude API unifies all modules into a single, mobile-installable platform accessible to farmers across India.

analysis.tldr: Kisan AI 通过引入市场价格特征，构建了利润感知的作物推荐系统，在九特征数据集上 RF 模型达 99.3% 准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有作物咨询系统存在“经济盲目性”，仅优化生物产量而忽略市场价格，导致农民做出农学上合理但财务上不可行的决策。
analysis.problem: 如何将市场价格纳入作物推荐模型，并构建一个多语言、可安装的移动平台，为农民提供利润感知的作物种植建议。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在标准七农学特征基础上增加市场价格特征，训练随机森林分类器；集成 Facebook Prophet 价格预测引擎和 MobileNetV2 病害检测模块；通过 Anthropic Claude API 构建九语言 AI 聊天机器人，统一为渐进式 Web 应用。
contributions: 提出利润感知的作物咨询系统，解决经济盲目性问题。
构建包含市场价格的九特征基准数据集，并验证其有效性。
开发多语言、全栈移动应用，集成推荐、价格预测和病害检测功能。
analysis.experiments: 在九特征数据集上，RF 模型与八个基线模型对比，评估指标包括准确率、精确率、召回率、F1 和 Log Loss，RF 达 99.3% 准确率和最低 Log Loss。
limitations: 可能未考虑区域价格波动和长期市场趋势。
模型依赖历史数据，对新作物或极端市场变化适应性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Kisan AI 通过引入市场价格特征，构建了利润感知的作物推荐系统，在九特征数据集上 RF 模型达 99.3% 准确率。

papers.title: StyleShield: Exposing the Fragility of AIGC Detectors through Continuous Controllable Style Transfer
papers.abstract: AI-generated content (AIGC) detectors are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings such as academic integrity screening, yet their reliability rests on a fundamental paradox: as language models are trained on human-written corpora, the statistical boundary between AI and human writing will inevitably dissolve as models improve. Commercial incentives have further distorted this landscape -- detection services and "de-AIification" tools often operate within the same supply chain, replacing evaluation of content quality with judgment of content origin. We present StyleShield, the first flow matching framework for conditional text style transfer, operating directly in continuous token embedding space via a DiT backbone with zero-initialized cross-attention adapters conditioned on frozen Qwen-7B representations. At inference, we adapt the SDEdit paradigm from image synthesis to text embeddings, with a single parameter gamma providing smooth continuous control over the evasion-preservation trade-off. On a multi-domain Chinese benchmark, StyleShield achieves 94.6% evasion against the training detector and >=99% against three unseen detectors, maintaining 0.928 semantic similarity.
