We further introduce RateAudit, a document-level scheduling algorithm that demonstrates detection-rate verdicts can be set to arbitrary values, directly questioning the reliability of score-based evaluation.

analysis.tldr: StyleShield通过连续可控风格转移暴露AIGC检测器的脆弱性，实现高规避率并质疑基于分数的评估可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: AIGC检测器在高风险场景中部署，但AI与人类写作的统计边界随模型改进而模糊，且商业激励扭曲了评估目标，亟需揭示检测器的根本脆弱性。
analysis.problem: 现有AIGC检测器依赖内容来源而非质量判断，且无法区分AI生成文本与人类写作的统计差异，导致可靠性存疑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检测器与去AI化工具形成供应链，且AI文本与人类文本的统计边界随模型改进而消失。
analysis.method: 提出StyleShield，首个基于流匹配的条件文本风格转移框架，在连续token嵌入空间通过DiT骨干和零初始化交叉注意力适配器操作，推理时采用SDEdit范式实现平滑控制。
contributions: 提出StyleShield，首个用于条件文本风格转移的流匹配框架，在连续嵌入空间操作。
引入RateAudit调度算法，证明检测率判决可被任意设置，质疑基于分数的评估可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在多领域中文基准上，StyleShield对训练检测器实现94.6%规避率，对三个未见检测器实现≥99%规避率，同时保持0.928语义相似度。
limitations: 仅针对中文基准测试，英文及其他语言泛化性未知。
未讨论对更先进检测器（如基于语义或混合方法）的规避效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StyleShield通过连续可控风格转移暴露AIGC检测器的脆弱性，实现高规避率并质疑基于分数的评估可靠性。

papers.title: Minimal, Local, Causal Explanations for Jailbreak Success in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Safety trained large language models (LLMs) can often be induced to answer harmful requests through jailbreak prompts. Because we lack a robust understanding of why LLMs are susceptible to jailbreaks, future frontier models operating more autonomously in higher-stakes settings may similarly be vulnerable to such attacks. Prior work has studied jailbreak success by examining the model's intermediate representations, identifying directions in this space that causally encode concepts like harmfulness and refusal. Then, they globally explain all jailbreak attacks as attempting to reduce or strengthen these concepts (e.g., reduce harmfulness). However, different jailbreak strategies may succeed by strengthening or suppressing different intermediate concepts, and the same jailbreak strategy may not work for different harmful request categories (e.g., violence vs. cyberattack); thus, we seek to give a local explanation -- i.e., why did this specific jailbreak succeed? To address this gap, we introduce LOCA, a method that gives Local, CAusal explanations of jailbreak success by identifying a minimal set of interpretable, intermediate representation changes that causally induce model refusal on an otherwise successful jailbreak request. We evaluate LOCA on harmful original-jailbreak pairs from a large jailbreak benchmark across Gemma and Llama chat models, comparing against prior methods adapted to this setting. LOCA can successfully induce refusal by making, on average, six interpretable changes; prior work routinely fails to achieve refusal even after 20 changes. LOCA is a step toward mechanistic, local explanations of jailbreak success in LLMs. Code to be released.

analysis.tldr: 提出LOCA方法，通过最小化可解释的中间表示变化来局部因果解释LLM越狱成功的原因。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法全局解释越狱攻击，但不同策略和请求类别可能涉及不同概念，缺乏局部因果解释。
analysis.problem: 如何为特定越狱成功提供最小、可解释的局部因果解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同越狱策略可能通过增强或抑制不同的中间概念来成功，同一策略对不同有害请求类别可能无效。
analysis.method: LOCA：识别最小可解释的中间表示变化集，这些变化因果地诱导模型在原本成功的越狱请求上拒绝回答。
contributions: 提出LOCA方法，提供越狱成功的局部因果解释。
在Gemma和Llama模型上验证，平均仅需6个可解释变化即可诱导拒绝，优于基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在大型越狱基准测试的原始-越狱对上进行评估，对比先前方法，LOCA平均6个变化成功诱导拒绝，基线方法20个变化仍常失败。
limitations: 仅关注中间表示变化，未涉及输入层面的解释。
可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LOCA方法，通过最小化可解释的中间表示变化来局部因果解释LLM越狱成功的原因。

papers.title: GAFSV-Net: A Vision Framework for Online Signature Verification
papers.abstract: Online signature verification (OSV) requires distinguishing skilled forgeries from genuine samples under high intra-class variability and with very few enrollment samples. Existing deep learning methods operate directly on raw temporal sequences, restricting them to 1D architectures and preventing the use of pretrained 2D vision backbones. We bridge this gap with GAFSV-Net, which represents each signature as a six-channel asymmetric Gramian Angular Field image: three kinematic channels (pen speed, pressure derivative, direction angle) are each encoded into complementary GASF and GADF matrices that capture pairwise temporal co-occurrence and directional transition structure respectively. A dual-branch ConvNeXt-Tiny encoder processes GASF and GADF independently, with bidirectional cross-attention enabling each branch to query discriminative patterns from the other before metric-space projection. Training uses semi-hard triplet loss with skilled-forgery hard-negative injection; verification is performed via cosine similarity against a small enrollment prototype. We evaluate on DeepSignDB and BiosecurID, outperforming all sequence-based baselines trained under identical objectives, demonstrating that the representational gain of 2D temporal encoding is consistent and independent of training procedure, with ablations characterising each design choice's contribution.

analysis.tldr: 将在线签名转化为六通道格拉姆角场图像，利用预训练2D视觉骨干网络进行签名验证，显著优于序列基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线签名验证面临类内差异大、注册样本少、伪造攻击复杂等挑战，现有深度方法局限于1D时序架构，无法利用强大的预训练2D视觉骨干网络。
analysis.problem: 如何将在线签名时序数据转化为适合2D视觉模型的形式，以利用预训练2D骨干网络提升签名验证性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GAFSV-Net，将签名时序信号（笔速、压力导数、方向角）编码为六通道GASF/GADF图像，使用双分支ConvNeXt-Tiny编码器加双向交叉注意力，训练采用半硬三元组损失并注入熟练伪造负样本，验证时计算余弦相似度。
contributions: 首次将在线签名验证转化为2D图像分类问题，利用预训练2D视觉骨干网络。
提出六通道非对称格拉姆角场表示，融合运动学和方向信息。
设计双分支交叉注意力架构，有效融合GASF和GADF特征。
在DeepSignDB和BiosecurID上超越所有序列基线，消融实验验证各组件贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepSignDB和BiosecurID数据集上评估，与多种序列基线对比，并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 可能对长签名序列的编码效率有影响。
未讨论跨数据集泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将在线签名转化为六通道格拉姆角场图像，利用预训练2D视觉骨干网络进行签名验证，显著优于序列基线。

papers.title: Cultural Benchmarking of LLMs in Standard and Dialectal Arabic Dialogues
papers.abstract: There is a significant gap in evaluating cultural reasoning in LLMs using conversational datasets that capture culturally rich and dialectal contexts. Most Arabic benchmarks focus on short text snippets in Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), overlooking the cultural nuances that naturally arise in dialogues. To address this gap, we introduce ArabCulture-Dialogue, a culturally grounded conversational dataset covering 13 Arabic-speaking countries, in both MSA and each country's respective dialect, spanning 12 daily-life topics and 54 fine-grained subtopics. We utilize the dataset to form three benchmarking tasks: (i) multiple-choice cultural reasoning, (ii) machine translation between MSA and dialects, and (iii) dialect-steering generation. Our experiments indicate that the performance gap between MSA and Arabic dialects still exists, whereby the models perform worse on all three tasks in the dialectal setup, compared to the MSA one.

analysis.tldr: 构建阿拉伯文化对话基准，发现LLM在方言场景下表现显著差于标准阿拉伯语。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有阿拉伯语基准多聚焦标准阿拉伯语短文本，缺乏对对话中文化细微差别和方言的评估，导致LLM文化推理能力评估不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏覆盖多国方言和日常对话的文化推理基准，难以评估LLM在真实阿拉伯文化对话中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，LLM在方言设置下的文化推理、机器翻译和方言引导生成任务中表现均差于标准阿拉伯语，存在显著性能差距。
analysis.method: 构建ArabCulture-Dialogue数据集，涵盖13个阿拉伯国家、标准阿拉伯语和各国方言、12个日常主题和54个细分子主题，并设计三项基准任务：多项选择文化推理、标准语-方言机器翻译、方言引导生成。
contributions: 提出首个覆盖多国方言和日常对话的阿拉伯文化推理数据集ArabCulture-Dialogue。
设计三项基准任务系统评估LLM在标准语和方言下的文化能力。
揭示LLM在阿拉伯方言场景下性能显著低于标准阿拉伯语的差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及性能差距存在。
limitations: 数据集可能未覆盖所有阿拉伯方言或文化子主题。
基准任务设计可能无法完全反映真实对话复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建阿拉伯文化对话基准，发现LLM在方言场景下表现显著差于标准阿拉伯语。

papers.title: ViLegalNLI: Natural Language Inference for Vietnamese Legal Texts
papers.abstract: In this article, we introduce ViLegalNLI, the first large-scale Vietnamese Natural Language Inference (NLI) dataset specifically constructed for the legal domain. The dataset consists of 42,012 premise-hypothesis pairs derived from official statutory documents and annotated with binary inference labels (Entailment and Non-entailment). It covers multiple legal domains and reflects realistic legal reasoning scenarios characterized by structured logic, conditional clauses, and domain-specific terminology. To construct ViLegalNLI, we propose a semi-automatic data generation framework that integrates large language models for controlled hypothesis generation and systematic quality validation procedures. The framework incorporates artifact mitigation strategies and cross-model validation to improve annotation reliability and ensure legal consistency. The resulting dataset captures diverse reasoning patterns, including paraphrasing, logical implication, and legally invalid inferences, thereby providing a comprehensive benchmark for Vietnamese legal inference tasks. We conduct extensive experiments on the ViLegalNLI using multilingual models, Vietnamese-specific pretrained language models, and instruction-tuned large language models. The results show that few-shot LLM configurations consistently achieve superior performance, while performance is significantly influenced by hypothesis length, lexical overlap, and reasoning complexity. Cross-domain evaluations further reveal the challenges of generalizing legal inference across distinct legal fields. Overall, ViLegalNLI establishes a foundational benchmark for Vietnamese legal NLI and supports future research in legal reasoning, statutory text understanding, and the development of reliable AI systems for legal analysis and decision support. The dataset is publicly available for research purposes.

analysis.tldr: 首个大规模越南语法律文本自然语言推理数据集ViLegalNLI，包含42k标注对，并评估了多语言和越南语模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律领域NLI研究因缺乏非英语数据集而受限，越南语法律文本推理面临结构化逻辑、条件从句和领域术语等挑战。
analysis.problem: 构建首个大规模、高质量的越南语法律NLI数据集，并评估现有模型在该任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 少样本LLM配置表现最优；假设长度、词汇重叠和推理复杂度显著影响性能；跨领域泛化存在挑战。
analysis.method: 提出半自动数据生成框架，结合大语言模型进行受控假设生成和质量验证，包含伪影缓解和跨模型验证。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模越南语法律NLI数据集ViLegalNLI（42,012对），覆盖多领域并反映真实法律推理场景。
提出了半自动数据生成框架，集成LLM假设生成与系统性质量验证，提高标注可靠性和法律一致性。
通过广泛实验揭示了模型性能受假设长度、词汇重叠和推理复杂度影响，以及跨领域泛化的挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在ViLegalNLI上使用多语言模型、越南语特定预训练语言模型和指令微调LLM进行实验，结果显示少样本LLM配置表现最优。
limitations: 仅包含二分类标签（蕴含/非蕴含），缺乏更细粒度的推理类型标注。
数据集仅覆盖越南语法律文本，跨语言泛化能力未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个大规模越南语法律文本自然语言推理数据集ViLegalNLI，包含42k标注对，并评估了多语言和越南语模型。

papers.title: How Frontier LLMs Adapt to Neurodivergence Context: A Measurement Framework for Surface vs. Structural Change in System-Prompted Responses
papers.abstract: We examine if frontier chat-based large language models (LLMs) adjust their outputs based on neurodivergence (ND) context in system prompts and describe the nature of these adjustments. Specifically, we propose NDBench, a 576-output benchmark involving two frontier models, three system prompt types (baseline, ND-profile assertion, and ND-profile assertion with explicit instructions for adjustments), four canonical ND profiles, and 24 prompts across four categories, one of which involves an adversarial masking strategy. Four trends emerge consistently from our findings. First, LLMs show significant adaptation under ND context, where fully instructed conditions yield lengthier and more structured outputs, characterized by higher token counts, more headings, and more granular steps (p < 10^-8, Holm-corrected). Second, such adaptation is largely structural in nature: although list density does not change much, there is a marked rise in the frequency of headings and per-step detail. Third, ND persona assertion alone fails to suppress potentially harmful tendencies, as masking-reinforcement decreases only in explicitly instructed cases (36-44% reduction); the reduction rate barely changes in persona assertion conditions. Moreover, reliability analysis of LLM-based harm assessment reveals that only two out of the six dimensions (masking and reinforcement, validation quality) exceed the pre-defined inter-judge agreement criterion (alpha >= 0.67) and thus can be considered primary results. NDBench is made publicly available along with its prompts, outputs, code, and other resources, forming a reproducible framework for auditing future LLMs' adaptation to ND awareness.

analysis.tldr: 提出NDBench基准，系统评估前沿LLM在系统提示中根据神经多样性上下文调整输出的程度，发现调整主要是结构性的，且仅凭身份断言无法抑制有害倾向。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经多样性人群在AI交互中可能面临不公平或有害输出，但现有研究缺乏系统评估LLM是否以及如何根据神经多样性上下文调整其行为的框架。
analysis.problem: 如何量化前沿LLM在系统提示中根据神经多样性上下文进行的输出调整，并区分表面调整与结构性变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在完全指导条件下产生更长、更结构化的输出（更高token数、更多标题、更细步骤），但列表密度变化不大；仅凭神经多样性身份断言无法有效减少有害倾向（如掩码强化），只有在明确指令下才有显著降低（36-44%）。
analysis.method: 提出NDBench基准，包含576个输出，涉及两个前沿模型、三种系统提示类型（基线、ND身份断言、ND身份断言+明确调整指令）、四种ND画像、24个提示（含对抗性掩码策略），通过统计检验和可靠性分析评估调整。
contributions: 提出NDBench基准，系统评估LLM在神经多样性上下文中的输出调整。
揭示调整主要是结构性的，且仅凭身份断言无法抑制有害倾向。
提供公开可复现的框架，用于审计未来LLM的神经多样性适应能力。
analysis.experiments: 使用两个前沿模型，在576个输出上评估，通过Holm校正的p值（p<10^-8）和Krippendorff's alpha（>=0.67）进行统计和可靠性分析。
limitations: 仅评估两个模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
神经多样性画像简化，可能无法覆盖真实多样性。
有害倾向评估仅两个维度达到可靠性标准，其他维度结果需谨慎解读。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NDBench基准，系统评估前沿LLM在系统提示中根据神经多样性上下文调整输出的程度，发现调整主要是结构性的，且仅凭身份断言无法抑制有害倾向。

papers.title: AIDA-ReID: Adaptive Intermediate Domain Adaptation for Generalizable and Source-Free Person Re-Identification
papers.abstract: Person re-identification (Re-ID) aims to match images of the same individual across non-overlapping camera views and remains challenging due to domain shifts caused by variations in illumination, background, camera characteristics, and population distributions. Although supervised models perform well under matched training and testing conditions, their performance degrades significantly when deployed in unseen environments. Existing intermediate domain approaches such as IDM and IDM++ alleviate this gap by constructing bridge feature distributions between domains; however, they rely on fixed mixing strategies and joint source-target access, limiting their applicability to multi-source and source-free settings. To address these limitations, this paper proposes Adaptive Intermediate Domain Adaptation (AIDA), also referred to as Source-Free Multi-Source Intermediate Domain Adaptation (SF-MIDA). The proposed framework treats intermediate-domain learning as a dynamically regulated process, where feature mixing and regularization strength are adaptively controlled using feedback signals derived from model uncertainty and training stability. A multi-source intermediate domain generator synthesizes diverse intermediate representations, while a pseudo-mirror regularization strategy preserves identity consistency under domain perturbations. Extensive experiments across domain generalization and source-free settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应中间域适应框架AIDA，实现无源多源行人重识别泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 行人重识别面临域偏移挑战，现有中间域方法依赖固定混合策略和联合源-目标访问，不适用于多源和无源场景。
analysis.problem: 解决多源和无源场景下行人重识别的域泛化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自适应中间域适应框架AIDA，包括多源中间域生成器合成中间表示，以及基于模型不确定性和训练稳定性的自适应特征混合与正则化强度控制，并采用伪镜像正则化保持身份一致性。
contributions: 提出自适应中间域适应框架AIDA，适用于多源和无源行人重识别。
设计基于不确定性和稳定性的自适应控制机制，动态调节特征混合与正则化强度。
引入伪镜像正则化策略，增强域扰动下的身份一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在域泛化和无源设置下进行大量实验，验证了框架的有效性。
limitations: 可能对高度异质的多源域适应性有限。
自适应机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应中间域适应框架AIDA，实现无源多源行人重识别泛化。

papers.title: HERMES++: Toward a Unified Driving World Model for 3D Scene Understanding and Generation
papers.abstract: Driving world models serve as a pivotal technology for autonomous driving by simulating environmental dynamics. However, existing approaches predominantly focus on future scene generation, often overlooking comprehensive 3D scene understanding. Conversely, while Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive reasoning capabilities, they lack the capacity to predict future geometric evolution, creating a significant disparity between semantic interpretation and physical simulation. To bridge this gap, we propose HERMES++, a unified driving world model that integrates 3D scene understanding and future geometry prediction within a single framework. Our approach addresses the distinct requirements of these tasks through synergistic designs. First, a BEV representation consolidates multi-view spatial information into a structure compatible with LLMs. Second, we introduce LLM-enhanced world queries to facilitate knowledge transfer from the understanding branch. Third, a Current-to-Future Link is designed to bridge the temporal gap, conditioning geometric evolution on semantic context. Finally, to enforce structural integrity, we employ a Joint Geometric Optimization strategy that integrates explicit geometric constraints with implicit latent regularization to align internal representations with geometry-aware priors. Extensive evaluations on multiple benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our method. HERMES++ achieves strong performance, outperforming specialist approaches in both future point cloud prediction and 3D scene understanding tasks. The model and code will be publicly released at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/HERMESV2.

analysis.tldr: HERMES++ 是一个统一的驾驶世界模型，同时实现3D场景理解与未来几何预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶世界模型主要关注未来场景生成，缺乏全面的3D场景理解能力；而大语言模型虽具备推理能力，却无法预测未来几何演化，导致语义理解与物理模拟之间存在显著差距。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一框架中同时实现3D场景理解与未来几何预测，并弥合语义与几何之间的鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HERMES++，包含四个关键设计：BEV表示将多视图空间信息整合为LLM兼容结构；LLM增强的世界查询促进理解分支的知识迁移；当前到未来链接桥接时间间隙，使几何演化以语义上下文为条件；联合几何优化策略结合显式几何约束与隐式潜在正则化，对齐内部表示与几何先验。
contributions: 提出统一的驾驶世界模型，同时处理3D场景理解与未来几何预测。
设计协同组件（BEV表示、LLM增强查询、当前到未来链接、联合几何优化）实现任务间的知识迁移与结构保持。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，HERMES++在未来的点云预测和3D场景理解任务中均优于专门方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量BEV表示，在复杂场景下精度受限。
联合几何优化策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HERMES++ 是一个统一的驾驶世界模型，同时实现3D场景理解与未来几何预测。

papers.title: OmniRobotHome: A Multi-Camera Platform for Real-Time Multiadic Human-Robot Interaction
papers.abstract: Human-robot collaboration has been studied primarily in dyadic or sequential settings. However, real homes require multiadic collaboration, where multiple humans and robots share a workspace, acting concurrently on interleaved subtasks with tight spatial and temporal coupling. This regime remains underexplored because close-proximity interaction between humans, robots, and objects creates persistent occlusion and rapid state changes, making reliable real-time 3D tracking the central bottleneck. No existing platform provides the real-time, occlusion-robust, room-scale perception needed to make this regime experimentally tractable. We present OmniRobotHome, the first room-scale residential platform that unifies wide-area real-time 3D human and object perception with coordinated multi-robot actuation in a shared world frame. The system instruments a natural home environment with 48 hardware-synchronized RGB cameras for markerless, occlusion-robust tracking of multiple humans and objects, temporally aligned with two Franka arms that act on live scene state. Continuous capture within this consistent frame further supports long-horizon human behavior modeling from accumulated trajectories. The platform makes the multiadic collaboration regime experimentally tractable. We focus on two central problems: safety in shared human-robot environments and human-anticipatory robotic assistance, and show that real-time perception and accumulated behavior memory each yield measurable gains in both.

analysis.tldr: 首个支持多人类-多机器人实时协同的室内平台，通过48台同步相机解决遮挡和实时3D跟踪瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于双人或顺序交互，但真实家庭环境需要多人类-多机器人（multiadic）协作，其中遮挡和快速状态变化导致实时3D跟踪成为瓶颈，缺乏实验平台。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够提供实时、抗遮挡、房间级感知的平台，以支持多人类-多机器人紧密耦合协作的实验研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多人类-多机器人协作中，近距离交互导致持续遮挡和快速状态变化，使实时3D跟踪成为核心瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建OmniRobotHome平台，在自然家庭环境中部署48台硬件同步RGB相机，实现无标记、抗遮挡的多人和物体实时3D跟踪，并与两台Franka机械臂协同，在共享世界坐标系中执行动作。
contributions: 首个房间级住宅平台，统一了实时3D人体和物体感知与多机器人协调驱动。
通过48台同步相机实现抗遮挡的多人、物体实时跟踪，并支持长时程人类行为建模。
在安全和人机协作两个问题上验证了实时感知和累积行为记忆的增益。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在安全和人机协作两个问题上验证了实时感知和累积行为记忆的增益。
limitations: 平台部署成本高，48台相机和两台机械臂可能难以复现。
实验仅在单一家庭环境中进行，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个支持多人类-多机器人实时协同的室内平台，通过48台同步相机解决遮挡和实时3D跟踪瓶颈。

papers.title: Generalizable Sparse-View 3D Reconstruction from Unconstrained Images
papers.abstract: Reconstructing 3D scenes from sparse, unposed images remains challenging under real-world conditions with varying illumination and transient occlusions. Existing methods rely on scene-specific optimization using appearance embeddings or dynamic masks, which requires extensive per-scene training and fails under sparse views. Moreover, evaluations on limited scenes raise questions about generalization. We present GenWildSplat, a feed-forward framework for sparse-view outdoor reconstruction that requires no per-scene optimization. Given unposed internet images, GenWildSplat predicts depth, camera parameters, and 3D Gaussians in a canonical space using learned geometric priors. An appearance adapter modulates appearance for target lighting conditions, while semantic segmentation handles transient objects. Through curriculum learning on synthetic and real data, GenWildSplat generalizes across diverse illumination and occlusion patterns. Evaluations on PhotoTourism and MegaScenes benchmark demonstrate state-of-the-art feed-forward rendering quality, achieving real-time inference without test-time optimization

analysis.tldr: 提出无需逐场景优化的前馈框架GenWildSplat，从无约束稀疏图像实现高质量3D重建与实时渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有稀疏视角3D重建方法依赖逐场景优化，在光照变化和瞬态遮挡的真实场景中泛化性差，且评估场景有限。
analysis.problem: 从稀疏、无位姿的真实世界图像中高效重建3D场景，无需逐场景优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 前馈框架GenWildSplat，利用学习到的几何先验预测深度、相机参数和规范空间中的3D高斯，通过外观适配器调节目标光照，语义分割处理瞬态物体，采用合成与真实数据的课程学习。
contributions: 提出无需逐场景优化的前馈稀疏视角3D重建方法
在PhotoTourism和MegaScenes基准上达到最先进的前馈渲染质量，实现实时推理
analysis.experiments: 在PhotoTourism和MegaScenes基准上评估，渲染质量达到最先进水平。
limitations: 可能对极端光照或复杂遮挡场景泛化有限
依赖合成数据预训练，真实场景分布偏移可能影响性能
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需逐场景优化的前馈框架GenWildSplat，从无约束稀疏图像实现高质量3D重建与实时渲染。

papers.title: LaST-R1: Reinforcing Robotic Manipulation via Adaptive Physical Latent Reasoning
papers.abstract: Robotic foundation models require reasoning over complex visual scenes to execute adaptive actions in dynamic environments. While recent studies on latent-reasoning Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated the capability to capture fine-grained physical dynamics, they remain predominantly confined to static imitation learning, severely limiting their adaptability and generalization. In this paper, we present LaST-R1, a novel reinforcement learning (RL) post-training framework designed to effectively harness "latent reasoning-before-acting" policies. Specifically, we propose Latent-to-Action Policy Optimization (LAPO), a core RL algorithm that jointly optimizes the latent reasoning process and the action generation. By explicitly embedding latent Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning directly within the RL optimization loop, LAPO stimulates profound physical world modeling, which in turn drives robust execution in interactive environments. Furthermore, an adaptive latent CoT mechanism is introduced, allowing the policy to dynamically modulate its reasoning horizon based on diverse environment states. Experiments show that LaST-R1 achieves a near-perfect 99.9% average success rate on the LIBERO benchmark with only one-shot supervised warm-up, significantly improving convergence speed and performance over prior state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. In real-world deployments, LaST-R1 yields up to a 22.5% average improvement over SOTA supervised fine-tuning approach across four complex tasks, including both single-arm and dual-arm settings. Finally, LaST-R1 demonstrates strong generalization across simulated and real-world environments.

analysis.tldr: LaST-R1通过强化学习后训练框架，在机器人操作中实现自适应潜在推理，显著提升成功率和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有潜在推理VLA模型主要局限于静态模仿学习，缺乏适应性和泛化能力，无法在动态环境中执行自适应操作。
analysis.problem: 如何通过强化学习有效利用潜在推理策略，提升机器人操作模型在交互环境中的适应性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LaST-R1框架，核心是LAPO算法，联合优化潜在推理过程和动作生成，并引入自适应潜在CoT机制动态调整推理深度。
contributions: 提出LaST-R1，首个利用RL后训练有效挖掘潜在推理策略的机器人操作框架。
设计LAPO算法，将潜在CoT推理嵌入RL优化循环，实现物理世界建模与鲁棒执行。
引入自适应潜在CoT机制，根据环境状态动态调整推理长度。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO基准上，仅需一次监督预热即达到99.9%平均成功率，显著优于先前SOTA；真实世界部署中，在四个复杂任务（含单臂和双臂）上平均提升22.5%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量仿真环境进行RL训练。
自适应CoT机制在极端复杂任务中的有效性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LaST-R1通过强化学习后训练框架，在机器人操作中实现自适应潜在推理，显著提升成功率和泛化能力。

papers.title: Representation Fréchet Loss for Visual Generation
papers.abstract: We show that Fréchet Distance (FD), long considered impractical as a training objective, can in fact be effectively optimized in the representation space. Our idea is simple: decouple the population size for FD estimation (e.g., 50k) from the batch size for gradient computation (e.g., 1024). We term this approach FD-loss. Optimizing FD-loss reveals several surprising findings. First, post-training a base generator with FD-loss in different representation spaces consistently improves visual quality. Under the Inception feature space, a one-step generator achieves0.72 FID on ImageNet 256x256. Second, the same FD-loss repurposes multi-step generators into strong one-step generators without teacher distillation, adversarial training or per-sample targets. Third, FID can misrank visual quality: modern representations can yield better samples despite worse Inception FID. This motivates FDr$^k$, a multi-representation metric. We hope this work will encourage further exploration of distributional distances in diverse representation spaces as both training objectives and evaluation metrics for generative models.

analysis.tldr: 提出将Fréchet距离作为生成模型训练损失，通过解耦估计与批次大小实现有效优化，显著提升视觉质量并揭示FID排名缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: Fréchet距离（FD）长期被认为不适合作为训练目标，但若能有效优化，可替代FID等指标直接指导生成模型训练，提升视觉质量。
analysis.problem: 如何将Fréchet距离作为可优化的训练损失函数，并验证其在视觉生成中的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 优化FD-loss发现：1）在不同表示空间后训练均可提升视觉质量；2）可将多步生成器转化为强单步生成器；3）FID可能错误排名视觉质量，现代表示空间下FID差但样本更好。
analysis.method: 提出FD-loss，解耦FD估计的总体大小（如50k）与梯度计算的批次大小（如1024），在表示空间中优化Fréchet距离。
contributions: 提出FD-loss，首次将Fréchet距离作为可优化的训练目标，并给出有效实现。
发现FID排名缺陷，提出多表示空间指标FDr$^k$。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256x256上，单步生成器达到0.72 FID（Inception特征空间）；多步生成器转化为单步生成器无需蒸馏或对抗训练。
limitations: 仅验证了后训练场景，未探索从头训练。
多表示空间指标FDr$^k$的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将Fréchet距离作为生成模型训练损失，通过解耦估计与批次大小实现有效优化，显著提升视觉质量并揭示FID排名缺陷。

papers.title: Computing Equilibrium beyond Unilateral Deviation
papers.abstract: Most familiar equilibrium concepts, such as Nash and correlated equilibrium, guarantee only that no single player can improve their utility by deviating unilaterally. They offer no guarantees against profitable coordinated deviations by coalitions. Although the literature proposes solution concepts that provide stability against multilateral deviations (\emph{e.g.}, strong Nash and coalition-proof equilibrium), these generally fail to exist. In this paper, we study an alternative solution concept that minimizes coalitional deviation incentives, rather than requiring them to vanish, and is therefore guaranteed to exist. Specifically, we focus on minimizing the average gain of a deviating coalition, and extend the framework to weighted-average and maximum-within-coalition gains. In contrast, the minimum-gain analogue is shown to be computationally intractable. For the average-gain and maximum-gain objectives, we prove a lower bound on the complexity of computing such an equilibrium and present an algorithm that matches this bound. Finally, we use our framework to solve the \emph{Exploitability Welfare Frontier} (EWF), the maximum attainable social welfare subject to a given exploitability (the maximum gain over all unilateral deviations).

analysis.tldr: 提出一种最小化联盟偏离收益的均衡概念，保证存在性并给出高效算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统均衡概念（如纳什均衡）只保证单方面偏离无利可图，但无法防止联盟的协调偏离；而强纳什均衡等概念往往不存在，因此需要一种保证存在且能最小化联盟偏离激励的均衡。
analysis.problem: 如何定义并计算一种均衡，使其最小化联盟偏离的平均收益（或加权平均、联盟内最大收益），并保证存在性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义最小化联盟偏离平均收益的均衡概念，并扩展至加权平均和联盟内最大收益；证明最小化最小收益是计算困难的，而对平均收益和最大收益目标给出下界并设计匹配算法；最后应用于可剥削性福利前沿（EWF）问题。
contributions: 提出一种新的均衡概念，最小化联盟偏离的平均收益，保证存在性。
证明最小化最小收益是计算困难的，而对平均收益和最大收益目标给出复杂度下界并设计最优算法。
将框架应用于求解可剥削性福利前沿（EWF）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于有限博弈或特定收益结构。
未讨论实际博弈中的计算效率或近似解。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种最小化联盟偏离收益的均衡概念，保证存在性并给出高效算法。

papers.title: Visual Generation in the New Era: An Evolution from Atomic Mapping to Agentic World Modeling
papers.abstract: Recent visual generation models have made major progress in photorealism, typography, instruction following, and interactive editing, yet they still struggle with spatial reasoning, persistent state, long-horizon consistency, and causal understanding. We argue that the field should move beyond appearance synthesis toward intelligent visual generation: plausible visuals grounded in structure, dynamics, domain knowledge, and causal relations. To frame this shift, we introduce a five-level taxonomy: Atomic Generation, Conditional Generation, In-Context Generation, Agentic Generation, and World-Modeling Generation, progressing from passive renderers to interactive, agentic, world-aware generators. We analyze key technical drivers, including flow matching, unified understanding-and-generation models, improved visual representations, post-training, reward modeling, data curation, synthetic data distillation, and sampling acceleration. We further show that current evaluations often overestimate progress by emphasizing perceptual quality while missing structural, temporal, and causal failures. By combining benchmark review, in-the-wild stress tests, and expert-constrained case studies, this roadmap offers a capability-centered lens for understanding, evaluating, and advancing the next generation of intelligent visual generation systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出视觉生成从原子映射到智能世界建模的五级分类法，并分析技术驱动与评估缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉生成模型在空间推理、持久状态、长程一致性和因果理解方面存在根本性不足，需要超越外观合成迈向智能生成。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地定义、评估和推动视觉生成从被动渲染向智能世界建模的演进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前评估过度强调感知质量，忽略了结构、时间和因果层面的失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出五级分类法（原子生成、条件生成、上下文生成、智能体生成、世界模型生成），并分析流匹配、统一理解-生成模型、后训练、奖励建模等关键技术驱动。
contributions: 提出视觉生成的五级分类法，明确从原子映射到世界建模的演进路径。
系统分析关键技术和评估缺陷，提供能力中心的路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分类法可能过于抽象，缺乏具体实现细节。
未提供实证验证分类法的有效性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视觉生成从原子映射到智能世界建模的五级分类法，并分析技术驱动与评估缺陷。

papers.title: Synthetic Computers at Scale for Long-Horizon Productivity Simulation
papers.abstract: Realistic long-horizon productivity work is strongly conditioned on user-specific computer environments, where much of the work context is stored and organized through directory structures and content-rich artifacts. To scale synthetic data creation for such productivity scenarios, we introduce Synthetic Computers at Scale, a scalable methodology for creating such environments with realistic folder hierarchies and content-rich artifacts (e.g., documents, spreadsheets, and presentations). Conditioned on each synthetic computer, we run long-horizon simulations: one agent creates productivity objectives that are specific to the computer's user and require multiple professional deliverables and about a month of human work; another agent then acts as that user and keeps working across the computer -- for example, navigating the filesystem for grounding, coordinating with simulated collaborators, and producing professional artifacts -- until these objectives are completed. In preliminary experiments, we create 1,000 synthetic computers and run long-horizon simulations on them; each run requires over 8 hours of agent runtime and spans more than 2,000 turns on average. These simulations produce rich experiential learning signals, whose effectiveness is validated by significant improvements in agent performance on both in-domain and out-of-domain productivity evaluations. Given that personas are abundant at billion scale, this methodology can in principle scale to millions or even billions of synthetic user worlds with sufficient compute, enabling broader coverage of diverse professions, roles, contexts, environments, and productivity needs. We argue that scalable synthetic computer creation, together with at-scale simulations, is highly promising as a foundational substrate for agent self-improvement and agentic reinforcement learning in long-horizon productivity scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模合成计算机环境生成方法，用于长周期生产力场景的智能体仿真与自我提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实长周期生产力工作高度依赖用户特定的计算机环境，而现有合成数据方法难以规模化创建具有真实文件夹层次和丰富内容的环境，限制了智能体在复杂生产力场景中的训练与评估。
analysis.problem: 如何规模化生成具有真实文件夹结构和内容丰富的合成计算机环境，并基于此进行长周期生产力仿真，以提升智能体在长期任务中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Synthetic Computers at Scale方法，先创建包含真实文件夹层次和文档、电子表格等内容的合成计算机环境；然后运行长周期仿真：一个智能体生成针对该计算机用户的生产力目标（需多个专业交付物、约一个月工作量），另一个智能体作为用户在该环境中持续工作（如导航文件系统、与模拟协作者协调、生成专业工件）直至目标完成。
contributions: 提出一种可扩展的合成计算机环境生成方法，支持真实文件夹层次和丰富内容。
设计长周期生产力仿真流程，生成丰富的经验学习信号，并在域内和域外评估中验证了其对智能体性能的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 初步实验创建了1,000个合成计算机并运行长周期仿真，每次运行超过8小时智能体运行时，平均超过2,000轮交互。仿真产生的经验学习信号在域内和域外生产力评估中显著提升了智能体性能。
limitations: 实验规模为1,000个合成计算机，更大规模（百万/十亿）的可行性尚未验证。
仿真依赖大量计算资源，实际部署成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模合成计算机环境生成方法，用于长周期生产力场景的智能体仿真与自我提升。

papers.title: Stop Holding Your Breath: CT-Informed Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Bronchoscopy
papers.abstract: Bronchoscopic navigation relies on registering endoscopic video to a preoperative CT scan, but respiratory motion deforms the airway by 5-20 mm, creating CT-to-body divergence that limits localization accuracy. In practice, this is mitigated through breath-hold protocols, which attempt to match the intraoperative anatomy to a static CT, but are difficult to reproduce and disrupt clinical workflow. We propose to eliminate the need for breath-hold protocols by leveraging patient-specific respiratory modeling. Paired inhale-exhale CT scans, already acquired for planning, implicitly define the patient-specific deformation space of the breathing airway. By registering these scans, we reduce respiratory motion to a single scalar breathing phase per frame, constraining all reconstructions to anatomically observed configurations. We embed this representation within a mesh-anchored Gaussian splatting framework, where a lightweight estimator infers breathing phase directly from endoscopic RGB, enabling continuous, deformation-aware reconstruction throughout the respiratory cycle without breath-holds or external sensing. To enable quantitative evaluation, we introduce RESPIRE, a physically grounded bronchoscopy simulation pipeline with per-frame ground truth for geometry, pose, breathing phase, and deformation. Experiments on RESPIRE show that our approach achieves geometrically faithful reconstruction, over 20x faster training, and 1.22 mm target localization accuracy (within the 3mm clinically relevant tolerances) outperforming unconstrained single-CT baselines. Please check out our website for additional visuals: https://asdunnbe.github.io/RESPIRE/

analysis.tldr: 提出CT引导的高斯泼溅框架，无需屏气即可实现动态支气管镜下的呼吸运动感知重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 支气管镜导航依赖术前CT与内窥镜视频配准，但呼吸运动导致气道变形5-20mm，造成CT与体内差异，限制定位精度；现有屏气协议难以复现且干扰临床流程。
analysis.problem: 消除支气管镜导航中对屏气协议的依赖，实现呼吸周期内连续、变形感知的重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用配对吸气-呼气CT扫描定义患者特定呼吸变形空间，通过配准将呼吸运动简化为每帧单个标量呼吸相位；嵌入网格锚定高斯泼溅框架，用轻量估计器从内窥镜RGB图像推断呼吸相位，实现无屏气或外部传感的连续重建。
contributions: 提出无需屏气协议的CT引导高斯泼溅框架，实现动态支气管镜的变形感知重建。
引入RESPIRE仿真管线，提供每帧几何、位姿、呼吸相位和变形的真实数据。
实验表明方法在几何保真度、训练速度（>20倍）和目标定位精度（1.22mm，优于单CT基线）上表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在RESPIRE仿真数据集上评估，目标定位精度1.22mm（临床相关容差3mm内），训练速度提升20倍以上。
limitations: 依赖配对吸气-呼气CT扫描，可能不适用于仅有单次CT的场景。
仿真环境与真实临床数据可能存在差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CT引导的高斯泼溅框架，无需屏气即可实现动态支气管镜下的呼吸运动感知重建。

papers.title: LLM as Clinical Graph Structure Refiner: Enhancing Representation Learning in EEG Seizure Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals are vital for automated seizure detection, but their inherent noise makes robust representation learning challenging. Existing graph construction methods, whether correlation-based or learning-based, often generate redundant or irrelevant edges due to the noisy nature of EEG data. This significantly impairs the quality of graph representation and limits downstream task performance. Motivated by the remarkable reasoning and contextual understanding capabilities of large language models (LLMs), we explore the idea of using LLMs as graph edge refiners. Specifically, we propose a two-stage framework: we first verify that LLM-based edge refinement can effectively identify and remove redundant connections, leading to significant improvements in seizure detection accuracy and more meaningful graph structures. Building on this insight, we further develop a robust solution where the initial graph is constructed using a Transformer-based edge predictor and multilayer perceptron, assigning probability scores to potential edges and applying a threshold to determine their existence. The LLM then acts as an edge set refiner, making informed decisions based on both textual and statistical features of node pairs to validate the remaining connections. Extensive experiments on TUSZ dataset demonstrate that our LLM-refined graph learning framework not only enhances task performance but also yields cleaner and more interpretable graph representations.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM作为图边精炼器，提升EEG癫痫诊断中图表示学习的质量。
analysis.research_motivation: EEG信号噪声大，现有图构建方法易产生冗余或无关边，影响图表示质量和下游任务性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM的推理和上下文理解能力，精炼EEG信号图结构中的边，去除冗余连接，提升图表示学习效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：首先用Transformer和MLP构建初始图，为边分配概率分数并阈值化；然后LLM作为边集精炼器，基于节点对的文本和统计特征验证剩余边的有效性。
contributions: 提出LLM作为图边精炼器的概念，验证其能有效识别和移除冗余边。
开发鲁棒的两阶段图学习框架，结合Transformer和LLM提升EEG癫痫诊断性能。
analysis.experiments: 在TUSZ数据集上实验，表明LLM精炼的图学习框架提升了任务性能，并得到更清晰、可解释的图表示。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，计算成本较高。
未讨论LLM精炼的泛化性到其他EEG任务或数据集。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM作为图边精炼器，提升EEG癫痫诊断中图表示学习的质量。

papers.title: AEGIS: A Holistic Benchmark for Evaluating Forensic Analysis of AI-Generated Academic Images
papers.abstract: We introduce AEGIS, A holistic benchmark for Evaluating forensic analysis of AI-Generated academic ImageS. Compared to existing benchmarks, AEGIS features three key advances: (1) Domain-Specific Complexity: covering seven academic categories with 39 fine-grained subtypes, exposing intrinsic forensic difficulty, where even GPT-5.1 reaches 48.80% overall performance and expert models achieve only limited localization accuracy (IoU 30.09%); (2) Diverse Forgery Simulations: modeling four prevalent academic forgery strategies across 25 generative models, with 11 yielding average forensic accuracy below 50%, showing that forensics lag behind generative advances; and (3) Multi-Dimensional Forensic Evaluation: jointly assessing detection, reasoning, and localization, revealing complementary strengths between model families, with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) at 84.74% accuracy in textual artifact recognition and expert detectors peaking at 79.54% accuracy in binary authenticity detection. By evaluating 25 leading MLLMs, nine expert models, and one unified multimodal understanding and generation model, AEGIS serves as a diagnostic testbed exposing fundamental limitations in academic image forensics.

analysis.tldr: AEGIS 是一个针对 AI 生成学术图像取证的多维度基准，揭示了现有模型在检测、推理和定位上的严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着 AI 生成图像在学术领域被滥用，现有基准缺乏领域特异性、伪造多样性和多维评估，无法全面衡量取证能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个覆盖多种学术类别、伪造策略和多维度评估的基准来诊断 AI 生成学术图像取证的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：GPT-5.1 整体性能仅 48.80%，专家模型定位精度低（IoU 30.09%）；25 个生成模型中 11 个导致平均取证准确率低于 50%；MLLM 在文本伪影识别上准确率 84.74%，专家模型在二分类真伪检测上峰值 79.54%，表明不同模型家族有互补优势。
analysis.method: 构建包含 7 个学术类别、39 个细分子类的基准，模拟 4 种常见学术伪造策略，使用 25 个生成模型生成图像，并设计检测、推理、定位三维评估。
contributions: 提出首个针对学术图像取证的全面基准 AEGIS，覆盖多种学术领域和伪造策略。
通过多维度评估（检测、推理、定位）揭示当前模型在学术图像取证中的根本局限。
analysis.experiments: 评估了 25 个领先 MLLM、9 个专家模型和 1 个统一多模态理解与生成模型，报告了整体性能、定位精度和不同任务下的准确率。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有学术图像类型或伪造技术。
评估主要基于现有模型，未提出新的取证方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AEGIS 是一个针对 AI 生成学术图像取证的多维度基准，揭示了现有模型在检测、推理和定位上的严重不足。

papers.title: Action Motifs: Self-Supervised Hierarchical Representation of Human Body Movements
papers.abstract: Effective human behavior modeling requires a representation of the human body movement that capitalizes on its compositionality. We propose a hierarchical representation consisting of Action Atoms that capture the atomic joint movements and Action Motifs that are formed by their temporal compositions and encode similar body movements found across different overall human actions. We derive A4Mer, a nested latent Transformer to learn this hierarchical representation from human pose data in a fully self-supervised manner. A4Mer splits a 3D pose sequence into variable-length segments and represents each segment as a single latent token (Action Atoms). Through bottom-up representation learning, temporal patterns composed of these Action Atoms, which capture meaningful temporal spans of reusable, semantic segments of body movements, naturally emerge (Action Motifs). A4Mer achieves this with a unified pretext task of masked token prediction in their respective latent spaces. We also introduce Action Motif Dataset (AMD), a large-scale dataset of multi-view human behavior videos with full SMPL annotations. We introduce a novel use of cameras by mounting them on the feet to achieve their frame-wise annotations despite frequent and heavy body occlusions. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of A4Mer for extracting meaningful Action Motifs, which significantly benefit human behavior modeling tasks including action recognition, motion prediction, and motion interpolation.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督层次化人体运动表征A4Mer，通过Action Atoms和Action Motifs捕捉人体运动的组合性，在多个行为建模任务上有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 人体行为建模需要利用运动的组合性，但现有方法缺乏层次化表征，难以捕捉可复用的语义运动片段。
analysis.problem: 如何从人体姿态数据中自监督学习层次化运动表征，以提取可复用的动作基元（Action Motifs）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出A4Mer，一种嵌套潜变量Transformer，将3D姿态序列分割为变长片段并编码为潜变量（Action Atoms），通过自监督掩码预测学习层次表征，使时间上组合的Action Atoms自然涌现为Action Motifs。
contributions: 提出层次化运动表征框架A4Mer，包含Action Atoms和Action Motifs，实现自监督学习。
构建大规模多视角人体行为数据集AMD，含完整SMPL标注，并创新性地将相机安装在脚上以应对遮挡。
analysis.experiments: 在动作识别、运动预测和运动插值任务上验证了A4Mer提取的Action Motifs的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D姿态数据，实际场景中获取困难。
层次化表征的语义可解释性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督层次化人体运动表征A4Mer，通过Action Atoms和Action Motifs捕捉人体运动的组合性，在多个行为建模任务上有效。

papers.title: DeGenTWeb: A First Look at LLM-dominant Websites
papers.abstract: Many recent news reports have claimed that content generated by large language models (LLMs) is taking over the web. However, these claims are typically not based on a representative sample of the web and the methodology underlying them is often opaque. Moreover, when aiming to minimize the chances of falsely attributing human-authored content to LLMs, we find that detectors of LLM-generated text perform much worse than advertised. Consequently, we lack an understanding of the true prevalence and characteristics of LLM content on the web. We describe DeGenTWeb which systematically identifies LLM-dominant websites: sites whose content has been generated using LLMs with little human input. We show how to adapt detectors of LLM-generated text for use on web pages, and how to aggregate detection results from multiple pages on a site for accurate site-level categorization. Using DeGenTWeb, we find that LLM-dominant sites are highly prevalent both in data from Common Crawl and in Bing's search results, and that this share is growing over time. We also show that continuing to accurately identify such sites appears challenging given the capabilities of the latest LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 系统识别LLM主导网站，发现其在网络和搜索结果中普遍存在且比例持续增长。
analysis.research_motivation: 新闻声称LLM内容充斥网络，但缺乏基于代表性样本的系统性研究，且现有检测器在低误报率下表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对LLM生成内容在网络中真实流行程度和特征的理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM主导网站在Common Crawl和Bing搜索结果中高度普遍，且比例随时间增长；最新LLM使得准确识别此类网站更具挑战性。
analysis.method: 提出DeGenTWeb框架，通过适配LLM文本检测器用于网页，并聚合多页面检测结果实现网站级分类。
contributions: 首次系统性地识别和分析LLM主导网站。
展示了如何适配检测器并聚合结果以进行准确的网站级分类。
揭示了LLM主导网站在网络和搜索结果中的高流行度及增长趋势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 检测器在低误报率下性能有限，可能漏检部分LLM内容。
方法依赖现有检测器，对最新LLM的适应性可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统识别LLM主导网站，发现其在网络和搜索结果中普遍存在且比例持续增长。

papers.title: PhyCo: Learning Controllable Physical Priors for Generative Motion
papers.abstract: Modern video diffusion models excel at appearance synthesis but still struggle with physical consistency: objects drift, collisions lack realistic rebound, and material responses seldom match their underlying properties. We present PhyCo, a framework that introduces continuous, interpretable, and physically grounded control into video generation. Our approach integrates three key components: (i) a large-scale dataset of over 100K photorealistic simulation videos where friction, restitution, deformation, and force are systematically varied across diverse scenarios; (ii) physics-supervised fine-tuning of a pretrained diffusion model using a ControlNet conditioned on pixel-aligned physical property maps; and (iii) VLM-guided reward optimization, where a fine-tuned vision-language model evaluates generated videos with targeted physics queries and provides differentiable feedback. This combination enables a generative model to produce physically consistent and controllable outputs through variations in physical attributes-without any simulator or geometry reconstruction at inference. On the Physics-IQ benchmark, PhyCo significantly improves physical realism over strong baselines, and human studies confirm clearer and more faithful control over physical attributes. Our results demonstrate a scalable path toward physically consistent, controllable generative video models that generalize beyond synthetic training environments.

analysis.tldr: PhyCo通过物理监督微调、ControlNet和VLM奖励优化，将可控物理先验引入视频扩散模型，提升生成视频的物理一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在生成时缺乏物理一致性，如物体漂移、碰撞反弹不真实、材料响应与属性不匹配，限制了其在物理模拟和交互场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将连续、可解释且物理可控的先验知识融入视频生成模型，使其在推理时无需模拟器或几何重建即可生成物理一致且可控的视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含10万+仿真视频的数据集，系统变化摩擦、恢复系数、变形和力等物理属性；使用物理属性图作为条件，通过ControlNet对预训练扩散模型进行物理监督微调；结合VLM奖励优化，用微调后的视觉语言模型评估生成视频的物理合理性并提供可微反馈。
contributions: 提出PhyCo框架，首次将连续、可解释的物理先验控制引入视频扩散模型。
构建大规模物理仿真视频数据集，系统标注多种物理属性。
结合物理监督微调和VLM奖励优化，实现无需推理时模拟器的物理一致生成。
analysis.experiments: 在Physics-IQ基准上，PhyCo显著提升了物理真实性，人类研究证实对物理属性的控制更清晰、更忠实。
limitations: 依赖仿真数据，可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的物理多样性。
VLM奖励优化可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhyCo通过物理监督微调、ControlNet和VLM奖励优化，将可控物理先验引入视频扩散模型，提升生成视频的物理一致性。

papers.title: Continuous-tone Simple Points: An $\ell_0$-Norm of Cyclic Gradient for Topology-Preserving Data-Driven Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Topological features play an essential role in ensuring geometric plausibility and structural consistency in image analysis tasks such as segmentation and skeletonization. However, integrating topology-preserving learning based on simple points into deep learning tasks remains challenging, as existing simple point detection methods are confined to binary images and are non-differentiable, rendering them incompatible with gradient-based optimization in modern deep learning. Moreover, morphological and purely data-driven approaches often fail to guaranty topological consistency. To address these limitations, we propose a novel method that directly computes simple points on continuous-valued images, enabling differentiable topological inference. Building on this theory, we develop an efficient skeleton extraction algorithm that preserves topological structures in binary and continuous-valued images. Furthermore, we design a variational model that enforces topological constraints by preserving topologically non-removable (i.e., non-simple) points, which can be seamlessly integrated into any deep neural network segmentation with softmax or sigmoid outputs. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach effectively improves topological integrity and structural accuracy across multiple benchmarks. The codes are available in https://github.com/levnsio/CSP.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续值图像上的简单点检测方法，实现可微分拓扑约束，提升图像分割的拓扑一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有简单点检测方法局限于二值图像且不可微，无法与深度学习梯度优化兼容；形态学或纯数据驱动方法难以保证拓扑一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何在连续值图像上实现可微分的简单点检测，并将其作为拓扑约束集成到深度分割网络中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出连续值图像上的简单点计算方法，基于循环梯度的ℓ₀范数实现可微分拓扑推理；设计骨架提取算法和变分模型，通过保留拓扑不可移除点（非简单点）施加拓扑约束，可无缝集成到softmax/sigmoid输出的分割网络。
contributions: 提出连续值图像上可微分的简单点检测理论，突破二值图像限制。
开发拓扑保持的骨架提取算法，适用于二值和连续值图像。
设计可集成到任意分割网络的拓扑约束变分模型，提升拓扑完整性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上验证了方法能有效提升拓扑完整性和结构精度。摘要未提供具体数据集和数值结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂拓扑结构（如高维图像）的适用性未提及。
计算效率可能受ℓ₀范数优化影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续值图像上的简单点检测方法，实现可微分拓扑约束，提升图像分割的拓扑一致性。

papers.title: Intern-Atlas: A Methodological Evolution Graph as Research Infrastructure for AI Scientists
papers.abstract: Existing research infrastructure is fundamentally document-centric, providing citation links between papers but lacking explicit representations of methodological evolution. In particular, it does not capture the structured relationships that explain how and why research methods emerge, adapt, and build upon one another. With the rise of AI-driven research agents as a new class of consumers of scientific knowledge, this limitation becomes increasingly consequential, as such agents cannot reliably reconstruct method evolution topologies from unstructured text. We introduce Intern-Atlas, a methodological evolution graph that automatically identifies method-level entities, infers lineage relationships among methodologies, and captures the bottlenecks that drive transitions between successive innovations. Built from 1,030,314 papers spanning AI conferences, journals, and arXiv preprints, the resulting graph comprises 9,410,201 semantically typed edges, each grounded in verbatim source evidence, forming a queryable causal network of methodological development. To operationalize this structure, we further propose a self-guided temporal tree search algorithm for constructing evolution chains that trace the progression of methods over time. We evaluate the quality of the resulting graph against expert-curated ground-truth evolution chains and observe strong alignment. In addition, we demonstrate that Intern-Atlas enables downstream applications in idea evaluation and automated idea generation. We position methodological evolution graphs as a foundational data layer for the emerging automated scientific discovery.

analysis.tldr: 构建方法论演化图作为AI科学家的研究基础设施，支持自动追踪方法演进。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究基础设施以文档为中心，仅提供论文间引用链接，缺乏对方法论演化结构关系的显式表示，无法支持AI研究代理从非结构化文本中可靠重建方法演化拓扑。
analysis.problem: 如何自动构建一个包含方法级实体、谱系关系和驱动瓶颈的方法论演化图，并支持演化链查询。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从103万篇论文中自动识别方法级实体，推断谱系关系，捕捉驱动瓶颈，构建包含941万个语义类型边的图；并提出自引导时序树搜索算法用于构建演化链。
contributions: 提出Intern-Atlas方法论演化图，自动构建方法级实体、谱系关系和驱动瓶颈。
提出自引导时序树搜索算法，用于追踪方法随时间演化的链条。
在专家标注的演化链上验证了图质量，并展示了在想法评估和自动生成中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖论文文本质量，对非标准术语识别有限。
演化链搜索算法可能在大规模图上效率不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建方法论演化图作为AI科学家的研究基础设施，支持自动追踪方法演进。

papers.title: FlexiTac: A Low-Cost, Open-Source, Scalable Tactile Sensing Solution for Robotic Systems
papers.abstract: We present FlexiTac, a low-cost, open-source, and scalable piezoresistive tactile sensing solution designed for robotic end-effectors. FlexiTac is a practical "plug-in" module consisting of (i) thin, flexible tactile sensor pads that provide dense tactile signals and (ii) a compact multi-channel readout board that streams synchronized measurements for real-time control and large-scale data collection. FlexiTac pads adopt a sealed three-layer laminate stack (FPC-Velostat-FPC) with electrode patterns directly integrated into flexible printed circuits, substantially improving fabrication throughput and repeatability while maintaining mechanical compliance for deployment on both rigid and soft grippers. The readout electronics use widely available, low-cost components and stream tactile signals to a host computer at 100 Hz via serial communication. Across multiple configurations, including fingertip pads and larger tactile mats, FlexiTac can be mounted on diverse platforms without major mechanical redesign. We further show that FlexiTac supports modern tactile learning pipelines, including 3D visuo-tactile fusion for contact-aware decision making, cross-embodiment skill transfer, and real-to-sim-to-real fine-tuning with GPU-parallel tactile simulation. Our project page is available at https://flexitac.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: FlexiTac 是一种低成本、开源、可扩展的压阻式触觉传感方案，支持实时控制和触觉学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有触觉传感器成本高、制造复杂、难以集成到不同机器人平台，限制了触觉在机器人中的广泛应用。
analysis.problem: 设计一种低成本、可扩展、易于集成且支持现代触觉学习管线的触觉传感解决方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用三层柔性层压结构（FPC-Velostat-FPC），电极直接集成在柔性电路上，配合紧凑的多通道读取板，实现100Hz实时触觉信号流。
contributions: 提出低成本、开源、可扩展的压阻式触觉传感器设计，制造重复性好且机械柔顺。
展示传感器支持3D视觉-触觉融合、跨本体技能迁移和真实-仿真-真实微调等现代触觉学习管线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏与现有触觉传感器的定量性能对比。
长期耐用性和在复杂环境下的鲁棒性未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlexiTac 是一种低成本、开源、可扩展的压阻式触觉传感方案，支持实时控制和触觉学习。

papers.title: A Proof-of-Concept Study of Multitask Learning for Cranial Synthetic CT Generation Across Heterogeneous MRI Field Strengths
papers.abstract: Accurate synthesis of computed tomography (CT) images from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is clinically valuable for cranial applications such as attenuation correction, radiotherapy planning, and image-guided interventions. However, heterogeneity across MRI field strengths and acquisition protocols limits the generalizability of existing methods. In this study, we formulate cranial CT synthesis as a modular, structurally coupled problem and propose a deep learning framework to improve robustness across heterogeneous MRI conditions. The model is designed to adapt to variations in field strength and imaging protocols while preserving anatomical consistency. Experiments on multi-site datasets demonstrate improved performance and generalization compared with conventional approaches. The proposed method enables reliable CT synthesis across heterogeneous MRI settings, supporting broader clinical translation.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化多任务学习框架，提升跨MRI场强颅脑CT合成鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: MRI场强和采集协议的异质性限制了现有CT合成方法的泛化能力，临床需求迫切。
analysis.problem: 解决跨异质MRI场强下颅脑CT合成泛化性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将CT合成建模为模块化、结构耦合问题，设计深度学习框架适应场强和协议变化，保持解剖一致性。
contributions: 提出模块化多任务学习框架用于跨场强CT合成
在多站点数据集上验证了改进的泛化性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对颅脑区域，未验证其他部位
模块化设计可能增加模型复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化多任务学习框架，提升跨MRI场强颅脑CT合成鲁棒性。

papers.title: Claw-Eval-Live: A Live Agent Benchmark for Evolving Real-World Workflows
papers.abstract: LLM agents are expected to complete end-to-end units of work across software tools, business services, and local workspaces. Yet many agent benchmarks freeze a curated task set at release time and grade mainly the final response, making it difficult to evaluate agents against evolving workflow demand or verify whether a task was executed. We introduce Claw-Eval-Live, a live benchmark for workflow agents that separates a refreshable signal layer, updated across releases from public workflow-demand signals, from a reproducible, time-stamped release snapshot. Each release is constructed from public workflow-demand signals, with ClawHub Top-500 skills used in the current release, and materialized as controlled tasks with fixed fixtures, services, workspaces, and graders. For grading, Claw-Eval-Live records execution traces, audit logs, service state, and post-run workspace artifacts, using deterministic checks when evidence is sufficient and structured LLM judging only for semantic dimensions. The release contains 105 tasks spanning controlled business services and local workspace repair, and evaluates 13 frontier models under a shared public pass rule. Experiments reveal that reliable workflow automation remains far from solved: the leading model passes only 66.7% of tasks and no model reaches 70%. Failures are structured by task family and execution surface, with HR, management, and multi-system business workflows as persistent bottlenecks and local workspace repair comparatively easier but unsaturated. Leaderboard rank alone is insufficient because models with similar pass rates can diverge in overall completion, and task-level discrimination concentrates in a middle band of tasks. Claw-Eval-Live suggests that workflow-agent evaluation should be grounded twice, in fresh external demand and in verifiable agent action.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个实时更新的工作流Agent基准Claw-Eval-Live，发现当前最强模型仅通过66.7%的任务，工作流自动化远未解决。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent基准冻结任务集且仅评估最终响应，无法衡量Agent对不断变化的工作流需求的适应能力，也无法验证任务是否真正执行。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能反映真实世界工作流需求变化、且可验证Agent执行过程的动态基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最强模型仅通过66.7%的任务，无模型达到70%；失败模式按任务族和执行面结构化，HR、管理、多系统业务工作流是持续瓶颈，本地工作空间修复相对容易但未饱和；排行榜排名不足以区分模型，因为通过率相似的模型在整体完成度上可能不同。
analysis.method: 提出Claw-Eval-Live，包含可刷新的信号层和可复现的时间戳快照；每个版本从公共工作流需求信号构建，使用ClawHub Top-500技能，物化为固定fixture、服务、工作空间和评分器的受控任务；评分记录执行轨迹、审计日志、服务状态和后运行工作空间工件，确定性检查为主，LLM判断仅用于语义维度。
contributions: 提出一个实时更新的工作流Agent基准，分离信号层和快照层，支持持续评估。
通过105个任务和13个前沿模型的实验，揭示工作流自动化远未解决，并分析失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在105个任务上评估13个前沿模型，使用共享公共通过规则。
limitations: 任务数量有限（105个），可能无法覆盖所有真实工作流场景。
LLM判断仅用于语义维度，可能仍存在评估偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个实时更新的工作流Agent基准Claw-Eval-Live，发现当前最强模型仅通过66.7%的任务，工作流自动化远未解决。

papers.title: Crab: A Semantics-Aware Checkpoint/Restore Runtime for Agent Sandboxes
papers.abstract: Autonomous agents act through sandboxed containers and microVMs whose state spans filesystems, processes, and runtime artifacts. Checkpoint and restore (C/R) of this state is needed for fault tolerance, spot execution, RL rollout branching, and safe rollback-yet existing approaches fall into two extremes: application-level recovery preserves chat history but misses OS-side effects, while full per-turn checkpointing is correct but too expensive under dense co-location. The root cause is an agent-OS semantic gap: agent frameworks see tool calls but not their OS effects; the OS sees state changes but lacks turn-level context to judge recovery relevance. This gap hides massive sparsity: over 75% of agent turns produce no recovery-relevant state, so most checkpoints are unnecessary. Crab (Checkpoint-and-Restore for Agent SandBoxes) is a transparent host-side runtime that bridges this gap without modifying agents or C/R backends. An eBPF-based inspector classifies each turn's OS-visible effects to decide checkpoint granularity; a coordinator aligns checkpoints with turn boundaries and overlaps C/R with LLM wait time; and a host-scoped engine schedules checkpoint traffic across co-located sandboxes. On shell-intensive and code-repair workloads, Crab raises recovery correctness from 8% (chat-only) to 100%, cuts checkpoint traffic by up to 87%, and stays within 1.9% of fault-free execution time.

analysis.tldr: Crab 通过语义感知的检查点/恢复运行时，弥合智能体与操作系统之间的语义鸿沟，实现高效且正确的沙箱状态恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主智能体依赖沙箱执行，其状态跨文件系统、进程和运行时工件，需要检查点/恢复（C/R）实现容错、分支执行和安全回滚。现有方法要么丢失操作系统侧效果，要么开销过高，无法在密集共置场景下实用。
analysis.problem: 智能体框架与操作系统之间存在语义鸿沟：框架看到工具调用但看不到其操作系统效果，操作系统看到状态变化但缺乏回合级上下文来判断恢复相关性，导致检查点要么不完整要么冗余。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到超过75%的智能体回合不产生与恢复相关的状态，因此大多数检查点是不必要的，存在巨大的稀疏性。
analysis.method: Crab 是一个透明的宿主机端运行时，包含三个组件：基于 eBPF 的检查器分类每个回合的操作系统可见效果以决定检查点粒度；协调器将检查点与回合边界对齐，并重叠 C/R 与 LLM 等待时间；宿主机范围引擎调度跨共置沙箱的检查点流量。
contributions: 提出 Crab，一个语义感知的检查点/恢复运行时，弥合智能体与操作系统之间的语义鸿沟。
通过 eBPF 检查器利用回合级语义实现稀疏检查点，减少高达87%的检查点流量。
在 shell 密集和代码修复工作负载上，将恢复正确率从8%（仅聊天）提升至100%，且开销接近无故障执行。
analysis.experiments: 在 shell 密集型任务和代码修复工作负载上评估，Crab 将恢复正确率从8%提升至100%，检查点流量减少高达87%，额外开销仅为无故障执行时间的1.9%。
limitations: 可能依赖 eBPF 和特定操作系统特性，跨平台兼容性未知。
仅针对 shell 和代码修复场景验证，其他类型智能体工作负载效果待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Crab 通过语义感知的检查点/恢复运行时，弥合智能体与操作系统之间的语义鸿沟，实现高效且正确的沙箱状态恢复。

papers.title: Beyond Pixel Fidelity: Minimizing Perceptual Distortion and Color Bias in Night Photography Rendering
papers.abstract: Night Photography Rendering (NPR) poses a significant challenge due to the extreme contrast between dark and illuminated areas in scenes, stemming from concurrent capture of severely dark regions alongside intense point light sources. Existing methods, which are mainly tailored for fidelity metrics, reveal considerable perceptual gaps and often detract from visual quality. We introduce pHVI-ISPNet, a novel RAW-to-RGB framework built on the robust HVI color space. Our network integrates four distinct key refinements: RAW-domain feature processing and Wavelet-based feature propagation to mitigate high-frequency detail loss; sample-based dynamic loss coefficients to ensure stable learning across varying exposure levels; and loss term based on feature distributions to maintain rigorous color constancy. Evaluations on the dataset introduced in the NTIRE 2025 challenge on NPR confirm our approach achieves competitive fidelity while establishing new state-of-the-art results in both CIE2000 color difference and LPIPS. This validates our perceptually-driven design for high-quality nighttime imaging.

analysis.tldr: 提出pHVI-ISPNet，在HVI色彩空间上通过RAW域处理、小波传播、动态损失系数和特征分布损失，在夜间摄影渲染中同时优化感知失真和颜色偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 夜间摄影渲染中暗区和强光源的极端对比导致现有基于保真度指标的方法存在感知差距和视觉质量下降，需要一种感知驱动的RAW-to-RGB框架。
analysis.problem: 如何在夜间摄影渲染中同时最小化感知失真和颜色偏差，超越传统像素级保真度指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法主要针对保真度指标，在感知上存在明显差距，且常损害视觉质量。
analysis.method: 基于HVI色彩空间的RAW-to-RGB网络，包含RAW域特征处理、小波特征传播、样本动态损失系数和基于特征分布的损失项。
contributions: 提出pHVI-ISPNet，在HVI色彩空间上集成四种关键改进以优化感知和颜色。
在NTIRE 2025挑战赛数据集上实现CIE2000色差和LPIPS的新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2025挑战赛的夜间摄影渲染数据集上评估，在CIE2000和LPIPS上达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖特定挑战赛数据集，泛化性未充分验证。
计算复杂度可能较高，未在摘要中讨论效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出pHVI-ISPNet，在HVI色彩空间上通过RAW域处理、小波传播、动态损失系数和特征分布损失，在夜间摄影渲染中同时优化感知失真和颜色偏差。

papers.title: To Vibe Research or Not to Vibe Research? Generative AI in Qualitative Research
papers.abstract: There has been intense debate among qualitative researchers about whether generative AI is suitable for qualitative research. In this paper, we summarize the broader ongoing discussion of generative AI in qualitative research and its implications for software engineering researchers. The qualitative research approach, small-q (positivist or post-positivist) or Big Q (non-positivist), is among the major criteria for determining whether generative AI can be used in qualitative research. In addition to research philosophy and research approach, skills, ethics, and personal preferences also play a role in researchers' decisions about whether to use AI in qualitative research.

analysis.tldr: 探讨生成式AI在定性研究中的适用性，强调研究哲学、技能、伦理和个人偏好的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 定性研究者对生成式AI的适用性存在激烈争论，需要系统梳理其影响和决策因素。
analysis.problem: 确定生成式AI在定性研究中的适用条件，特别是基于研究哲学（小q vs 大Q）的决策框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，仅指出研究哲学、技能、伦理和个人偏好是决策关键。
analysis.method: 总结现有讨论，提出基于研究哲学（小q/大Q）的决策框架，并考虑技能、伦理和偏好。
contributions: 系统梳理了生成式AI在定性研究中的争论和影响
提出了基于研究哲学、技能、伦理和偏好的决策框架

papers.title: 3D-ReGen: A Unified 3D Geometry Regeneration Framework
papers.abstract: We consider the problem of regenerating 3D objects from 2D images and initial 3D shapes. Most 3D generators operate in a one-shot fashion, converting text or images to a 3D object with limited controllability. We introduce instead 3D-ReGen, a 3D regenerator that is conditioned on an initial 3D shape. This conceptually simple formulation allows us to support numerous useful tasks, including 3D enhancement, reconstruction, and editing. 3D-ReGen uses a new conditioning mechanism based on VecSet, which allows the regenerator to update or improve the input geometry with consistent fine-grained details. 3D-ReGen learns a widely applicable regeneration prior from off-the-shelf 3D datasets via self-supervised pretext tasks and augmentations, without additional annotations. We evaluate both the geometric consistency and fine-grained quality of 3D-ReGen, achieving state-of-the-art performance in controllable 3D generation across several tasks.

analysis.tldr: 3D-ReGen 提出一种基于初始形状条件化的 3D 重生成框架，通过 VecSet 机制实现可控的 3D 增强、重建与编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3D 生成器多为一次性转换，缺乏对初始形状的控制，难以支持增强、编辑等细粒度任务。
analysis.problem: 如何从 2D 图像和初始 3D 形状出发，实现可控且高质量的 3D 重生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 3D-ReGen 框架，采用基于 VecSet 的条件机制，通过自监督预任务和数据增强学习重生成先验。
contributions: 提出一种统一的 3D 重生成框架，支持增强、重建和编辑等多种任务。
设计基于 VecSet 的条件机制，实现细粒度几何更新。
通过自监督学习从现成 3D 数据集获得广泛适用的重生成先验。
analysis.experiments: 在多个任务上评估几何一致性和细粒度质量，达到可控 3D 生成的最优性能。
limitations: 可能依赖初始 3D 形状的质量。

papers.title: MoCapAnything V2: End-to-End Motion Capture for Arbitrary Skeletons
papers.abstract: Recent methods for arbitrary-skeleton motion capture from monocular video follow a factorized pipeline, where a Video-to-Pose network predicts joint positions and an analytical inverse-kinematics (IK) stage recovers joint rotations. While effective, this design is inherently limited, since joint positions do not fully determine rotations and leave degrees of freedom such as bone-axis twist ambiguous, and the non-differentiable IK stage prevents the system from adapting to noisy predictions or optimizing for the final animation objective. In this work, we present the first fully end-to-end framework in which both Video-to-Pose and Pose-to-Rotation are learnable and jointly optimized. We observe that the ambiguity in pose-to-rotation mapping arises from missing coordinate system information: the same joint positions can correspond to different rotations under different rest poses and local axis conventions. To resolve this, we introduce a reference pose-rotation pair from the target asset, which, together with the rest pose, not only anchors the mapping but also defines the underlying rotation coordinate system. This formulation turns rotation prediction into a well-constrained conditional problem and enables effective learning. In addition, our model predicts joint positions directly from video without relying on mesh intermediates, improving both robustness and efficiency. Both stages share a skeleton-aware Global-Local Graph-guided Multi-Head Attention (GL-GMHA) module for joint-level local reasoning and global coordination. Experiments on Truebones Zoo and Objaverse show that our method reduces rotation error from ~17 degrees to ~10 degrees, and to 6.54 degrees on unseen skeletons, while achieving ~20x faster inference than mesh-based pipelines. Project page: https://animotionlab.github.io/MoCapAnythingV2/

analysis.tldr: 首个端到端任意骨架动作捕捉框架，通过引入参考姿态-旋转对解决旋转歧义，显著降低旋转误差并加速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有任意骨架动作捕捉方法采用分解式流水线（Video-to-Pose + 逆运动学），但关节位置无法唯一确定旋转（如骨轴扭转歧义），且不可微的IK阶段阻碍联合优化，导致精度受限。
analysis.problem: 从单目视频中为任意骨架估计关节旋转时，关节位置到旋转的映射存在歧义，且现有分解式方法无法端到端优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出关节位置到旋转的歧义源于缺失坐标系信息：相同关节位置在不同静止姿态和局部轴约定下对应不同旋转。
analysis.method: 提出首个端到端可学习框架，包含Video-to-Pose和Pose-to-Rotation两个可学习阶段，并联合优化。引入目标资产的参考姿态-旋转对，与静止姿态一起锚定映射并定义旋转坐标系，将旋转预测转化为有约束的条件问题。两个阶段共享骨架感知的全局-局部图引导多头注意力（GL-GMHA）模块。
contributions: 首个端到端任意骨架动作捕捉框架，Video-to-Pose和Pose-to-Rotation均可学习且联合优化。
引入参考姿态-旋转对解决旋转歧义，使旋转预测成为有约束的条件问题。
提出骨架感知的GL-GMHA模块，实现关节级局部推理和全局协调。
在Truebones Zoo和Objaverse上旋转误差从~17°降至~10°，未见骨架降至6.54°，推理速度比基于网格的流水线快约20倍。
analysis.experiments: 在Truebones Zoo和Objaverse数据集上评估，旋转误差从约17度降至约10度，未见骨架降至6.54度，推理速度比基于网格的流水线快约20倍。
limitations: 可能依赖参考姿态-旋转对的质量和可用性。
未在真实复杂场景（如遮挡、快速运动）中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个端到端任意骨架动作捕捉框架，通过引入参考姿态-旋转对解决旋转歧义，显著降低旋转误差并加速推理。

papers.title: Latent Adversarial Detection: Adaptive Probing of LLM Activations for Multi-Turn Attack Detection
papers.abstract: Multi-turn prompt injection follows a known attack path -- trust-building, pivoting, escalation but text-level defenses miss covert attacks where individual turns appear benign. We show this attack path leaves an activation-level signature in the model's residual stream: each phase shift moves the activation, producing a total path length far exceeding benign conversations. We call this adversarial restlessness. Five scalar trajectory features capturing this signal lift conversation-level detection from 76.2% to 93.8% on synthetic held-out data. The signal replicates across four model families (24B-70B); probes are model-specific and do not transfer across architectures. Generalization is source-dependent: leave-one-source-out evaluation shows each of synthetic, LMSYS-Chat-1M, and SafeDialBench captures distinct attack distributions, with detection on real-world LMSYS reaching 47-71% when its distribution is represented in training. Combined three-source training achieves 89.4% detection at 2.4% false positive rate on a held-out mixed set. We further show that three-phase turn-level labels(benign/pivoting/adversarial) unique to our synthetic dataset are essential: binary conversation-level labels produce 50-59% false positives. These results establish adversarial restlessness as a reliable activation-level signal and characterize the data requirements for practical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析LLM残差流中的激活轨迹长度（对抗性不安），提出一种基于五维标量特征的潜在对抗检测方法，将多轮对话攻击检测率从76.2%提升至93.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮提示注入攻击遵循信任建立、转向、升级的路径，但文本级防御难以检测看似无害的单轮对话，需要更底层的检测信号。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM内部激活状态检测多轮对话中的隐蔽攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击路径在模型残差流中留下激活级签名：每个阶段转变移动激活向量，导致总路径长度远超良性对话，称为对抗性不安。
analysis.method: 提取五维标量轨迹特征（如路径长度等）捕捉激活轨迹信号，训练对话级分类器进行检测。
contributions: 发现并命名了对抗性不安现象，即多轮攻击在激活空间中产生异常长的轨迹。
提出基于五维标量特征的检测方法，在合成数据上将检测率从76.2%提升至93.8%。
系统评估了跨模型族、跨数据源的泛化性，并揭示了数据需求。
analysis.experiments: 在四个模型族（24B-70B）上验证信号可复现；消融实验显示三阶段轮次标签（良性/转向/对抗）对低误报率至关重要；跨源评估显示检测率依赖训练数据分布。
limitations: 检测器是模型特定的，不跨架构迁移。
真实世界数据（LMSYS）的检测率较低（47-71%），依赖分布匹配。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分析LLM残差流中的激活轨迹长度（对抗性不安），提出一种基于五维标量特征的潜在对抗检测方法，将多轮对话攻击检测率从76.2%提升至93.8%。

papers.title: NorBERTo: A ModernBERT Model Trained for Portuguese with 331 Billion Tokens Corpus
papers.abstract: High-quality corpora are essential for advancing Natural Language Processing (NLP) in Portuguese. Building on previous encoder-only models such as BERTimbau and Albertina PT-BR, we introduce NorBERTo, a modern encoder based on the ModernBERT architecture, featuring long-context support and efficient attention mechanisms. NorBERTo is trained on Aurora-PT, a newly curated Brazilian Portuguese corpus comprising 331 billion GPT-2 tokens collected from diverse web sources and existing multilingual datasets. We systematically benchmark NorBERTo against Strong baselines on semantic similarity, textual entailment and classification tasks using standardized datasets such as ASSIN 2 and PLUE. On PLUE, NorBERTo-large achieves the best results among the encoder models we evaluated, notably reaching 0.9191 F1 on MRPC and 0.7689 accuracy on RTE. On ASSIN 2, NorBERTo-large attains the highest entailment F1 (~0.904) among all encoders considered, although Albertina-900M and BERTimbau-large still hold an advantage. To the best of our knowledge, Aurora-PT is currently the largest openly available monolingual Portuguese corpus, surpassing previous resources. NorBERTo provides a modern, mid-sized encoder designed for realistic deployment scenarios: it is straight-forward to fine-tune, efficient to serve, and well suited as a backbone for retrieval-augmented generation and other downstream Portuguese NLP systems.

analysis.tldr: NorBERTo 是一个基于 ModernBERT 架构的葡萄牙语编码器模型，在 3310 亿 token 的新语料上训练，在多项 NLU 任务上达到领先水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量语料库对葡萄牙语 NLP 至关重要，但此前缺乏大规模、公开的葡萄牙语单语语料，且现有编码器模型（如 BERTimbau）在架构上缺乏长上下文支持和高效注意力机制。
analysis.problem: 构建一个现代、高效、支持长上下文的葡萄牙语编码器模型，并配套大规模高质量语料库。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用 ModernBERT 架构（支持长上下文和高效注意力），在 3310 亿 token 的 Aurora-PT 语料上训练，并发布 NorBERTo 模型。
contributions: 发布了目前最大的公开葡萄牙语单语语料库 Aurora-PT（3310 亿 token）。
训练并开源了基于 ModernBERT 的葡萄牙语编码器 NorBERTo，在语义相似度、文本蕴含和分类任务上达到领先水平。
analysis.experiments: 在 ASSIN 2 和 PLUE 基准上评估，NorBERTo-large 在 PLUE 的 MRPC 上达到 0.9191 F1，RTE 上 0.7689 准确率；在 ASSIN 2 上蕴含 F1 约 0.904，但 Albertina-900M 和 BERTimbau-large 仍有一定优势。
limitations: 在 ASSIN 2 上未全面超越所有基线（Albertina-900M 和 BERTimbau-large 仍有优势）。
仅针对巴西葡萄牙语，可能不覆盖其他葡萄牙语变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NorBERTo 是一个基于 ModernBERT 架构的葡萄牙语编码器模型，在 3310 亿 token 的新语料上训练，在多项 NLU 任务上达到领先水平。

papers.title: Normativity and Productivism: Ableist Intelligence? A Degrowth Analysis of AI Sign Language Translation Tools for Deaf People
papers.abstract: Sign languages, of any geographical or accentual variation, understandably face continuous scrutiny under the ever present popularity of verbal dictation and audism. Through this, many potential problems arise with the current lack of accessible communication for those who rely on such sign languages for essential conversation. Such AI systems regularly take the form of recognition and interpretation models, designed to provide seamless and accurate translation. In reality these systems are built from biased data and created without any input from deaf communities. Such models are widely used and accepted by their hearing counterparts who remain ignorant to the inherent culture, semantics and colloquial language present in gestural language systems. This phenomenon is best analysed under the scope of The Technological System and Technological bluff by Ellul. Indeed, what is at play here is the standardization of language by technicians into what can be captured by technique: data, statistics, a mathematical language. For that AI technique to exist, sign language must be rationalized, in a search for profit that annihilates the conditions for communication and fails to capture the human experience of the deaf person. By that process, it presents normative effects, creating a model of Man, standardized, massified, and who has to adapt to the tool and technical milieu instead of the other way around, which we assume should have been the goal of such a technology. Technique thus reshapes what it means to be human, to submit deaf people to the goals of productivity and efficiency. In doing so, it exhibits clear counter productivity, alienating instead of emancipating, isolating instead of nourishing human relationships. Therefore this paper argues for the idea of AI as Ableist Intelligence, as such systems seek to emphasise the humiliated and marginalised nature of sign.

analysis.tldr: 从去增长视角批判AI手语翻译工具中的健全主义与生产主义偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI手语翻译系统缺乏聋人社区参与，基于偏见数据构建，未能捕捉手语的文化语义和人类体验，反而强化了标准化和效率导向的健全主义。
analysis.problem: AI手语翻译工具如何通过技术理性标准化手语，产生规范性效应，并导致对聋人的异化和边缘化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出AI系统将手语理性化为数据、统计和数学语言，追求利润而破坏沟通条件，未能捕捉聋人的人类体验，表现出明显的反生产性。
analysis.method: 基于Ellul的技术系统和技术虚张声势理论，进行去增长分析，批判AI作为健全主义智能。
contributions: 提出AI作为健全主义智能的概念，揭示手语翻译工具中的权力结构。
从去增长视角批判技术标准化对聋人社群的异化效应。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证数据支持批判论点。
未提出替代性技术方案或设计原则。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从去增长视角批判AI手语翻译工具中的健全主义与生产主义偏见。

papers.title: Beyond SFT-to-RL: Pre-alignment via Black-Box On-Policy Distillation for Multimodal RL
papers.abstract: The standard post-training recipe for large multimodal models (LMMs) applies supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated demonstrations followed by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). However, SFT introduces distributional drift that neither preserves the model's original capabilities nor faithfully matches the supervision distribution. This problem is further amplified in multimodal reasoning, where perception errors and reasoning failures follow distinct drift patterns that compound during subsequent RL. We introduce PRISM, a three-stage pipeline that mitigates this drift by inserting an explicit distribution-alignment stage between SFT and RLVR. Building on the principle of on-policy distillation (OPD), PRISM casts alignment as a black-box, response-level adversarial game between the policy and a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) discriminator with dedicated perception and reasoning experts, providing disentangled corrective signals that steer the policy toward the supervision distribution without requiring access to teacher logits. While 1.26M public demonstrations suffice for broad SFT initialization, distribution alignment demands higher-fidelity supervision; we therefore curate 113K additional demonstrations from Gemini 3 Flash, featuring dense visual grounding and step-by-step reasoning on the hardest unsolved problems. Experiments on Qwen3-VL show that PRISM consistently improves downstream RLVR performance across multiple RL algorithms (GRPO, DAPO, GSPO) and diverse multimodal benchmarks, improving average accuracy by +4.4 and +6.0 points over the SFT-to-RLVR baseline on 4B and 8B, respectively. Our code, data, and model checkpoints are publicly available at https://github.com/XIAO4579/PRISM.

analysis.tldr: 提出PRISM，通过在SFT和RL之间插入黑盒在线蒸馏对齐阶段，缓解多模态模型分布漂移，提升RLVR性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准SFT-to-RL流程中，SFT引入分布漂移，既破坏模型原有能力又不匹配监督分布，在多模态推理中感知和推理错误复合放大，亟需缓解。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型后训练中SFT导致的分布漂移问题，以及该漂移在后续RL阶段被放大的现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SFT引入分布漂移，不保留模型原始能力且不匹配监督分布；多模态推理中感知错误和推理失败遵循不同漂移模式，在后续RL中复合。
analysis.method: PRISM三阶段流水线：在SFT和RLVR之间插入显式分布对齐阶段，基于在线蒸馏（OPD）原则，将对齐建模为策略与MoE判别器之间的黑盒响应级对抗游戏，提供解耦的纠正信号。
contributions: 提出PRISM，一种三阶段后训练流水线，通过在线蒸馏缓解SFT-to-RL的分布漂移。
构建113K高质量演示数据集（来自Gemini 3 Flash），包含密集视觉基础和逐步推理。
