在Qwen3-VL上实验证明PRISM在多种RL算法和基准上一致提升RLVR性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-VL上使用GRPO、DAPO、GSPO等多种RL算法，在多个多模态基准上评估，4B和8B模型平均准确率分别提升+4.4和+6.0点。
limitations: 依赖额外的高质量演示数据（113K），数据收集成本可能较高。
方法在更大规模模型或不同架构上的泛化性未在摘要中明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PRISM，通过在SFT和RL之间插入黑盒在线蒸馏对齐阶段，缓解多模态模型分布漂移，提升RLVR性能。

papers.title: Beyond Gaussian Bottlenecks: Topologically Aligned Encoding of Vision-Transformer Feature Spaces
papers.abstract: Modern visual world modeling systems increasingly rely on high-capacity architectures and large-scale data to produce plausible motion, yet they often fail to preserve underlying 3D geometry or physically consistent camera dynamics. A key limitation lies not only in model capacity, but in the latent representations used to encode geometric structure. We propose S$^2$VAE, a geometry-first latent learning framework that focuses on compressing and representing the latent 3D state of a scene, including camera motion, depth, and point-level structure, rather than modeling appearance alone. Building on representations from a Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), we introduce a novel type of variational autoencoder using a product of Power Spherical latent distributions, explicitly enforcing hyperspherical structure in the bottleneck to preserve directional and geometric semantics under strong compression. Across depth estimation, camera pose recovery, and point cloud reconstruction, we show that geometry-aligned hyperspherical latents consistently outperform conventional Gaussian bottlenecks, particularly in high-compression regimes. Our results highlight latent geometry as a first-class design choice for physically grounded visual and world models.

analysis.tldr: 提出S$^2$VAE，用Power Spherical分布替代高斯瓶颈，在强压缩下保留视觉Transformer特征的几何结构，提升深度、相机姿态和点云重建性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代视觉世界模型虽能生成合理运动，但常丢失底层3D几何或物理一致的相机动态，关键在于潜表示未编码几何结构。
analysis.problem: 现有高斯瓶颈在强压缩下无法保留潜空间的几何语义，导致3D几何和相机动态建模不准确。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出S$^2$VAE，基于VGGT特征，使用Power Spherical潜变量乘积分布，强制瓶颈具有超球面结构以保持方向性和几何语义。
contributions: 提出几何优先的潜学习框架S$^2$VAE，用Power Spherical分布替代高斯分布。
在深度估计、相机姿态恢复和点云重建任务上，证明几何对齐的超球面潜变量在强压缩下优于高斯瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于VGGT的特征，泛化性未知。
未讨论计算开销或训练稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出S$^2$VAE，用Power Spherical分布替代高斯瓶颈，在强压缩下保留视觉Transformer特征的几何结构，提升深度、相机姿态和点云重建性能。

papers.title: Do Sparse Autoencoders Capture Concept Manifolds?
papers.abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used to extract interpretable features from neural network representations, often under the implicit assumption that concepts correspond to independent linear directions. However, a growing body of evidence suggests that many concepts are instead organized along low-dimensional manifolds encoding continuous geometric relationships. This raises three basic questions: what does it mean for an SAE to capture a manifold, when do existing SAE architectures do so, and how? We develop a theoretical framework that answers these questions and show that SAEs can capture manifolds in two fundamentally different ways: globally, by allocating a compact group of atoms whose linear span contains the entire manifold, or locally, by distributing it across features that each selectively tile a restricted region of the underlying geometry. Empirically, we find that SAEs suboptimally recover continuous structures, mixing the global subspace and local tiling solutions in a fragmented regime we call dilution. This explains why manifold structure is rarely visible at the level of individual concepts and motivates post-hoc unsupervised discovery methods that search for coherent groups of atoms rather than isolated directions. More broadly, our results suggest that future representation learning methods should treat geometric objects, not just individual directions, as the basic units of interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）以全局子空间和局部平铺两种方式捕捉概念流形，但存在混合碎片化问题，导致流形结构难以在单个概念层面显现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SAE通常假设概念对应独立的线性方向，但许多概念实际组织在低维流形中，这种假设与真实几何结构不匹配，限制了可解释性。
analysis.problem: SAE如何捕捉概念流形？在什么条件下能捕捉？以及捕捉方式是什么？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAE以全局子空间和局部平铺两种方式捕捉流形，但实践中两者混合形成碎片化（dilution）状态，导致流形结构在单个特征层面不可见。
analysis.method: 提出理论框架分析SAE捕捉流形的两种机制（全局子空间与局部平铺），并通过实验验证碎片化现象。
contributions: 建立了SAE捕捉概念流形的理论框架，明确定义了两种捕捉方式。
发现并解释了碎片化现象，说明为何流形结构在单个概念层面难以观测。
为后续无监督发现方法提供了理论依据，建议将几何对象而非单个方向作为可解释性基本单元。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架可能仅适用于特定类型的SAE架构。
碎片化现象的普遍性及缓解方法尚未充分探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）以全局子空间和局部平铺两种方式捕捉概念流形，但存在混合碎片化问题，导致流形结构难以在单个概念层面显现。

papers.title: DEFault++: Automated Fault Detection, Categorization, and Diagnosis for Transformer Architectures
papers.abstract: Transformer models are widely deployed in critical AI applications, yet faults in their attention mechanisms, projections, and other internal components often degrade behavior silently without raising runtime errors. Existing fault diagnosis techniques often target generic deep neural networks and cannot identify which transformer component is responsible for an observed symptom. In this article, we present DEFault++, a hierarchical learning-based diagnostic technique that operates at three level of abstraction: it detects whether a fault is present, classifies it into one of 12 transformer-specific fault categories (covering both attention-internal mechanisms and surrounding architectural components), and identifies the underlying root cause from up to 45 mechanisms. To facilitate both training and evaluation, we construct DEFault-bench, a benchmark of 3,739 labeled instances obtained through systematic mutation testing. These instances are created across seven transformer models and nine downstream tasks using DEForm, a transformer-specific mutation technique we developed for this purpose. DEFault++ measures runtime behavior at the level of individual transformer components. It organizes these measurements through a Fault Propagation Graph (FPG) derived from the transformer architecture. It then produces an interpretable diagnosis using prototype matching combined with supervised contrastive learning. On DEFault-bench, DEFault++ exceeds an AUROC of 0.96 for detection and a Macro-F1 of 0.85 for both categorization and root-cause diagnosis on encoder and decoder architectures. In a developer study with 21 practitioners, the accuracy of choosing correct repair actions increased from 57.1% without support to 83.3% when using DEFault++.

analysis.tldr: 提出DEFault++，一种分层学习诊断方法，用于检测、分类和诊断Transformer架构中的故障，并构建了DEFault-bench基准。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer模型在关键AI应用中广泛部署，但其内部故障（如注意力机制、投影等）会静默退化行为而不引发运行时错误，现有诊断技术无法定位具体故障组件。
analysis.problem: 如何自动检测Transformer模型中的故障、分类为特定故障类别，并诊断根本原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Transformer故障通常不引发运行时错误，而是静默影响性能，现有方法无法区分故障组件。
analysis.method: DEFault++采用分层学习诊断，通过Fault Propagation Graph (FPG)组织组件级运行时行为测量，结合原型匹配和监督对比学习生成可解释诊断。
contributions: 提出DEFault++，一种三层抽象的分层诊断方法，可检测、分类和诊断Transformer特定故障。
构建DEFault-bench基准，包含3,739个通过系统突变测试生成的标记实例，覆盖7个Transformer模型和9个下游任务。
开发DEForm，一种Transformer特定突变技术，用于生成故障实例。
在基准上达到检测AUROC>0.96，分类和诊断Macro-F1>0.85，并在开发者研究中将正确修复动作选择准确率从57.1%提升至83.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在DEFault-bench上，检测AUROC超过0.96，分类和根本原因诊断的Macro-F1超过0.85；21名从业者的研究显示，使用DEFault++后正确修复动作准确率从57.1%提升至83.3%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定Transformer架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
基准实例通过突变生成，可能不完全覆盖真实故障分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DEFault++，一种分层学习诊断方法，用于检测、分类和诊断Transformer架构中的故障，并构建了DEFault-bench基准。

papers.title: FreeOcc: Training-Free Embodied Open-Vocabulary Occupancy Prediction
papers.abstract: Existing learning-based occupancy prediction methods rely on large-scale 3D annotations and generalize poorly across environments. We present FreeOcc, a training-free framework for open-vocabulary occupancy prediction from monocular or RGB-D sequences. Unlike prior approaches that require voxel-level supervision and ground-truth camera poses, FreeOcc operates without 3D annotations, pose ground truth, or any learning stage. FreeOcc incrementally builds a globally consistent occupancy map via a four-layer pipeline: a SLAM backbone estimates poses and sparse geometry; a geometrically consistent Gaussian update constructs dense 3D Gaussian maps; open-vocabulary semantics from off-the-shelf vision-language models are associated with Gaussian primitives; and a probabilistic Gaussian-to-occupancy projection produces dense voxel occupancy. Despite being entirely training-free and pose-agnostic, FreeOcc achieves over $2\times$ improvements in IoU and mIoU on EmbodiedOcc-ScanNet compared to prior self-supervised methods. We further introduce ReplicaOcc, a benchmark for indoor open-vocabulary occupancy prediction, and show that FreeOcc transfers zero-shot to novel environments, substantially outperforming both supervised and self-supervised baselines. Project page: https://the-masses.github.io/freeocc-web/.

analysis.tldr: FreeOcc 是一种无需训练的开集占用预测框架，通过 SLAM、3D 高斯和视觉语言模型实现零样本迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于学习的占用预测方法依赖大规模 3D 标注，泛化能力差，且需要真实相机位姿，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有 3D 标注、真实位姿和训练的情况下，从单目或 RGB-D 序列进行开集占用预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FreeOcc 采用四层流水线：SLAM 骨干估计位姿和稀疏几何；几何一致的高斯更新构建密集 3D 高斯地图；利用现成视觉语言模型将开集语义关联到高斯原语；概率高斯到占用投影生成密集体素占用。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的开集占用预测框架 FreeOcc，无需 3D 标注、真实位姿或学习阶段。
在 EmbodiedOcc-ScanNet 上相比自监督方法 IoU 和 mIoU 提升超过 2 倍，并零样本迁移到新环境。
引入 ReplicaOcc 基准，用于室内开集占用预测评估。
analysis.experiments: 在 EmbodiedOcc-ScanNet 上评估，FreeOcc 相比自监督方法 IoU 和 mIoU 提升超过 2 倍；在 ReplicaOcc 上零样本迁移，显著优于监督和自监督基线。
limitations: 依赖 SLAM 和视觉语言模型的性能，可能受限于这些模块的精度。
未在室外或动态场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FreeOcc 是一种无需训练的开集占用预测框架，通过 SLAM、3D 高斯和视觉语言模型实现零样本迁移。

papers.title: Splitting Argumentation Frameworks with Collective Attacks and Supports
papers.abstract: This work proposes novel splitting techniques for argumentation formalisms that incorporate supports between defeasible elements. We base our studies on bipolar set-based argumentation frameworks (BSAFs) which generalize argumentation frameworks with collective attacks (SETAFs), as well as bipolar argumentation frameworks (BAFs), by incorporating both collective attacks and supports. Notably, BSAFs establish a crucial link to structured argumentation as they naturally capture general (potentially non-flat) assumption-based argumentation. The increase in expressiveness calls for diverse forms of splitting. We consider splits over collective attacks (thereby generalizing the recently proposed splitting techniques for SETAFs), splits over collective supports, as well as splits over both collective attacks and supports. We establish suitable splitting schemata and prove their correctness for the most common argumentation semantics.

analysis.tldr: 提出双极集论证框架（BSAFs）的拆分技术，支持集体攻击和支持的拆分，并证明其正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有论证框架的拆分技术主要针对攻击关系，但实际论证中支持关系也很重要，且集体攻击和支持的引入增加了框架的复杂性，需要新的拆分方法。
analysis.problem: 如何对包含集体攻击和集体支持的双极集论证框架（BSAFs）进行有效的拆分，并保证拆分后语义的正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三种拆分模式：仅集体攻击拆分、仅集体支持拆分、以及集体攻击和支持同时拆分，并设计相应的拆分模式，证明其在常见论证语义下的正确性。
contributions: 首次提出针对双极集论证框架（BSAFs）的拆分技术，涵盖集体攻击和支持。
证明了所提拆分模式在常见论证语义下的正确性，为结构化论证提供了理论基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未考虑更复杂的论证语义（如偏好语义）下的拆分正确性。
理论结果可能缺乏实际应用中的效率验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双极集论证框架（BSAFs）的拆分技术，支持集体攻击和支持的拆分，并证明其正确性。

papers.title: Mapping the Methodological Space of Classroom Interaction Research: Scale, Duration, and Modality in an Age of AI
papers.abstract: Research on classroom interaction has long been divided between large-scale observation and in-depth ethnographic work. We propose a framework mapping this methodological space along three dimensions--scale, duration, and modality--where a study's position shapes what it reveals and obscures. We illustrate it through contrasting studies of dialogic teaching--Howe et al. (2019) and Snell and Lefstein (2018)--and an interview with the lead researchers, organized around three questions: what can be operationalized, what mechanisms become visible, and what translates to practice. We then examine how AI is expanding this space and how the framework can guide research and tool design.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个三维框架（规模、时长、模态）来映射课堂互动研究方法论空间，并探讨AI如何扩展该空间。
analysis.research_motivation: 课堂互动研究长期存在大规模观察与深度民族志工作之间的分裂，缺乏统一框架来理解不同方法论的优劣与互补性。
analysis.problem: 如何系统化描述和比较课堂互动研究的方法论选择，并理解AI技术对方法论空间的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，仅通过对比两个案例说明不同方法论位置揭示和遮蔽的内容不同。
analysis.method: 提出一个三维框架（规模、时长、模态），通过对比两个对话教学研究案例和研究者访谈来阐释框架，并讨论AI如何扩展该空间。
contributions: 提出了一个三维方法论空间框架，用于映射和比较课堂互动研究。
通过案例分析和研究者访谈展示了框架的应用价值。
探讨了AI技术对方法论空间的影响，为未来研究和工具设计提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能无法覆盖所有课堂互动研究方法论维度。
案例选择有限，可能不具有广泛代表性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个三维框架（规模、时长、模态）来映射课堂互动研究方法论空间，并探讨AI如何扩展该空间。

papers.title: UHR-Net: An Uncertainty-Aware Hypergraph Refinement Network for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Accurate lesion segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis and treatment planning. However, lesions often resemble surrounding tissues and exhibit ill-defined boundaries, leading to unstable predictions in boundary/transition regions. Moreover, small-lesion cues can be diluted by multi-scale feature extraction, causing under- or over-segmentation. To address these challenges, we propose an Uncertainty-Aware Hypergraph Refinement Network (UHR-Net). First, we introduce an Uncertainty-Oriented Instance Contrastive (UO-IC) pretraining strategy that couples geometry-aware copy-paste augmentation with hard-negative mining of lesion-like background regions to improve instance-level discrimination for small and visually ambiguous lesions. Second, we design an Uncertainty-Guided Hypergraph Refinement (UGHR) block, which derives an entropy-based uncertainty map from a coarse probability map to guide hypergraph refinement. By splitting hyperedge prototypes into foreground and background groups, UGHR decouples higher-order interactions and improves refinement in ambiguous regions. Experiments on five public benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains over strong baselines. Code is available at: https://github.com/CUGfreshman/UHR-Net.

analysis.tldr: 提出UHR-Net，通过不确定性引导的超图精炼网络提升医学图像分割中边界模糊和小病灶的分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 病灶分割中边界模糊和小病灶易被多尺度特征稀释，导致预测不稳定，现有方法难以处理这些挑战。
analysis.problem: 医学图像分割中病灶边界不清晰和小病灶分割不准确的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 病灶与周围组织相似且边界模糊，导致过渡区域预测不稳定；小病灶线索在多尺度特征提取中被稀释，造成欠分割或过分割。
analysis.method: 提出UHR-Net，包含不确定性导向的实例对比预训练（UO-IC）和不确定性引导的超图精炼块（UGHR）。UO-IC通过几何感知复制-粘贴增强和难负样本挖掘提升小病灶判别；UGHR利用熵图引导超图精炼，分离超边原型为前景和背景组以解耦高阶交互。
contributions: 提出UO-IC预训练策略，结合几何感知增强和难负样本挖掘，提升小病灶和视觉模糊病灶的实例级判别。
设计UGHR模块，利用不确定性图引导超图精炼，通过分离超边原型解耦高阶交互，改善模糊区域分割。
在五个公开基准上取得一致改进，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在五个公开医学图像分割基准上评估，与强基线相比取得一致提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对超图构建的复杂度敏感，计算开销较大。
不确定性估计依赖粗概率图，可能受初始预测质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UHR-Net，通过不确定性引导的超图精炼网络提升医学图像分割中边界模糊和小病灶的分割精度。

papers.title: What Makes a Good Terminal-Agent Benchmark Task: A Guideline for Adversarial, Difficult, and Legible Evaluation Design
papers.abstract: Terminal-agent benchmarks have become a primary signal for measuring the coding and system-administration capabilities of large language models. As the market for evaluation environments grows, so does the pressure to ship tasks quickly, often without thorough adversarial review of the verification logic. This paper is a guideline for writing good benchmark tasks, drawn from over a year of contributing to and reviewing tasks for Terminal Bench. Most people write benchmark tasks the way they write prompts. They shouldn't. A prompt is designed to help the agent succeed; a benchmark is designed to find out if it can. We argue that good tasks are adversarial, difficult, and legible, and that a large class of common failure modes -- AI-generated instructions, over-prescriptive specifications, clerical difficulty, oracle solutions that assume hidden knowledge, tests that validate the wrong things, and reward-hackable environments -- are predictable consequences of treating task authoring as prompt authoring. We catalog these failure modes, argue that real difficulty is conceptual rather than environmental, and discuss recent empirical evidence that over 15% of tasks in popular terminal-agent benchmarks are reward-hackable. We hope this serves as a useful reference for benchmark maintainers, task contributors, and researchers using benchmark scores as evidence.

analysis.tldr: 提出终端Agent基准任务应具备对抗性、困难性和可读性，并总结常见失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 终端Agent基准测试是衡量LLM编码和系统管理能力的主要信号，但任务编写常缺乏对抗性审查，导致验证逻辑存在漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高质量、可靠且能真实反映LLM能力的终端Agent基准任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出常见失败模式包括AI生成指令、过度规定性规范、文书难度、假设隐藏知识的预言机解决方案、验证错误内容的测试以及可奖励黑客的环境，并提到超过15%的流行基准任务存在奖励黑客问题。
analysis.method: 提出任务设计三原则（对抗性、困难性、可读性），并分类常见失败模式作为指南。
contributions: 提出终端Agent基准任务应具备对抗性、困难性和可读性的设计原则。
系统分类并分析了常见失败模式及其成因。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 指南基于单一平台（Terminal Bench）的经验，可能不适用于所有终端Agent基准。
未提供量化验证指南有效性的实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出终端Agent基准任务应具备对抗性、困难性和可读性，并总结常见失败模式。

papers.title: Towards Neuro-symbolic Causal Rule Synthesis, Verification, and Evaluation Grounded in Legal and Safety Principles
papers.abstract: Rule-based systems remain central in safety-critical domains but often struggle with scalability, brittleness, and goal misspecification. These limitations can lead to reward hacking and failures in formal verification, as AI systems tend to optimize for narrow objectives. In previous research, we developed a neuro-symbolic causal framework that integrates first-order logic abduction trees, structural causal models, and deep reinforcement learning within a MAPE-K loop to provide explainable adaptations under distribution shifts. In this paper, we extend that framework by introducing a meta-level layer designed to mitigate goal misspecification and support scalable rule maintenance. This layer consists of a Goal/Rule Synthesizer and a Rule Verification Engine, which iteratively refine a formal rule theory from high-level natural-language goals and principles provided by human experts. The synthesis pipeline employs large language models (LLMs) to: (1) decompose goals into candidate causes, (2) consolidate semantics to remove redundancies, (3) translate them into candidate first-order rules, and (4) compose necessary and sufficient causal sets. The verification pipeline then performs (1) syntax and schema validation, (2) logical consistency analysis, and (3) safety and invariant checks before integrating verified rules into the knowledge base. We evaluated our approach with a proof-of-concept implementation in two autonomous driving scenarios. Results indicate that, given human-specified goals and principles, the pipeline can successfully derive minimal necessary and sufficient rule sets and formalize them as logical constraints. These findings suggest that the pipeline supports incremental, modular, and traceable rule synthesis grounded in established legal and safety principles.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种神经符号因果框架，利用LLM从自然语言目标中合成并验证形式化规则，在自动驾驶场景中验证了最小必要规则集的生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于规则的系统在安全关键领域存在可扩展性差、脆弱性和目标错配问题，导致奖励黑客和形式化验证失败，亟需一种可解释且可维护的规则合成方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从高层自然语言目标和原则中自动合成并验证形式化因果规则，以缓解目标错配并支持可扩展的规则维护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展神经符号因果框架，引入元层级：目标/规则合成器（LLM分解目标、合并语义、翻译为候选一阶规则、组合因果集）和规则验证引擎（语法/模式验证、逻辑一致性分析、安全与不变性检查），通过MAPE-K循环迭代精炼规则理论。
contributions: 提出一个元层级框架，通过LLM驱动的合成和形式化验证，从自然语言目标中迭代生成最小必要规则集。
在自动驾驶场景中通过概念验证实现，展示了规则合成与验证的可行性和可追溯性。
analysis.experiments: 在自动驾驶场景中进行概念验证评估，结果表明能从人类指定的目标和原则中成功推导出最小必要规则集并形式化为逻辑约束。
limitations: 仅进行了概念验证，缺乏大规模或真实场景的定量实验。
依赖LLM的分解和翻译质量，可能引入语义偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种神经符号因果框架，利用LLM从自然语言目标中合成并验证形式化规则，在自动驾驶场景中验证了最小必要规则集的生成。

papers.title: Characterizing the Consistency of the Emergent Misalignment Persona
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) on narrowly misaligned data generalizes to broadly misaligned behavior, a phenomenon termed emergent misalignment (EM). While prior work has found a correlation between harmful behavior and self-assessment in emergently misaligned models, it remains unclear how consistent this correspondence is across tasks and whether it varies across fine-tuning domains. We characterize the consistency of the EM persona by fine-tuning Qwen 2.5 32B Instruct on six narrowly misaligned domains (e.g., insecure code, risky financial advice, bad medical advice) and administering experiments including harmfulness evaluation, self-assessment, choosing between two descriptions of AI systems, output recognition, and score prediction. Our results reveal two distinct patterns: coherent-persona models, in which harmful behavior and self-reported misalignment are coupled, and inverted-persona models, which produce harmful outputs while identifying as aligned AI systems. These findings reveal a more fine-grained picture of the effects of emergent misalignment, calling into question the consistency of the EM persona.

analysis.tldr: 微调LLM在窄域上的错位行为会泛化为广义错位，但错位人格在不同任务和领域间的一致性存在两种模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前研究发现错位行为与自我评估之间存在相关性，但尚不清楚这种对应关系在不同任务和微调领域中的一致性如何，需要更细粒度的刻画。
analysis.problem: 表征错位人格在跨任务和跨微调领域中的一致性模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现两种模式：一致人格模型（有害行为与自我报告错位耦合）和倒置人格模型（产生有害输出但自认为对齐）。
analysis.method: 在六个窄域错位领域（如不安全代码、风险金融建议、不良医疗建议）微调Qwen 2.5 32B Instruct，并进行危害性评估、自我评估、AI系统描述选择、输出识别和分数预测实验。
contributions: 揭示了错位人格存在两种不同模式：一致人格和倒置人格。
对错位人格的一致性提出质疑，提供了更细粒度的理解。
analysis.experiments: 在六个窄域错位领域微调模型，并进行了多项实验（危害性评估、自我评估等），摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用单一模型（Qwen 2.5 32B Instruct），可能不适用于其他架构。
窄域错位领域有限，可能无法覆盖所有错位类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 微调LLM在窄域上的错位行为会泛化为广义错位，但错位人格在不同任务和领域间的一致性存在两种模式。

papers.title: AesRM: Improving Video Aesthetics with Expert-Level Feedback
papers.abstract: Despite rapid advances in photorealistic video generation, real-world applications such as filmmaking require video aesthetics, e.g., harmonious colors and cinematic lighting, beyond visual fidelity. Prior work on visual aesthetics largely focuses on images, often reducing aesthetics to coarse definitions, e.g., visual pleasure, without a rigorous and systematic evaluation. To improve video aesthetics, we propose a hierarchical rubric that decomposes video aesthetics into three core dimensions, Visual Aesthetics (VA), Visual Fidelity (VF), and Visual Plausibility (VP), with 15 fine-grained criteria, e.g., shot composition. This framework enables a large-scale expert-annotated preference dataset and an evaluation benchmark, AesVideo-Bench, containing about 2500 video pairs with expert annotations on VA, VF, and VP. We then build a family of Video Aesthetic Reward Models (AesRM): AesRM-Base, which directly predicts pairwise preferences on these dimensions to provide efficient post-training rewards, and AesRM-CoT, which additionally generates CoT aligned with all 15 criteria to improve assessment interpretability. Specifically, we train AesRM with a three-stage progressive scheme: (1) Atomic Aesthetic Capability Learning, which strengthens AesRM's recognition of fundamental aesthetic concepts, e.g., accurately identifying centered composition; (2) Cold-Start, aligning the model with structured reasoning protocols; and (3) GRPO, further improving evaluation accuracy. To enhance AesRM-CoT, we additionally propose self-consistency-based CoT synthesis to improve CoT quality and design CoT-based process rewards during GRPO. Extensive experiments show AesRM outperforms baselines on multiple aesthetics benchmarks and is more robust, with lower position bias. Finally, we align Wan2.2 with AesRM and observe clear aesthetic gains over existing aesthetic reward models.

analysis.tldr: 提出视频美学层次化评估标准与奖励模型AesRM，通过专家标注数据和三阶段训练提升视频生成美学质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成追求逼真度，但电影制作等应用需要和谐色彩、电影级光照等美学属性；先前美学工作多聚焦图像且定义粗糙，缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何系统定义和评估视频美学，并训练奖励模型以提升生成视频的美学质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出层次化美学评估标准（VA、VF、VP共15个细粒度准则），构建专家标注偏好数据集和AesVideo-Bench基准；训练AesRM-Base（直接预测偏好）和AesRM-CoT（生成思维链），采用三阶段渐进训练：原子美学能力学习、冷启动对齐、GRPO优化；并利用自一致性思维链合成提升CoT质量。
contributions: 提出层次化视频美学评估标准，包含3个核心维度和15个细粒度准则。
构建大规模专家标注偏好数据集和AesVideo-Bench评估基准。
提出AesRM奖励模型家族，包括AesRM-Base和AesRM-CoT，以及三阶段训练方案。
实验表明AesRM在多个美学基准上优于基线，且位置偏差更低；用于对齐Wan2.2生成模型获得美学提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个美学基准上评估，AesRM优于基线且更鲁棒、位置偏差更低；将Wan2.2与AesRM对齐后观察到明显美学提升。
limitations: 依赖专家标注，成本高且可能引入主观偏差。
评估标准可能无法覆盖所有美学维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视频美学层次化评估标准与奖励模型AesRM，通过专家标注数据和三阶段训练提升视频生成美学质量。

papers.title: TopBench: A Benchmark for Implicit Prediction and Reasoning over Tabular Question Answering
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced Table Question Answering, where most queries can be answered by extracting information or simple aggregation. However, a common class of real-world queries is implicitly predictive, requiring the inference of unobserved answers from historical patterns rather than mere retrieval. These queries introduce two challenges: recognizing latent intent and reliable predictive reasoning over massive tables. To assess LLMs in such Tabular questiOn answering with implicit Prediction tasks, we introduce TopBench, a benchmark consisting of 779 samples across four sub-tasks, ranging from single-point prediction to decision making, treatment effect analysis, and complex filtering, requiring models to generate outputs spanning reasoning text and structured tables. We evaluate diverse models under both text-based and agentic workflows. Experiments reveal that current models often struggle with intent recognition, defaulting to just lookups. Deeper analysis identifies that accurate intent disambiguation serves as the prerequisite for leading these predictive behaviors. Furthermore, elevating the upper bound of prediction precision requires the integration of more sophisticated modeling or reasoning capabilities.

analysis.tldr: TopBench 是一个评估大语言模型在表格问答中进行隐式预测和推理的基准，发现现有模型在意图识别上存在困难。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实中的表格查询常涉及隐式预测，需要从历史模式推断未观测答案，而非简单检索，但现有基准和模型对此关注不足。
analysis.problem: 评估大语言模型在表格问答中处理隐式预测任务的能力，包括意图识别和可靠推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前模型在隐式预测任务中常默认执行查找操作，难以识别潜在预测意图；准确的意图消歧是引导预测行为的前提。
analysis.method: 构建包含779个样本、四个子任务（单点预测、决策制定、处理效应分析、复杂过滤）的基准TopBench，要求模型输出推理文本和结构化表格，并在基于文本和智能体工作流下评估多种模型。
contributions: 提出了TopBench基准，专门评估LLM在表格问答中的隐式预测和推理能力。
揭示了现有模型在意图识别上的不足，并指出意图消歧是提升预测性能的关键。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型上进行了基于文本和智能体工作流的评估，发现模型在意图识别上表现不佳，且提升预测精度需要更复杂的建模或推理能力。
limitations: 基准规模较小（779个样本），可能不足以覆盖所有隐式预测场景。
未提供具体实验结果数值，难以量化模型间的差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TopBench 是一个评估大语言模型在表格问答中进行隐式预测和推理的基准，发现现有模型在意图识别上存在困难。

papers.title: Repetition over Diversity: High-Signal Data Filtering for Sample-Efficient German Language Modeling
papers.abstract: Recent research has shown that filtering massive English web corpora into high-quality subsets significantly improves training efficiency. However, for high-resource non-English languages like German, French, or Japanese, aggressive filtering creates a strategic dilemma: should practitioners prioritize diversity by training once on large amounts of lightly filtered web data, or prioritize quality by strictly filtering for a high-quality core and repeating it over multiple epochs? We investigate this trade-off for German by constructing hierarchical quality filters applied to 500M web documents, comparing multi-epoch training on the filtered subsets against single-pass training on a diverse corpus. Our experiments across multiple model scales and token budgets show that repeating high-quality data consistently outperforms single-pass training on larger, less filtered sets. Notably, the performance gap persists even after 7 epochs. Our findings suggest that for non-English LLMs, semantic concentration through quality filtering offers a more viable path to efficient language modeling than simply maximizing unique data volume. We release our German language models (called Boldt), as well as our cleaned evaluation benchmarks to the research community. Our experiments indicate that they achieve state-of-the-art results despite training on 10-360x fewer tokens than comparable models.

analysis.tldr: 对德语等非英语语言，重复高质量过滤数据比单次训练大量低质数据更高效。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多聚焦英语，非英语语言（如德语）在数据过滤时面临策略困境：是追求多样性（单次训练大量轻过滤数据）还是质量（严格过滤后重复训练）。
analysis.problem: 探索非英语语言（德语）语言模型训练中，高质量数据重复训练与多样化数据单次训练的效率权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重复高质量数据在多个模型规模和token预算下始终优于单次训练更大但过滤较少的数据集，且性能差距在7个epoch后仍存在。
analysis.method: 构建分层质量过滤器，从5亿网页文档中筛选高质量子集，进行多epoch训练，并与单次训练多样化语料对比。
contributions: 揭示非英语语言模型中，语义集中（质量过滤+重复）比最大化数据多样性更有效。
发布德语语言模型Boldt及清理后的评估基准，模型在训练token减少10-360倍的情况下达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型规模和token预算下进行实验，比较多epoch训练过滤子集与单次训练多样化语料，并报告了7个epoch后的性能。
limitations: 仅针对德语，其他非英语语言（如法语、日语）的泛化性未验证。
过滤策略依赖人工设计的质量信号，可能未覆盖所有高质量数据特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对德语等非英语语言，重复高质量过滤数据比单次训练大量低质数据更高效。

papers.title: 3D Reconstruction Techniques in the Manufacturing Domain: Applications, Research Opportunities and Use Cases
papers.abstract: This comprehensive review examines the evolution and the current state of the art in three-dimensional (3D) reconstruction techniques in manufacturing applications. The analysis covers both traditional approaches and emerging deep learning methods, showing a critical research gap in unified 3d reconstruction frameworks. Through systematic review of 106 recent publications, we classify reconstruction techniques into three primary categories: data acquisition, point cloud generation, post-processing and applications. Non-contact methods, particularly structured light scanning and stereo vision, have shown significant adoption in manufacturing, with 47% of surveyed applications focusing on quality inspection. The integration of deep learning has enhanced reconstruction accuracy and processing speed, particularly in feature extraction and matching. Key applications span design and development (13%), machining (8%), process (17%), assembly (22%), and quality inspection (40%). While current technologies achieve sub-millimeter accuracy in controlled environments, challenges persist in handling reflective surfaces and dynamic environments. Our findings indicate a trend toward hybrid systems combining multiple sensor types and processing methods to overcome individual limitations. This survey provides a structured framework for understanding current capabilities and future directions in manufacturing-focused 3D reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 综述制造领域3D重建技术，分类数据采集、点云生成和后处理，指出混合系统趋势。
analysis.research_motivation: 制造领域3D重建技术缺乏统一框架，传统与深度学习方法分散，需要系统梳理以指导未来方向。
analysis.problem: 制造应用中3D重建技术缺乏系统性分类和比较，现有方法在反射表面和动态环境中存在局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非接触方法（结构光扫描、立体视觉）占主导，47%应用聚焦质量检测；深度学习提升精度和速度；混合系统趋势明显。
analysis.method: 系统综述106篇文献，将3D重建技术分为数据采集、点云生成、后处理与应用三大类。
contributions: 提出制造领域3D重建技术的系统分类框架
识别关键应用分布（质量检测40%、装配22%）和研究缺口
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 综述范围限于制造领域，可能不涵盖其他领域技术
未提供定量性能比较或基准测试
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述制造领域3D重建技术，分类数据采集、点云生成和后处理，指出混合系统趋势。

papers.title: RHyVE: Competence-Aware Verification and Phase-Aware Deployment for LLM-Generated Reward Hypotheses
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) make reward design in reinforcement learning substantially more scalable, but generated rewards are not automatically reliable training objectives. Existing work has focused primarily on generating, evolving, or selecting reward candidates, while paying less attention to when such candidates can be verified and deployed during policy optimization. We study this deployment-time problem by treating generated rewards as reward hypotheses whose utility depends on the competence of the current policy and the phase of training. We propose \textsc{RHyVE}, a competence-aware verification and phase-aware deployment protocol that compares small sets of reward hypotheses from shared policy checkpoints using short-horizon fork verification. Our experiments show that reward rankings are unreliable at low competence but become informative after task-dependent thresholds. On a sparse manipulation task, phase-aware deployment improves peak and retained performance under a locked protocol. Updated LLM-generated reward-candidate experiments show candidate-family-dependent behavior: generated pools can exhibit phase-dependent winner changes, but no fixed warm-up schedule is universally optimal. Held-out schedule selection, conservative selector baselines, compute-matched controls, and scale controls further show that \textsc{RHyVE} is best understood as a verification-informed deployment protocol rather than a universal scheduler. Dense and all-failure boundary experiments delimit the scope of the method. Together, these results suggest that reward generation and reward deployment should be studied as coupled problems: generated rewards must be verified and deployed under changing policy competence.

analysis.tldr: 提出RHyVE协议，在强化学习中根据策略能力分阶段验证和部署LLM生成的奖励假设。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM使奖励设计更可扩展，但生成的奖励并非自动可靠的训练目标，现有工作忽视验证和部署时机问题。
analysis.problem: 如何根据策略当前能力和训练阶段，可靠地验证和部署LLM生成的奖励假设。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 奖励排序在低能力时不可靠，达到任务相关阈值后才变得有效；不同奖励候选族表现出阶段依赖的胜者变化，无固定预热计划通用最优。
analysis.method: RHyVE协议：基于共享策略检查点的短视分支验证，比较小规模奖励假设集，实现能力感知验证和阶段感知部署。
contributions: 提出能力感知验证和阶段感知部署协议RHyVE，将奖励生成与部署作为耦合问题研究。
通过实验揭示奖励排序可靠性随策略能力变化的阈值现象，以及候选族依赖的阶段性胜者变化。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏操作任务上，阶段感知部署提升锁定协议下的峰值和保持性能；通过保留调度选择、保守基线、计算匹配控制和规模控制验证RHyVE作为验证知情部署协议而非通用调度器；密集和全失败边界实验界定方法范围。
limitations: 方法依赖短视分支验证，可能不适用于长视任务。
未探索自动确定任务相关阈值的方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RHyVE协议，在强化学习中根据策略能力分阶段验证和部署LLM生成的奖励假设。

papers.title: PROMISE-AD: Progression-aware Multi-horizon Survival Estimation for Alzheimer's Disease Progression and Dynamic Tracking
papers.abstract: Individualized Alzheimer's disease (AD) progression prediction requires models that use irregular visits, account for censoring, avoid diagnostic leakage, and provide calibrated horizon risks. We propose PROgression-aware MultI-horizon Survival Estimation for Alzheimer's Disease (PROMISE-AD), a leakage-safe survival framework for predicting conversion from cognitively normal (CN) to mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and from MCI to AD dementia using ADNI/TADPOLE tabular histories. PROMISE-AD converts pre-index visits into tokens with standardized measurements, missingness masks, longitudinal changes, time-normalized slopes, visit timing, and non-diagnostic categorical attributes. A temporal Transformer fuses global, attention-pooled, and latest-visit representations to estimate a progression score and latent discrete-time mixture hazards. Training combines survival likelihood, horizon-specific focal risk loss, progression ranking, hazard smoothness, and mixture-balance regularization, followed by validation-set isotonic calibration for 1-, 2-, 3-, and 5-year risks. In held-out testing across three seeds, PROMISE-AD achieved an integrated Brier score (IBS) of 0.085 $\pm$ 0.012, C-index of 0.808 $\pm$ 0.015, and mean time-dependent AUC of 0.840 $\pm$ 0.081 for CN-to-MCI conversion, yielding the lowest IBS among compared methods. For MCI-to-AD conversion, PROMISE-AD achieved the highest C-index (0.894 $\pm$ 0.018) and near-ceiling 5-year discrimination (AUROC 0.997 $\pm$ 0.003; AUPRC 0.999 $\pm$ 0.001), although some baselines had lower IBS. Ablations and interpretability supported longitudinal change features, fused temporal representations, mixture hazards, cognitive and functional measures, APOE4 status, and recent conversion-proximal visits. These findings suggest that progression-aware survival modeling can provide interpretable multi-horizon AD conversion risk estimates.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无泄漏的生存分析框架PROMISE-AD，利用时序Transformer预测阿尔茨海默病不同阶段的转化风险，在ADNI/TADPOLE数据集上取得领先性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿尔茨海默病进展预测需要处理不规则访视、删失数据、避免诊断泄漏并提供校准的多时间风险，现有方法在这些方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个无诊断泄漏、能处理不规则访视和删失数据、并提供校准的多时间风险预测的个体化AD进展模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将访视数据转化为包含标准化测量、缺失掩码、纵向变化、时间归一化斜率等特征的token，通过时序Transformer融合全局、注意力池化和最新访视表示，估计进展分数和潜在离散时间混合风险，结合多种损失训练并后校准。
contributions: 提出PROMISE-AD，一个无泄漏的生存分析框架，用于预测AD从CN到MCI和MCI到AD痴呆的转化。
在ADNI/TADPOLE数据集上，CN-to-MCI转化取得最低IBS（0.085），MCI-to-AD转化取得最高C-index（0.894）和近完美的5年区分性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI/TADPOLE数据集上进行三种子实验，评估IBS、C-index、时间依赖AUC等指标，并与基线方法比较。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集（ADNI/TADPOLE），泛化性需进一步验证。
部分基线在MCI-to-AD任务上IBS更低，表明模型在某些指标上仍有改进空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无泄漏的生存分析框架PROMISE-AD，利用时序Transformer预测阿尔茨海默病不同阶段的转化风险，在ADNI/TADPOLE数据集上取得领先性能。

papers.title: To Build or Not to Build? Factors that Lead to Non-Development or Abandonment of AI Systems
papers.abstract: Responsible AI research typically focuses on examining the use and impacts of deployed AI systems. Yet, there is currently limited visibility into the pre-deployment decisions to pursue building such systems in the first place. Decisions taken in the earlier stages of development shape which systems are ultimately released, and therefore represent potential, but underexplored, points for intervention. As such, this paper investigates factors influencing AI non-development and abandonment throughout the development lifecycle. Specifically, we first perform a scoping review of academic literature, civil society resources, and grey literature including journalism and industry reports. Through thematic analysis of these sources, we develop a taxonomy of six categories of factors contributing to AI abandonment: ethical concerns, stakeholder feedback, development lifecycle challenges, organizational dynamics, resource constraints, and legal/regulatory concerns. Then, we collect data on real-world case of AI system abandonment via an AI incident database and a practitioner survey to evidence and compare factors that drive abandonment both prior to and following system deployment. While academic responsible AI communities often emphasize ethical risks as reasons to not develop AI, our empirical analysis of these cases demonstrates the diverse, and often non-ethics-related, levers that motivate organizations to abandon AI development. Synthesizing evidence from our taxonomy and related case study analyses, we identify gaps and opportunities in current responsible AI research to (1) engage with the diverse range of levers that influence organizations to abandon AI development, and (2) better support appropriate (dis)engagement with AI system development.

analysis.tldr: 研究AI系统在开发前或开发中被放弃的因素，提出六类因素分类法，并发现实际放弃原因常与伦理无关。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前负责任AI研究主要关注已部署系统的影响，但对系统开发前的决策（如是否构建）缺乏了解，而这些早期决策决定了哪些系统最终被发布，是潜在的干预点。
analysis.problem: 探究影响AI系统在开发生命周期中未被开发或被放弃的因素，并分析这些因素在部署前后的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过文献综述和实证分析发现，AI系统放弃的原因多样，且实际案例中非伦理因素（如资源限制、组织动态）比伦理风险更常见，与学术界的关注点存在差距。
analysis.method: 首先进行范围综述（学术文献、公民社会资源、灰色文献），通过主题分析构建六类因素分类法；然后通过AI事件数据库和实践者调查收集真实放弃案例数据，进行实证比较。
contributions: 提出了一个包含六类因素的AI系统放弃因素分类法（伦理关切、利益相关者反馈、开发生命周期挑战、组织动态、资源约束、法律/监管问题）。
通过实证分析揭示了实际放弃原因与学术伦理焦点之间的差距，并指出了负责任AI研究中的空白与机会。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及通过AI事件数据库和实践者调查收集了真实案例数据。
limitations: 分类法可能无法覆盖所有放弃因素，且基于文献和有限案例，普适性有待验证。
实证分析可能受限于数据库和调查样本的代表性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究AI系统在开发前或开发中被放弃的因素，提出六类因素分类法，并发现实际放弃原因常与伦理无关。

papers.title: Agent-Agnostic Evaluation of SQL Accuracy in Production Text-to-SQL Systems
papers.abstract: Text-to-SQL (T2SQL) evaluation in production environments poses fundamental challenges that existing benchmarks do not address. Current evaluation methodologies whether rule-based SQL matching or schema-dependent semantic parsers assume access to ground-truth queries and structured database schema, constraints that are rarely satisfied in real-world deployments. This disconnect leaves production T2SQL agents largely unevaluated beyond developer-time testing, creating silent quality degradation with no feedback mechanism for continuous improvement. We present STEF (Schema-agnostic Text-to-SQL Evaluation Framework), a production-native evaluation system that operates exclusively on natural language inputs the user question, an enriched reformulation, and the generated SQL without requiring database schema or reference queries. STEF extracts semantic specifications from both natural language and SQL representations, performs normalized feature alignment, and produces an interpretable 0 to 100 accuracy score via a composite metric that encompasses filter alignment, semantic verdict, and confidence of the evaluator. Key contributions include: enriched question quality validation as a first-class evaluation signal, configurable application-specific rule injection via prompt templating, and production-robust normalization handling GROUP BY tolerance, ORDER BY defaults, and LIMIT heuristics. Empirical results demonstrate that STEF enables continuous production monitoring and agent improvement feedback loops without schema dependency, making structured query evaluation viable at scale for the first time.

analysis.tldr: 提出生产环境下的无模式Text-to-SQL评估框架STEF，无需数据库模式或参考查询即可评估SQL准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL评估方法依赖真实查询和数据库模式，在生产环境中难以满足，导致缺乏持续监控和反馈机制，质量退化无法被察觉。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖数据库模式或参考查询的情况下，对生产环境中的Text-to-SQL系统进行准确且可解释的评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STEF框架，通过从自然语言和SQL中提取语义规范、进行归一化特征对齐，并利用包含过滤对齐、语义判定和评估器置信度的复合指标生成0-100的准确性分数。
contributions: 提出生产环境原生、无需模式或参考查询的Text-to-SQL评估框架STEF
引入增强问题质量验证作为一级评估信号，以及可配置的应用特定规则注入和鲁棒归一化处理
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的增强问题表述
复合指标的权重设置可能需要针对不同应用场景调整
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生产环境下的无模式Text-to-SQL评估框架STEF，无需数据库模式或参考查询即可评估SQL准确性。

papers.title: TAFA-GSGC: Group-wise Scalable Point Cloud Geometry Compression with Progressive Residual Refinement
papers.abstract: Scalable compression is essential for bandwidth-adaptive transmission, yet most learned codecs are optimized for a fixed rate-distortion point, making rate adaptation costly due to re-encoding or maintaining multiple bitstreams. In this work, we propose TAFA-GSGC, a scalable learned point cloud geometry codec that enables multi-quality decoding from a single bitstream and a single trained model. TAFA-GSGC combines layered residual refinement with channel-group entropy coding, and introduces Target-Aligned Feature Aggregation module to reduce cross-layer redundancy in enhancement residuals. Our framework supports up to 9 decodable quality levels with monotonic quality improvement as more subbitstreams are received, while maintaining strong compression efficiency. Compared with the baseline PCGCv2, TAFA-GSGC attains comparable and slightly better RD performance, achieving average BD-Rate savings of -4.99% in D1 and -5.92% in D2.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的点云几何压缩方法，支持单模型单码流多质量解码，通过分层残差细化与通道组熵编码实现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有学习型点云压缩方法通常针对固定率失真点优化，带宽自适应传输时需要重新编码或维护多个码流，成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可扩展的点云几何压缩方法，使得单个模型和单个码流能支持多质量等级解码，同时保持压缩效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合分层残差细化与通道组熵编码，并引入目标对齐特征聚合模块以减少增强残差中的跨层冗余。
contributions: 提出TAFA-GSGC，一种可扩展的学习型点云几何压缩编解码器，支持从单一码流和单一模型进行多质量解码。
设计目标对齐特征聚合模块，有效减少增强残差中的跨层冗余，提升压缩效率。
analysis.experiments: 在点云几何压缩基准上，与基线PCGCv2相比，TAFA-GSGC在D1和D2指标上分别平均节省BD-Rate 4.99%和5.92%，性能相当或略优。
limitations: 可能仅针对几何信息，未涉及属性压缩。
可扩展性可能受限于最大质量等级数（9级）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可扩展的点云几何压缩方法，支持单模型单码流多质量解码，通过分层残差细化与通道组熵编码实现。

papers.title: Collaborative Agent Reasoning Engineering (CARE): A Three-Party Design Methodology for Systematically Engineering AI Agents with Subject Matter Experts, Developers, and Helper Agents
papers.abstract: We present Collaborative Agent Reasoning Engineering (CARE), a disciplined methodology for engineering Large Language Model (LLM) agents in scientific domains. Unlike ad-hoc trial-and-error approaches, CARE specifies behavior, grounding, tool orchestration, and verification through reusable artifacts and systematic, stage-gated phases. The methodology employs a three-party workflow involving Subject-Matter Experts (SMEs), developers, and LLM-based helper agents. These helper agents function as facilitation infrastructure, transforming informal domain intent into structured, reviewable specifications for human approval at defined gates. CARE addresses the "jagged technological frontier", characterized by uneven LLM performance, by bridging the gap between novice and expert analysts regarding domain constraints and verification practices. By generating concrete artifacts, including interaction requirements, reasoning policies, and evaluation criteria, CARE ensures agent behavior is specifiable, testable, and maintainable. Evaluation results from a scientific use case demonstrate that this stage-gated, artifact-driven methodology yields measurable improvements in development efficiency and complex-query performance.

analysis.tldr: CARE 是一种通过三方协作和阶段化工件驱动来系统化工程化科学领域 LLM Agent 的方法论。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 LLM Agent 开发多采用临时试错法，缺乏系统化工程流程，导致在科学领域中性能不稳定、难以维护和验证。
analysis.problem: 如何系统化地设计、验证和维护科学领域的 LLM Agent，使其行为可指定、可测试且可维护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 LLM 性能存在“锯齿状技术前沿”，即表现不均匀，且领域专家与开发者之间存在知识鸿沟。
analysis.method: CARE 采用三方（领域专家、开发者、LLM 辅助 Agent）协作流程，通过阶段化门控和可复用工件（交互需求、推理策略、评估标准）来规范 Agent 行为、接地、工具编排和验证。
contributions: 提出了一种系统化的三方协作方法论，用于工程化科学领域的 LLM Agent。
通过生成具体工件（交互需求、推理策略、评估标准）确保 Agent 行为的可指定性、可测试性和可维护性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在科学用例中评估，结果显示阶段化、工件驱动的方法在开发效率和复杂查询性能上有可衡量的改进，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于科学领域，泛化性未验证。
依赖 LLM 辅助 Agent 的质量，可能引入新不确定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CARE 是一种通过三方协作和阶段化工件驱动来系统化工程化科学领域 LLM Agent 的方法论。

papers.title: SpecVQA: A Benchmark for Spectral Understanding and Visual Question Answering in Scientific Images
papers.abstract: Spectra are a prevalent yet highly information-dense form of scientific imagery, presenting substantial challenges to multimodal large language models (MLLMs) due to their unstructured and domain-specific characteristics. Here we introduce SpecVQA, a professional scientific-image benchmark for evaluating multimodal models on scientific spectral understanding, covering 7 representative spectrum types with expert-annotated question-answer pairs. The aim comprises two aspects: spectra scientific QA evaluation and corresponding underlying task evaluation. SpecVQA contains 620 figures and 3100 QA pairs curated from peer-reviewed literature, targeting both direct information extraction and domain-specific reasoning. To effectively reduce token length while preserving essential curve characteristics, we propose a spectral data sampling and interpolation reconstruction approach. Ablation studies further confirm that the approach achieves substantial performance improvements on the proposed benchmark. We test the capability of prominent MLLMs in scientific spectral understanding on our benchmark and present a leaderboard. This work represents an essential step toward enhancing spectral understanding in multimodal large models and suggests promising directions for extending visual-language models to broader scientific research and data analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出科学图像光谱理解基准SpecVQA，并设计采样插值方法提升MLLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 光谱图像信息密集且非结构化，现有MLLM难以处理这类领域特定数据，缺乏专业评测基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对科学光谱图像的理解与问答评测基准，以及高效处理光谱数据的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含7类光谱、620张图和3100个QA对的基准SpecVQA，并提出光谱数据采样与插值重建方法以减少token长度同时保留曲线特征。
contributions: 提出首个面向科学光谱图像理解与问答的基准SpecVQA
设计光谱数据采样与插值重建方法，有效提升MLLM性能
analysis.experiments: 在SpecVQA上测试了多个主流MLLM，并通过消融实验验证了所提方法的有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准规模有限（620张图），可能覆盖不全
方法仅针对曲线特征，对其他科学图像类型适用性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出科学图像光谱理解基准SpecVQA，并设计采样插值方法提升MLLM性能。

papers.title: Models Recall What They Violate: Constraint Adherence in Multi-Turn LLM Ideation
papers.abstract: When researchers iteratively refine ideas with large language models, do the models preserve fidelity to the original objective? We introduce DriftBench, a benchmark for evaluating constraint adherence in multi-turn LLM-assisted scientific ideation. Across 2,146 scored benchmark runs spanning seven models from five providers (including two open-weight), four interaction conditions, and 38 research briefs from 24 scientific domains, we find that iterative pressure reliably increases structural complexity and often reduces adherence to original constraints. A restatement probe reveals a dissociation between declarative recall and behavioral adherence, as models accurately restate constraints they simultaneously violate. The knows-but-violates (KBV) rate, measuring constraint non-compliance despite preserved recall, ranges from 8% to 99% across models. Structured checkpointing partially reduces KBV rates but does not close the dissociation, and complexity inflation persists. Human validation against blind raters confirms that the LLM judge under-detects constraint violations, making reported constraint adherence scores conservative. Sensitivity analyses confirm the findings are robust to temperature (0.7 vs.\ 1.0) and pressure type (novelty vs.\ rigor). We release all briefs, prompts, rubrics, transcripts, and scores as an open benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 多轮LLM辅助科学构思中，模型常违背原始约束，即使能准确复述约束。
analysis.research_motivation: 研究人员使用LLM迭代优化想法时，模型可能偏离原始目标，但缺乏系统评估约束遵循的基准。
analysis.problem: 评估多轮LLM辅助科学构思中模型对原始约束的遵循程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 迭代压力增加结构复杂性并降低约束遵循；模型能准确复述约束却同时违反（KBV率8%-99%）；结构化检查点部分降低KBV但未消除分离；复杂性膨胀持续存在。
analysis.method: 构建DriftBench基准，包含2,146次评分运行、7个模型、4种交互条件、38份研究简报，通过约束遵循评分和KBV率评估。
contributions: 提出DriftBench基准用于评估多轮LLM构思中的约束遵循。
发现模型存在“知道但违反”现象，即能复述约束却违背。
验证结构化检查点部分缓解但未消除约束偏离。
analysis.experiments: 在2,146次运行中测试7个模型（含两个开源），4种交互条件，38份跨24个科学领域的研究简报，使用人类验证确认LLM评判保守。
limitations: 仅针对科学构思场景，可能不适用于其他多轮对话。
约束类型限于研究简报中的原始目标，未涵盖更广泛约束。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多轮LLM辅助科学构思中，模型常违背原始约束，即使能准确复述约束。

papers.title: MIFair: A Mutual-Information Framework for Intersectionality and Multiclass Fairness
papers.abstract: Fairness in machine learning remains challenging due to its ethical complexity, the absence of a universal definition, and the need for context-specific bias metrics. Existing methods still struggle with intersectionality, multiclass settings, and limited flexibility and generality. To address these gaps, we introduce MIFair, a unified framework for bias assessment and mitigation based on mutual information. MIFair provides a flexible metric template and an in-processing mitigation method inspired by the Prejudice Remover, defining group fairness as statistical independence between prediction-derived variables and sensitive attributes. We further strengthen its information-theoretic foundation by establishing equivalences with widely used fairness notions such as independence and separation. MIFair naturally supports intersectionality, complex subgroup structures, and multiclass classification and employs regularization-based training to reduce bias according to the selected metric. Its key advantage is its versatility: it consolidates diverse fairness requirements into a single coherent framework, enabling consistent benchmarking and simplifying practical use. Experiments on real-world tabular and image datasets show that MIFair effectively reduces bias, including previously unaddressed multi-attribute scenarios, while maintaining strong predictive performance across the evaluated settings.

analysis.tldr: MIFair 基于互信息提出统一公平性评估与缓解框架，支持交叉性、多类别和多属性场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习公平性面临伦理复杂性、缺乏统一定义和上下文特定偏差度量等挑战，现有方法在交叉性、多类别设置以及灵活性和通用性方面仍存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的、基于互信息的框架，以灵活评估和缓解多种公平性定义下的偏差，并自然支持交叉性、复杂子群结构和多类别分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MIFair 框架，包含基于互信息的灵活度量模板和受 Prejudice Remover 启发的处理中缓解方法，将群体公平性定义为预测派生变量与敏感属性之间的统计独立性，并通过正则化训练减少偏差。
contributions: 提出统一的基于互信息的公平性评估与缓解框架 MIFair，支持交叉性、多类别和多属性场景。
建立与独立性、分离性等广泛公平性概念的信息论等价关系，增强理论基础。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界表格和图像数据集上实验，MIFair 有效减少偏差（包括之前未解决的多属性场景），同时保持强预测性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可计算互信息的场景，对高维数据计算成本较高。
未在摘要中讨论对非表格/图像模态的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MIFair 基于互信息提出统一公平性评估与缓解框架，支持交叉性、多类别和多属性场景。

papers.title: DeRelayL: Sustainable Decentralized Relay Learning
papers.abstract: In the era of big data, large-scale machine learning models have revolutionized various fields, driving significant advancements. However, large-scale model training demands high financial and computational resources, which are only affordable by a few technological giants and well-funded institutions. In this case, common users like mobile users, the real creators of valuable data, are often excluded from fully benefiting due to the barriers, while the current methods for accessing large-scale models either limit user ownership or lack sustainability. This growing gap highlights the urgent need for a collaborative model training approach, allowing common users to train and share models. However, existing collaborative model training paradigms, especially federated learning (FL), primarily focus on data privacy and group-based model aggregation. To this end, this paper intends to address this issue by proposing a novel training paradigm named decentralized relay learning (DeRelayL), a sustainable learning system where permissionless participants can contribute to model training in a relay-like manner and share the model. In detail, this paper presents the architecture and workflow of DeRelayL, designs incentive mechanisms to ensure sustainability, and conducts theoretical analysis and numerical simulations to demonstrate its effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可持续的去中心化接力学习范式，允许无许可参与者以接力方式协作训练并共享模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模模型训练成本高昂，普通用户被排除在外，现有协作范式（如联邦学习）主要关注数据隐私和组聚合，缺乏可持续性和用户所有权。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可持续的去中心化学习系统，使无许可参与者能协作训练并共享模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出去中心化接力学习（DeRelayL），包括架构、工作流、激励机机制，并通过理论分析和数值模拟验证。
contributions: 提出DeRelayL范式，实现无许可参与者的可持续协作训练
设计激励机机制确保系统可持续性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏真实场景实验验证
激励机机制在恶意节点下的鲁棒性未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可持续的去中心化接力学习范式，允许无许可参与者以接力方式协作训练并共享模型。

papers.title: Reliable Answers for Recurring Questions: Boosting Text-to-SQL Accuracy with Template Constrained Decoding
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have revolutionized Text-to-SQL generation, allowing users to query structured data using natural language with growing ease. Yet, real-world deployment remains challenging, especially in complex or unseen schemas, due to inconsistent accuracy and the risk of generating invalid SQL. We introduce Template Constrained Decoding (TeCoD), a system that addresses these limitations by harnessing the recurrence of query patterns in labeled workloads. TeCoD converts historical NL-SQL pairs into reusable templates and introduces a robust template selection module that uses a fine-tuned natural language inference model to match or reject queries efficiently. Once the template is selected, TeCoD enforces it during SQL generation through grammar-constrained decoding, implemented via a novel partitioned strategy that ensures both syntactic validity and efficiency. Together, these components yield up to 36% higher execution accuracy than in-context learning (ICL) and 2.2x lower latency on matched queries.

analysis.tldr: TeCoD通过模板约束解码提升Text-to-SQL准确率与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在Text-to-SQL中面临准确率不稳定和生成无效SQL的风险，尤其在复杂或未见过的模式上，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何利用历史查询模式提高Text-to-SQL的准确性和生成SQL的语法有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出模板约束解码（TeCoD），将历史NL-SQL对转换为可复用模板，通过微调的自然语言推理模型进行模板匹配，并在SQL生成时通过分区策略实施语法约束解码。
contributions: 提出TeCoD系统，利用历史查询模式提升Text-to-SQL准确率。
设计模板选择模块和分区约束解码策略，兼顾语法有效性和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在匹配查询上，TeCoD相比上下文学习（ICL）执行准确率提升高达36%，延迟降低2.2倍。
limitations: 依赖历史标注工作负载，对新领域可能泛化不足。
模板匹配模块可能对未见查询模式处理不佳。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TeCoD通过模板约束解码提升Text-to-SQL准确率与效率。

papers.title: ResiHMR: Residual-Limb Aware Single-Image 3D Human Mesh Recovery for Individuals with Limb Loss
papers.abstract: Single-image human mesh recovery provides a compact 3D, person-centric representation that supports analysis, animation, AR and VR, rehabilitation, and human-computer interaction. However, prevailing systems impose an intact-limb prior and degrade on people with limb loss, because fixed-topology models cannot represent residual limbs. In this work, we present ResiHMR, a residual-limb aware framework for single-image 3D human modeling. ResiHMR adopts residual-limb keypoints and introduces two components: (i) a topology-adaptive Residual Anchor-Factor Optimization module that constrains estimation to the observed kinematic subgraph of anatomically valid structures, and (ii) a geometry-based Residual-Limb Reconstruction module that estimates residual-limb boundaries and convex limb-termination geometry. These components introduce topology-aware optimization and explicit termination geometry as tools for human mesh recovery under non-standard limb anatomy. Unlike joint-removal methods in a fixed topology, ResiHMR explicitly reconstructs residual-limb surfaces and aligns optimization with limb-loss topology, which better matches prosthetic biomechanics and real-world use. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first single-image HMR system that explicitly reconstructs residual-limb surfaces and performs topology-adaptive optimization for individuals with limb loss. On a curated dataset of real-world images with limb loss, ResiHMR improves reconstruction quality under both SMPLify-X and HSMR backbones, reducing intact-joint 2D MPJPE from 41.32 to 37.40 with SMPLify-X and residual-limb 2D MPJPE from 73.61 to 23.19 with HSMR.

analysis.tldr: ResiHMR 提出首个面向截肢者的残肢感知单图人体网格重建框架，通过拓扑自适应优化和显式残肢几何重建显著提升重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单图人体网格重建方法假设肢体完整，固定拓扑模型无法表示残肢，导致对截肢者重建效果差，限制了在康复、AR/VR等领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张图像中重建截肢者的三维人体网格，包括残肢表面和拓扑自适应优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定拓扑模型无法表示残肢，导致截肢者重建质量严重下降；简单移除关节的方法无法重建残肢表面。
analysis.method: 提出残肢关键点，并引入拓扑自适应残基锚点因子优化模块（约束估计到有效解剖结构的运动子图）和基于几何的残肢重建模块（估计残肢边界和凸面终止几何）。
contributions: 首个显式重建残肢表面并进行拓扑自适应优化的单图人体网格恢复系统。
提出残基锚点因子优化和残肢几何重建两个模块，有效处理非标准肢体解剖。
analysis.experiments: 在真实截肢者图像数据集上，以SMPLify-X和HSMR为骨干，ResiHMR降低了完整关节2D MPJPE（41.32→37.40）和残肢2D MPJPE（73.61→23.19）。
limitations: 依赖残肢关键点标注，可能限制数据扩展。
仅针对单图，未考虑视频时序信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ResiHMR 提出首个面向截肢者的残肢感知单图人体网格重建框架，通过拓扑自适应优化和显式残肢几何重建显著提升重建质量。

papers.title: Are DeepFakes Realistic Enough? Exploring Semantic Mismatch as a Novel Challenge
papers.abstract: Current DeepFake detection scenarios are mostly binary, yet data manipulation can vary across audio, video, or both, whose variability is not captured in binary settings. Four-class audio-visual formulations address this by discriminating manipulation type, but introduce a unresolved problem: models may rely solely on data source integrity to detect DeepFakes without evaluating their semantic consistency. If the DeepFake origin is not in the data source but in its content, can semantic mismatch be assessed by the state-of-the-art? This paper proposes a new evaluation setup, extending the four-class formulation by explicitly modeling semantic-level inconsistency between authentic modalities with the introduction a new class: Real Audio-Real Video with Semantic Mismatch (RARV-SMM). We assess the robustness of state-of-the-art models in this new realistic DeepFake setting, using the FakeAVCeleb dataset, highlighting the limitations of existing approaches when faced with semantic mismatch data. We further introduce three RARV-SMM variants that expose distinct architectural vulnerabilities as audio-visual divergence increases. We also propose a semantic reinforcement strategy that incorporates the semantic mismatch class and ImageBind embeddings to improve DeepFake detection in both our proposed and state-of-the-art settings, on FakeAVCeleb and LAV-DF, paving the way to more realistic DeepFake detectors. The source code and data are available at https://github.com/.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义不匹配作为DeepFake检测的新挑战，并引入新评估设置与增强策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有DeepFake检测多基于二分类或四分类，但忽略了真实音视频间语义不一致的问题，导致模型可能仅依赖数据源完整性而非语义一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和提升模型在语义不匹配场景下的DeepFake检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，四分类模型可能仅依赖数据源完整性，而无法检测语义不匹配的DeepFake；引入RARV-SMM类后，现有模型表现出局限性。
analysis.method: 提出包含语义不匹配类（RARV-SMM）的新评估框架，并设计三种变体暴露架构脆弱性；采用语义增强策略，结合ImageBind嵌入和语义不匹配类进行训练。
contributions: 提出语义不匹配作为DeepFake检测的新挑战，并引入RARV-SMM类扩展四分类设置。
评估现有模型在语义不匹配场景下的局限性，并设计三种变体分析架构脆弱性。
提出语义增强策略，利用ImageBind嵌入提升检测鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在FakeAVCeleb和LAV-DF数据集上评估，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 语义不匹配的定义可能依赖数据集，泛化性待验证。
语义增强策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义不匹配作为DeepFake检测的新挑战，并引入新评估设置与增强策略。

papers.title: Design Structure Matrix Modularization with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Design Structure Matrix (DSM) modularization, the task of partitioning system elements into cohesive modules, is a fundamental combinatorial challenge in engineering design. Traditional methods treat modularization as a pure graph optimization, without access to the engineering context embedded in the system. Building on prior work on LLM-based combinatorial optimization for DSM sequencing, this paper extends the method to modularization across five cases and three backbone LLMs. Our method achieves near-reference quality within 30 iterations without requiring specialized optimization code. Counterintuitively, domain knowledge, beneficial in sequencing, consistently impairs performance on more complex DSMs. We attribute this to semantic misalignment between the LLM's functional priors and the purely structural optimization objective, and propose the semantic-alignment hypothesis as a testable condition governing knowledge effectiveness with LLMs. Ablation studies identify the most effective input representation, objective formulation, and solution pool design for practical deployment. These findings offer practical guidance for deploying LLMs in engineering design optimization.

analysis.tldr: LLM 可在无专用优化代码的情况下，通过语义对齐实现 DSM 模块化，但领域知识反而损害性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统 DSM 模块化方法仅依赖图优化，无法利用系统嵌入的工程上下文，而 LLM 在组合优化中展现出潜力，但如何有效应用于模块化任务尚待探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 进行 DSM 模块化，并理解领域知识对性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 领域知识在简单任务中有益，但在复杂 DSM 中持续损害性能，归因于 LLM 的功能先验与纯结构优化目标之间的语义错位。
analysis.method: 基于 LLM 的迭代优化方法，在 30 次迭代内达到接近参考质量，无需专用优化代码；通过消融研究确定最佳输入表示、目标函数和解决方案池设计。
contributions: 将 LLM 方法从 DSM 排序扩展到模块化，在五个案例和三个骨干 LLM 上验证。
发现领域知识在复杂 DSM 中损害性能，并提出语义对齐假说解释该现象。
通过消融研究提供实际部署的指导。
analysis.experiments: 在五个案例上使用三个骨干 LLM 进行实验，30 次迭代内达到接近参考质量；进行了消融研究。
limitations: 语义对齐假说仍需进一步验证。
方法可能对 LLM 的选择敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM 可在无专用优化代码的情况下，通过语义对齐实现 DSM 模块化，但领域知识反而损害性能。

papers.title: Faster 3D Gaussian Splatting Convergence via Structure-Aware Densification
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting has emerged as a powerful scene representation for real-time novel-view synthesis. However, its standard adaptive density control relies on screen-space positional gradients, which do not distinguish between geometric misplacement and frequency aliasing, often leading to either over-blurred high-frequency textures or inefficient over-densification. We present a structure-aware densification framework. Our key insight is that the decision to subdivide a Gaussian should be driven by an explicit comparison between its projected screen-space extent and the local structure of the texture it seeks to represent. We introduce a multi-scale frequency analysis combining structure tensors with Laplacian scale space analysis to estimate the dominant frequency at each pixel, enabling robust supervision across varying texture scales. Based on this analysis, we define $η$, a per-Gaussian, per-axis frequency violation metric that indicates when a primitive may be under-resolving local texture details. Unlike methods that perform isotropic splitting (e.g., splitting each Gaussian into two smaller ones with uniform shape), our approach performs anisotropic splitting. For each axis with high $η$, we compute a split factor to better resolve the local frequency content. We further introduce a multiview consistency criterion that aggregates $η$ observations across multiple views. By performing densification early and faster, we skip the lengthy iterative densification phases required by baseline methods and achieve significantly faster convergence. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method also achieves superior reconstruction quality, particularly in high-frequency regions.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构感知的稠密化框架，通过多尺度频率分析和各向异性分裂加速3D高斯泼溅收敛并提升高频重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯泼溅的标准自适应密度控制依赖屏幕空间位置梯度，无法区分几何错位和频率混叠，导致高频纹理过模糊或过度稠密化，收敛缓慢。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种能感知局部纹理结构的稠密化策略，以加速收敛并提升高频区域的重建质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准方法中，屏幕空间位置梯度无法区分几何错位和频率混叠，导致高频纹理过模糊或过度稠密化。
analysis.method: 提出结构感知稠密化框架：结合结构张量和拉普拉斯尺度空间分析进行多尺度频率分析，定义每高斯每轴的频率违规度量η，基于η进行各向异性分裂，并引入多视图一致性准则聚合η观测。
contributions: 提出结构感知稠密化框架，通过多尺度频率分析指导高斯分裂。
引入各向异性分裂策略，根据局部频率内容自适应调整分裂因子。
通过早期快速稠密化显著加速收敛，并在标准基准上取得更优重建质量，尤其在高频区域。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上实验，表明方法在重建质量上优于基线，尤其在高频区域。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对纹理极稀疏区域效果有限。
多视图一致性准则可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构感知的稠密化框架，通过多尺度频率分析和各向异性分裂加速3D高斯泼溅收敛并提升高频重建质量。

papers.title: Hyperspherical Forward-Forward with Prototypical Representations
papers.abstract: The Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm presents a compelling, bio-inspired alternative to backpropagation. However, while efficient in training, it has a computationally prohibitive inference process that requires a separate forward pass for every class that is evaluated. In this work, we introduce the Hyperspherical Forward-Forward (HFF), a novel reformulation that resolves this critical bottleneck. Our core innovation is to reframe the local objective of each layer from a binary goodness-of-fit task to a direct multi-class classification problem within a hyperspherical feature space. We achieve this by learning a set of class-specific, unit-norm prototypes that act as geometric anchors and implicit negatives. This architectural innovation preserves the benefits of local training while enabling weight update and inference in a single forward pass, making it >40x faster than the original FF algorithm. Our method is simple to implement, scales effectively to modern convolutional architectures, and achieves superior accuracy on standard image classification benchmarks, closing the gap with backpropagation. Most notably, we are among the first greedy local-learning methods to report over 25% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1k, and 65.96% with transfer learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出超球面前向-前向算法，通过原型表示将局部学习转化为多类分类，实现单次前向推理，速度提升40倍以上。
analysis.research_motivation: 前向-前向算法虽高效训练，但推理时需为每类单独前向传播，计算成本高，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 解决前向-前向算法推理过程计算开销大的瓶颈问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将每层的局部目标从二值拟合任务重构为超球面特征空间中的直接多类分类问题，通过学习类特定的单位范数原型作为几何锚点和隐式负样本。
contributions: 提出超球面前向-前向（HFF）算法，将推理加速至单次前向传播，比原算法快40倍以上。
首次在ImageNet-1k上实现超过25% top-1准确率的贪心局部学习方法，迁移学习达65.96%。
analysis.experiments: 在标准图像分类基准上达到更高准确率，缩小与反向传播的差距；在ImageNet-1k上报告了top-1准确率（>25%和65.96%）。
limitations: 可能仅在卷积架构上验证，未提及对其他架构的适用性。
准确率仍低于反向传播，存在性能差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超球面前向-前向算法，通过原型表示将局部学习转化为多类分类，实现单次前向推理，速度提升40倍以上。

papers.title: Echo-α: Large Agentic Multimodal Reasoning Model for Ultrasound Interpretation
papers.abstract: Ultrasound interpretation requires both precise lesion localization and holistic clinical reasoning, yet existing methods typically excel at only one of these capabilities: specialized detectors offer strong localization but limited reasoning, whereas multimodal large language models (MLLMs) provide flexible reasoning but weak grounding in specialized medical domains. We present Echo-α, an agentic multimodal reasoning model for ultrasound interpretation that unifies these strengths within an invoke-and-reason framework. Echo-α is trained to coordinate organ-specific detector outputs, integrate them with global visual context, and convert the resulting evidence into grounded diagnostic decisions beyond detector-only inference. This behavior is established through a nine-task supervised curriculum and then refined by sequential reinforcement learning under different reward trade-offs, yielding Echo-α-Grounding for lesion anchoring and Echo-α-Diagnosis for final diagnosis. On multi-center renal and breast ultrasound benchmarks, Echo-α outperforms competitive baselines on both grounding and diagnosis. In particular, on cross-center test sets, Echo-α-Grounding attains 56.73%/43.78% F1@0.5 and Echo- α-Diagnosis reaches 74.90%/49.20% overall accuracy on renal/breast ultrasound. These results suggest that agentic multimodal reasoning can turn specialized detectors into verifiable clinical evidence, offering a practical route toward ultrasound AI systems that are more accurate, interpretable, and transferable. The repository is at https://github.com/MiliLab/Echo-Alpha.

analysis.tldr: 提出Echo-α，一个结合专用检测器和多模态大语言模型的超声解读智能体推理模型，在肾脏和乳腺超声基准上取得领先性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 超声解读需要精确定位和临床推理，但现有方法要么定位强推理弱，要么推理灵活但医学领域定位弱，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将专用检测器的强定位能力与多模态大语言模型的灵活推理能力结合，实现超声图像的准确解读和可验证诊断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Echo-α，采用invoke-and-reason框架，通过九任务监督课程学习协调器官检测器输出与全局视觉上下文，再通过序列强化学习优化，得到Echo-α-Grounding（病灶定位）和Echo-α-Diagnosis（最终诊断）。
contributions: 提出首个结合专用检测器和MLLM的超声解读智能体推理模型Echo-α。
设计九任务监督课程和序列强化学习训练策略，实现定位与诊断的协同优化。
在多中心肾脏和乳腺超声基准上取得领先性能，验证了方法的有效性和可迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在多中心肾脏和乳腺超声基准上评估，Echo-α-Grounding在跨中心测试集上F1@0.5达56.73%/43.78%，Echo-α-Diagnosis总体准确率达74.90%/49.20%。
limitations: 仅针对肾脏和乳腺超声，泛化到其他超声类型需验证。
依赖专用检测器输出，检测器性能可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Echo-α，一个结合专用检测器和多模态大语言模型的超声解读智能体推理模型，在肾脏和乳腺超声基准上取得领先性能。

papers.title: Learning from Disagreement: Clinician Overrides as Implicit Preference Signals for Clinical AI in Value-Based Care
papers.abstract: We reframe clinician overrides of clinical AI recommendations as implicit preference data - the same signal structure exploited by reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), but richer: the annotator is a domain expert, the alternatives carry real consequences, and downstream outcomes are observable. We present a formal framework extending standard preference learning with three contributions: a five-category override taxonomy mapping override types to distinct model update targets; a preference formulation conditioned on patient state s, organizational context c, and clinician capability kappa, where kappa decomposes into execution capability kappa-exec and alignment capability kappa-align; and a dual learning architecture that jointly trains a reward model and a capability model via alternating optimization, preventing a failure mode we term suppression bias-the systematic suppression of correct-but-difficult recommendations when clinician capability falls below the execution threshold. We argue that chronic disease management under outcome-based payment contracts produces override data with uniquely favorable properties-longitudinal density, concentrated decision space, outcome labels, and natural capability variation-and that training environments combining longitudinal outcome measurement with aligned financial incentives are a necessary condition for learning a reward model aligned with patient trajectory rather than with encounter economics. This framework emerged from operational work to improve clinician capability in a live value-based care deployment.

analysis.tldr: 将临床医生对AI建议的否决重新定义为隐式偏好数据，提出覆盖分类法、条件偏好公式和双学习架构，以在基于价值的医疗中学习与患者轨迹对齐的奖励模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床AI部署中，医生常否决AI建议，但这些否决未被有效利用；现有偏好学习（如RLHF）依赖显式反馈，而临床场景中隐式否决数据更丰富但缺乏形式化框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将临床医生的否决行为转化为可学习的偏好信号，并避免因医生能力不足导致的系统性偏差（抑制偏差）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到当临床医生能力低于执行阈值时，系统会系统性抑制正确但困难的建议，称为抑制偏差。
analysis.method: 提出一个形式化框架，包含五类否决分类法、基于患者状态/组织环境/医生能力的条件偏好公式，以及联合训练奖励模型和能力模型的双学习架构，通过交替优化防止抑制偏差。
contributions: 提出五类否决分类法，将否决类型映射到不同的模型更新目标。
构建条件偏好公式，融入患者状态、组织环境和医生能力分解（执行能力与对齐能力）。
设计双学习架构，联合训练奖励模型和能力模型，通过交替优化避免抑制偏差。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖纵向结果测量和财务激励对齐，可能难以在缺乏此类条件的场景中推广。
能力模型的估计需要大量数据，实际部署中可能面临数据稀疏问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将临床医生对AI建议的否决重新定义为隐式偏好数据，提出覆盖分类法、条件偏好公式和双学习架构，以在基于价值的医疗中学习与患者轨迹对齐的奖励模型。

papers.title: A Pattern Language for Resilient Visual Agents
papers.abstract: Integrating multimodal foundation models into enterprise ecosystems presents a fundamental software architecture challenge. Architects must balance competing quality attributes: the high latency and non-determinism of vision language action (VLA) models versus the strict determinism and real-time performance required by enterprise control loops. In this study, we propose an architectural pattern language for visual agents that separates fast, deterministic reflexes from slow, probabilistic supervision. It consists of four architectural design patterns: (1) Hybrid Affordance Integration, (2) Adaptive Visual Anchoring, (3) Visual Hierarchy Synthesis, and (4) Semantic Scene Graph.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种用于视觉智能体的架构模式语言，通过分离快速确定性反射与慢速概率监督来平衡企业级系统的延迟与确定性需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 将多模态基础模型集成到企业生态系统面临软件架构挑战，需要平衡VLA模型的高延迟/非确定性与企业控制环的严格确定性和实时性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计视觉智能体的软件架构，使其既能利用多模态基础模型的强大能力，又能满足企业级系统对低延迟和高确定性的要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出包含四种架构设计模式的模式语言：混合可拓性集成、自适应视觉锚定、视觉层次合成和语义场景图。
contributions: 提出一种针对视觉智能体的架构模式语言，分离快速确定性反射与慢速概率监督。
定义了四种具体的架构设计模式，用于指导企业级视觉智能体的构建。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模式语言可能缺乏实证验证，实际效果未知。
可能仅适用于特定类型的企业级视觉智能体场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种用于视觉智能体的架构模式语言，通过分离快速确定性反射与慢速概率监督来平衡企业级系统的延迟与确定性需求。

papers.title: Exploring Interaction Paradigms for LLM Agents in Scientific Visualization
papers.abstract: This paper examines how different types of large language model (LLM) agents perform on scientific visualization (SciVis) tasks, where users generate visualization workflows from natural-language instructions. We compare three primary interaction paradigms, including domain-specific agents with structured tool use, computer-use agents, and general-purpose coding agents, by evaluating eight representative agents across 15 benchmark tasks and measuring visualization quality, efficiency, robustness, and computational cost. We further analyze interaction modalities, including code scripts and model context protocol (MCP) or API calls for structured tool use, as well as command-line interfaces (CLI) and graphical user interfaces (GUI) for more general interaction, while additionally studying the effect of persistent memory in selected agents. The results reveal clear tradeoffs across paradigms and modalities. General-purpose coding agents achieve the highest task success rates but are computationally expensive, while domain-specific agents are more efficient and stable but less flexible. Computer-use agents perform well on individual steps but struggle with longer multi-step workflows, indicating that long-horizon planning is their primary limitation. Across both CLI- and GUI-based settings, persistent memory improves performance over repeated trials, although its benefits depend on the underlying interaction mode and the quality of feedback. These findings suggest that no single approach is sufficient, and future SciVis systems should combine structured tool use, interactive capabilities, and adaptive memory mechanisms to balance performance, robustness, and flexibility.

analysis.tldr: 比较三种LLM智能体交互范式在科学可视化任务中的表现，发现通用编码智能体成功率最高但计算成本高，领域专用智能体更高效稳定，计算机使用智能体在长流程中受限，提出未来系统应结合结构化工具、交互能力和自适应记忆。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学可视化任务中用户通过自然语言生成可视化工作流，但现有LLM智能体交互范式（领域专用、计算机使用、通用编码）缺乏系统比较，无法明确其在不同维度的优劣，阻碍了实际应用中的范式选择与系统设计。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和比较不同LLM智能体交互范式在科学可视化任务中的性能、效率、鲁棒性和计算成本，并分析交互模态和持久记忆的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用编码智能体任务成功率最高但计算成本高；领域专用智能体更高效稳定但灵活性差；计算机使用智能体在单步任务表现好但长多步工作流中受限，表明长程规划是其主要瓶颈；持久记忆在CLI和GUI设置中均能提升重复试验性能，但收益依赖于交互模式和反馈质量。
analysis.method: 构建15个基准任务，评估8个代表性智能体（涵盖三种交互范式），测量可视化质量、效率、鲁棒性和计算成本，并分析交互模态（代码脚本、MCP/API调用、CLI、GUI）及持久记忆的影响。
contributions: 首次系统比较三种LLM智能体交互范式在科学可视化任务中的性能，揭示范式间的明确权衡。
分析交互模态和持久记忆对智能体表现的影响，发现长程规划是计算机使用智能体的主要瓶颈。
提出未来科学可视化系统应结合结构化工具使用、交互能力和自适应记忆机制的设计建议。
analysis.experiments: 在15个基准任务上评估8个智能体，测量可视化质量、效率、鲁棒性和计算成本，并分析交互模态和持久记忆的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准任务规模有限（15个），可能无法覆盖所有科学可视化场景。
未深入探讨不同范式组合的具体实现策略和性能增益。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 比较三种LLM智能体交互范式在科学可视化任务中的表现，发现通用编码智能体成功率最高但计算成本高，领域专用智能体更高效稳定，计算机使用智能体在长流程中受限，提出未来系统应结合结构化工具、交互能力和自适应记忆。

papers.title: ITS-Mina: A Harris Hawks Optimization-Based All-MLP Framework with Iterative Refinement and External Attention for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting plays a pivotal role in numerous real-world applications, including financial analysis, energy management, and traffic planning. While Transformer-based architectures have gained popularity for this task, recent studies reveal that simpler MLP-based models can achieve competitive or superior performance with significantly reduced computational cost.
