In this paper, we propose ITS-Mina, a novel all-MLP framework for multivariate time series forecasting that integrates three key innovations: (1) an iterative refinement mechanism that progressively enhances temporal representations by repeatedly applying a shared-parameter residual mixer stack, effectively deepening the model's computational capacity without multiplying the number of distinct parameters; (2) an external attention module that replaces traditional self-attention with learnable memory units, capturing cross-sample global dependencies at linear computational complexity; and (3) a Harris Hawks Optimization (HHO) algorithm for automatic dropout rate tuning, enabling adaptive regularization tailored to each dataset. Extensive experiments on six widely-used benchmark datasets demonstrate that ITS-Mina achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance compared to eleven baseline models across multiple forecasting horizons.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于哈里斯鹰优化的全MLP框架ITS-Mina，通过迭代细化、外部注意力和自适应正则化实现高效多变量时间序列预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 多变量时间序列预测在金融、能源、交通等领域至关重要，但现有Transformer模型计算成本高，而简单MLP模型性能仍有提升空间。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种计算高效且性能优异的全MLP架构用于多变量时间序列预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ITS-Mina框架，包含三个创新：迭代细化机制（共享参数残差混合器堆叠）、外部注意力模块（可学习记忆单元替代自注意力）、哈里斯鹰优化算法自动调整dropout率。
contributions: 提出迭代细化机制，通过共享参数残差混合器堆叠增强时间表征，不增加参数量。
引入外部注意力模块，以线性复杂度捕获跨样本全局依赖。
采用哈里斯鹰优化自动调节dropout率，实现自适应正则化。
analysis.experiments: 在六个广泛使用的基准数据集上与十一个基线模型对比，在多个预测长度上达到SOTA或极具竞争力的性能。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，尤其是HHO的搜索空间设置。
外部注意力模块的记忆单元大小需针对不同数据集调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于哈里斯鹰优化的全MLP框架ITS-Mina，通过迭代细化、外部注意力和自适应正则化实现高效多变量时间序列预测。

papers.title: D3-Gym: Constructing Real-World Verifiable Environments for Data-Driven Discovery
papers.abstract: Despite recent progress in language models and agents for scientific data-driven discovery, further advancing their capabilities is held back by the absence of verifiable environments representing real-world scientific tasks. To fill this gap, we introduce D3-Gym, the first automatically constructed dataset with verifiable environments for scientific Data-Driven Discovery. D3-Gym comprises (1) 565 tasks sourced from 239 real scientific repositories across four disciplines where (2) each task is equipped with a natural language instruction, an executable environment with pre-installed dependencies, input dataset and artifact previews, a reference code solution, and an automatically synthesized evaluation script. Rigorous evaluation of the quality of the verification signal in D3-Gym confirms that our evaluation scripts achieve 87.5% agreement with human-annotated gold standards and strong alignment in domain-specific evaluation logic, showing their scientific soundness. Further, training on trajectories sampled from D3-Gym yields consistent and substantial gains across Qwen3 models of varying sizes on ScienceAgentBench, boosting Qwen3-32B by 7.8 absolute points and substantially shrinking the gap with strong proprietary models. All D3-Gym artifacts (environments, creation workflow, trajectories, and models) can be found at https://github.com/OSU-NLP-Group/D3-Gym.

analysis.tldr: D3-Gym 是首个自动构建的、用于科学数据驱动发现的可验证环境数据集，包含 565 个来自真实科学仓库的任务，并验证了其评估脚本与人工标注高度一致。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前语言模型和智能体在科学数据驱动发现方面的进展受限于缺乏代表真实科学任务的可验证环境。
analysis.problem: 缺乏自动构建的、具有可验证评估信号的真实科学任务环境，以支持数据驱动发现的研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从 239 个真实科学仓库中提取 565 个任务，为每个任务配备自然语言指令、可执行环境（含预装依赖）、输入数据与工件预览、参考代码解决方案以及自动合成的评估脚本。
contributions: 首次提出自动构建的、用于科学数据驱动发现的可验证环境数据集 D3-Gym。
通过人工标注验证了评估脚本的高质量（87.5% 一致率）和领域特异性。
基于 D3-Gym 采样的轨迹训练可显著提升 Qwen3 模型在 ScienceAgentBench 上的性能，缩小与强专有模型的差距。
analysis.experiments: 评估脚本与人工标注的 gold standard 达到 87.5% 一致率；在 ScienceAgentBench 上，使用 D3-Gym 轨迹训练使 Qwen3-32B 提升 7.8 个绝对百分点。
limitations: 任务仅覆盖四个学科，可能缺乏更广泛领域的代表性。
评估脚本的自动合成可能在某些边缘任务上存在偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: D3-Gym 是首个自动构建的、用于科学数据驱动发现的可验证环境数据集，包含 565 个来自真实科学仓库的任务，并验证了其评估脚本与人工标注高度一致。

papers.title: TransVLM: A Vision-Language Framework and Benchmark for Detecting Any Shot Transitions
papers.abstract: Traditional Shot Boundary Detection (SBD) inherently struggles with complex transitions by formulating the task around isolated cut points, frequently yielding corrupted video shots. We address this fundamental limitation by formalizing the Shot Transition Detection (STD) task. Rather than searching for ambiguous points, STD explicitly detects the continuous temporal segments of transitions. To tackle this, we propose TransVLM, a Vision-Language Model (VLM) framework for STD. Unlike regular VLMs that predominantly rely on spatial semantics and struggle with fine-grained inter-shot dynamics, our method explicitly injects optical flow as a critical motion prior at the input stage. Through a simple yet effective feature-fusion strategy, TransVLM directly processes concatenated color and motion representations, significantly enhancing its temporal awareness without incurring any additional visual token overhead on the language backbone. To overcome the severe class imbalance in public data, we design a scalable data engine to synthesize diverse transition videos for robust training, alongside a comprehensive benchmark for STD. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TransVLM achieves superior overall performance, outperforming traditional heuristic methods, specialized spatiotemporal networks, and top-tier VLMs. This work has been deployed to production. For more related research, please visit HeyGen Research (https://www.heygen.com/research) and HeyGen Avatar-V (https://www.heygen.com/research/avatar-v-model). Project page: https://chence17.github.io/TransVLM/

analysis.tldr: 提出TransVLM框架，将镜头边界检测重新定义为镜头过渡检测任务，利用光流注入和特征融合提升VLM的时间感知能力，并构建合成数据引擎和基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统镜头边界检测（SBD）将任务定义为寻找孤立切点，难以处理复杂过渡，导致视频镜头损坏，需要更鲁棒的过渡检测方法。
analysis.problem: 解决传统SBD在复杂过渡检测中的局限性，将任务重新定义为镜头过渡检测（STD），并设计能感知细粒度时间动态的VLM框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TransVLM，在输入阶段显式注入光流作为运动先验，通过特征融合策略拼接颜色和运动表示，增强时间感知而不增加语言骨干的视觉token开销；同时设计可扩展数据引擎合成多样化过渡视频以缓解类别不平衡。
contributions: 将镜头边界检测重新定义为镜头过渡检测任务，明确检测连续时间段的过渡。
提出TransVLM框架，通过光流注入和特征融合提升VLM的时间感知能力。
设计可扩展数据引擎和综合基准，解决数据不平衡问题。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，TransVLM优于传统启发式方法、专用时空网络和顶级VLM，并已部署到生产环境。
limitations: 可能依赖光流质量，在低质量视频中性能受限。
合成数据与真实数据之间可能存在域差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TransVLM框架，将镜头边界检测重新定义为镜头过渡检测任务，利用光流注入和特征融合提升VLM的时间感知能力，并构建合成数据引擎和基准。

papers.title: FineState-Bench: Benchmarking State-Conditioned Grounding for Fine-grained GUI State Setting
papers.abstract: Despite the rapid progress of large vision-language models (LVLMs), fine-grained, state-conditioned GUI interaction remains challenging. Current evaluations offer limited coverage, imprecise target-state definitions, and an overreliance on final-task success, obscuring where and why agents fail. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{FineState-Bench}, a benchmark that evaluates whether an agent can correctly ground an instruction to the intended UI control and reach the exact target state. FineState-Bench comprises 2,209 instances across desktop, web, and mobile platforms, spanning four interaction families and 23 UI component types, with each instance explicitly specifying an exact target state for fine-grained state setting. We further propose \textit{FineState-Metrics}, a four-stage diagnostic pipeline with stage-wise success rates: Localization Success Rate (SR@Loc), Interaction Success Rate (SR@Int), Exact State Success Rate at Locate (ES-SR@Loc), and Exact State Success Rate at Interact (ES-SR@Int), and a plug-and-play \textit{Visual Diagnostic Assistant} (VDA) that generates a Description and a bounding-box Localization Hint to diagnose visual grounding reason via controlled w/ vs.\ w/o comparisons. On FineState-Bench, exact goal-state success remains low: ES-SR@Int peaks at 32.8\% on Web and 22.8\% on average across platforms. With VDA localization hints, Gemini-2.5-Flash gains +14.9 ES-SR@Int points, suggesting substantial headroom from improved visual grounding, yet overall accuracy is still insufficient for reliable fine-grained state-conditioned interaction \href{https://github.com/FengxianJi/FineState-Bench}{Github.}

analysis.tldr: 提出FineState-Bench基准，评估LVLM在细粒度GUI状态设置中的状态条件定位能力，发现精确状态成功率仅22.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LVLM在细粒度GUI交互中评估覆盖有限、目标状态定义不精确且过度依赖最终任务成功，无法揭示代理失败的具体原因。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够精确评估代理是否将指令正确关联到目标UI控件并达到精确目标状态的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要显示，在FineState-Bench上精确状态成功率很低（平均22.8%），但通过VDA定位提示可提升14.9个百分点，表明视觉定位是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建包含2209个实例的跨平台基准FineState-Bench，提出四阶段诊断指标FineState-Metrics和即插即用的视觉诊断助手VDA。
contributions: 提出FineState-Bench基准，覆盖桌面、网页和移动平台，包含四种交互族和23种UI组件类型。
提出FineState-Metrics四阶段诊断指标和VDA视觉诊断助手，用于分析视觉定位失败原因。
analysis.experiments: 在FineState-Bench上评估多个LVLM，精确状态成功率ES-SR@Int在网页上最高32.8%，平均22.8%；VDA定位提示使Gemini-2.5-Flash提升14.9个百分点。
limitations: 基准实例数量有限（2209个），可能无法覆盖所有GUI场景。
VDA仅提供定位提示，未解决状态设置的其他失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FineState-Bench基准，评估LVLM在细粒度GUI状态设置中的状态条件定位能力，发现精确状态成功率仅22.8%。

papers.title: From LLM-Driven Trading Card Generation to Procedural Relatedness: A Pokémon Case Study
papers.abstract: Since the dawn of Trading Card Games, the genre has grown into a multi-billion-dollar industry engaging millions of analog and digital players worldwide. Popular TCGs rely on regular updates, balance adjustments, and rotating constraints to sustain engagement. Yet, as metagames stabilize, predictable strategies dominate and viable card options diminish, often resulting in repetitive and impaired player experiences. This paper investigates the use of Large Language Models and Image Diffusion Models for Procedural Content Generation of TCG cards, addressing these challenges by enabling a personalized infinity of card designs. Modern generative AI not only enables large-scale content creation but could even introduce procedural relatedness, fostering unique connections between players and their cards. We present a pipeline combining player-centric co-creation, fine-tuned embeddings, local LLMs, and Diffusion Models to generate dynamic, personalized cards while potentially expanding creative range. We evaluated the pipeline in a user study with 49 participants who generated 196 Pokémon card samples. Participants rated aesthetics and representativeness of visuals and mechanics, and provided qualitative feedback. Results show high satisfaction and indicate that most participants successfully realized their own ideas through prompt adjustments. These findings lay groundwork for future content generation systems and alternatives to conventional metagame evolution through procedural relatedness.

analysis.tldr: 使用LLM和扩散模型为集换式卡牌游戏生成个性化卡牌，用户研究显示高满意度。
analysis.research_motivation: 集换式卡牌游戏（TCG）的元游戏稳定后，策略趋同、卡牌选择减少，导致玩家体验重复且受损，需要个性化内容生成来维持参与度。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生成式AI（LLM和扩散模型）为TCG卡牌实现程序化内容生成，并引入程序化关联性以增强玩家与卡牌之间的独特联系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个结合玩家中心共创、微调嵌入、本地LLM和扩散模型的流水线，用于生成动态个性化卡牌。
contributions: 提出一个结合LLM和扩散模型的TCG卡牌程序化生成流水线。
通过用户研究（49名参与者，196张卡牌样本）验证了方法的有效性，显示高满意度。
analysis.experiments: 在用户研究中，49名参与者生成了196张宝可梦卡牌样本，评估了视觉和机制的美学与代表性，并收集了定性反馈。
limitations: 仅针对宝可梦卡牌，泛化性未知。
用户研究规模较小（49人），可能不足以代表广泛玩家群体。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用LLM和扩散模型为集换式卡牌游戏生成个性化卡牌，用户研究显示高满意度。

papers.title: From Mirage to Grounding: Towards Reliable Multimodal Circuit-to-Verilog Code Generation
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to translate visual artifacts into code, from UI mockups into HTML to scientific plots into Python scripts. A circuit diagram can be viewed as a visual domain-specific language for hardware: it encodes timing, topology, and bit level semantics that are invisible to casual inspection yet safety critical once fabricated in silicon. Translating such diagrams into register-transfer-level(RTL) code therefore represents an extreme reliability test for vision-to-code generation. We reveal a phenomenon we call Mirage: replacing a circuit diagram with a blank image leaves Pass@k unchanged or even higher, because models bypass the visual input and instead exploit identifier semantics in the module header to retrieve canonical RTL templates. This constitutes a new, highly covert class of defect in AI-assisted code generation that directly undermines MLLMs' trustworthiness. To quantify the effect, we construct C2VEVAL and evaluate eight MLLMs under a paired Normal/Anony protocol in which Anony mode anonymizes all identifiers in both the diagram and the module header; Anony-mode scores drop sharply across all models, confirming that high Normal-mode accuracy is largely a Mirage. We then propose VeriGround (4B), trained with identifier anonymization, refusal augmentation, and D-ORPO (Decision-Focused ORPO) preference alignment that up-weights pivotal generate-or-refuse tokens. VeriGround achieves Functional Pass@1 of 46.11%/42.51%(Normal/Anony) with a False Refusal Rate of only 1.20%/0.00%, while maintaining >92% Refusal Rate on blank images. With only 4B parameters, VeriGround performs on par with GPT-5.4 under Normal and significantly outperforms all baselines under Anony, confirming genuine visual grounding.

analysis.tldr: 揭示MLLM在电路图转Verilog任务中依赖标识符而非视觉输入的“幻象”现象，并提出VeriGround模型实现真正的视觉接地。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在视觉到代码生成任务中可靠性不足，尤其是电路图转RTL代码涉及安全关键应用，现有方法可能绕过视觉输入而依赖文本标识符，导致评估结果虚假。
analysis.problem: 解决MLLM在电路图到Verilog代码生成中依赖标识符模板而非真实视觉理解的问题，实现可靠的视觉接地。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现“幻象”现象：用空白图像替换电路图后Pass@k不变甚至更高，模型利用模块头中的标识符语义检索标准RTL模板，构成隐蔽缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出VeriGround（4B），结合标识符匿名化、拒绝增强和D-ORPO偏好对齐（对关键生成或拒绝令牌加权），训练模型真正依赖视觉输入。
contributions: 揭示并量化了MLLM在电路图转代码中的“幻象”现象，提出C2VEVAL基准和Normal/Anony评估协议。
提出VeriGround模型，通过标识符匿名化、拒绝增强和D-ORPO对齐实现可靠视觉接地，在4B参数下性能媲美GPT-5.4。
analysis.experiments: 在C2VEVAL上评估8个MLLM，Normal/Anony协议下Anony模式分数大幅下降，验证幻象存在；VeriGround在Normal/Anony下Functional Pass@1达46.11%/42.51%，假拒绝率仅1.20%/0.00%，空白图像拒绝率>92%。
limitations: 仅针对电路图到Verilog任务，泛化性未验证。
模型规模仅4B，更大模型可能进一步提升性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示MLLM在电路图转Verilog任务中依赖标识符而非视觉输入的“幻象”现象，并提出VeriGround模型实现真正的视觉接地。

papers.title: ClimateVID -- Social Media Videos Analysis and Challenges Involved
papers.abstract: The pervasive growth of digital content, specifically short videos on social media platforms, has significantly altered how topics are discussed and understood in public discourse. In this work, we advance automated visual theme detection by assessing zero-shot and clustering capabilities on social media data. (1) We evaluated the capabilities of notable VLMs such as VideoChatGPT, PandaGPT, and VideoLLava using zero-shot image classification and compared their performance to the baseline provided by frame-wise CLIP image classification. (2) By treating clustering as a minimum cost multicut problem, we aim to uncover insightful patterns in an unsupervised manner. For both analysis strategies, we provide extensive evaluations and practical guidance to practitioners. While VLMs are currently not able to detect climate change specific classes, the clustering results are distinct visual frames. %Given that VLMs are not currently capable to grasp the climate change discourse, we focus the clustering evaluation of image embedding models. We find that both ConvNeXt V2 and DINOv2 produce meaningful clusters, with DINOv2 focusing more on style differences and abstract categories, while ConvNeXt V2 clusters differ in more fine-grained ways. Code available at https://github.com/KathPra/ClimateVID.git.

analysis.tldr: 评估VLM在社交媒体气候变化视频中的零样本分类与聚类能力，发现VLM无法检测气候变化类别，但图像嵌入模型可产生有意义的聚类。
analysis.research_motivation: 社交媒体短视频的激增改变了公共话语，但自动化视觉主题检测在气候变化领域面临挑战，现有VLM能力不足。
analysis.problem: 评估VLM在社交媒体气候变化视频中的零样本分类和聚类性能，并探索无监督聚类方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM无法检测气候变化特定类别，而ConvNeXt V2和DINOv2聚类有意义，DINOv2关注风格差异，ConvNeXt V2关注细粒度差异。
analysis.method: 零样本分类评估VLM（VideoChatGPT、PandaGPT、VideoLLava）与CLIP基线对比；聚类作为最小成本多割问题，评估图像嵌入模型（ConvNeXt V2、DINOv2）。
contributions: 评估了多个VLM在气候变化视频零样本分类中的性能
提出基于最小成本多割的聚类方法并比较了不同图像嵌入模型
analysis.experiments: 在社交媒体气候变化视频数据集上评估零样本分类和聚类，提供了广泛评估和实践指导。
limitations: VLM在气候变化检测上表现不佳，可能需领域微调
聚类结果依赖嵌入模型选择，泛化性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估VLM在社交媒体气候变化视频中的零样本分类与聚类能力，发现VLM无法检测气候变化类别，但图像嵌入模型可产生有意义的聚类。

papers.title: Splitting Assumption-Based Argumentation Frameworks
papers.abstract: Assumption-Based Argumentation (ABA) is a well-established formalism for modelling and reasoning over debates, with a wide range of applications. However, the high computational complexity of core reasoning tasks in ABA poses a significant challenge for its applicability. This issue is further aggravated when ABA frameworks (ABAFs) are instantiated into graph-based argumentation formalisms, such as Dung's Argumentation Frameworks (AFs) and Argumentation Frameworks with Collective Attacks (SETAFs). In knowledge representation and reasoning, a key strategy to address computational intractability is to optimise reasoning over a given knowledge base through divide-and-conquer algorithms. A paradigmatic example of this approach is splitting, where extensions of a given framework are computed incrementally, by restricting the search space to sub-frameworks only, and then combining the obtained results. This approach has been successfully applied to AFs, for which also a parametrised version has been introduced under stable semantics. However, the exponential growth produced by the instantiation might undermine the usefulness of splitting on the argument graphs induced by ABAFs. To address this issue, our work investigates the concept of splitting on the knowledge base rather than on its graph-based instantiation. Furthermore, we generalise splitting to its parametrised version for ABAFs.

analysis.tldr: 将分割策略从图实例化层面提升到知识库层面，以降低基于假设的论证框架的推理复杂度。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于假设的论证框架（ABA）核心推理任务计算复杂度高，且实例化为图后复杂度进一步增加，阻碍了其实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何通过分割策略降低ABA框架的推理复杂度，避免因实例化导致的指数级增长。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出在知识库层面而非图实例化层面进行分割，并推广到参数化版本。
contributions: 提出在知识库层面进行分割的新概念，避免实例化带来的指数增长。
将分割推广到参数化版本，适用于基于假设的论证框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定语义（如稳定语义）。
参数化分割的实用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将分割策略从图实例化层面提升到知识库层面，以降低基于假设的论证框架的推理复杂度。

papers.title: Language Models Refine Mechanical Linkage Designs Through Symbolic Reflection and Modular Optimisation
papers.abstract: Designing mechanical linkages involves combinatorial topology selection and continuous parameter fitting. We show that language models can systematically improve linkage designs through symbolic representations. Language model agents explore discrete topologies while numerical optimisers fit continuous parameters. A symbolic lifting operator translates simulator trajectories into qualitative descriptors, motion labels, temporal predicates, and structural diagnostics that models interpret across iterative design cycles. Across six engineering-relevant motion targets and three open-source models (Llama 3.3 70B, Qwen3 4B, Qwen3 MoE 30B-A3B), the modular architecture reduces geometric error by up to 68% and improves structural validity by up to 134% over monolithic baselines. Critically, 78.6% of iterative refinement trajectories show measurable improvement, with the system correctly diagnosing overconstraint (56.3%) and underconstraint (35.6%) failure modes and proposing grounded corrections. Models across all three families acquire interpretable mechanical reasoning strategies without fine-tuning, demonstrating that principled symbolic abstraction bridges generative AI and the numerical precision required for engineering design.

analysis.tldr: 语言模型通过符号表示和模块化优化，在机械连杆设计中实现几何误差降低68%、结构有效性提升134%。
analysis.research_motivation: 机械连杆设计涉及拓扑选择与参数拟合的组合优化，传统方法依赖专家经验且难以自动化，而纯数值方法难以处理离散拓扑搜索。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型有效参与机械连杆的拓扑与参数联合优化设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出78.6%的迭代轨迹有可测量改进，模型能诊断过约束(56.3%)和欠约束(35.6%)失效模式。
analysis.method: 提出符号反射与模块化优化框架：语言模型代理探索离散拓扑，数值优化器拟合连续参数，通过符号提升算子将模拟轨迹转化为定性描述、运动标签、时间谓词和结构诊断，供模型在迭代设计循环中理解。
contributions: 提出语言模型与数值优化结合的模块化架构用于机械连杆设计
引入符号提升算子桥接模拟数据与语言模型推理
在六个工程运动目标上验证，几何误差降低68%，结构有效性提升134%
analysis.experiments: 在六个工程相关运动目标上，使用Llama 3.3 70B、Qwen3 4B、Qwen3 MoE 30B-A3B三个开源模型，与单体基线对比。
limitations: 仅测试了三个开源模型，未涉及更大规模或闭源模型
应用范围限于机械连杆设计，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 语言模型通过符号表示和模块化优化，在机械连杆设计中实现几何误差降低68%、结构有效性提升134%。

papers.title: LLMs as ASP Programmers: Self-Correction Enables Task-Agnostic Nonmonotonic Reasoning
papers.abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) have achieved impressive reasoning milestones but continue to struggle with high computational costs, logical inconsistencies, and sharp performance degradation on high-complexity problems. While neuro-symbolic methods attempt to mitigate these issues by coupling LLMs with symbolic reasoners, existing approaches typically rely on monotonic logics (e.g., SMT) that cannot represent defeasible reasoning -- essential components of human cognition. We present "LLM+ASP," a framework that translates natural language into Answer Set Programming (ASP), a nonmonotonic formalism based on stable model semantics. Unlike prior "LLM+ASP" approaches that require manually authored knowledge modules, domain-specific prompts, or evaluation restricted to single problem classes, our framework operates without any per-task engineering and applies uniformly across diverse reasoning tasks. Our system utilizes an automated self-correction loop where structured feedback from the ASP solver enables iterative refinement. Evaluating across six diverse benchmarks, we demonstrate that: (1) stable model semantics allow LLMs to naturally express default rules and exceptions, outperforming SMT-based alternatives by significant margins on nonmonotonic tasks; (2) iterative self-correction is the primary driver of performance, effectively replacing the need for handcrafted domain knowledge; (3) compact in-context reference guides substantially outperform verbose documentation, revealing a "context rot" phenomenon where excessive context hinders constraint adherence.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM+ASP框架，利用自校正循环实现任务无关的非单调推理，在多个基准上超越SMT方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在复杂推理中成本高、逻辑不一致，神经符号方法依赖单调逻辑无法处理可废止推理，且需要人工领域知识。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM无需任务特定工程即可进行非单调推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现紧凑的上下文参考指南优于冗长文档，揭示“上下文腐烂”现象：过多上下文阻碍约束遵循。
analysis.method: 将自然语言翻译为回答集编程（ASP），利用ASP求解器的结构化反馈进行迭代自校正。
contributions: 提出任务无关的LLM+ASP框架，无需人工知识模块或领域特定提示。
证明稳定模型语义使LLM自然表达默认规则和例外，显著优于SMT方法。
揭示自校正是性能主要驱动力，紧凑上下文指南优于冗长文档。
analysis.experiments: 在六个不同基准上评估，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖ASP求解器的效率。
自校正循环可能增加推理时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM+ASP框架，利用自校正循环实现任务无关的非单调推理，在多个基准上超越SMT方法。

papers.title: TripVVT: A Large-Scale Triplet Dataset and a Coarse-Mask Baseline for In-the-Wild Video Virtual Try-On
papers.abstract: Due to the scarcity of large-scale in-the-wild triplet data and the improper use of masks, the performance of video virtual try-on models remains limited. In this paper, we first introduce **TripVVT-10K**, the largest and most diverse in-the-wild triplet dataset to date, providing explicit video-level cross-garment supervision that existing video datasets lack. Built upon this resource, we develop **TripVVT**, a Diffusion Transformer-based framework that replaces fragile garment masks with a simple, stable human-mask prior, enabling reliable background preservation while remaining robust to real-world motion, occlusion, and cluttered scenes. To support comprehensive evaluation, we further establish **TripVVT-Bench**, a 100-case benchmark covering diverse garments, complex environments, and multi-person scenarios, with metrics spanning video quality, try-on fidelity, background consistency, and temporal coherence. Compared to state-of-the-art academic and commercial systems, TripVVT achieves superior video quality and garment fidelity while markedly improving generalization to challenging in-the-wild videos. We publicly release the dataset and benchmark, which we believe provide a solid foundation for advancing controllable, realistic, and temporally stable video virtual try-on.

analysis.tldr: 提出最大规模野外视频虚拟试穿数据集TripVVT-10K和基于Diffusion Transformer的基线方法TripVVT，用稳定人体掩码替代脆弱衣物掩码，显著提升野外泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频虚拟试穿模型因缺乏大规模野外三元组数据和掩码使用不当，性能受限，难以应对真实世界的运动、遮挡和杂乱场景。
analysis.problem: 解决视频虚拟试穿中野外数据稀缺和掩码脆弱导致背景保持与泛化能力不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法依赖脆弱的衣物掩码，在野外场景中易失败；而使用稳定的人体掩码先验可有效保留背景并提升鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 构建最大规模野外三元组数据集TripVVT-10K，提出基于Diffusion Transformer的TripVVT框架，用人体掩码先验替代衣物掩码，实现背景保持与鲁棒性。
contributions: 发布最大规模野外视频虚拟试穿数据集TripVVT-10K，提供显式视频级跨衣物监督。
提出TripVVT框架，以稳定人体掩码替代脆弱衣物掩码，提升野外泛化能力。
建立TripVVT-Bench基准，涵盖多样衣物、复杂环境和多人场景，评估视频质量、试穿保真度等。
analysis.experiments: 与学术和商业系统对比，TripVVT在视频质量和衣物保真度上更优，且在挑战性野外视频上泛化能力显著提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在长尾衣物或极端姿态覆盖不足。
方法依赖人体掩码，在严重遮挡或多人交互场景中可能仍有挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出最大规模野外视频虚拟试穿数据集TripVVT-10K和基于Diffusion Transformer的基线方法TripVVT，用稳定人体掩码替代脆弱衣物掩码，显著提升野外泛化能力。

papers.title: GUI Agents with Reinforcement Learning: Toward Digital Inhabitants
papers.abstract: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for intelligent systems that perceive and interact with graphical interfaces visually. Yet supervised fine-tuning alone cannot handle long-horizon credit assignment, distribution shifts, and safe exploration in irreversible environments, making Reinforcement Learning (RL) a central methodology for advancing automation. In this work, we present the first comprehensive overview of the intersection between RL and GUI agents, and examine how this research direction may evolve toward digital inhabitants. We propose a principled taxonomy that organizes existing methods into Offline RL, Online RL, and Hybrid Strategies, and complement it with analyses of reward engineering, data efficiency, and key technical innovations. Our analysis reveals several emerging trends: the tension between reliability and scalability is motivating the adoption of composite, multi-tier reward architectures; GUI I/O latency bottlenecks are accelerating the shift toward world-model-based training, which can yield substantial performance gains; and the spontaneous emergence of System-2-style deliberation suggests that explicit reasoning supervision may not be necessary when sufficiently rich reward signals are available. We distill these findings into a roadmap covering process rewards, continual RL, cognitive architectures, and safe deployment, aiming to guide the next generation of robust GUI automation and its agent-native infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 首篇全面综述强化学习与GUI智能体交叉领域，提出分类法并揭示奖励架构、世界模型训练等趋势，展望数字居民方向。
analysis.research_motivation: GUI智能体面临长程信用分配、分布偏移和不可逆环境中的安全探索等挑战，监督微调难以应对，强化学习成为推进自动化的核心方法论。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理强化学习在GUI智能体中的应用，并识别关键趋势和未来方向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了三个趋势：可靠性与可扩展性之间的张力推动复合多层奖励架构；GUI I/O延迟瓶颈加速向基于世界模型的训练转变；系统2式深思熟虑的自发涌现表明，当奖励信号足够丰富时，显式推理监督可能并非必需。
analysis.method: 提出一个原则性分类法，将现有方法分为离线RL、在线RL和混合策略，并辅以奖励工程、数据效率和关键技术创新的分析。
contributions: 首次全面综述强化学习与GUI智能体的交叉领域。
提出包含离线RL、在线RL和混合策略的分类法，并分析奖励工程、数据效率等关键方面。
揭示复合奖励架构、世界模型训练和系统2式推理涌现等趋势，并提炼出包含过程奖励、持续RL、认知架构和安全部署的路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或进行实验验证。
趋势分析可能受限于现有文献覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首篇全面综述强化学习与GUI智能体交叉领域，提出分类法并揭示奖励架构、世界模型训练等趋势，展望数字居民方向。

papers.title: The Effects of Visual Priming on Cooperative Behavior in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: As Vision-Language Models (VLMs) become increasingly integrated into decision-making systems, it is essential to understand how visual inputs influence their behavior. This paper investigates the effects of visual priming on VLMs' cooperative behavior using the Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma (IPD) as a test scenario. We examine whether exposure to images depicting behavioral concepts (kindness/helpfulness vs. aggressiveness/selfishness) and color-coded reward matrices alters VLM decision patterns. Experiments were conducted across multiple state-of-the-art VLMs. We further explore mitigation strategies including prompt modifications, Chain of Thought (CoT) reasoning, and visual token reduction. Results show that VLM behavior can be influenced by both image content and color cues, with varying susceptibility and mitigation effectiveness across models. These findings not only underscore the importance of robust evaluation frameworks for VLM deployment in visually rich and safety-critical environments, but also highlight how architectural and training differences among models may lead to distinct behavioral responses-an area worthy of further investigation.

analysis.tldr: 视觉提示可影响VLM在囚徒困境中的合作行为，不同模型敏感度与缓解策略效果各异。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM正被集成到决策系统中，理解视觉输入如何影响其行为对安全部署至关重要。
analysis.problem: 研究视觉提示（图像内容与颜色线索）对VLM合作行为的影响及其缓解策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM行为可被图像内容和颜色线索影响，不同模型对视觉提示的敏感度和缓解策略有效性存在差异。
analysis.method: 在迭代囚徒困境中，向VLM展示行为概念图像和颜色编码奖励矩阵，测试决策变化，并探索提示修改、思维链推理和视觉令牌减少等缓解策略。
contributions: 首次系统研究视觉提示对VLM合作行为的影响
揭示不同VLM架构和训练差异导致的行为响应差异

papers.title: Attractor FCM
papers.abstract: In this paper an attractor FCM is created, tested, and analyzed. This FCM is neither a hebbian based nor agentic, nor a hybrid; it rather is a gradient descent based, physics constrained, Jacobian version of an FCM. Moreover, this model has several quirks; it uses residual memory, back propagation through time, and a fixed point anchor that is recursively implemented to update its weights. The residuals update the recursive part without losing the system memory. The model's anchor enables it to converge in a fixed point for which back propagation through time unrolls it and ensures that the error minimization is for an accurate gradient. Furthermore, a new learning algorithm is utilized. The Newton's method finds the system's fixed point attractor and then gradient descend is adaptively changing the landscape; an adaptive term is used to directly manipulate the weights through the attractor dynamics. As the adaptive term changes, the descent through the landscape is constantly adjusting according to sigmoid saturation, and that prevents premature convergence to a local minimum. Lastly, the updates are filtered by causal mask that informs the network about the physics, respecting the initial expert based opinions, for which model reduces the error to the target in an efficient way.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于梯度下降、物理约束的吸引子模糊认知图（Attractor FCM），利用残差记忆、时间反向传播和不动点锚实现高效收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有FCM多基于Hebbian规则或混合方法，缺乏物理约束和高效收敛机制，难以处理复杂动态系统。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种FCM，使其在物理约束下通过梯度下降实现稳定收敛，并避免局部最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Attractor FCM，采用残差记忆、时间反向传播和不动点锚更新权重；利用牛顿法寻找系统不动点吸引子，自适应梯度下降调整权重，并通过因果掩码施加物理约束。
contributions: 提出一种新的梯度下降、物理约束的FCM架构，区别于Hebbian或混合方法。
引入残差记忆、时间反向传播和不动点锚机制，确保系统收敛并准确最小化误差。
采用牛顿法结合自适应梯度下降，通过因果掩码融入专家先验，避免局部最优。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对大规模系统计算开销较高。

papers.title: A Collective Variational Principle Unifying Bayesian Inference, Game Theory, and Thermodynamics
papers.abstract: Collective intelligence emerges across biological, physical, and artificial systems without central coordination, yet a unifying principle governing such behaviour remains elusive. The Free Energy Principle explains how individual agents adapt through variational inference, while game theory formalises strategic interactions. Here we introduce the Game-Theoretic Free Energy Principle, a unified framework showing that multi-agent systems performing local free-energy minimisation implicitly implement a stochastic game. We prove that, under bounded rationality and local information constraints, stationary points of collective free energy correspond to approximate Nash equilibria of an induced game. Conversely, a broad class of cooperative games admits a variational representation in which equilibria arise as Gibbs distributions over coalitions, establishing a bridge between Bayesian inference and strategic interaction. To characterise higher-order effects, we introduce a free-energy formulation of the Harsanyi dividend, isolating irreducible multi-agent synergy. This yields a predictive theory of cooperation, including a falsifiable non-monotonic relationship between sensory precision and agent influence. We validate this prediction across neural, biological, and artificial multi-agent systems. These results identify a common variational principle underlying inference, thermodynamics, and game-theoretic equilibrium.

analysis.tldr: 提出博弈论自由能原理，统一贝叶斯推理、博弈论和热力学，证明多智能体局部自由能最小化隐式实现随机博弈。
analysis.research_motivation: 集体智能在生物、物理和人工系统中普遍存在，但缺乏统一的理论框架来解释其涌现机制。
analysis.problem: 如何将自由能原理、博弈论和热力学统一到一个变分框架中，以解释多智能体系统的集体行为。

analysis.method: 提出博弈论自由能原理，证明多智能体局部自由能最小化隐式实现随机博弈，并引入Harsanyi红利的自由能公式化来表征高阶协同效应。
contributions: 建立了博弈论自由能原理，统一了贝叶斯推理、博弈论和热力学。
证明了集体自由能的驻点对应于诱导博弈的近似纳什均衡。
引入自由能形式的Harsanyi红利，隔离不可约的多智能体协同效应。
预测了感官精度与智能体影响之间的非单调关系，并在神经、生物和人工多智能体系统中验证。
analysis.experiments: 在神经、生物和人工多智能体系统中验证了预测的非单调关系。
limitations: 框架可能依赖于有界理性和局部信息约束的假设。
实际应用中计算集体自由能可能具有挑战性。

papers.title: World Model for Robot Learning: A Comprehensive Survey
papers.abstract: World models, which are predictive representations of how environments evolve under actions, have become a central component of robot learning. They support policy learning, planning, simulation, evaluation, data generation, and have advanced rapidly with the rise of foundation models and large-scale video generation. However, the literature remains fragmented across architectures, functional roles, and embodied application domains. To address this gap, we present a comprehensive review of world models from a robot-learning perspective. We examine how world models are coupled with robot policies, how they serve as learned simulators for reinforcement learning and evaluation, and how robotic video world models have progressed from imagination-based generation to controllable, structured, and foundation-scale formulations. We further connect these ideas to navigation and autonomous driving, and summarize representative datasets, benchmarks, and evaluation protocols. Overall, this survey systematically reviews the rapidly growing literature on world models for robot learning, clarifies key paradigms and applications, and highlights major challenges and future directions for predictive modeling in embodied agents. To facilitate continued access to newly emerging works, benchmarks, and resources, we will maintain and regularly update the accompanying GitHub repository alongside this survey.

analysis.tldr: 全面综述世界模型在机器人学习中的应用，涵盖架构、策略耦合、仿真、视频生成及未来挑战。

papers.title: MM-StanceDet: Retrieval-Augmented Multi-modal Multi-agent Stance Detection
papers.abstract: Multimodal Stance Detection (MSD) is crucial for understanding public discourse, yet effectively fusing text and image, especially with conflicting signals, remains challenging. Existing methods often face difficulties with contextual grounding, cross-modal interpretation ambiguity, and single-pass reasoning fragility. To address these, we propose Retrieval-Augmented Multi-modal Multi-agent Stance Detection (MM-StanceDet), a novel multi-agent framework integrating Retrieval Augmentation for contextual grounding, specialized Multimodal Analysis agents for nuanced interpretation, a Reasoning-Enhanced Debate stage for exploring perspectives, and Self-Reflection for robust adjudication. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate MM-StanceDet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating the efficacy of its multi-agent architecture and structured reasoning stages in addressing complex multimodal stance challenges.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索增强的多模态多智能体框架MM-StanceDet，通过结构化推理阶段提升立场检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态立场检测中文本与图像融合困难，现有方法在上下文对齐、跨模态歧义和单次推理脆弱性方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合文本和图像信息，解决跨模态冲突信号和推理不稳定的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MM-StanceDet框架，包含检索增强模块、多模态分析智能体、推理增强辩论阶段和自我反思模块。
contributions: 提出检索增强的多模态多智能体框架，整合上下文对齐、跨模态分析和结构化推理。
在五个数据集上显著超越现有最优方法，验证了多智能体架构和推理阶段的有效性。

papers.title: Dynamic Cluster Data Sampling for Efficient and Long-Tail-Aware Vision-Language Pre-training
papers.abstract: The computational cost of training a vision-language model (VLM) can be reduced by sampling the training data. Previous work on efficient VLM pre-training has pointed to the importance of semantic data balance, adjusting the distribution of topics in the data to improve VLM accuracy. However, existing efficient pre-training approaches may disproportionately remove rare concepts from the training corpus. As a result, \emph{long-tail concepts} remain insufficiently represented in the training data and are not effectively captured during training. In this work, we introduce a \emph{dynamic cluster-based sampling approach (DynamiCS)} that downsamples large clusters of data and upsamples small ones. The approach is dynamic in that it applies sampling at each epoch. We first show the importance of dynamic sampling for VLM training. Then, we demonstrate the advantage of our cluster-scaling approach, which maintains the relative order of semantic clusters in the data and emphasizes the long-tail. This approach contrasts with current work, which focuses only on flattening the semantic distribution of the data. Our experiments show that DynamiCS reduces the computational cost of VLM training and provides a performance advantage for long-tail concepts.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态聚类采样方法DynamiCS，在降低VLM训练计算成本的同时提升长尾概念性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高效VLM预训练方法通过语义数据平衡降低计算成本，但可能过度移除稀有概念，导致长尾概念表示不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在高效采样训练数据时保留长尾概念，提升VLM对稀有概念的捕获能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有高效预训练方法在平衡语义分布时可能不成比例地移除稀有概念，导致长尾概念在训练数据中表示不足。
analysis.method: 提出动态聚类采样方法DynamiCS，每轮根据聚类大小进行下采样大簇、上采样小簇，保持语义簇相对顺序并强调长尾。
contributions: 展示了动态采样对VLM训练的重要性
提出聚类缩放方法，在降低计算成本的同时提升长尾概念性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及实验表明DynamiCS降低了VLM训练计算成本并提升了长尾概念性能。
limitations: 可能依赖聚类质量，聚类不准确时采样效果可能下降
动态采样每轮调整可能增加训练复杂度

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态聚类采样方法DynamiCS，在降低VLM训练计算成本的同时提升长尾概念性能。

papers.title: Training-Free Tunnel Defect Inspection and Engineering Interpretation via Visual Recalibration and Entity Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Tunnel inspection requires outputs that can support defect localization, measurement, severity grading, and engineering documentation. Existing training-free foundation-model pipelines usually stop at coarse open-vocabulary proposals, which are difficult to use directly in interference-heavy tunnel scenes. We propose a training-free framework TunnelMIND. Specifically, language-guided defect proposals are not treated as final outputs; instead, their spatial support is recalibrated at inference time through dense visual consistency, so that coarse semantic anchors can be transformed into more reliable prompts under tunnel-specific hard negatives. The resulting masks are further reconstructed into structured defect entities with category, location, geometry, severity, and context attributes, which are then mapped to retrieval-grounded explanation and engineering-readable report generation under expert knowledge constraints. On visible, GPR, and road defect tasks, TunnelMIND achieves F1 scores of 0.68, 0.78, and 0.72, respectively. Overall, TunnelMIND shows that training-free tunnel inspection can move beyond coarse localization toward structured defect evidence for engineering assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的隧道缺陷检测框架TunnelMIND，通过视觉重校准和实体重建实现结构化工程报告生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 隧道检测需要支持缺陷定位、测量、严重性分级和工程文档的输出，但现有免训练基础模型管道通常仅提供粗粒度的开放词汇提议，难以直接用于干扰严重的隧道场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练的情况下，将粗粒度的语言引导缺陷提议转化为可靠的结构化缺陷实体，并生成工程可读的报告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TunnelMIND框架：首先通过语言引导生成缺陷提议，然后在推理时利用密集视觉一致性对空间支持进行重校准，将粗语义锚点转化为隧道特定硬负样本下的可靠提示；接着将得到的掩码重构为具有类别、位置、几何、严重性和上下文属性的结构化缺陷实体；最后在专家知识约束下映射到检索驱动的解释和工程可读报告生成。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的隧道缺陷检测框架，通过视觉重校准和实体重建实现结构化输出。
在可见光、GPR和道路缺陷三个任务上验证了有效性，F1分数分别为0.68、0.78和0.72。
analysis.experiments: 在可见光、GPR和道路缺陷任务上评估，F1分数分别为0.68、0.78和0.72。

papers.title: Taming the Centaur(s) with LAPITHS: a framework for a theoretically grounded interpretation of AI performances
papers.abstract: We introduce a framework called LAPITHS (Language model Analysis through Paradigm grounded Interpretations of Theses about Human likenesS) and use it to show that several major claims advanced by models such as CENTAUR, proposed as an artificial Unified Model of Cognition, are not theoretically or empirically justified. LAPITHS provides a principled reference point for counteracting the current behaviouristic tendency in AI research to interpret the human level performances of transformer based language models as evidence of human like underlying computation and, by extension, as signs of cognitive abilities. The novelty of LAPITHS lies in making explicit the arguments grounded in two quantitative assessments: (i) the Minimal Cognitive Grid, a theoretically motivated method for estimating the cognitive plausibility of artificial systems, and (ii) a behavioural comparison showing that results similar to those reported for CENTAUR like models can be reproduced by other systems that do not satisfy the structural constraints typically associated with cognitive plausibility, and whose outputs do not provide independent explanatory insight into human cognition.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAPITHS框架，从理论和实证角度质疑CENTAUR等模型声称的类人认知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI研究存在行为主义倾向，将Transformer语言模型的人类水平表现直接解释为类人认知能力，缺乏理论依据。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个理论严谨的框架来评估AI模型声称的认知合理性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，CENTAUR等模型声称的类人认知能力缺乏理论和实证支持，且类似结果可由不满足认知合理性约束的其他系统复现。
analysis.method: LAPITHS框架包含两个定量评估：最小认知网格（理论驱动的认知合理性估计）和行为比较（证明非认知系统可复现类似结果）。
contributions: 提出LAPITHS框架，为评估AI模型认知合理性提供理论参考点。
通过最小认知网格和行为比较，质疑CENTAUR等模型的类人认知主张。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能仅适用于特定类型的认知主张评估。
行为比较的复现性可能依赖具体实验设置。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LAPITHS框架，从理论和实证角度质疑CENTAUR等模型声称的类人认知能力。

papers.title: Can AI Be a Good Peer Reviewer? A Survey of Peer Review Process, Evaluation, and the Future
papers.abstract: Peer review is a multi-stage process involving reviews, rebuttals, meta-reviews, final decisions, and subsequent manuscript revisions. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have motivated methods that assist or automate different stages of this pipeline. In this survey, we synthesize techniques for (i) peer review generation, including fine-tuning strategies, agent-based systems, RL-based methods, and emerging paradigms to enhance generation; (ii) after-review tasks including rebuttals, meta-review and revision aligned to reviews; and (iii) evaluation methods spanning human-centered, reference-based, LLM-based and aspect-oriented. We catalog datasets, compare modeling choices, and discuss limitations, ethical concerns, and future directions. The survey aims to provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and integrating LLM systems across the full peer review workflow.

analysis.tldr: 综述LLM在同行评审全流程中的应用，包括生成、评估及未来方向。

整理相关数据集，比较建模选择，并讨论局限、伦理问题和未来方向。

papers.title: Beyond Semantics: Measuring Fine-Grained Emotion Preservation in Small Language Model-Based Machine Translation
papers.abstract: Preserving affective nuance remains a challenge in Machine Translation (MT), where semantic equivalence often takes precedence over emotional fidelity. This paper evaluates the performance of three state-of-the-art Small Language Models (SLMs) -- EuroLLM, Aya Expanse, and Gemma -- in maintaining fine-grained emotions during backtranslation. Using the GoEmotions dataset, which comprises Reddit comments across 28 distinct categories, we assess emotional preservation across five European languages: German, French, Spanish, Italian, and Polish. Specifically, we investigate (i) the inherent capability of these SLMs to retain emotional sentiment, (ii) the efficacy of emotion-aware prompting in improving preservation, and (iii) the performance of ModernBERT as a contemporary alternative to BERT for emotion classification in MT evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 评估小语言模型在机器翻译中保留细粒度情感的能力，发现情感感知提示可提升表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器翻译中语义等价常优先于情感保真度，但情感细微差别的保留对跨语言交流至关重要，现有研究缺乏对SLM情感保留能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 小语言模型在机器翻译中能否保留细粒度情感，以及情感感知提示和现代情感分类器能否改善评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用GoEmotions数据集（28类情感），对EuroLLM、Aya Expanse、Gemma三种SLM进行回译实验，评估五种欧洲语言的情感保留；比较无提示与情感感知提示的效果；并测试ModernBERT作为情感分类器的性能。
contributions: 系统评估了三种SLM在机器翻译中保留细粒度情感的能力。
验证了情感感知提示对提升情感保留的有效性。
提出ModernBERT作为情感分类的替代方案用于MT评估。
analysis.experiments: 在GoEmotions数据集上，对德语、法语、西班牙语、意大利语、波兰语五种语言进行回译实验，评估情感保留。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估了三种SLM，可能不具广泛代表性。
仅使用回译设置，未涉及直接翻译任务。
情感分类依赖GoEmotions数据集，可能覆盖有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估小语言模型在机器翻译中保留细粒度情感的能力，发现情感感知提示可提升表现。

papers.title: Generate Your Talking Avatar from Video Reference
papers.abstract: Existing talking avatar methods typically adopt an image-to-video pipeline conditioned on a static reference image within the same scene as the target generation. This restricted, single-view perspective lacks sufficient temporal and expression cues, limiting the ability to synthesize high-fidelity talking avatars in customized backgrounds. To this end, we introduce Talking Avatar generation from Video Reference (TAVR), a novel framework that shifts the paradigm by leveraging cross-scene video inputs. To effectively process these extended temporal contexts and bridge cross-scene domain gaps, TAVR integrates a token selection module alongside a comprehensive three-stage training scheme. Specifically, same-scene video pretraining establishes foundational appearance copying, which is subsequently expanded by cross-scene reference fine-tuning for robust cross-scene adaptation. Finally, task-specific reinforcement learning aligns the generated outputs with identity-based rewards to maximize identity similarity. To systematically evaluate cross-scene robustness, we construct a new benchmark comprising 158 carefully curated cross-scene video pairs. Extensive experiments show that TAVR benefits from flexible inference-time video referencing and consistently surpasses existing baselines both quantitatively and qualitatively. This work has been deployed to production. For more related research, please visit \href{https://www.heygen.com/research}{HeyGen Research} and \href{https://www.heygen.com/research/avatar-v-model}{HeyGen Avatar-V}.

analysis.tldr: 提出 TAVR 框架，利用跨场景视频参考生成高保真说话头像，超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有说话头像方法通常基于静态参考图像进行图像到视频生成，受限于单视角且缺乏时间与表情线索，难以在自定义背景中合成高保真头像。
analysis.problem: 如何利用跨场景视频输入，有效处理扩展的时间上下文并弥合跨场景域差距，以生成高保真说话头像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TAVR 框架包含令牌选择模块和三阶段训练方案：同场景视频预训练建立外观复制，跨场景参考微调实现鲁棒适应，任务特定强化学习最大化身份相似度。
contributions: 提出 TAVR 框架，将说话头像生成从图像参考范式转变为视频参考范式。
构建包含158个跨场景视频对的基准，用于系统评估跨场景鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在构建的基准上进行了定量和定性实验，TAVR 一致超越现有基线，并已部署到生产环境。
limitations: 可能对极端跨场景域差异的鲁棒性有限。
三阶段训练方案计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 TAVR 框架，利用跨场景视频参考生成高保真说话头像，超越现有方法。

papers.title: Being-H0.7: A Latent World-Action Model from Egocentric Videos
papers.abstract: Visual-Language-Action models (VLAs) have advanced generalist robot control by mapping multimodal observations and language instructions directly to actions, but sparse action supervision often encourages shortcut mappings rather than representations of dynamics, contact, and task progress. Recent world-action models introduce future prediction through video rollouts, yet pixel-space prediction is a costly and indirect substrate for control, as it may model visual details irrelevant to action generation and introduces substantial training or inference overhead. We present Being-H0.7, a latent world-action model that brings future-aware reasoning into VLA-style policies without generating future frames. Being-H0.7 inserts learnable latent queries between perception and action as a compact reasoning interface, and trains them with a future-informed dual-branch design: a deployable prior branch infers latent states from the current context, while a training-only posterior branch replaces the queries with embeddings from future observations. Jointly aligning the two branches at the latent reasoning space leads the prior branch to reason future-aware, action-useful structure from current observations alone. At inference, Being-H0.7 discards the posterior branch and performs no visual rollout. Experiments across six simulation benchmarks and diverse real-world tasks show that Being-H0.7 achieves state-of-the-art or comparable performance, combining the predictive benefits of world models with the efficiency and deployability of direct VLA policies.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种隐空间世界-动作模型，通过未来感知的隐推理提升VLA策略性能，无需生成未来帧。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型因稀疏动作监督易学习捷径映射，缺乏对动力学、接触和任务进度的表征；像素空间的世界模型预测成本高且包含与动作无关的视觉细节。
analysis.problem: 如何在不生成未来帧的情况下，将未来感知推理引入VLA策略，以提升其表征动力学和任务进度的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Being-H0.7，在感知和动作之间插入可学习的隐查询作为紧凑推理接口，采用未来感知的双分支设计：部署的先验分支从当前上下文推断隐状态，仅训练的后验分支用未来观测的嵌入替换查询，通过对齐两个分支使先验分支学会从当前观测推理未来感知的动作有用结构。
contributions: 提出隐空间世界-动作模型Being-H0.7，将未来感知推理融入VLA策略而不生成未来帧。
设计未来感知的双分支训练框架，通过隐空间对齐实现高效推理。
在六个仿真基准和多种真实世界任务上达到SOTA或可比性能。
analysis.experiments: 在六个仿真基准和多种真实世界任务上评估，达到SOTA或可比性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的未来观测进行训练。
隐查询的维度选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种隐空间世界-动作模型，通过未来感知的隐推理提升VLA策略性能，无需生成未来帧。

papers.title: From Unstructured Recall to Schema-Grounded Memory: Reliable AI Memory via Iterative, Schema-Aware Extraction
papers.abstract: Persistent AI memory is often reduced to a retrieval problem: store prior interactions as text, embed them, and ask the model to recover relevant context later. This design is useful for thematic recall, but it is mismatched to the kinds of memory that agents need in production: exact facts, current state, updates and deletions, aggregation, relations, negative queries, and explicit unknowns. These operations require memory to behave less like search and more like a system of record. This paper argues that reliable external AI memory must be schema-grounded. Schemas define what must be remembered, what may be ignored, and which values must never be inferred. We present an iterative, schema-aware write path that decomposes memory ingestion into object detection, field detection, and field-value extraction, with validation gates, local retries, and stateful prompt control. The result shifts interpretation from the read path to the write path: reads become constrained queries over verified records rather than repeated inference over retrieved prose. We evaluate this design on structured extraction and end-to-end memory benchmarks. On the extraction benchmark, the judge-in-the-loop configuration reaches 90.42% object-level accuracy and 62.67% output accuracy, above all tested frontier structured-output baselines. On our end-to-end memory benchmark, xmemory reaches 97.10% F1, compared with 80.16%-87.24% across the third-party baselines. On the application-level task, xmemory reaches 95.2% accuracy, outperforming specialised memory systems, code-generated Markdown harnesses, and customer-facing frontier-model application harnesses. The results show that, for memory workloads requiring stable facts and stateful computation, architecture matters more than retrieval scale or model strength alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于模式（Schema）的迭代式AI记忆写入方法，将记忆从检索问题转变为记录系统，显著提升事实准确性和状态管理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI记忆系统依赖文本检索，难以支持精确事实、状态更新、聚合、关系查询等生产级需求，导致记忆不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可靠的外部AI记忆系统，使其能够像记录系统一样支持精确事实存储、更新、删除、聚合和负查询，而非仅依赖检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前基于检索的记忆设计在主题回忆上有用，但无法满足精确事实、状态更新等操作，需要架构转变。
analysis.method: 提出迭代式、模式感知的写入流程，将记忆摄入分解为对象检测、字段检测和字段值提取，并加入验证门、本地重试和状态化提示控制，将解释负担从读取路径转移到写入路径。
contributions: 论证了可靠外部AI记忆必须基于模式（Schema）驱动，而非纯检索。
提出了迭代式模式感知写入方法，包含验证和重试机制，显著提升结构化提取和端到端记忆性能。
analysis.experiments: 在结构化提取基准上，judge-in-the-loop配置达到90.42%对象级准确率和62.67%输出准确率，优于所有前沿结构化输出基线；在端到端记忆基准上，xmemory达到97.10% F1，第三方基线为80.16%-87.24%；在应用级任务上达到95.2%准确率，优于专用记忆系统、代码生成Markdown和面向客户的前沿模型应用。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的模式定义，模式设计本身需要人工或自动生成。
迭代写入流程可能增加延迟，实时性要求高的场景需优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于模式（Schema）的迭代式AI记忆写入方法，将记忆从检索问题转变为记录系统，显著提升事实准确性和状态管理能力。

papers.title: HiMix: Hierarchical Artifact-aware Mixup for Generalized Synthetic Image Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid evolution of generative models has enabled the creation of highly realistic and diverse synthetic images, posing significant challenges to reliable and generalizable Synthetic Image Detection (SID). However, existing detectors are typically trained on limited and biased datasets, resulting in poor generalization to unseen generators. To address this issue, we propose HiMix, a unified framework that enhances generalization by expanding the training distribution and promoting artifact-aware representations. Specifically, the Mixup-driven Distributional Augmentation (MDA) module constructs continuous transitional samples between real and fake images, improving coverage of low-confidence regions and exposing the model to more challenging samples, while the pixel-wise mixup operation smoothly perturbs semantics to enhance sensitivity to low-level artifacts. Moreover, the Hierarchical Artifact-aware Representation (HAR) module aggregates artifact information from both global and local levels through cross-layer integration and coarse-to-fine feature fusion, enabling the extraction of discriminative forgery representations under diverse distributions. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that HiMix achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing well-separated logits for improved generalization to unseen forgeries.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种层次化伪影感知混合框架HiMix，通过混合增强和层次化特征融合提升合成图像检测的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成图像检测器在有限且有偏的数据集上训练，导致对未见生成器的泛化能力差。
analysis.problem: 如何提升合成图像检测模型对未知生成器生成图像的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HiMix框架，包含Mixup驱动的分布增强模块（MDA）和层次化伪影感知表示模块（HAR）。MDA通过混合真实和伪造图像构建连续过渡样本，扩大训练分布；HAR通过跨层集成和粗到细特征融合聚合全局和局部伪影信息。
contributions: 提出HiMix框架，结合混合增强和层次化伪影感知，提升合成图像检测的泛化性。
在多个基准上取得最先进性能，并实现分离的logits以改善对未见伪造的泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行广泛实验，结果表明HiMix达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对特定类型生成器的伪影模式依赖较强。
混合策略可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种层次化伪影感知混合框架HiMix，通过混合增强和层次化特征融合提升合成图像检测的泛化能力。

papers.title: Simulating clinical interventions with a generative multimodal model of human physiology
papers.abstract: Understanding how human health changes over time, and why responses to interventions vary between individuals, remains a central challenge in medicine. Here we present HealthFormer, a decoder-only transformer that models the human physiological trajectory generatively, by training on data from the Human Phenotype Project, a multi-visit cohort of over 15,000 deeply phenotyped individuals. We tokenise each participant's health trajectory across 667 measurements spanning seven domains: blood biomarkers, body composition, sleep physiology, continuous glucose monitoring, gut microbiome, wearable-derived physiology, and behaviour and medication exposure. We train HealthFormer to forecast individual physiological trajectories across these domains, and from this single generative objective a range of clinically relevant tasks can be expressed as queries on the model. We show that, without task-specific training, HealthFormer transfers to four independent cohorts and improves prediction for 27 of 30 incident-disease and mortality endpoints, exceeding established clinical risk scores in every comparison. We further show that the model can simulate interventions in silico: in a held-out personalised-nutrition trial, intervention-conditioned predictions recover individual six-month biomarker changes (e.g., Pearson r = 0.78 for diastolic blood pressure). Across 41 randomised intervention-outcome comparisons drawn from published trials, our results show that the predicted direction of effect agrees in every case, and the predicted mean falls within the reported 95% confidence interval in 30 cases. We position HealthFormer as an initial health world model, from which forecasting, risk stratification, and intervention-conditioned simulation arise as queries, providing a basis for clinical digital twins.

analysis.tldr: HealthFormer 是一个生成式多模态生理轨迹模型，可模拟临床干预效果并预测疾病风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解人类健康随时间的变化及个体对干预反应的差异是医学核心挑战，现有方法缺乏统一的生成式框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能生成个体生理轨迹、预测疾病风险并模拟干预效果的通用模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: HealthFormer 采用 decoder-only Transformer，将多模态生理数据（667 个测量指标）tokenize 后生成式预测轨迹，并通过查询实现多种临床任务。
contributions: 提出 HealthFormer，首个生成式多模态生理轨迹模型，可模拟干预效果。
在四个独立队列中优于传统临床风险评分，并成功预测个性化营养试验中的生物标志物变化。
analysis.experiments: 在 Human Phenotype Project 上训练，在四个独立队列上评估疾病预测，并在个性化营养试验和 41 项随机干预比较中验证干预模拟。
limitations: 模型依赖特定队列数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
干预模拟的准确性可能受限于训练数据覆盖的干预类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HealthFormer 是一个生成式多模态生理轨迹模型，可模拟临床干预效果并预测疾病风险。

papers.title: Graph World Models: Concepts, Taxonomy, and Future Directions
papers.abstract: As one of the mainstream models of artificial intelligence, world models allow agents to learn the representation of the environment for efficient prediction and planning. However, classical world models based on flat tensors face several key problems, including noise sensitivity, error accumulation and weak reasoning. To address these limitations, many recent studies use graph structure to decompose the environment into entity nodes and interactive edges, and model virtual environments in a structured space. This paper systematically formalizes and unifies these emerging graph-based works under the concept of graph world models (GWMs). To the best of our knowledge, GWMs have not yet been explicitly defined and surveyed as a unified research paradigm. Furthermore, we propose a taxonomy based on relational inductive biases (RIB), categorizing GWMs by the specific structural priors they inject: (1) spatial RIB for topological abstraction; (2) physical RIB for dynamic simulation; and (3) logical RIB for causal and semantic reasoning. For each model category, we outline the key design principles, summarize representative models, and conduct comparative analyses. We further discuss open challenges and future directions, including dynamic graph adaptation, probabilistic relational dynamics, multi-granularity inductive biases, and the need for dedicated benchmarks and evaluation metrics for GWMs.

analysis.tldr: 系统定义图世界模型（GWM）概念，提出基于关系归纳偏置的分类法，并总结代表性模型与未来方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典世界模型基于扁平张量，存在噪声敏感、误差累积和推理能力弱等问题，而图结构方法能通过实体节点和交互边分解环境，但缺乏统一的形式化定义和系统综述。
analysis.problem: 如何统一形式化并分类基于图结构的世界模型（GWM），并明确其设计原则、代表性模型及开放挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，但指出经典世界模型存在噪声敏感、误差累积和弱推理等瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出图世界模型（GWM）概念，并基于关系归纳偏置（RIB）提出分类法：空间RIB（拓扑抽象）、物理RIB（动态模拟）、逻辑RIB（因果与语义推理）。对每类模型概述设计原则、总结代表模型并进行比较分析。
contributions: 首次明确定义并统一图世界模型（GWM）作为独立研究范式。
提出基于关系归纳偏置（RIB）的三类分类法（空间、物理、逻辑），并系统梳理设计原则与代表模型。
讨论开放挑战与未来方向，包括动态图适应、概率关系动力学、多粒度归纳偏置及专用基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或实验验证。
分类法可能无法覆盖所有图世界模型变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统定义图世界模型（GWM）概念，提出基于关系归纳偏置的分类法，并总结代表性模型与未来方向。

papers.title: In-Context Prompting Obsoletes Agent Orchestration for Procedural Tasks
papers.abstract: Agent orchestration frameworks -- LangGraph, CrewAI, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK, and others -- place an external orchestrator above the LLM, tracking state and injecting routing instructions at every turn. We present a controlled comparison showing that for procedural tasks, this architecture is dominated by a simpler alternative: putting the entire procedure in the system prompt and letting the model self-orchestrate. Across three domains -- travel booking (14 nodes), Zoom technical support (14 nodes), and insurance claims processing (55 nodes) -- we evaluate 200 conversations per condition using LLM-as-judge scoring on five quality criteria. The in-context approach scores 4.53--5.00 on a 5-point scale while a LangGraph orchestrator using the same model scores 4.17--4.84. The orchestrated system fails on 24% of travel, 9% of Zoom, and 17% of insurance conversations, compared to 11.5%, 0.5%, and 5% for the in-context baseline. While external orchestration may have been necessary for earlier models, advances in frontier model capabilities have made it unnecessary for multi-turn conversations following a defined procedure.

analysis.tldr: 对于程序性任务，将完整流程放入系统提示让模型自我编排，效果优于外部编排框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前Agent编排框架（如LangGraph、CrewAI等）在LLM之上引入外部编排器，增加了复杂性和失败率，但前沿模型能力提升后，这种架构可能已不再必要。
analysis.problem: 验证对于程序性多轮对话任务，外部编排架构是否已被更简单的上下文提示方法所超越。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 外部编排系统在三个领域（旅行预订、Zoom技术支持、保险理赔）中失败率更高（24%、9%、17%），而上下文提示方法失败率更低（11.5%、0.5%、5%），且评分更高。
analysis.method: 将完整程序流程直接放入系统提示中，让LLM自我编排，无需外部编排器。
contributions: 通过受控实验证明，对于程序性任务，上下文提示方法在质量和可靠性上优于外部编排架构。
揭示了随着模型能力提升，外部编排的必要性正在降低。
analysis.experiments: 在旅行预订（14节点）、Zoom技术支持（14节点）和保险理赔（55节点）三个领域，每个条件进行200次对话，使用LLM-as-judge在五个质量维度上评分。
limitations: 仅评估了程序性任务，未涉及需要动态规划或外部工具调用的场景。
实验基于特定模型，结论可能不适用于所有LLM。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对于程序性任务，将完整流程放入系统提示让模型自我编排，效果优于外部编排框架。

papers.title: Noise2Map: End-to-End Diffusion Model for Semantic Segmentation and Change Detection
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation and change detection are two fundamental challenges in remote sensing, requiring models to capture either spatial semantics or temporal differences from satellite imagery. Existing deep learning models often struggle with temporal inconsistencies or in capturing fine-grained spatial structures, require extensive pretraining, and offer limited interpretability - especially in real-world remote sensing scenarios. Recent advances in diffusion models show that Gaussian noise can be systematically leveraged to learn expressive data representations through denoising. Motivated by this, we investigate whether the noise process in diffusion models can be effectively utilized for discriminative tasks. We propose Noise2Map, a unified diffusion-based framework that repurposes the denoising process for fast, end-to-end discriminative learning. Unlike prior work that uses diffusion only for generation or feature extraction, Noise2Map directly predicts semantic or change maps using task-specific noise schedules and timestep conditioning, avoiding the costly sampling procedures of traditional diffusion models. The model is pretrained via self-supervised denoising and fine-tuned with supervision, enabling both interpretability and robustness. Our architecture supports both tasks (SS and CD) through a shared backbone and task-specific noise schedulers. Extensive evaluations on the SpaceNet7, WHU, and xView2 buildings damaged by wildfires datasets demonstrate that Noise2Map ranks on average 1st among seven models on semantic segmentation and 1st on change detection by a cross-dataset rank metric (average F1 primary, IoU tie-break). Ablation studies highlight the robustness of our model against different training noise schedulers and timestep control in the diffusion process, as well as the ability of the model to perform multi-task learning.

analysis.tldr: Noise2Map 将扩散模型的去噪过程重新用于语义分割和变化检测，实现端到端判别学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感中的语义分割和变化检测面临时间不一致、细粒度结构捕捉困难、需要大量预训练且可解释性有限等问题，现有深度学习方法在这些方面表现不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用扩散模型中的噪声过程进行高效的判别式任务（语义分割和变化检测），避免传统扩散模型昂贵的采样过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Noise2Map 统一框架，通过任务特定的噪声调度和时间步条件，直接预测语义或变化图，采用自监督去噪预训练和监督微调，共享骨干网络并配备任务特定噪声调度器。
contributions: 首次将扩散模型的去噪过程直接用于判别式任务（语义分割和变化检测），实现端到端快速学习。
提出任务特定的噪声调度和时间步条件机制，避免传统扩散模型的昂贵采样。
在多个遥感数据集上取得平均排名第一的性能，并展示了鲁棒性和多任务学习能力。
analysis.experiments: 在 SpaceNet7、WHU 和 xView2 建筑物火灾损坏数据集上评估，语义分割和变化检测的平均排名均为第一（使用平均 F1 主要指标，IoU 作为平局决胜）。消融研究验证了不同训练噪声调度器和时间步控制的鲁棒性以及多任务学习能力。
limitations: 可能对噪声调度和时间步条件的设计敏感，需要针对不同任务调整。
仅在遥感数据集上验证，泛化到其他领域（如医学图像）尚未探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Noise2Map 将扩散模型的去噪过程重新用于语义分割和变化检测，实现端到端判别学习。

papers.title: Building Persona-Based Agents On Demand: Tailoring Multi-Agent Workflows to User Needs
papers.abstract: Recent advances in agentic AI are shifting automation from discrete tools to proactive multi-agent systems that coordinate multi-specialized capabilities behind unified interfaces. However, today's agent systems typically rely on hard-coded agent architectures with fixed roles, coordination patterns, and interaction flows that limit end-user personalization and make adaptation to individual needs and contexts difficult. Given this limitation, we argue that on-demand persona-based agent generation offers a promising path towards more efficient and contextually appropriate interaction within agentic workflows. By dynamically crafting agents and personas at run-time to match user characteristics, task demands, and workflow context, agentic platforms can move beyond one-size-fits-all configurations. We present a pipeline for on-demand persona generation in agentic platforms, detailing how real-time crafting of AI personas can be systematically integrated within agent systems, aiming to open new possibilities in agentic platform design paradigms.

analysis.tldr: 提出按需生成基于角色的智能体流水线，以替代固定架构，提升多智能体工作流的个性化与上下文适应性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多智能体系统依赖硬编码的固定角色、协调模式和交互流程，限制了终端用户的个性化定制，难以适应个体需求和上下文变化。
analysis.problem: 如何实现按需、动态地生成智能体角色（persona），以匹配用户特征、任务需求和工作流上下文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个按需角色生成流水线，详细说明如何在智能体平台中实时、系统地集成AI角色生成。
contributions: 论证了按需角色生成是实现高效、上下文适当交互的可行路径。
提出了一个具体的流水线框架，用于在智能体平台中动态生成角色。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及实验验证，可能缺乏实证支持。
流水线的实际效果和泛化能力有待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出按需生成基于角色的智能体流水线，以替代固定架构，提升多智能体工作流的个性化与上下文适应性。

papers.title: Frequency-Aware Semantic Fusion with Gated Injection for AI-generated Image Detection
papers.abstract: AI-generated images are becoming increasingly realistic and diverse, posing significant challenges for generalizable detection. While Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) provide rich semantic representations and frequency-based methods capture complementary artifact cues, existing approaches that combine these modalities still suffer from limited generalization, with notable performance degradation on unseen generative models. We attribute this limitation to two key factors: frequency shortcut bias toward easily distinguishable cues associated with specific generators and cross-domain representation conflict between high-level semantics and low-level frequency patterns. To address these issues, we propose a Frequency-aware Gated Injection Network (FGINet) to improve generalization. Specifically, we design a Band-Masked Frequency Encoder (BMFE) that applies cross-band masking in the frequency domain to reduce reliance on generator-specific patterns and encourage more diverse and generalizable representations. We further introduce a Layer-wise Gated Frequency Injection (LGFI) mechanism to progressively inject frequency cues into the VFM backbone with adaptive gating, aligning with its hierarchical abstraction and alleviating representation conflict. Moreover, we propose a Hyperspherical Compactness Learning (HCL) framework with a cosine margin objective to learn compact and well-separated representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FGINet achieves state-of-the-art performance and strong generalization across multiple challenging datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率感知门控注入网络（FGINet），通过带掩码频率编码和层级门控注入提升AI生成图像检测的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成图像日益逼真，现有检测方法在未见过的生成模型上泛化能力差，主要受限于频率捷径偏差和跨域表征冲突。
analysis.problem: 提升AI生成图像检测方法对未知生成模型的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法存在频率捷径偏差（依赖特定生成器的易区分线索）和跨域表征冲突（高层语义与低层频率模式不兼容）。
analysis.method: 提出FGINet，包含带掩码频率编码器（BMFE）减少生成器特定依赖、层级门控频率注入（LGFI）自适应融合频率与语义特征、超球面紧致学习（HCL）优化表征分离性。
contributions: 设计BMFE通过跨带掩码抑制频率捷径偏差，促进泛化表征。
提出LGFI机制渐进注入频率信息，缓解跨域表征冲突。
引入HCL框架学习紧致且分离的表征，提升检测鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个具有挑战性的数据集上达到SOTA性能，并展现出强泛化能力。
limitations: 可能对极端未见生成器仍存在泛化瓶颈。
计算开销可能因多模块集成而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率感知门控注入网络（FGINet），通过带掩码频率编码和层级门控注入提升AI生成图像检测的泛化能力。

papers.title: Modeling Clinical Concern Trajectories in Language Model Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents deployed in clinical settings often exhibit abrupt, threshold-driven behavior, offering little visibility into accumulating risk prior to escalation. In real-world care, however, clinicians act on gradually rising concern rather than instantaneous triggers. We study whether explicit state dynamics can expose such pre-escalation signals without delegating clinical authority to the agent. We introduce a lightweight agent architecture in which a memoryless clinical risk encoder is integrated over time using first- and second-order dynamics to produce a continuous escalation pressure signal. Across synthetic ward scenarios, stateless agents exhibit sharp escalation cliffs, while second-order dynamics produce smooth, anticipatory concern trajectories despite similar escalation timing. These trajectories surface sustained unease prior to escalation, enabling human-in-the-loop monitoring and more informed intervention. Our results suggest that explicit state dynamics can make LLM agents more clinically legible by revealing how long concern has been rising, not just when thresholds are crossed.

analysis.tldr: 通过显式状态动力学建模临床关注轨迹，使LLM智能体在临床场景中更可解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床环境中部署的LLM智能体通常表现出突然的、阈值驱动的行为，在升级前缺乏风险累积的可视性，而真实临床医生依赖逐渐上升的关注而非瞬时触发。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体在临床决策中暴露升级前的累积风险信号，同时不将临床决策权委托给智能体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无状态智能体表现出陡峭的升级悬崖，而二阶动力学产生平滑、可预期的关注轨迹，在升级前揭示持续的不安。
analysis.method: 提出轻量级智能体架构，使用记忆less临床风险编码器，通过一阶和二阶动力学积分产生连续升级压力信号。
contributions: 提出显式状态动力学使LLM智能体在临床场景中更可解释，揭示关注上升的持续时间而非仅阈值触发。
通过合成病房场景验证二阶动力学产生平滑、可预期的关注轨迹，支持人在回路监控。
analysis.experiments: 在合成病房场景中比较无状态与一阶/二阶动力学智能体，观察升级悬崖和关注轨迹。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在合成场景验证，未在真实临床数据上测试。
未讨论动力学参数选择对轨迹的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过显式状态动力学建模临床关注轨迹，使LLM智能体在临床场景中更可解释。

papers.title: Parameter-Efficient Architectural Modifications for Translation-Invariant CNNs
papers.abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are widely assumed to be translation-invariant, yet standard architectures exhibit a startling fragility: even a single-pixel shift can drastically degrade performance due to their reliance on spatially dependent fully connected layers. In this work, we resolve this vulnerability by proposing a lightweight 'Online Architecture' strategy. By strategically inserting Global Average Pooling (GAP) layers at various network depths, we effectively decouple feature recognition from spatial location. Using VGG-16 as a primary case study, we demonstrate that this architectural modification achieves a massive 98% reduction in trainable parameters (from 5.2M to just 82K) and a 90% reduction in total network size (138M to 14M). Despite this drastic pruning, our variants maintain competitive Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet (66.4%) while doubling translational robustness, reducing average relative loss from 0.09 to 0.05. Furthermore, our analysis identifies a fundamental limit to invariance: while GAP resolves macroscopic sensitivity, discrete pooling operations introduce a residual periodic aliasing that prevents perfect pixel-level stability. Finally, we extend these findings to Perceptual Image Quality Assessment (IQA) by integrating our invariant backbones into the LPIPS framework. The resulting metric significantly outperforms the retrained baseline in generalization across the KADID-10k dataset (Spearman 0.89 vs. 0.75) and achieves a near-perfect alignment with human psychophysical response curves on the RAID dataset (Spearman 0.95). These results confirm that enforcing architectural invariance is a far more efficient and biologically plausible path to robustness than traditional data augmentation. Data and code are publicly available. The data and code are publicly available to facilitate validation and further research.

analysis.tldr: 通过插入全局平均池化层实现CNN的平移不变性，大幅减少参数并提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准CNN因依赖全连接层而对像素级平移高度敏感，现有方法依赖数据增强或复杂架构，效率低且不彻底。
analysis.problem: 解决CNN对输入平移的脆弱性，实现高效且参数精简的平移不变性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全连接层导致空间依赖，单像素平移即可显著降低性能；全局平均池化可解耦特征与位置，但离散池化引入周期性混叠，限制完美不变性。
analysis.method: 提出'在线架构'策略，在VGG-16不同深度插入全局平均池化层，替代全连接层，实现参数高效且平移鲁棒的CNN。
contributions: 提出轻量级架构修改实现平移不变性，参数减少98%，网络大小减少90%。
揭示离散池化操作引入的周期性混叠是完美不变性的根本限制。
将不变性骨干集成到LPIPS中，在图像质量评估任务上显著提升泛化性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet上验证分类性能（Top-1 66.4%）和平移鲁棒性（平均相对损失从0.09降至0.05）；在KADID-10k和RAID数据集上评估图像质量评估（Spearman 0.89和0.95）。
limitations: 仅以VGG-16为案例，未验证其他架构的泛化性。
离散池化导致的周期性混叠未完全消除。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过插入全局平均池化层实现CNN的平移不变性，大幅减少参数并提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: KellyBench: A Benchmark for Long-Horizon Sequential Decision Making
papers.abstract: Language models are saturating benchmarks for procedural tasks with narrow objectives. But they are increasingly being deployed in long-horizon, non-stationary environments with open-ended goals. In this paper we introduce KellyBench, an environment for evaluating sequential decision-making in sports betting markets. Agents are placed in a sequential simulation of the 2023-24 English Premier League season and tasked with maximising their long-term bankroll growth. They are given detailed historical data, including advanced statistics, lineups, and public odds. To succeed they must build machine learning models, identify edge in public markets, and adapt as the environment changes over time. We find that all frontier models evaluated lose money on average over the course of the season for five seeds. The best performing model achieves an average return of -8%, and many models experiencing ruin across seeds. To judge strategy sophistication, we use a human expert rubric to grade each model and find their approaches to be unsophisticated compared to human baselines; Claude Opus 4.6 achieves a rubric score of 26.5%, which means there is significant room for improvement. KellyBench is available as an open-access API endpoint at https://openreward.ai/GeneralReasoning/KellyBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个用于评估长时序决策的体育博彩基准，发现前沿语言模型均亏损且策略粗糙。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言模型在窄目标程序任务上趋于饱和，但实际部署常面临长时序、非平稳、开放目标的环境，缺乏相应评测基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能评估语言模型在长时序、非平稳环境中进行序贯决策的基准环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有前沿模型在模拟赛季中平均亏损，最佳模型平均回报-8%，且策略复杂度远低于人类专家（Claude Opus 4.6 仅得 26.5%）。
analysis.method: 基于2023-24英超赛季数据构建序贯模拟环境，要求智能体利用历史数据（高级统计、阵容、赔率）构建模型、识别市场优势并动态适应，以最大化长期资金增长。
contributions: 提出KellyBench，一个用于长时序序贯决策评估的体育博彩基准环境
通过实验揭示前沿语言模型在该任务上的显著不足，并提供人类专家评分标准
analysis.experiments: 在5个随机种子下评估多个前沿模型，所有模型平均亏损，最佳模型平均回报-8%，部分模型经历破产。
limitations: 仅基于单一赛季数据，可能无法完全反映长期动态
人类专家评分标准可能带有主观性
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个用于评估长时序决策的体育博彩基准，发现前沿语言模型均亏损且策略粗糙。

papers.title: A Brief Overview: Agentic Reinforcement Learning In Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has traditionally focused on training specialized agents to optimize predefined reward functions within narrowly defined environments. However, the advent of powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) and increasingly complex, open-ended tasks has catalyzed a paradigm shift towards agentic paradigms within RL. This emerging framework extends beyond traditional RL by emphasizing the development of autonomous agents capable of goal-setting, long-term planning, dynamic strategy adaptation, and interactive reasoning in uncertain, real-world environments. Unlike conventional approaches that rely heavily on static objectives and episodic interactions, LLM-based Agentic RL incorporates cognitive-like capabilities such as meta-reasoning, self-reflection, and multi-step decision-making directly into the learning loop. In this paper, we provide a deep insight for looking the conceptual foundations, methodological innovations, and effective designs underlying this trend. Furthermore, we identify critical challenges and outline promising future directions for building LLM-based Agentic RL.

analysis.tldr: 综述LLM中基于强化学习的智能体范式，强调自主目标设定与动态决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RL局限于预定义奖励和窄环境，无法应对开放、不确定的真实世界任务；LLM的兴起需要更自主的智能体框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM与RL结合，构建具备目标设定、长期规划和自适应推理能力的智能体系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 综述LLM-based Agentic RL的概念基础、方法创新（如元推理、自我反思）和有效设计，并指出挑战与未来方向。
contributions: 系统梳理LLM-based Agentic RL的概念框架与方法创新
识别关键挑战并展望未来研究方向
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，缺乏实证验证
可能未覆盖所有最新方法
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述LLM中基于强化学习的智能体范式，强调自主目标设定与动态决策。

papers.title: AI Inference as Relocatable Electricity Demand: A Latency-Constrained Energy-Geography Framework
papers.abstract: AI inference is becoming a persistent and geographically distributed source of electricity demand. Unlike many traditional electrical loads, inference workloads can sometimes be executed away from the user-facing service location, provided that latency, state locality, capacity, and regulatory constraints remain acceptable. This paper studies when such digital relocation of computation can be interpreted as latency-constrained relocation of electricity demand. We develop an energy-geography framework for geo-distributed AI inference. The framework models a three-layer architecture of clients, service nodes, and compute nodes, and formulates inference placement as a constrained optimization problem over electricity prices, marginal carbon intensity, power usage effectiveness, compute capacity, network latency, and migration frictions. The key object is the energy-latency frontier: the marginal cost and carbon benefit unlocked by relaxing inference latency budgets. The paper makes four contributions. First, it distinguishes physical electricity transmission from digital relocation of electricity-consuming computation.
