Second, it formulates a geo-distributed inference placement model with feasibility masks and migration frictions. Third, it introduces operational metrics, including relocatable inference demand, energy return on latency, carbon return on latency, and a relocation break-even condition. Fourth, it provides a transparent stylized simulation over representative global compute regions to show how heterogeneous latency tolerance separates workloads into local, regional, and energy-oriented execution layers. The results show that latency relaxation expands feasible geography, while migration frictions, egress costs, state locality, legal constraints, and capacity limits can sharply reduce realized benefits.

analysis.tldr: 将AI推理视为可迁移的电力需求，提出延迟约束下的能源-地理框架。
analysis.research_motivation: AI推理正成为持续且地理分布的电力消耗源，但传统电力负荷管理方法未考虑推理工作负载的可迁移性，导致能源成本和碳排放优化不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在满足延迟、状态局部性、容量和监管约束的前提下，将AI推理计算的地理迁移建模为电力需求的地理迁移，并量化其能源与碳效益。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但框架分析表明延迟容忍度扩展可行地理范围，而迁移摩擦、出口成本、状态局部性、法律约束和容量限制会显著降低实际收益。
analysis.method: 提出一个三层架构（客户端、服务节点、计算节点）的能源-地理框架，将推理放置建模为受电价、边际碳强度、PUE、计算容量、网络延迟和迁移摩擦约束的优化问题，并引入能量-延迟前沿、可迁移推理需求、延迟能源回报率、延迟碳回报率及迁移盈亏平衡条件等指标。
contributions: 区分物理电力传输与消耗电力的计算数字迁移。
提出带可行性掩码和迁移摩擦的地理分布式推理放置模型。
引入可迁移推理需求、延迟能源回报率、延迟碳回报率及迁移盈亏平衡条件等操作指标。
通过代表性全球计算区域的透明风格化模拟，展示延迟容忍度如何将工作负载分为本地、区域和能源导向执行层。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及风格化模拟显示延迟放松扩展可行地理范围，但迁移摩擦等因素会削减收益。
limitations: 模拟为风格化，可能未考虑真实网络动态和电价波动。
未涉及实际部署中的隐私和监管复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将AI推理视为可迁移的电力需求，提出延迟约束下的能源-地理框架。

papers.title: NeocorRAG: Less Irrelevant Information, More Explicit Evidence, and More Effective Recall via Evidence Chains
papers.abstract: Although precise recall is a core objective in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), a critical oversight persists in the field: improvements in retrieval performance do not consistently translate to commensurate gains in downstream reasoning. To diagnose this gap, we propose the Recall Conversion Rate (RCR), a novel evaluation metric to quantify the contribution of retrieval to reasoning accuracy. Our quantitative analysis of mainstream RAG methods reveals that as Recall@5 improves, the RCR exhibits a near-linear decay. We identify the neglect of retrieval quality in these methods as the underlying cause. In contrast, approaches that focus solely on quality optimization often suffer from inferior recall performance. Both categories lack a comprehensive understanding of retrieval quality optimization, resulting in a trade-off dilemma. To address these challenges, we propose comprehensive retrieval quality optimization criteria and introduce the NeocorRAG framework. This framework achieves holistic retrieval quality optimization by systematically mining and utilizing Evidence Chains. Specifically, NeocorRAG first employs an innovative activated search algorithm to obtain a refined candidate space. Then it ensures precise evidence chain generation through constrained decoding. Finally, the retrieved set of evidence chains guides the retrieval optimization process. Evaluated on benchmarks including HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, MuSiQue, and NQ, NeocorRAG achieves SOTA performance on both 3B and 70B parameter models, while consuming less than 20% of tokens used by comparable methods. This study presents an efficient, training-free paradigm for RAG enhancement that effectively optimizes retrieval quality while maintaining high recall. Our code is released at https://github.com/BUPT-Reasoning-Lab/NeocorRAG.

analysis.tldr: 提出NeocorRAG框架，通过证据链优化检索质量，在保持高召回的同时提升下游推理准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG方法中检索性能提升未能一致转化为下游推理增益，存在检索质量与召回之间的权衡困境。
analysis.problem: 如何同时优化检索质量和召回率，使检索结果更有效地支持下游推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着Recall@5提升，召回转换率（RCR）呈近线性下降，表明检索质量被忽视；仅优化质量的方法召回性能差。
analysis.method: 提出NeocorRAG框架，包括激活搜索算法获取候选空间、约束解码生成证据链、以及证据链引导的检索优化。
contributions: 提出RCR指标量化检索对推理的贡献，并揭示检索质量与召回之间的权衡。
提出NeocorRAG框架，通过证据链实现检索质量整体优化，无需训练。
analysis.experiments: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA、MuSiQue和NQ上，3B和70B模型均达到SOTA，且token消耗少于对比方法的20%。
limitations: 可能依赖多跳推理数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
证据链生成依赖约束解码，可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NeocorRAG框架，通过证据链优化检索质量，在保持高召回的同时提升下游推理准确率。

papers.title: A Grid-Aware Agent-Based Model for Analyzing Electric Vehicle Charging Systems
papers.abstract: This paper presents a configurable, grid-aware Agent-Based Model (ABM) for the systematic analysis of electric vehicle (EV) charging systems under configurable infrastructure and operational conditions. The model integrates heterogeneous EV behavior, charging column constraints, and a shared Energy Sandbox that regulates aggregate power allocation, enabling the joint study of user-centric charging dynamics and facility-level power behavior. Implemented in Python using the SimPy discrete-event framework, the approach supports scalable, event-driven simulations across varying system sizes, charger compositions, and scheduling strategies. A representative workplace charging scenario is investigated to illustrate how infrastructure configuration and coordination mechanisms influence energy delivery performance, infrastructure utilization, and aggregate load characteristics. The results highlight the context-dependence of infrastructure suitability and demonstrate how charging strategies and charger types reshape both service-level outcomes and grid-facing behavior. The proposed ABM provides a flexible and extensible simulation environment for exploring technical, operational, and grid-aware aspects of EV charging ecosystems, and for serving as a methodological basis for subsequent studies on advanced coordination strategies beyond the specific scenario analyzed in this study.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种网格感知的智能体模型，用于分析电动汽车充电系统在不同配置下的充电动态和电网影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 电动汽车充电系统涉及用户行为、充电桩约束和电网负载的复杂交互，现有模型难以同时考虑用户侧和电网侧行为，缺乏可配置的仿真工具来系统分析不同基础设施和运营条件的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可配置、网格感知的智能体模型，以联合研究用户充电动态和设施级功率行为，并分析基础设施配置与协调机制对能源交付、利用率和负载特性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于智能体建模（ABM），集成异构EV行为、充电桩约束和共享能量沙盒（Energy Sandbox）来调节总功率分配，使用SimPy离散事件框架实现可扩展的事件驱动仿真。
contributions: 提出了一个可配置、网格感知的智能体模型，能够联合分析用户充电动态和设施级功率行为。
通过一个代表性工作场所充电场景，展示了基础设施配置和协调机制对能源交付、利用率和负载特性的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析了一个工作场所充电场景，未涵盖其他场景（如公共快充、家庭充电）。
模型未考虑实时电价、用户偏好等更复杂的因素。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种网格感知的智能体模型，用于分析电动汽车充电系统在不同配置下的充电动态和电网影响。

papers.title: CastFlow: Learning Role-Specialized Agentic Workflows for Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown great promise in time series forecasting. However, most existing LLM-based forecasting methods still follow a static generative paradigm that directly maps historical observations to future values in a single pass. Under this paradigm, forecasting is constrained by limited temporal pattern extraction, single-round acquisition of contextual features, one-shot forecast generation, and lack of support from ensemble forecasts. To address these limitations, in this work, we propose CastFlow, a dynamic agentic forecasting framework that enables multi-view temporal pattern extraction, multi-round contextual features acquisition, iterative forecast refinement, and forecasting with ensemble forecasts. First, CastFlow organizes the forecasting process into planning, action, forecasting, and reflection, establishing an agentic workflow. Second, this workflow is supported by a memory module that retrieves prior experience and a multi-view toolkit that constructs diagnostic evidence and provides a reliable ensemble forecast baseline. Third, CastFlow adopts a role-specialized design that combines general-purpose reasoning with specialized numerical forecasting. Under this design, a frozen LLM preserves general-purpose reasoning, while a fine-tuned domain-specific LLM performs evidence-guided numerical forecasting based on the ensemble forecast baseline, rather than from scratch. To optimize a fine-tuned domain-specific LLM, we further develop a two-stage workflow-oriented training that combines supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). To evaluate the effectiveness of CastFlow, we conduct extensive experiments on diverse datasets and show that it achieves superior overall results against strong baselines. We hope that this work can serve as a step toward more adaptive and accurate time series forecasting.

analysis.tldr: CastFlow 提出一种角色分工的智能体工作流，通过多视角时序模式提取、多轮上下文获取、迭代预测优化和集成预测来提升时间序列预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 LLM 的时间序列预测方法大多采用静态生成范式，单次映射历史观测到未来值，受限于有限的时序模式提取、单轮上下文特征获取、一次性预测生成以及缺乏集成预测支持。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个动态的智能体框架，实现多视角时序模式提取、多轮上下文获取、迭代预测优化和集成预测，以克服静态生成范式的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CastFlow 将预测过程组织为规划、行动、预测和反思四个阶段的智能体工作流，包含记忆模块和多视角工具包，采用角色分工设计：冻结的通用 LLM 负责推理，微调的领域专用 LLM 基于集成预测基线进行证据引导的数值预测，并通过两阶段工作流导向训练（SFT + RLVR）优化。
contributions: 提出 CastFlow，一个动态智能体预测框架，支持多视角时序模式提取、多轮上下文获取、迭代预测优化和集成预测。
设计角色分工架构，结合通用推理和专用数值预测，并开发两阶段工作流导向训练方法（SFT + RLVR）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行广泛实验，结果显示 CastFlow 在整体结果上优于强基线。
limitations: 依赖预训练 LLM，计算成本可能较高。
两阶段训练流程复杂，调优难度大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CastFlow 提出一种角色分工的智能体工作流，通过多视角时序模式提取、多轮上下文获取、迭代预测优化和集成预测来提升时间序列预测性能。

papers.title: Taming Noise-Induced Prototype Degradation for Privacy-Preserving Personalized Federated Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Prototype-based Personalized Federated Learning (ProtoPFL) enables efficient multi-domain adaptation by communicating compact class prototypes, but directly sharing them poses privacy risks. A common defense involves per-example $\ell_2$ clipping before prototype computation to bound sensitivity, followed by isotropic Gaussian noise to enforce Local Differential Privacy (LDP). However, Isotropic Gaussian Prototype Perturbation (IGPP) typically over-perturbs discriminative dimensions and struggles to balance the clipping threshold with representation fidelity. In this paper, we propose VPDR, a client-side privacy plug-in that seamlessly integrates into existing ProtoPFLs. Motivated by the observation that dimension-wise class variance reflects discriminability, we introduce Variance-adaptive Prototype Perturbation (VPP), which allocates less noise to discriminative subspaces, preserving semantic separability while ensuring privacy. We further develop Distillation-guided Clipping Regularization (DCR), which enables feature norms to adaptively concentrate near the predefined clipping threshold while maintaining prediction consistency. Theoretical analysis shows that our groupwise mechanism provides privacy guarantees no weaker than the isotropic baseline under the same privacy constraints. Extensive experiments on multi-domain benchmarks demonstrate that VPDR achieves a superior privacy-utility trade-off, outperforming IGPP in personalized federated fine-tuning without sacrificing robustness against realistic attacks.

analysis.tldr: 提出VPDR，通过方差自适应扰动和蒸馏引导裁剪正则化，在联邦微调中平衡隐私与效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 原型联邦学习（ProtoPFL）通过共享类原型实现多域适应，但直接共享存在隐私风险；现有各向同性高斯扰动（IGPP）过度扰动判别维度，且难以平衡裁剪阈值与表征保真度。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护本地差分隐私（LDP）的同时，减少原型扰动对判别性语义信息的破坏，并自适应调整特征范数以匹配裁剪阈值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到维度级类方差反映判别性，各向同性噪声会过度扰动判别维度，导致原型退化。
analysis.method: 提出VPDR，包含两个模块：1) 方差自适应原型扰动（VPP），根据维度方差分配噪声，保护判别子空间；2) 蒸馏引导裁剪正则化（DCR），通过知识蒸馏使特征范数自适应集中在裁剪阈值附近，保持预测一致性。
contributions: 提出VPP，利用维度方差指导噪声分配，在保证隐私的同时保留语义可分性。
提出DCR，通过蒸馏正则化自适应调整特征范数，缓解裁剪阈值与表征保真度的矛盾。
理论证明分组机制在相同隐私约束下提供不弱于各向同性基线的隐私保证。
analysis.experiments: 在多域基准上进行了广泛实验，VPDR在个性化联邦微调中实现了更优的隐私-效用权衡，且未牺牲对现实攻击的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的分组策略，未探索自适应分组。
蒸馏引导正则化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VPDR，通过方差自适应扰动和蒸馏引导裁剪正则化，在联邦微调中平衡隐私与效用。

papers.title: CRC-Screen: Certified DNA-Synthesis Hazard Screening Under Taxonomic Shift
papers.abstract: DNA-synthesis providers screen incoming orders by searching the requested sequence against curated hazard lists. We show that this baseline collapses to a 100% false-flag rate when the hazardous sequence comes from a taxonomic family absent from the reference set: under Conformal Risk Control's certified miss-rate constraint, a low-discrimination signal forces the threshold below the entire test-benign mass. We compose three signals derived from a synthesis order's public annotation: $k$-mer Jaccard similarity to known toxins, the trimmed-mean score of a five-LLM judge panel, and cosine similarity to clustered embedding centroids. Fused under a monotone logistic aggregator and calibrated by Conformal Risk Control, the resulting screener certifies $\mathbb{E}[\mathrm{FNR}] \le α$. Across ten leave-one-taxonomic-family-out folds at $α=0.05$ on UniProt KW-0800 reviewed toxins, the calibrated screener achieves 0% test miss rate on every fold and 0% test false-flag rate on nine of ten folds. The bound's finite-sample slack $1/(n_{\mathrm{cal}}+1)$ caps the certifiable miss rate at 1.77% on our 200-hazard subsample; reaching procurement-grade $α=10^{-3}$ requires an $18\times$ larger calibration set, which the full reviewed UniProt KW-0800 corpus is large enough to deliver. The binding constraint on certifiable DNA-synthesis screening is calibration data, not algorithms. Code: https://github.com/najmulhasan-code/crc-screen

analysis.tldr: 提出CRC-Screen，通过融合多种信号和保形风险控制，在分类偏移下实现DNA合成危害筛查的认证低漏检率。
analysis.research_motivation: DNA合成供应商需要筛查订单中的危险序列，但现有基线方法在遇到参考集中未出现的分类家族时，假阳性率会达到100%，存在严重的安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个在分类偏移（taxonomic shift）下仍能保证低漏检率（FNR）的DNA合成危害筛查方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当危险序列来自参考集中缺失的分类家族时，基线方法的判别信号极弱，导致保形风险控制下的阈值低于所有良性测试样本，造成100%假阳性率。
analysis.method: 融合三种信号：k-mer Jaccard相似度、五LLM评委的修剪均值、与聚类嵌入质心的余弦相似度，通过单调逻辑聚合器融合，并用保形风险控制校准，确保期望FNR≤α。
contributions: 揭示了DNA合成筛查在分类偏移下的失效模式（100%假阳性率）。
提出了融合多信号与保形风险控制的认证筛查方法，在10折留一分类家族实验中实现0%漏检率和90%零假阳性率。
分析了认证漏检率受限于校准数据量，并给出了达到采购级α=10^{-3}所需的数据规模。
analysis.experiments: 在UniProt KW-0800审核毒素数据集上进行10折留一分类家族实验，α=0.05时校准筛查器在每折实现0%测试漏检率，在9/10折实现0%假阳性率。
limitations: 认证漏检率受限于校准集大小，达到极低α需要大量校准数据。
方法依赖公共注释和LLM，可能受注释质量和LLM偏见影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CRC-Screen，通过融合多种信号和保形风险控制，在分类偏移下实现DNA合成危害筛查的认证低漏检率。

papers.title: ObjectGraph: From Document Injection to Knowledge Traversal -- A Native File Format for the Agentic Era
papers.abstract: Every document format in existence was designed for a human reader moving linearly through text. Autonomous LLM agents do not read - they retrieve. This fundamental mismatch forces agents to inject entire documents into their context window, wasting tokens on irrelevant content, compounding state across multi-turn loops, and broadcasting information indiscriminately across agent roles. We argue this is not a prompt engineering problem, not a retrieval problem, and not a compression problem: it is a format problem. We introduce OBJECTGRAPH (.og), a file format that reconceives the document as a typed, directed knowledge graph to be traversed rather than a string to be injected. OBJECTGRAPH is a strict superset of Markdown - every .md file is a valid .og file - requires no infrastructure beyond a two-primitive query protocol, and is readable by both humans and agents without tooling. We formalize the Document Consumption Problem, characterise six structural properties no existing format satisfies simultaneously, and prove OBJECTGRAPH satisfies all six. We further introduce the Progressive Disclosure Model, the Role-Scoped Access Protocol, and Executable Assertion Nodes as native format primitives. Empirical evaluation across five document classes and eight agent task types demonstrates up to 95.3 percent token reduction with no statistically significant degradation in task accuracy (p > 0.05). Transpiler fidelity reaches 98.7 percent content preservation on a held-out document benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向LLM Agent的原生文件格式ObjectGraph，将文档重构为知识图谱以大幅减少token消耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文档格式为人类线性阅读设计，而LLM Agent通过检索而非阅读处理信息，导致上下文窗口被无关内容浪费、状态累积和角色间信息广播问题，这不是提示工程、检索或压缩问题，而是格式问题。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM Agent处理文档时因格式不匹配导致的token浪费、状态累积和信息广播问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ObjectGraph (.og)文件格式，将文档表示为带类型的、有向的知识图谱，支持遍历而非注入；是Markdown的超集，无需额外基础设施；包含渐进式披露模型、角色作用域访问协议和可执行断言节点等原生原语。
contributions: 形式化定义了文档消费问题，并刻画了现有格式无法同时满足的六个结构属性，证明ObjectGraph满足全部六个。
提出ObjectGraph格式，包含渐进式披露模型、角色作用域访问协议和可执行断言节点等原生原语。
在五类文档和八种Agent任务上实验，实现高达95.3%的token减少且任务准确率无统计显著下降，转译器保真度达98.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在五类文档和八种Agent任务类型上进行实证评估，显示高达95.3%的token减少，任务准确率无统计显著下降（p>0.05），转译器在保留文档基准上达到98.7%的内容保真度。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于检索的LLM Agent场景，对非Agent应用价值有限。
格式的广泛采用需要工具链支持，初期可能面临生态兼容性问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向LLM Agent的原生文件格式ObjectGraph，将文档重构为知识图谱以大幅减少token消耗。

papers.title: MCPHunt: An Evaluation Framework for Cross-Boundary Data Propagation in Multi-Server MCP Agents
papers.abstract: Multi-server MCP agents create an information-flow control problem: faithful tool composition can turn individually benign read/write permissions into cross-boundary credential propagation -- a structural side effect of workflow topology, not necessarily malicious model behavior. We present MCPHunt, to our knowledge the first controlled benchmark that isolates non-adversarial, verbatim credential propagation across multi-server MCP trust boundaries, with three methodological contributions: (1) canary-based taint tracking that reduces propagation detection to objective string matching; (2) an environment-controlled coverage design with risky, benign, and hard-negative conditions that validates pipeline soundness and controls for credential-format confounds; (3) CRS stratification that disentangles task-mandated propagation (faithful execution of verbatim-transfer instructions) from policy-violating propagation (credentials included despite the option to redact). Across 3,615 main-benchmark traces from 5 models spanning 147 tasks and 9 mechanism families, policy-violating propagation rates reach 11.5--41.3% across all models. This propagation is pathway-specific (25x cross-mechanism range) and concentrated in browser-mediated data flows; hard-negative controls provide evidence that production-format credentials are not necessary -- prompt-directed cross-boundary data flow is sufficient. A prompt-mitigation study across 3 models reduces policy-violating propagation by up to 97% while preserving 80.5% utility, but effectiveness varies with instruction-following capability -- suggesting that prompt-level defenses alone may not suffice. Code, traces, and labeling pipeline are released under MIT and CC BY 4.0.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对多服务器MCP Agent中跨信任边界凭证传播的受控基准与评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 多服务器MCP Agent中，工具组合可能将个体无害的读写权限转化为跨边界的凭证传播，这是一个信息流控制问题，但缺乏系统性的评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何客观检测和量化多服务器MCP Agent中非恶意的、逐字凭证跨边界传播现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 凭证传播是工作流拓扑的结构性副作用，而非模型恶意行为；传播具有路径特异性（跨机制范围达25倍），且集中在浏览器中介的数据流中；生产格式凭证并非必要条件，提示导向的跨边界数据流已足够。
analysis.method: 提出MCPHunt框架，包含：(1) 基于金丝雀的污点追踪，将传播检测简化为客观字符串匹配；(2) 环境控制的覆盖设计，包含风险、良性和硬负条件；(3) CRS分层，区分任务强制传播与违反策略的传播。
contributions: 首个针对多服务器MCP Agent跨边界凭证传播的受控基准MCPHunt。
提出金丝雀污点追踪、环境控制覆盖设计和CRS分层三种方法论贡献。
通过5个模型、147个任务、3615条轨迹的实验，揭示政策违反传播率达11.5-41.3%，并验证提示缓解的有效性与局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在5个模型、147个任务、9个机制族上收集3615条主基准轨迹，测量政策违反传播率；进行提示缓解研究，在3个模型上减少高达97%的政策违反传播，同时保留80.5%效用。
limitations: 仅关注逐字凭证传播，未涵盖语义等价或编码变体。
提示缓解效果随指令遵循能力变化，提示级防御可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对多服务器MCP Agent中跨信任边界凭证传播的受控基准与评估框架。

papers.title: Autonomous Systems Dependability in the era of AI: Design Challenges in Safety, Security, Reliability and Certification
papers.abstract: The design of embedded safety-critical systems such as those used in next-generation automotive and autonomous platforms, is increasingly challenged by escalating system complexity, hardware-software heterogeneity, and the integration of intelligent, data-driven components. Ensuring dependability in such systems requires a holistic approach that spans multiple abstraction layers and encompasses both design- and run-time assurance. Traditional methods for reliability, safety, and security management often fall short in addressing the dynamic and uncertain behaviors introduced by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) components, especially under stringent real-time, power, and safety constraints. While AI and ML offer powerful predictive, adaptive, and self-optimizing capabilities that can enhance system dependability, their inherent non-determinism, data-dependence, and lack of formal guarantees introduce new challenges for verification, validation, and certification. This paper explores emerging methodologies, architectures, and frameworks for designing dependable autonomous and embedded systems in the era of AI. It highlight advances in reliability modeling, secure system design, and certification approaches that account for imperfect, learning-enabled components, aiming to bridge the gap between AI innovation and certifiable system-level dependability.

analysis.tldr: 探讨AI时代自主系统在安全性、可靠性、安全性和认证方面的设计挑战与新兴方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着嵌入式安全关键系统（如自动驾驶平台）复杂性增加、硬件-软件异构性以及智能数据驱动组件的集成，确保系统可信赖性面临严峻挑战。传统方法难以应对AI/ML组件带来的动态和不确定性行为，尤其是在严格的实时、功耗和安全约束下。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可信赖的自主和嵌入式系统，以应对AI/ML组件引入的非确定性、数据依赖性和缺乏形式化保证等问题，并实现验证、确认和认证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出AI/ML组件虽然能增强系统可信赖性，但其非确定性、数据依赖性和缺乏形式化保证给验证、确认和认证带来新挑战。
analysis.method: 综述新兴方法论、架构和框架，涵盖可靠性建模、安全系统设计和认证方法，以桥接AI创新与可认证的系统级可信赖性。
contributions: 识别了AI时代自主系统可信赖性设计的关键挑战，包括安全性、可靠性、安全性和认证。
综述了应对这些挑战的新兴方法论、架构和框架，特别是针对学习使能组件的不完美性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述论文，可能缺乏具体实验验证。
所提方法可能尚未在实际系统中充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探讨AI时代自主系统在安全性、可靠性、安全性和认证方面的设计挑战与新兴方法。

papers.title: Machine Unlearning for Class Removal through SISA-based Deep Neural Network Architectures
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of image generation models and other artificial intelligence (AI) systems has intensified concerns regarding data privacy and user consent. As the availability of public datasets declines, major technology companies increasingly rely on proprietary or private user data for model training, raising ethical and legal challenges when users request the deletion of their data after it has influenced a trained model. Machine unlearning seeks to address this issue by enabling the removal of specific data from models without complete retraining. This study investigates a modified SISA (Sharded, Isolated, Sliced, and Aggregated) framework designed to achieve class-level unlearning in Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures. The proposed framework incorporates a reinforced replay mechanism and a gating network to enhance selective forgetting efficiency. Experimental evaluations across multiple image datasets and CNN configurations demonstrate that the modified SISA approach enables effective class unlearning while preserving model performance and reducing retraining overhead. The findings highlight the potential of SISA-based unlearning for deployment in privacy-sensitive AI applications. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/SiamFS/ sisa-class-unlearning.

analysis.tldr: 基于改进SISA框架实现CNN模型中的类别级遗忘，兼顾隐私删除与模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像生成模型等AI系统引发数据隐私担忧，用户要求删除已影响模型训练的数据，但完全重训练成本高昂，亟需高效的机器遗忘方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在深度神经网络中实现类别级别的数据遗忘，避免完全重训练，同时保持模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 改进SISA框架，引入强化重放机制和门控网络，实现CNN中的类别级遗忘。
contributions: 提出一种基于SISA的类别级遗忘框架，包含强化重放机制和门控网络。
在多个图像数据集和CNN配置上验证了方法的有效性，表明能有效遗忘类别并降低重训练开销。
analysis.experiments: 在多个图像数据集和CNN配置上进行实验，评估类别遗忘效果、模型性能保持和重训练开销。
limitations: 可能仅适用于CNN架构，未验证其他模型类型。
门控网络和重放机制可能增加额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于改进SISA框架实现CNN模型中的类别级遗忘，兼顾隐私删除与模型性能。

papers.title: Post-Optimization Adaptive Rank Allocation for LoRA
papers.abstract: Exponential growth in the scale of modern foundation models has led to the widespread adoption of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) as a parameter-efficient fine-tuning technique. However, standard LoRA implementations disregard the varying intrinsic dimensionality of model layers and enforce a uniform rank, leading to parameter redundancy. We propose Post-Optimization Adaptive Rank Allocation (PARA), a data-free compression method for LoRA that integrates seamlessly into existing fine-tuning pipelines. PARA leverages Singular Value Decomposition to prune LoRA ranks using a global threshold over singular values across all layers. This results in non-uniform rank allocation based on layer-wise spectral importance. As a post-hoc method, PARA circumvents the training modifications and resulting instabilities that dynamic architectures typically incur. We empirically demonstrate that PARA reduces parameter count by 75-90\% while preserving the predictive performance of the original, uncompressed LoRA across multiple vision and language benchmarks. Code will be published upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需数据的后优化自适应秩分配方法PARA，通过SVD全局阈值剪枝LoRA秩，在保持性能的同时减少75-90%参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代基础模型规模指数增长，LoRA作为参数高效微调技术被广泛采用，但标准LoRA对所有层使用统一秩，忽略了不同层内在维度的差异，导致参数冗余。
analysis.problem: 解决标准LoRA中统一秩分配导致的参数冗余问题，实现非均匀秩分配以提升参数效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出后优化自适应秩分配方法PARA，利用奇异值分解（SVD）对所有层的奇异值设置全局阈值，剪枝低重要性奇异值对应的秩，实现基于层谱重要性的非均匀秩分配。
contributions: 提出一种无需数据、无需训练修改的后优化秩分配方法PARA，可无缝集成到现有微调流程中。
在多个视觉和语言基准上，PARA在减少75-90%参数的同时保持原始LoRA的预测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视觉和语言基准上验证，参数减少75-90%且性能保持。
limitations: 可能依赖SVD分解的计算开销。
全局阈值的选择可能影响不同任务的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需数据的后优化自适应秩分配方法PARA，通过SVD全局阈值剪枝LoRA秩，在保持性能的同时减少75-90%参数。

papers.title: AgentReputation: A Decentralized Agentic AI Reputation Framework
papers.abstract: Decentralized, agentic AI marketplaces are rapidly emerging to support software engineering tasks such as debugging, patch generation, and security auditing, often operating without centralized oversight. However, existing reputation mechanisms fail in this setting for three fundamental reasons: agents can strategically optimize against evaluation procedures; demonstrated competence does not reliably transfer across heterogeneous task contexts; and verification rigor varies widely, from lightweight automated checks to costly expert review. Current approaches to reputation drawing on federated learning, blockchain-based AI platforms, and large language model safety research are unable to address these challenges in combination. We therefore propose \textbf{AgentReputation}, a decentralized, three-layer reputation framework for agentic AI systems. The framework separates task execution, reputation services, and tamper-proof persistence to both leverage their respective strengths and enable independent evolution. The framework introduces explicit verification regimes linked to agent reputation metadata, as well as context-conditioned reputation cards that prevent reputation conflation across domains and task types. In addition, AgentReputation provides a decision-facing policy engine that supports resource allocation, access control, and adaptive verification escalation based on risk and uncertainty. Building on this framework, we outline several future research directions, including the development of verification ontologies, methods for quantifying verification strength, privacy-preserving evidence mechanisms, cold-start reputation bootstrapping, and defenses against adversarial manipulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个去中心化的三层声誉框架AgentReputation，解决AI Agent在去中心化市场中的声誉评估问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 去中心化AI Agent市场快速兴起，但现有声誉机制无法应对Agent策略性优化、跨任务泛化差和验证成本差异三大挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个去中心化、防操纵、上下文感知的声誉系统，以支持AI Agent在软件工程任务中的可信协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有声誉机制在去中心化场景下失效的三个根本原因：Agent可策略性优化评估、能力跨任务迁移不可靠、验证严格程度差异大。
analysis.method: 提出三层框架：任务执行层、声誉服务层和防篡改持久化层；引入显式验证机制、上下文条件声誉卡和决策策略引擎。
contributions: 提出去中心化三层声誉框架，分离任务执行、声誉服务和持久化，支持独立演进。
引入显式验证机制和上下文条件声誉卡，防止声誉跨域混淆。
设计决策策略引擎，支持基于风险和不确定性的资源分配、访问控制和验证升级。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚未实现和实证验证，仅提出概念和未来方向。
未讨论实际部署中的隐私和效率权衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个去中心化的三层声誉框架AgentReputation，解决AI Agent在去中心化市场中的声誉评估问题。

papers.title: How Generative AI Disrupts Search: An Empirical Study of Google Search, Gemini, and AI Overviews
papers.abstract: Generative AI is being increasingly integrated into web search for the convenience it provides users. In this work, we aim to understand how generative AI disrupts web search by retrieving and presenting the information and sources differently from traditional search engines. We introduce a public benchmark dataset of 11,500 user queries to support our study and future research of generative search. We compare the search results returned by Google's search engine, the accompanying AI Overview (AIO), and Gemini Flash 2.5 for each query. We have made several key findings. First, we find that for 51.5\% of representative, real-user queries, AIOs are generated, and are displayed above the organic search results. Controversial questions frequently result in an AIO. Second, we show that the retrieved sources are substantially different for each search engine (<0.2 average Jaccard similarity). Traditional Google search is significantly more likely to retrieve information from popular or institutional websites in government or education, while generative search engines are significantly more likely to retrieve Google-owned content. Third, we observe that websites that block Google's AI crawler are significantly less likely to be retrieved by AIOs, despite having access to the content. Finally, AIOs are less consistent when processing two runs of the same query, and are less robust to minor query edits. Our findings have important implications for understanding how generative search impacts website visibility, the effectiveness of generative engine optimization techniques, and the information users receive. We call for revenue frameworks to foster a sustainable and mutually beneficial ecosystem for publishers and generative search providers.

analysis.tldr: 生成式AI搜索（如AI Overviews）与传统搜索在来源、可见性和一致性上存在显著差异，且更倾向引用Google自有内容。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI正被整合到网络搜索中，但其对信息检索和呈现方式的颠覆性影响尚不明确，尤其是与传统搜索引擎的差异。
analysis.problem: 量化分析生成式AI搜索（Gemini、AI Overviews）与传统Google搜索在结果来源、网站可见性、一致性和鲁棒性上的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 51.5%的查询会触发AI Overviews，且争议性问题更易触发；生成式搜索与传统搜索的检索来源Jaccard相似度低于0.2；生成式搜索更倾向引用Google自有内容；屏蔽AI爬虫的网站被AI Overviews检索的概率显著降低；AI Overviews对同一查询的两次运行结果一致性较低，且对微小查询编辑的鲁棒性较差。
analysis.method: 构建包含11,500条用户查询的公开基准数据集，对比Google搜索、AI Overviews和Gemini Flash 2.5的搜索结果，分析来源相似性、网站类型分布、爬虫屏蔽影响及一致性。
contributions: 发布了包含11,500条用户查询的公开基准数据集，支持生成式搜索研究。
系统揭示了生成式AI搜索在来源偏好、网站可见性和一致性方面的关键差异。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了基于11,500条查询的对比分析，包括Jaccard相似度、来源类型统计和一致性测试。
limitations: 仅针对Google生态（Google搜索、AIO、Gemini），未涵盖其他搜索引擎。
未深入分析用户行为或长期影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 生成式AI搜索（如AI Overviews）与传统搜索在来源、可见性和一致性上存在显著差异，且更倾向引用Google自有内容。

papers.title: Test Before You Deploy: Governing Updates in the LLM Supply Chain
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used as core dependencies in software systems. However, the hosted LLM services evolve continuously through provider-side updates without explicit version changes. These silent updates can introduce behavioral drift, causing regressions in functionality, formatting, safety constraints, or other application-specific requirements. Existing approaches focus primarily on regression testing or versioning but do not provide deployer-side mechanisms for governing compatibility during opaque model evolution. This paper proposes a deployment-side governance framework based on three components: clearly defined rules for how the model is allowed to behave (production contracts), focused testing organized by deployment risk categories (risk-category-based testing suite), and release checkpoints that block updates unless they meet defined safety and performance standards (compatibility gates). Through exploratory validation across multiple LLM versions, we provide evidence that targeted testing in specific risk areas can uncover performance regressions that overall metrics miss. We also identify several open research challenges, including how to systematically build effective test suites, how to set reliable performance thresholds in non-deterministic systems, and how to detect and explain model drift when providers offer limited transparency. Overall, we frame LLM update management as a software supply chain governance problem and outline a research agenda for putting deployer-side compatibility controls into practice.

analysis.tldr: 提出部署侧治理框架，通过生产合约、风险分类测试和兼容性门控管理LLM无声更新引发的行为漂移。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为软件核心依赖，其托管服务频繁无声更新，导致功能、格式、安全等行为漂移，现有方法缺乏部署侧兼容性治理机制。
analysis.problem: 如何治理LLM供应链中无声更新引发的行为漂移，确保部署侧兼容性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析，但指出整体指标可能掩盖特定风险区域的性能回归。
analysis.method: 提出部署侧治理框架，包含三个组件：生产合约（定义模型允许行为）、风险分类测试套件（按部署风险组织测试）、兼容性门控（阻止未达标更新）。
contributions: 提出LLM更新管理作为软件供应链治理问题的视角
设计部署侧兼容性治理框架（生产合约、风险分类测试、兼容性门控）
通过探索性验证揭示特定风险区域测试能发现整体指标遗漏的性能回归
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及跨多个LLM版本的探索性验证。
limitations: 框架依赖人工定义的生产合约和风险分类，自动化程度有限
非确定性系统中可靠性能阈值的设定仍具挑战
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出部署侧治理框架，通过生产合约、风险分类测试和兼容性门控管理LLM无声更新引发的行为漂移。

papers.title: RuC: HDL-Agnostic Rule Completion Benchmark Generation
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have rapidly improved in performance across code-related tasks, making their integration into Register Transfer Level (RTL) development increasingly attractive. Mimicking the behavior of inline code assistants, many benchmarks evaluate LLMs' capabilities in code completion, either assessing the generation of entire hardware modules or the completion of a single line within a module. However both of these approaches lack the ability to control the granularity of the code-completion sample size and the syntactic range of completions. To overcome these limitations, we present a framework for language-agnostic rule completion (RuC), a grammar-driven, rule-selectable benchmark generator that automatically produces RTL code-completion tasks from a set of input hardware description sources. RuC uses the target Hardware Description Language (HDL) grammar to mask syntactically defined code regions and prompts a model to regenerate them using the surrounding unmasked code as context, enabling a controlled and scalable evaluation of the domain-specific model's code-understanding capabilities, ranging from assignments to the reconstruction of entire logic blocks. We use RuC to generate two SystemVerilog rule-completion benchmarks from the Tiny Tapeout shuttle TT07 and the CVE2 RISC-V core to demonstrate RuC's applicability to a broad range of designs, and conduct a comparative study of the code completion capabilities of modern open-source LLMs across diverse settings. Results indicate that completion performance strongly depends on the model type, the grammatical structure of the masked region, and the prompting strategy. Specifically, the highest scores are obtained with Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) prompting. These findings highlight the value of grammar-driven, arbitrarily granular benchmarks for meaningful evaluation of LLM capabilities in RTL development workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种语法驱动的、与HDL无关的规则补全基准生成框架RuC，用于可控评估LLM在RTL代码补全中的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM代码补全基准要么生成整个硬件模块，要么补全单行，无法控制补全样本的粒度和语法范围，导致评估不够精细和可控。
analysis.problem: 如何生成粒度可控、语法范围可选的RTL代码补全基准，以系统评估LLM在硬件描述语言中的代码理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 补全性能强烈依赖于模型类型、被掩码区域的语法结构以及提示策略，其中Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM)提示获得最高分数。
analysis.method: 提出RuC框架，利用目标HDL语法规则自动生成代码补全任务：从输入硬件描述源码中，根据语法定义掩码代码区域，并提示模型利用周围未掩码代码作为上下文进行重建。
contributions: 提出一种语法驱动的、与HDL无关的规则补全基准生成框架RuC，支持任意粒度的代码补全任务生成。
利用RuC从Tiny Tapeout shuttle TT07和CVE2 RISC-V核生成两个SystemVerilog规则补全基准，并对比评估了多个开源LLM的代码补全能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Tiny Tapeout shuttle TT07和CVE2 RISC-V核上生成基准，对比了多个现代开源LLM在不同设置下的代码补全能力。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对SystemVerilog进行了演示，对其他HDL的适用性有待验证。
未讨论生成基准的覆盖率和代表性是否充分。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种语法驱动的、与HDL无关的规则补全基准生成框架RuC，用于可控评估LLM在RTL代码补全中的能力。

papers.title: WindowsWorld: A Process-Centric Benchmark of Autonomous GUI Agents in Professional Cross-Application Environments
papers.abstract: While GUI agents have shown impressive capabilities in common computer-use tasks such as OSWorld, current benchmarks mainly focus on isolated and single-application tasks. This overlooks a critical real-world requirement of coordinating across multiple applications to accomplish complex profession-specific workflows. To bridge this gap, we present a computer-use benchmark in cross-application workflows, named WindowsWorld, designed to systematically assess GUI Agents on complex multi-step tasks that mirror real-world professional activities. Our methodology uses a multi-agent framework steered by 16 occupations to generate four difficulty-level tasks with intermediate inspection, which are then refined by human review and executed in a simulated environment. The resulting benchmark contains 181 tasks with an average of 5.0 sub-goals across 17 common desktop applications, of which 78% are inherently multi-application. Experimental results of leading large models and agents show that: 1) All computer-use agents perform poorly on multi-application tasks (< 21% success rate), far below the performance of simple single-app tasks; 2) They largely fail at tasks requiring conditional judgment and reasoning across $\geq$ 3 applications, stalling at early sub-goals; 3) Low execution efficiency, where tasks often fail despite far exceeding human step limits. Code, benchmark data, and evaluation resources are available at github.com/HITsz-TMG/WindowsWorld.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨应用GUI智能体基准WindowsWorld，发现现有智能体在多应用任务上成功率极低。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GUI智能体基准主要关注单应用任务，无法评估真实世界中跨应用协调完成复杂专业工作流的能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统评估GUI智能体在跨应用、多步骤专业工作流中表现的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有计算机使用智能体在多应用任务上成功率低于21%，远低于单应用任务；在需要跨≥3个应用的条件判断和推理的任务中早期失败；执行效率低，常因超出人类步数限制而失败。
analysis.method: 基于16种职业的多智能体框架生成四个难度级别的任务，经人工审核并在模拟环境中执行，构建包含181个任务、平均5.0个子目标、78%为多应用的基准。
contributions: 提出WindowsWorld基准，专注于跨应用专业工作流评估。
揭示当前GUI智能体在多应用任务上的严重不足和失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在WindowsWorld上评估了主流大模型和智能体，结果显示多应用任务成功率低于21%，且存在条件推理和执行效率问题。
limitations: 基准任务可能未覆盖所有专业领域。
模拟环境与真实桌面环境可能存在差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨应用GUI智能体基准WindowsWorld，发现现有智能体在多应用任务上成功率极低。

papers.title: Instruction-Guided Poetry Generation in Arabic and Its Dialects
papers.abstract: Poetry has long been a central art form for Arabic speakers, serving as a powerful medium of expression and cultural identity. While modern Arabic speakers continue to value poetry, existing research on Arabic poetry within Large Language Models (LLMs) has primarily focused on analysis tasks such as interpretation or metadata prediction, e.g., rhyme schemes and titles. In contrast, our work addresses the practical aspect of poetry creation in Arabic by introducing controllable generation capabilities to assist users in writing poetry. Specifically, we present a large-scale, carefully curated instruction-based dataset in Modern Standard Arabic (MSA) and various Arabic dialects. This dataset enables tasks such as writing, revising, and continuing poems based on predefined criteria, including style and rhyme, as well as performing poetry analysis. Our experiments show that fine-tuning LLMs on this dataset yields models that can effectively generate poetry that is aligned with user requirements, based on both automated metrics and human evaluation with native Arabic speakers. The data and the code are available at https://github.com/mbzuai-nlp/instructpoet-ar

analysis.tldr: 构建大规模指令数据集，微调LLM实现阿拉伯语及方言诗歌的受控生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿拉伯语诗歌是重要的文化表达形式，但现有LLM研究多聚焦分析任务（如韵律预测），缺乏实用的可控诗歌生成能力。
analysis.problem: 如何实现阿拉伯语（含现代标准阿拉伯语及方言）诗歌的指令引导生成，包括写作、修改、续写及分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建大规模、精心策划的指令数据集（覆盖MSA和多种方言），包含写作、修改、续写等任务，并基于预定义风格和韵律要求；微调LLM以对齐用户需求。
contributions: 首个面向阿拉伯语诗歌可控生成的大规模指令数据集
通过微调LLM实现符合用户要求的诗歌生成，经自动评估和人工评估验证有效性
analysis.experiments: 在自动评估指标和母语者人工评估上验证了微调模型的有效性。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有阿拉伯方言
生成质量可能受限于数据集规模和多样性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建大规模指令数据集，微调LLM实现阿拉伯语及方言诗歌的受控生成。

papers.title: GourNet: A CNN-Based Model for Mango Leaf Disease Detection
papers.abstract: Mango cultivation is crucial in the agricultural sector, significantly contributing to economic development and food security. However, diseases affecting mango leaves can significantly reduce both the production and overall fruit grade. Detecting leaf diseases at an early stage with precision is key to effective disease prevention and sustaining crop productivity. In this paper, we introduce a "deep learning" model named "GourNet", which leverages "Convolutional Neural Networks" to identify infections in mango leaves. We utilize the "MangoLeafBD" (MBD) dataset to train and assess the effectiveness of the presented model. The MBD dataset contains seven disease classes and a Healthy class, making a total of eight classes. To enhance model performance, the images are preprocessed through steps like resizing, rescaling, and data augmentation prior to training. To properly evaluate the model, the dataset is separated into 80% for training, with the remaining 20% equally split between validation and testing. Our model uses only 683,656 total parameters and achieves a classification accuracy of 97%. This research's source code can be found at: https://github.com/ekramalam/GourNet-Repo.

analysis.tldr: GourNet 是一个基于 CNN 的芒果叶病害检测模型，在 MangoLeafBD 数据集上达到 97% 准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 芒果叶病害严重影响产量和果实品质，早期精准检测对病害防控和保障农业生产力至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何利用深度学习模型高效、准确地识别芒果叶片的多种病害类别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 GourNet 模型，基于卷积神经网络，对 MangoLeafBD 数据集图像进行预处理（调整大小、缩放、数据增强），按 80% 训练、10% 验证、10% 测试划分，模型参数量为 683,656。
contributions: 提出了一个轻量级 CNN 模型 GourNet，用于芒果叶病害检测。
在 MangoLeafBD 数据集上实现了 97% 的分类准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在 MangoLeafBD 数据集上评估，包含 8 个类别（7 种病害 + 健康），使用 80% 训练、10% 验证、10% 测试划分，模型参数量 683,656，准确率 97%。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化能力未知。
未与其他方法进行对比实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GourNet 是一个基于 CNN 的芒果叶病害检测模型，在 MangoLeafBD 数据集上达到 97% 准确率。

papers.title: Intent2Tx: Benchmarking LLMs for Translating Natural Language Intents into Ethereum Transactions
papers.abstract: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) offers a transformative interface for Web3, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture the complexity of translating high-level user intents into functionally correct, state-dependent on-chain transactions. We present \textsc{Intent2Tx}, a high-fidelity benchmark featuring 29,921 single-step and 1,575 multi-step instances meticulously derived from 300 days of real-world Ethereum mainnet traces. Unlike prior works that rely on synthetic instructions, \textsc{Intent2Tx} grounds natural language intents in real-world protocol interactions across 11 categories, including diverse long-tail Decentralized Finance (DeFi) primitives. To enable rigorous evaluation, we propose an execution-aware framework that transcends surface-level text matching by employing differential state analysis on forked mainnet environments. Our extensive evaluation of 16 state-of-the-art LLMs reveals that while scaling and retrieval-augmentation enhance logical consistency and parameter precision, current models struggle with out-of-distribution generalization and multi-step planning. Crucially, our execution-based analysis demonstrates that syntactically valid outputs often fail to achieve intended state transitions, highlighting a significant gap in current "reasoning-to-execution" capabilities. \textsc{Intent2Tx} serves as a critical foundation for developing autonomous, reliable agents in intent-centric Web3 ecosystems. Code and data: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Intent2Tx_Bench-97FF .

analysis.tldr: 提出Intent2Tx基准，评估LLM将自然语言意图翻译为以太坊交易的能力，发现当前模型在分布外泛化和多步规划上存在不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准无法捕捉将高层用户意图翻译为功能正确、状态依赖的链上交易的复杂性，缺乏真实世界场景的评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个高保真基准来评估LLM将自然语言意图转换为以太坊交易的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，虽然扩展和检索增强提升了逻辑一致性和参数精度，但当前模型在分布外泛化和多步规划上表现不佳；语法正确的输出往往无法实现预期的状态转换，暴露出推理到执行能力的差距。
analysis.method: 基于300天真实以太坊主网交易记录构建包含29,921个单步和1,575个多步实例的基准，并提出执行感知评估框架，通过分叉主网环境进行差分状态分析。
contributions: 构建了高保真基准Intent2Tx，包含真实世界协议交互的自然语言意图实例。
提出执行感知评估框架，超越表面文本匹配，通过状态差分分析评估交易正确性。
对16个先进LLM进行系统评估，揭示了当前模型在推理到执行能力上的关键差距。
analysis.experiments: 在16个先进LLM上进行了评估，包括单步和多步任务，分析了扩展和检索增强的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖以太坊主网交易，可能不适用于其他区块链或非金融场景。
评估框架依赖分叉主网环境，可能无法完全模拟真实网络条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Intent2Tx基准，评估LLM将自然语言意图翻译为以太坊交易的能力，发现当前模型在分布外泛化和多步规划上存在不足。

papers.title: XekRung Technical Report
papers.abstract: We present XekRung, a frontier large language model for cybersecurity, designed to provide comprehensive security capabilities. To achieve this, we develop diverse data synthesis pipelines tailored to the cybersecurity domain, enabling the scalable construction of high-quality training data and providing a strong foundation for cybersecurity knowledge and understanding. Building on this foundation, we establish a complete training pipeline spanning continued pre-training (CPT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL) to further extend the model's capabilities. We further introduce a multi-dimensional evaluation system to guide the iterative improvement of both domain-specific and general-purpose abilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that XekRung achieves state-of-the-art performance on cybersecurity-specific benchmarks among models of the same scale, while maintaining strong performance on general benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: XekRung是一个面向网络安全的先进大语言模型，通过专用数据合成和完整训练流程实现领域领先性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络安全领域缺乏专门的大语言模型，现有通用模型在安全任务上表现不足，需要构建领域专用的高质量数据和训练方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个在网络安全任务上达到领先水平，同时保持通用能力的大语言模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建网络安全领域的数据合成流水线，采用持续预训练、监督微调和强化学习的完整训练流程，并引入多维度评估系统。
contributions: 提出面向网络安全领域的数据合成流水线，实现高质量训练数据的可扩展构建。
建立包含CPT、SFT和RL的完整训练流程，提升模型领域能力。
引入多维度评估系统，指导领域和通用能力的迭代优化。
analysis.experiments: 在网络安全专用基准上达到同规模模型的最优性能，同时在通用基准上保持强性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据合成策略，泛化性需进一步验证。
评估基准可能未覆盖所有网络安全子领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: XekRung是一个面向网络安全的先进大语言模型，通过专用数据合成和完整训练流程实现领域领先性能。

papers.title: Learning to Reason: Targeted Knowledge Discovery and Fuzzy Logic Update for Robust Image Recognition
papers.abstract: Integrating domain knowledge into deep neural networks is a promising way to improve generalization. Existing methods either encode prior knowledge in the loss function or apply post-processing modules, but both depend on identifying useful symbolic knowledge to integrate. Since such rules are often unavailable in real-world vision tasks, we propose a method for targeted knowledge discovery. We propose a Differentiable Knowledge Unit (DKU) that enables modulating the classifier logits, yielding refined class probabilities. The DKU uses implication rules to represent relationships between task classes and implicit concepts learned entirely from the main task supervision, without requiring concept labels. Concepts are identified by dedicated classifiers, whose probabilities are passed to DKU alongside the primary class probabilities. DKU computes a logic-based adjustment vector via fuzzy inference, which modulates the primary class logits to yield refined class probabilities. When concept classifiers represent concepts that do not support the logical rule structure, the resulting adjustments to the class probabilities do not directly minimize the supervision loss. Consequently, optimizing the supervision loss on these adjusted class probabilities implicitly trains the concept classifiers. We construct the rule base so that bidirectional logical relations connect concepts and classes. We enforce the concepts to be distinct from each other and with respect to the classes. This design enforces a clean supervision signal for concept learning. We evaluate our methods on the PASCAL-VOC, COCO, and MedMNIST datasets. We demonstrate improvement through our knowledge integration across these datasets. We conduct domain generalization and hard-sample ablation studies and find that our implicit knowledge discovery and integration outperforms the baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出可微知识单元(DKU)通过模糊推理隐式发现并整合概念知识，提升图像识别鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 将领域知识集成到深度神经网络中可提升泛化能力，但现有方法依赖人工定义符号规则，在真实视觉任务中难以获取。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖概念标签的情况下，自动发现并整合隐式概念知识以改进分类器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当概念分类器表示的概念不支持逻辑规则结构时，对类概率的调整不会直接最小化监督损失，从而隐式训练概念分类器。
analysis.method: 提出可微知识单元(DKU)，通过模糊推理基于逻辑规则调整分类器logits，概念由专用分类器从主任务监督中隐式学习，无需概念标签。
contributions: 提出一种无需概念标签的隐式知识发现方法，通过可微知识单元(DKU)整合逻辑规则。
设计双向逻辑规则库和概念区分约束，确保概念学习的干净监督信号。
analysis.experiments: 在PASCAL-VOC、COCO和MedMNIST数据集上评估，进行了域泛化和难样本消融实验，表明隐式知识发现与集成优于基线。
limitations: 规则库的构建可能依赖领域知识，扩展性待验证。
隐式概念的可解释性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可微知识单元(DKU)通过模糊推理隐式发现并整合概念知识，提升图像识别鲁棒性。

papers.title: Autonomous Traffic Signal Optimization Using Digital Twin and Agentic AI for Real-Time Decision-Making
papers.abstract: This article outlines a new framework of traffic light optimization through a digital twin of the transport infrastructure, managed by agentic AI to ensure real-time autonomous decisions. The framework relies on physical sensors and edge computing to measure real-time traffic information and simulate traffic flow in a constantly updated digital twin. The traffic light is automatically controlled through the digital twin according to traffic congestion, travel delay and traffic patterns. This approach is implemented as a three-layer system: perception, conceptualization and action. The perception layer receives data on physical systems; the conceptualization layer uses LangChain to process the data; and the action layer links to the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and traffic management APIs to implement optimised traffic signal control algorithms. The results show that the framework minimizes waiting time at traffic lights and positively affects the effectiveness of the entire traffic flow, which is better than the fixed-time and reinforcement learning-based baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于数字孪生和智能体AI的交通信号优化框架，通过三层系统实现实时自主决策，优于固定时间和强化学习基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统交通信号控制方法（如固定时间或强化学习）难以适应实时动态交通流，导致拥堵和延误，亟需更灵活高效的自主决策方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用数字孪生和智能体AI实现交通信号的实时自主优化，以最小化等待时间并提升整体交通流效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建三层系统：感知层通过物理传感器和边缘计算获取实时交通数据；概念化层使用LangChain处理数据；行动层通过模型上下文协议和交通管理API执行优化算法，在数字孪生中模拟并控制信号灯。
contributions: 提出结合数字孪生与智能体AI的交通信号优化框架
设计三层系统架构实现实时自主决策
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到框架在等待时间和交通流效率上优于固定时间和强化学习基线，但未提供具体实验设置或数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量传感器和边缘计算基础设施
未讨论大规模路网或极端交通场景的适应性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于数字孪生和智能体AI的交通信号优化框架，通过三层系统实现实时自主决策，优于固定时间和强化学习基线。

papers.title: Position-Aware Drafting for Inference Acceleration in LLM-Based Generative List-Wise Recommendation
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based generative list-wise recommendation has advanced rapidly, but decoding remains sequential and thus latency-prone. To accelerate inference without changing the target distribution, speculative decoding (SD) uses a small draft model to propose several next tokens at once and a target LLM to verify and accept the longest prefix, skipping multiple steps per round. In generative recommendation, however, each item is represented by multiple semantic-ID tokens, often with separators, and current drafts typically treat these tokens uniformly. This overlooks two practical facts: (i) a token's semantics depend on its within-item slot, and (ii) uncertainty tends to increase with speculation depth. Without modeling these effects, SD's speedups can be limited. We introduce PAD-Rec, Position-Aware Drafting for generative Recommendation, a lightweight module that augments the draft model with two complementary signals. Item position embeddings explicitly encode the within-item slot of each token, strengthening structural awareness. Step position embeddings encode the draft step, allowing the model to adapt to depth-dependent uncertainty and improve proposal quality. To harmonize these signals with base features, we add simple gates: a learnable coefficient for item slots and a context-driven gate for draft steps. The module is trainable, easy to integrate with standard draft models, and adds negligible inference overhead. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets show up to 3.1x wall-clock speedup and about 5% average wall-clock speedup gain over strong SD baselines, while largely preserving recommendation quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出位置感知草稿模块PAD-Rec，通过物品位置嵌入和步长位置嵌入提升推测解码在生成式列表推荐中的加速效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的生成式列表推荐解码顺序执行导致延迟高，现有推测解码方法未考虑推荐场景中令牌的语义位置依赖和深度不确定性，加速效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用令牌的槽位位置和推测深度信息改进草稿模型，提升推测解码在生成式推荐中的推理速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键现象：(i) 令牌的语义依赖于其在物品内的槽位位置；(ii) 推测深度增加时不确定性增大。现有草稿模型未建模这些因素，导致加速有限。
analysis.method: 提出PAD-Rec模块，为草稿模型添加物品位置嵌入（编码令牌的槽位位置）和步长位置嵌入（编码推测步数），并通过可学习门控融合基础特征。
contributions: 提出位置感知草稿模块PAD-Rec，利用物品位置和步长位置信号提升推测解码效率。
在四个真实数据集上实现最高3.1倍加速，平均约5%的加速增益，同时保持推荐质量。
analysis.experiments: 在四个真实数据集上进行实验，与强推测解码基线相比，获得最高3.1倍墙钟加速和约5%平均加速增益，推荐质量基本保持。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于语义ID的生成式推荐场景。
加速增益依赖于草稿模型与目标LLM的匹配程度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出位置感知草稿模块PAD-Rec，通过物品位置嵌入和步长位置嵌入提升推测解码在生成式列表推荐中的加速效果。

papers.title: Consumer Attitudes Towards AI in Digital Health: A Mixed-Methods Survey in Australia
papers.abstract: AI applications are increasingly being introduced into digital health. While technical performance has advanced rapidly, successful deployment mainly depends on consumer attitudes, especially to patient-facing applications. However, most existing research examines consumer attitudes towards healthcare AI at an abstract level rather than in response to concrete artefacts. We report a mixed-methods survey study in Australia (N=275) examining consumer readiness, acceptance, trust, and risk perceptions of healthcare AI, combined with a scenario-based evaluation of an AI-generated versus clinician-written consultation summary. Participants expressed moderate optimism and strong perceived usefulness and ease of use, but also substantial concerns about accuracy, safety, and data use. In the scenario task, the AI-generated summary was strongly preferred for quality, empathy, and overall usefulness, yet identification of the AI summary was near chance. Findings show that consumers judge AI through concrete communication quality and visible human governance, underscoring the need for clinically supervised deployment frameworks beyond technical performance alone.

analysis.tldr: 澳大利亚消费者对医疗AI态度混合：既认可AI生成摘要的质量，又担忧准确性和安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多从抽象层面调查消费者对医疗AI的态度，缺乏对具体AI产物的评估，而实际部署成功取决于消费者对具体应用的接受度。
analysis.problem: 消费者对具体医疗AI应用（如AI生成的咨询摘要）的态度、信任和风险感知如何？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消费者对AI摘要的质量、共情和有用性评价优于医生版本，但识别AI摘要的能力接近随机水平；同时存在对准确性、安全性和数据使用的显著担忧。
analysis.method: 混合方法调查：定量问卷测量消费者准备度、接受度、信任和风险感知，结合场景实验比较AI生成与医生撰写的咨询摘要。
contributions: 提供了澳大利亚消费者对医疗AI态度的实证数据，揭示抽象态度与具体评价之间的差异。
发现消费者通过具体沟通质量和可见的人类治理来判断AI，而非仅凭技术性能。
analysis.experiments: 在澳大利亚进行N=275的混合方法调查，包括问卷和场景实验。摘要未提供具体统计结果。
limitations: 样本仅来自澳大利亚，可能不具全球代表性。
场景实验仅涉及咨询摘要一种应用，结论推广性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 澳大利亚消费者对医疗AI态度混合：既认可AI生成摘要的质量，又担忧准确性和安全性。

papers.title: Why Self-Supervised Encoders Want to Be Normal
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning has achieved remarkable empirical success in learning robust representations without explicit labels, most recently demonstrated within the framework of Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPA). However, a fundamental question remains: what analytical principles drive these encoders toward specific distributional states? In this paper, we demonstrate that the preference for normal distributions in self-supervised encoders is a direct consequence of the Information Bottleneck (IB) principle. By recasting the IB objective as a rate-distortion problem over the predictive manifold, we provide a theoretical basis for why optimal, target-neutral, latent representations should tend towards isotropic Gaussian states. Under this framework, we show that latent representations correspond to soft clustering of inputs sharing similar predictive distributions, organized within a natural simplex structure. This perspective unifies a wide range of existing supervised and less-supervised objectives and provides a principled explanation for commonly used regularization schemes. Furthermore, we derive practical loss objectives that approximate this structure and demonstrate their effectiveness on standard benchmarks. Ultimately, our framework offers a geometric lens to understanding representation collapse and it establishes a mathematical system for regularization strategies to be used to ensure high-entropy, informative embeddings in modern self-supervised models.

analysis.tldr: 自监督编码器偏好正态分布是信息瓶颈原理的直接结果，提供了理论解释和实用损失目标。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督学习虽成功，但缺乏对编码器为何趋向特定分布状态的分析原理，理解这一机制有助于设计更好的正则化策略。
analysis.problem: 解释自监督编码器为何倾向于生成正态分布的潜在表示，并基于此推导实用目标函数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论分析表明潜在表示对应共享相似预测分布的输入的软聚类，并呈现自然单纯形结构。
analysis.method: 将信息瓶颈目标重述为预测流形上的率失真问题，证明最优目标无关表示趋向各向同性高斯分布，并推导近似该结构的实用损失目标。
contributions: 从信息瓶颈原理出发，为自监督编码器偏好正态分布提供了理论依据。
统一了多种监督和弱监督目标，并解释了常用正则化方案。
推导了实用损失目标，在标准基准上验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在标准基准上验证了有效性，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论推导可能依赖于特定假设，实际应用中需验证。
实用损失目标的性能可能受超参数影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自监督编码器偏好正态分布是信息瓶颈原理的直接结果，提供了理论解释和实用损失目标。

papers.title: AgentEconomist: An End-to-end Agentic System Translating Economic Intuitions into Executable Computational Experiments
papers.abstract: A long-standing challenge in economics lies not in the lack of intuition, but in the difficulty of translating intuitive insights into verifiable research. To address this challenge, we introduce AgentEconomist, an end-to-end interactive system designed to translate abstract intuitions into executable computational experiments. Grounded in a domain-specific knowledge base covering over 13,000 high-quality academic papers, the system employs a modular multi-stage architecture. Specifically, the Idea Development Stage generates literature-grounded hypotheses, the Experimental Design Stage configures simulator-aligned experimental parameters and protocols, and the Experimental Execution Stage runs experiments and returns structured analyses. Together, these stages form a human-in-the-loop, iterative workflow that translates economic intuitions into executable computational experiments. Through extensive experiments involving human expert evaluation and large language models (LLMs) as judges, we show that the system generates research ideas with stronger literature grounding and higher novelty and insight than state-of-the-art generic LLMs. Overall, AgentEconomist adopts a human-AI collaboration paradigm that enables researchers to focus on high-level intuitions, while delegating the labor-intensive processes of translation and computational execution to agents.

analysis.tldr: AgentEconomist 是一个将经济学直觉转化为可执行计算实验的端到端智能体系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 经济学研究中长期存在一个挑战：研究者往往有直觉洞察，但难以将其转化为可验证的研究，缺乏从直觉到实验的自动化工具。
analysis.problem: 如何将经济学家的抽象直觉自动转化为文献支撑的假设、实验参数和可执行的计算实验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建模块化多阶段架构：Idea Development Stage 生成文献支撑的假设，Experimental Design Stage 配置实验参数和协议，Experimental Execution Stage 运行实验并返回结构化分析，形成人机协作的迭代工作流。
contributions: 提出 AgentEconomist 系统，实现从经济学直觉到计算实验的端到端自动化翻译。
构建覆盖 13,000+ 高质量论文的领域知识库，并设计多阶段模块化架构。
通过人类专家评估和 LLM 评判，证明系统生成的思路在文献支撑、新颖性和洞察力上优于通用 LLM。
analysis.experiments: 涉及人类专家评估和 LLM 作为评判者的实验，比较 AgentEconomist 与通用 LLM 在思路生成质量上的差异。
limitations: 可能依赖知识库的覆盖范围和更新频率。
实验执行阶段可能受限于模拟器的准确性和可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentEconomist 是一个将经济学直觉转化为可执行计算实验的端到端智能体系统。

papers.title: Iterative Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Medical Question Answering
papers.abstract: Medical retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems typically operate on text chunks extracted from biomedical literature, discarding the rich visual content (tables, figures, structured layouts) of original document pages. We propose MED-VRAG, an iterative multimodal RAG framework that retrieves and reasons over PMC document page images instead of OCR'd text. The system pairs ColQwen2.5 patch-level page embeddings with a sharded MapReduce LLM filter, scaling to ~350K pages while keeping Stage-1 retrieval under 30 ms via an offline coarse-to-fine index (C=8 centroids per page, ANN over centroids, exact two-way scoring on the top-R shortlist). A vision-language model (VLM) then iteratively refines its query and accumulates evidence in a memory bank across up to 3 reasoning rounds, with a single iteration costing ~15.9 s and the full three-round pipeline ~47.8 s on 4xA100. Across four medical QA benchmarks (MedQA, MedMCQA, PubMedQA, MMLU-Med), MEDVRAG reaches 78.6% average accuracy. Under controlled comparison with the same Qwen2.5-VL-32B backbone, retrieval contributes a +5.8 point gain over the no-retrieval baseline; we also note a +1.8 point edge over MedRAG + GPT-4 (76.8%), with the caveat that this is a cross-paper rather than head-to-head comparison. Ablations isolate +1.0 from page-image vs text-chunk retrieval, +1.5 from iteration, and +1.0 from the memory bank.

analysis.tldr: 提出迭代多模态RAG框架MED-VRAG，通过检索PMC文档页面图像而非文本，在医学问答上达到78.6%平均准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学RAG系统仅检索文本块，忽略了文档页面中丰富的视觉内容（表格、图表、结构化布局），限制了问答性能。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用医学文献中的多模态页面图像进行检索增强生成，以提升医学问答的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MED-VRAG框架：使用ColQwen2.5补丁级页面嵌入和分片MapReduce LLM过滤器进行检索，通过离线粗到细索引扩展到约35万页面；视觉语言模型迭代优化查询并在记忆库中累积证据，最多3轮推理。
contributions: 提出迭代多模态RAG框架MED-VRAG，直接检索PMC文档页面图像而非OCR文本。
设计粗到细索引和分片MapReduce过滤器实现高效大规模检索。
在四个医学QA基准上达到78.6%平均准确率，验证了多模态检索和迭代推理的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在MedQA、MedMCQA、PubMedQA、MMLU-Med四个基准上评估，平均准确率78.6%；消融实验显示页面图像检索贡献+1.0，迭代贡献+1.5，记忆库贡献+1.0。
limitations: 跨论文比较而非严格头对头对比。
推理时间较长（三轮约47.8秒）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出迭代多模态RAG框架MED-VRAG，通过检索PMC文档页面图像而非文本，在医学问答上达到78.6%平均准确率。

papers.title: Compliance-Aware Agentic Payments on Stablecoin Rails
papers.abstract: Agentic payment systems extend delegated action to financial transfers, but scaling them on stablecoin rails in regulated settings requires safeguards that remain effective when humans are not continuously in the loop. We present a compliance-aware architecture that combines x402-style, signature-based payment authorisation and relayed execution with programmable compliance embedded as an on-chain guardrail via a policy wrapper and policy manager coordinating modular checks. By enforcing compliance at the point of execution, rather than as a separate off-chain workflow, the approach preserves low-friction settlement when conditions are satisfied, records transaction-linked on-chain attestations, and supports structured resolution when requirements are pending.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种合规感知的智能体支付架构，将合规检查嵌入链上执行过程，实现低摩擦结算与可审计性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在受监管环境中，将智能体支付系统扩展到稳定币轨道时，需要确保人类不在循环中时仍能有效执行合规保障。
analysis.problem: 如何在智能体支付系统中实现可编程合规，既保持低摩擦结算，又能记录链上证明并支持结构化处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合x402风格的签名授权和中继执行，通过策略包装器和策略管理器将可编程合规作为链上护栏嵌入执行点。
contributions: 提出一种合规感知的智能体支付架构，将合规检查嵌入执行点而非分离的链下工作流。
通过链上证明和结构化处理支持合规要求的可审计性和灵活性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定区块链基础设施（如稳定币轨道），泛化性未验证。
合规策略的复杂性和性能开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种合规感知的智能体支付架构，将合规检查嵌入链上执行过程，实现低摩擦结算与可审计性。

papers.title: Physically-Informed Fuzzy Clustering of Vertical Sounding Ionograms
papers.abstract: This paper presents a physically-informed fuzzy clustering of vertical sounding ionograms for automatically separating the ionogram into tracks suitable for further interpretation and determining their optimal number. The model is designed for use not only in conditions where the number of tracks is known, but also in disturbed ionospheric conditions where the number of tracks is preliminary unknown. The method is based on an expectation-maximization algorithm, used for clustering, and on parametrically specified distributions of distances from points to parametrically specified curves. The curves used as track models are close to model tracks in the parabolic ionospheric layer model. The resulting model of each track has six parameters: three standard ones (the critical frequency, the lower boundary of the layer, and its half-width), and three additional ones to take into account possible underlying layer effects. By sequentially increasing the number of tracks and optimizing their parameters, the model finds the optimal number of tracks on the ionogram by minimizing the modified Bayesian information criterion. The Sequential Least Squares Quadratic Programming algorithm is used to find the parameters of a single track. The width of each single track is assumed to be unknown constant found during fitting process. To improve the quality of ionogram clustering, automatic adaptive noise filtering is performed before clustering. This filtering is based on a combination of the DBSCAN and Gaussian Mixture algorithms. Also, to improve clustering quality on an ionosonde without hardware separation of the ordinary and extraordinary components, a preliminary approximate removal of points belonging to the extraordinary mode is performed.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种物理信息引导的模糊聚类方法，自动分离电离层垂直探测图（ionogram）中的轨迹并确定其最优数量。
analysis.research_motivation: 电离层垂直探测图（ionogram）的自动解释对于空间天气监测和通信研究至关重要，但现有方法在扰动电离层条件下（轨迹数量未知）表现不佳，且难以处理噪声和模式重叠问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在未知轨迹数量、存在噪声和异常模式（如额外分量）的情况下，自动将ionogram分离为物理上有意义的轨迹并确定其最优数量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出在扰动电离层条件下轨迹数量未知，且存在底层效应和异常模式（如寻常/非寻常分量）的干扰。
analysis.method: 基于期望最大化（EM）算法进行模糊聚类，使用参数化曲线（基于抛物线电离层模型）作为轨迹模型，每条轨迹由6个参数描述（3个标准参数+3个底层效应参数）。通过逐步增加轨迹数量并优化参数，利用修正贝叶斯信息准则（BIC）确定最优轨迹数。采用序列最小二乘二次规划（SLSQP）优化单轨迹参数，并引入自适应噪声滤波（DBSCAN+高斯混合）和异常模式预去除。
contributions: 提出一种物理信息引导的模糊聚类方法，能够自动分离ionogram中的轨迹并确定其最优数量。
通过参数化轨迹模型（基于抛物线电离层模型）和自适应噪声滤波，提高了在扰动电离层条件下的聚类鲁棒性。
引入修正BIC准则和逐步增加轨迹数量的策略，实现了轨迹数量的自动确定。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖于抛物线电离层模型，可能不适用于非抛物线性状的电离层条件。
自适应噪声滤波和异常模式去除步骤可能引入额外计算开销或误去除。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种物理信息引导的模糊聚类方法，自动分离电离层垂直探测图（ionogram）中的轨迹并确定其最优数量。

papers.title: Auditing Frontier Vision-Language Models for Trustworthy Medical VQA: Grounding Failures, Format Collapse, and Domain Adaptation
papers.abstract: Deploying vision-language models (VLMs) in clinical settings demands auditable behavior under realistic failure conditions, yet the failure landscape of frontier VLMs on specialized medical inputs is poorly characterized. We audit five recent frontier and grounding-aware VLMs (Gemini~2.5~Pro, GPT-5, o3, GLM-4.5V, Qwen~2.5~VL) on Medical VQA along two trust-relevant axes. Perception: all models localize anatomical and pathological targets poorly -- the best model reaches only 0.23 mean IoU and 19.1% Acc@0.5 -- and exhibit clinically dangerous laterality confusion. Pipeline integration: a self-grounding pipeline, where the same model localizes then answers, degrades VQA accuracy for every model -- driven by both inaccurate localization and format-compliance failures under the two-step prompt (parse failure rises to 70%--99% for Gemini and GPT-5 on VQA-RAD). Replacing predicted boxes with ground-truth annotations recovers and improves VQA accuracy, consistent with the failure residing in the perception module rather than in the decomposition itself. These observational findings identify grounding quality as a primary trustworthiness bottleneck in our SLAKE bounding-box setting. As a complementary fine-tuning follow-up, supervised fine-tuning of Qwen~2.5~VL on combined Med-VQA training data attains the highest reported SLAKE open-ended recall (85.5%) among comparable methods, suggesting that the VQA-level gap is tractable with domain adaptation; whether this also closes the perception/trustworthiness bottleneck is left to future work.

analysis.tldr: 审计前沿VLM在医学VQA中的失败模式：定位差、格式崩溃，但领域微调可提升VQA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 在临床部署VLM需要审计其在真实失败条件下的行为，但前沿VLM在专业医学输入上的失败模式尚未被充分刻画。
analysis.problem: 系统审计前沿VLM在医学VQA中的感知和流水线集成失败，并探索领域微调能否缓解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型定位解剖和病理目标差（最佳模型mIoU仅0.23，Acc@0.5仅19.1%），存在临床危险的左右混淆；自定位-回答流水线因定位不准和格式合规失败（Gemini和GPT-5解析失败率达70%-99%）导致VQA准确率下降；用真实框替换预测框可恢复并提升VQA准确率，表明失败在感知模块而非分解本身。
analysis.method: 审计5个前沿VLM在医学VQA上的感知和流水线集成失败，并对Qwen-2.5-VL进行监督微调。
contributions: 揭示了前沿VLM在医学VQA中定位能力差和格式崩溃的失败模式
通过领域微调在SLAKE开放问答上达到最高召回率85.5%
analysis.experiments: 在VQA-RAD和SLAKE数据集上审计5个VLM，并微调Qwen-2.5-VL在组合Med-VQA训练数据上。
limitations: 仅审计了5个模型，可能不全面
领域微调是否同时解决感知/可信瓶颈留待未来工作
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 审计前沿VLM在医学VQA中的失败模式：定位差、格式崩溃，但领域微调可提升VQA性能。

papers.title: Improving Calibration in Test-Time Prompt Tuning for Vision-Language Models via Data-Free Flatness-Aware Prompt Pretraining
papers.abstract: Test-time prompt tuning (TPT) has emerged as a promising technique for enhancing the adaptability of vision-language models by optimizing textual prompts using unlabeled test data. However, prior studies have observed that TPT often produces poorly calibrated models, raising concerns about the reliability of their predictions. Recent works address this issue by incorporating additional regularization terms that constrain model outputs, which improve calibration but often degrade performance. In this work, we reveal that these regularization strategies implicitly encourage optimization toward flatter minima, and that the sharpness of the loss landscape around adapted prompts is a key factor governing calibration quality. Motivated by this observation, we introduce Flatness-aware Prompt Pretraining (FPP), a simple yet effective pretraining framework for TPT that initializes prompts within flatter regions of the loss landscape prior to adaptation. We show that simply replacing the initialization in existing TPT pipelines--without modifying any other components--is sufficient to improve both calibration and performance. Notably, FPP requires no labeled data and incurs no additional computational costs during test-time tuning, making it highly practical for real-world deployment. The code is available at: https://github.com/YonseiML/fpp.

analysis.tldr: 通过平坦性感知的提示预训练，在不增加测试时计算成本的前提下，同时提升视觉-语言模型测试时提示调优的校准性和性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 测试时提示调优（TPT）能提升视觉-语言模型的适应性，但现有方法往往导致模型校准性差，而添加正则项虽能改善校准却常以牺牲性能为代价，因此需要一种不损害性能的校准改进方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不降低性能且不增加测试时计算成本的情况下，改善测试时提示调优的校准性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正则化策略隐式鼓励优化到更平坦的极小值，且损失景观的尖锐度是影响校准质量的关键因素。
analysis.method: 提出平坦性感知提示预训练（FPP），在测试时调优之前将提示初始化到损失景观的平坦区域，仅替换初始化方式而不修改其他组件。
contributions: 揭示了测试时提示调优中校准性与损失景观平坦性的关联。
提出FPP方法，无需标签数据且不增加测试时计算成本，同时提升校准性和性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及代码已开源。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于提示调优的视觉-语言模型。
平坦性预训练的具体实现细节和超参数敏感性未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过平坦性感知的提示预训练，在不增加测试时计算成本的前提下，同时提升视觉-语言模型测试时提示调优的校准性和性能。

papers.title: Knowledge Graph Representations for LLM-Based Policy Compliance Reasoning
papers.abstract: The risks posed by AI features are increasing as they are rapidly integrated into software applications. In response, regulations and standards for safe and secure AI have been proposed. In this paper, we present an agentic framework that constructs knowledge graphs (KGs) from AI policy documents and retrieves policy-relevant information to answer questions. We build KGs from three AI risk-related polices under two ontology schemas, and then evaluate five LLMs on 42 policy QA tasks spanning six reasoning types, from entity lookup to cross-policy inference, using both heuristic scoring and an LLM-as-judge. KG augmentation improves scores for all five models, and an open, LLM-discovered schema matches or exceeds the formal ontology.

analysis.tldr: 利用知识图谱增强LLM对AI政策文档的合规推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: AI功能快速集成到软件中带来风险，需要合规推理，但现有LLM直接处理政策文档效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM准确回答基于AI政策文档的合规性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建AI政策文档的知识图谱，通过检索增强LLM问答。
contributions: 提出基于知识图谱的LLM政策合规推理框架。
构建了42个覆盖六种推理类型的政策QA任务集。
实验表明KG增强提升所有模型性能，且开放本体模式匹配或超越形式本体。
analysis.experiments: 在42个政策QA任务上评估5个LLM，使用启发式评分和LLM-as-judge。
limitations: 仅针对三个AI风险政策，泛化性待验证。
KG构建依赖文档解析质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用知识图谱增强LLM对AI政策文档的合规推理能力。

papers.title: Linguistically Informed Multimodal Fusion for Vietnamese Scene-Text Image Captioning: Dataset, Graph Framework, and Phonological Attention
papers.abstract: Scene-text image captioning requires fusing three information streams -- visual features, OCR-detected text, and linguistic knowledge -- to generate descriptions that faithfully integrate text visible in images. Existing fusion approaches treat text as language-agnostic, which fails for Vietnamese: a tonal language where diacritics alter word meaning, OCR errors are pervasive, and word boundaries are ambiguous. We argue that Vietnamese scene-text captioning demands \textit{linguistically informed multimodal fusion}, where language-specific structural knowledge is explicitly incorporated into the fusion mechanism. Motivated from these insights, we propose \textbf{HSTFG} (Heterogeneous Scene-Text Fusion Graph), a general-purpose graph fusion framework with learned spatial attention bias, and show through topology analysis that cross-modal graph edges are harmful for scene-text fusion. Building on this finding, we design \textbf{PhonoSTFG} (Phonological Scene-Text Fusion Graph) which specializes graph-level fusion for Vietnamese linguistic reasoning. To support evaluation, we introduce \textbf{ViTextCaps}, the first large-scale Vietnamese scene-text captioning dataset (\textbf{15{,}729} images with \textbf{74{,}970} captions), with comprehensive linguistic analysis showing that 52.8\% of the vocabulary is at risk of diacritic collision.

analysis.tldr: 提出越南语场景文本图像描述数据集ViTextCaps和图融合框架HSTFG/PhonoSTFG，利用音韵学注意力机制解决声调语言OCR错误和词边界模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有场景文本图像描述方法将文本视为语言无关，无法处理越南语这类声调语言中变音符号改变词义、OCR错误普遍、词边界模糊等挑战，亟需语言感知的多模态融合。
analysis.problem: 如何为越南语场景文本图像描述设计一种融合视觉、OCR文本和语言结构知识的图融合框架，并构建相应数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过拓扑分析发现跨模态图边对场景文本融合有害；数据集词汇分析显示52.8%的词汇存在变音符号冲突风险。
analysis.method: 提出HSTFG（异构场景文本融合图）通用图融合框架，包含学习到的空间注意力偏置；在此基础上设计PhonoSTFG，专门针对越南语语言推理进行图级融合，引入音韵学注意力机制。
contributions: 提出HSTFG通用图融合框架，并通过拓扑分析揭示跨模态图边对场景文本融合有害。
设计PhonoSTFG，将音韵学知识融入图融合以处理越南语语言特性。
构建ViTextCaps，首个大规模越南语场景文本图像描述数据集（15,729张图像，74,970条描述），并进行了全面的语言学分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖越南语，方法对其他声调语言的泛化性未知。
音韵学注意力机制可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出越南语场景文本图像描述数据集ViTextCaps和图融合框架HSTFG/PhonoSTFG，利用音韵学注意力机制解决声调语言OCR错误和词边界模糊问题。

papers.title: Contextual Agentic Memory is a Memo, Not True Memory
papers.abstract: Current agentic memory systems (vector stores, retrieval-augmented generation, scratchpads, and context-window management) do not implement memory: they implement lookup. We argue that treating lookup as memory is a category error with provable consequences for agent capability, long-term learning, and security. Retrieval generalizes by similarity to stored cases; weight-based memory generalizes by applying abstract rules to inputs never seen before. Conflating the two produces agents that accumulate notes indefinitely without developing expertise, face a provable generalization ceiling on compositionally novel tasks that no increase in context size or retrieval quality can overcome, and are structurally vulnerable to persistent memory poisoning as injected content propagates across all future sessions. Drawing on Complementary Learning Systems theory from neuroscience, we show that biological intelligence solved this problem by pairing fast hippocampal exemplar storage with slow neocortical weight consolidation, and that current AI agents implement only the first half. We formalize these limitations, address four alternative views, and close with a co-existence proposal and a call to action for system builders, benchmark designers, and the memory community.

analysis.tldr: 论文指出当前智能体记忆系统本质是查找而非记忆，导致泛化上限和安全漏洞，并借鉴神经科学互补学习系统理论提出解决方案。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前智能体记忆系统（如向量存储、RAG、上下文窗口管理）被广泛使用，但它们实际上只实现了查找而非真正的记忆，这限制了智能体的长期学习能力、泛化能力和安全性，亟需澄清概念并设计真正的记忆机制。
analysis.problem: 现有智能体记忆系统将查找（lookup）误当作记忆（memory），导致智能体无法通过经验积累形成抽象规则，在组合新颖任务上存在可证明的泛化上限，且易受持久性记忆中毒攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：1) 检索通过相似性泛化，而基于权重的记忆通过抽象规则泛化，两者混淆导致智能体只能积累笔记而无法发展专长；2) 增加上下文大小或检索质量无法克服组合新颖任务的泛化上限；3) 注入的内容会跨会话传播，造成结构性记忆中毒。
analysis.method: 借鉴神经科学中的互补学习系统理论，提出应像生物智能一样，将快速的海马体示例存储与缓慢的新皮层权重巩固相结合，并形式化当前局限，讨论四种替代观点，最后提出共存方案和行动呼吁。
contributions: 明确区分查找与记忆，指出将查找视为记忆是范畴错误，并证明其对智能体能力、长期学习和安全性的影响。
借鉴互补学习系统理论，提出生物智能解决记忆问题的双系统机制，并呼吁系统构建者、基准设计者和记忆社区共同行动。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 论文为理论分析和观点阐述，缺乏实验验证。
提出的共存方案和行动呼吁可能缺乏具体实现细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文指出当前智能体记忆系统本质是查找而非记忆，导致泛化上限和安全漏洞，并借鉴神经科学互补学习系统理论提出解决方案。

papers.title: A generalised pre-training strategy for deep learning networks in semantic segmentation of remotely sensed images
papers.abstract: In the segmentation of remotely sensed images, deep learning models are typically pre-trained using large image databases like ImageNet before fine-tuned on domain-specific datasets.
