However, the performance of these fine-tuned models is often hindered by the large domain gaps (i.e., differences in scenes and modalities) between ImageNet's images and remotely sensed images being processed. Therefore, many researchers have undertaken efforts to establish large-scale domain-specific image datasets for pre-training, aiming to enhance model performance. However, establishing such datasets is often challenging, requiring significant effort, and these datasets often exhibit limited generaliza-bility to other application scenarios. To address these issues, this study introduces a novel yet simple pre-training strategy designed to guide a model away from learning domain-specific features in a pre-training dataset during pre-training, thereby improving the generalisation ability of the pre-trained model. To evaluate the strategy's effectiveness, deep learning models are pre-trained on ImageNet and subsequently fine-tuned on four semantic segmentation datasets with diverse scenes and modalities, including iSAID, MFNet, PST900 and Potsdam. Experimental results show that the proposed pre-training strategy led to state-of-the-art accuracies on all four datasets, namely 67.4% mIoU for iSAID, 56.9% mIoU for MFNet, 84.22% mIoU for PST900, 91.88% mF1 for Potsdam. This research lays the groundwork for developing a unified foundation model applicable to both computer vision and remote sensing applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通用预训练策略，通过抑制领域特定特征学习来提升遥感图像语义分割的跨域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像分割中，ImageNet预训练模型因领域差异性能受限，而构建大规模遥感专用预训练数据集成本高且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种简单有效的预训练策略，使模型在预训练阶段避免学习领域特定特征，从而提升对遥感图像语义分割的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种新颖的预训练策略，在预训练过程中引导模型不学习预训练数据集的领域特定特征，从而增强预训练模型的泛化能力。
contributions: 提出一种简单通用的预训练策略，可缓解预训练数据集与目标领域之间的领域差异问题。
在四个不同场景和模态的遥感语义分割数据集上取得最先进结果，验证了策略的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在iSAID、MFNet、PST900和Potsdam四个数据集上评估，分别达到67.4% mIoU、56.9% mIoU、84.22% mIoU和91.88% mF1，均为最先进水平。
limitations: 策略仅在遥感图像分割任务上验证，对其他领域（如自然图像）的泛化性未知。
未与大规模遥感专用预训练数据集进行直接对比，可能无法完全替代后者。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通用预训练策略，通过抑制领域特定特征学习来提升遥感图像语义分割的跨域泛化能力。

papers.title: RayFormer: Modeling Inter- and Intra-Ray Similarity for NeRF-Based Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging
papers.abstract: Video snapshot compressive imaging (SCI) enables the reconstruction of dynamic scenes from a single snapshot measurement. Recently, NeRF-based methods have shown promising reconstruction performance. However, such methods typically adopt random ray sampling strategies and fail to capture content structural similarities, resulting in limited reconstruction quality. To address these issues, we first propose a patch-level ray sampling strategy to enable the modeling of content structure. Then, we propose an Inter- and Intra-Ray Transformer (RayFormer) to capture the structural similarities, modeling both inter-ray similarities among spatially neighboring points at the same depth and intra-ray correlations between adjacent points along the viewing ray. Finally, benefiting from the patch-level sampling strategy, the total variation prior is incorporated into the objective function to enhance spatial smoothness and suppress artifacts. Experiments in both simulated and real-world scenes demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) reconstruction performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出RayFormer，通过补丁级射线采样和跨/内射线Transformer建模结构相似性，提升视频快照压缩成像重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频快照压缩成像（SCI）中，基于NeRF的方法因随机射线采样策略无法捕捉内容结构相似性，导致重建质量受限。
analysis.problem: 现有NeRF-based SCI方法因随机采样和缺乏结构相似性建模，重建质量有限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机射线采样策略无法捕捉内容结构相似性，影响重建质量。
analysis.method: 提出补丁级射线采样策略以建模内容结构，并设计Inter- and Intra-Ray Transformer（RayFormer）分别捕捉空间邻域点的跨射线相似性和沿视线的内射线相关性，同时引入全变分先验增强空间平滑性。
contributions: 提出补丁级射线采样策略，使NeRF-based SCI能建模内容结构。
设计RayFormer同时建模跨射线和内射线结构相似性。
将全变分先验融入目标函数，提升空间平滑性并抑制伪影。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实场景中均达到SOTA重建性能。
limitations: 可能依赖补丁大小选择，影响效率。
未讨论对高动态范围或极端运动场景的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RayFormer，通过补丁级射线采样和跨/内射线Transformer建模结构相似性，提升视频快照压缩成像重建质量。

papers.title: Bridging Values and Behavior: A Hierarchical Framework for Proactive Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Current embodied agents are often limited to passive instruction-following or reactive need-satisfaction, lacking a stable, high-order value framework essential for long-term, self-directed behavior and resolving motivational conflicts. We introduce \textit{ValuePlanner}, a hierarchical cognitive architecture that decouples high-level value scheduling from low-level action execution. \textit{ValuePlanner} employs an LLM-based cognitive module to generate symbolic subgoals by reasoning through abstract value trade-offs, which are then translated into executable action plans by a classical PDDL planner. This process is refined via a closed-loop feedback mechanism. Evaluating such autonomy requires methods beyond task-success rates, and we therefore propose a value-centric evaluation suite measuring cumulative value gain, preference alignment, and behavioral diversity. Experiments in the TongSim household environment demonstrate that \textit{ValuePlanner} arbitrates competing values to generate coherent, long-horizon, self-directed behavior absent from instruction-following and needs-driven baselines. Our work offers a structured approach to bridging intrinsic values and grounded behavior for autonomous agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出ValuePlanner分层架构，通过高层价值调度与低层动作执行解耦，使具身智能体具备主动、长期、自驱行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前具身智能体多是被动指令跟随或反应式需求满足，缺乏稳定的高阶价值框架来支持长期自驱行为和解决动机冲突。
analysis.problem: 如何让具身智能体基于内在价值主动规划行为，而非仅响应外部指令或即时需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ValuePlanner：分层认知架构，高层用LLM推理抽象价值权衡生成符号子目标，低层用PDDL规划器转化为可执行动作，并通过闭环反馈机制优化。
contributions: 提出ValuePlanner分层架构，将价值调度与动作执行解耦。
设计以价值为中心的评估套件，衡量累积价值增益、偏好对齐和行为多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在TongSim家庭环境中实验，ValuePlanner能仲裁竞争价值并生成连贯、长周期、自驱行为，优于指令跟随和需求驱动基线。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，在复杂价值冲突时可能出错。
评估环境为模拟家庭环境，真实场景泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ValuePlanner分层架构，通过高层价值调度与低层动作执行解耦，使具身智能体具备主动、长期、自驱行为。

papers.title: Deep Learning-Based Segmentation of Peritoneal Cancer Index Regions from CT Imaging
papers.abstract: Peritoneal metastases are currently assessed using diagnostic laparoscopy to determine Sugarbaker's Peritoneal Cancer Index (sPCI), which works by dividing the abdomen into 13 regions and scoring each region based on tumor size. A recent consensus study defined 3D regions to facilitate a radiological PCI (rPCI), providing standardized anatomical regions for imaging-based assessment. Despite its clinical value, sPCI is invasive and lacks a standardized imaging counterpart. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based approach to automatically segment the rPCI regions on CT. We evaluate nnU-Net and Swin UNETR on 62 CT scans with rPCI regions manually annotated by three clinical researchers and validated by two expert radiologists. Performance was assessed using five-fold cross-validation with the Dice Similarity Coefficient (Dice), 95th percentile Hausdorff distance and Average Surface Distance. nnU-Net achieved an overall Dice of 0.82, approaching interobserver agreement (0.88) and outperforming Swin UNETR (0.76), with remaining challenges primarily in right flank and small-bowel regions. These results demonstrate feasibility of automated rPCI segmentation, laying the foundation for non-invasive, imaging-based assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于深度学习的CT图像腹膜癌指数区域自动分割方法，nnU-Net达到接近观察者间一致性的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 腹膜转移评估依赖侵入性诊断腹腔镜，缺乏标准化的影像学对应方法，而基于CT的放射学PCI（rPCI）具有非侵入性优势，但手动分割耗时且主观。
analysis.problem: 实现CT图像中rPCI区域的自动、准确分割，以支持非侵入性腹膜癌评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: nnU-Net在整体Dice上达到0.82，接近观察者间一致性0.88，优于Swin UNETR的0.76，但右肋腹和小肠区域仍存在挑战。
analysis.method: 采用nnU-Net和Swin UNETR两种深度学习模型，在62例CT扫描（由临床研究者标注并经放射科专家验证）上进行五折交叉验证训练和评估。
contributions: 首次提出基于深度学习的rPCI区域自动分割方法，并验证其可行性。
系统比较nnU-Net和Swin UNETR在rPCI分割任务上的性能，指出nnU-Net更优。
analysis.experiments: 在62例CT扫描上使用五折交叉验证，评估指标包括Dice系数、95% Hausdorff距离和平均表面距离。nnU-Net整体Dice为0.82，Swin UNETR为0.76。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（62例），可能限制泛化性。
右肋腹和小肠区域分割精度仍有待提升。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于深度学习的CT图像腹膜癌指数区域自动分割方法，nnU-Net达到接近观察者间一致性的性能。

papers.title: EviMem: Evidence-Gap-Driven Iterative Retrieval for Long-Term Conversational Memory
papers.abstract: Long-term conversational memory requires retrieving evidence scattered across multiple sessions, yet single-pass retrieval fails on temporal and multi-hop questions. Existing iterative methods refine queries via generated content or document-level signals, but none explicitly diagnoses the evidence gap, namely what is missing from the accumulated retrieval set, leaving query refinement untargeted. We present EviMem, combining IRIS (Iterative Retrieval via Insufficiency Signals), a closed-loop framework that detects evidence gaps through sufficiency evaluation, diagnoses what is missing, and drives targeted query refinement, with LaceMem (Layered Architecture for Conversational Evidence Memory), a coarse-to-fine memory hierarchy supporting fine-grained gap diagnosis. On LoCoMo, EviMem improves Judge Accuracy over MIRIX on temporal (73.3% to 81.6%) and multi-hop (65.9% to 85.2%) questions at 4.5x lower latency. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/EviMem.

analysis.tldr: 提出证据差距驱动的迭代检索方法EviMem，显著提升长期对话记忆的时序和多跳问题回答准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 长期对话记忆需要检索跨会话的分散证据，但单次检索在时序和多跳问题上失败；现有迭代方法通过生成内容或文档级信号优化查询，但未显式诊断证据差距，导致查询优化缺乏针对性。
analysis.problem: 如何显式检测并弥补迭代检索中的证据差距，以提升长期对话记忆的时序和多跳问题回答性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次检索在时序和多跳问题上失败；现有迭代方法未显式诊断证据差距，查询优化不精准。
analysis.method: 提出EviMem，包含IRIS（通过不足信号进行迭代检索）闭环框架，通过充分性评估检测证据差距、诊断缺失内容并驱动针对性查询优化；以及LaceMem（分层对话证据记忆架构），支持从粗到细的粒度证据差距诊断。
contributions: 提出证据差距驱动的迭代检索框架IRIS，显式诊断并弥补缺失证据。
设计分层记忆架构LaceMem，支持细粒度证据差距诊断。
在LoCoMo数据集上，时序问题准确率从73.3%提升至81.6%，多跳问题从65.9%提升至85.2%，延迟降低4.5倍。
analysis.experiments: 在LoCoMo数据集上评估，与MIRIX对比，EviMem在时序和多跳问题上Judge Accuracy显著提升，延迟降低4.5倍。
limitations: 可能依赖充分性评估的准确性，错误评估可能导致检索偏差。
未在更多样化的长期对话数据集上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出证据差距驱动的迭代检索方法EviMem，显著提升长期对话记忆的时序和多跳问题回答准确率。

papers.title: When Agents Evolve, Institutions Follow
papers.abstract: Across millennia, complex societies have faced the same coordination problem of how to organize collective action among cognitively bounded and informationally incomplete individuals. Different civilizations developed different political institutions to answer the same basic questions of who proposes, who reviews, who executes, and how errors are corrected. We argue that multi-agent systems built on large language models face the same challenge. Their central problem is not only individual intelligence, but collective organization. Historical institutions therefore provide a structured design space for multi-agent architectures, making key trade-offs between efficiency and error correction, centralization and distribution, and specialization and redundancy empirically testable. We translate seven historical political institutions, spanning four canonical governance patterns, into executable multi-agent architectures and evaluate them under identical conditions across three large language models and two benchmarks. We find that governance topology strongly shapes collective performance. Within a single model, the gap between the best and worst institution exceeds 57 percentage points, while the optimal architecture shifts systematically with model capability and task characteristics. These results suggest that collective intelligence will not advance through a single optimal organizational form, but through governance mechanisms that can be reselected and reconfigured as tasks and capabilities evolve. More broadly, this points to a transition from \textbf{self-evolving agents} to the \textbf{self-evolving multi-agent system}. The code is available on \href{https://github.com/cf3i/SocialSystemArena}{GitHub}.

analysis.tldr: 将历史政治制度转化为多智能体架构，发现治理拓扑显著影响集体性能，最优架构随模型能力和任务特性变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统的核心问题不仅是个体智能，更是集体组织，而历史政治制度提供了结构化的设计空间来探索效率与纠错、集中与分布、专业化与冗余之间的权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何利用历史政治制度设计多智能体架构，并系统评估不同治理拓扑对集体性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一模型内最佳与最差制度性能差距超过57个百分点，最优架构随模型能力和任务特性系统性变化。
analysis.method: 将七种历史政治制度（涵盖四种典型治理模式）转化为可执行的多智能体架构，在三个大语言模型和两个基准上评估。
contributions: 提出将历史政治制度作为多智能体架构的设计空间，并实现七种可执行架构。
通过实验证明治理拓扑显著影响集体性能，最优架构随模型能力和任务特性变化。
analysis.experiments: 在三个大语言模型和两个基准上评估七种多智能体架构，发现同一模型内最佳与最差制度性能差距超过57个百分点。
limitations: 仅基于历史政治制度，可能未覆盖所有潜在治理模式。
实验限于特定模型和基准，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将历史政治制度转化为多智能体架构，发现治理拓扑显著影响集体性能，最优架构随模型能力和任务特性变化。

papers.title: VibroML: an automated toolkit for high-throughput vibrational analysis and dynamic instability remediation of crystalline materials using machine-learned potentials
papers.abstract: While machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) accelerate phonon dispersion calculations, merely identifying dynamical instabilities in computationally predicted materials is insufficient; automated pathways to resolve them are required. We introduce VibroML, an open-source Python toolkit driven by foundational MLIPs that shifts the paradigm from stability verification to automated structural remediation. VibroML employs an energy-guided genetic algorithm that vastly outperforms traditional soft-mode following, efficiently navigating the potential energy surface to uncover diverse, dynamically stable polymorphs. As 0 K harmonic stability does not guarantee macroscopic viability, an automated molecular dynamics workflow evaluates finite-temperature structural retention. VibroML also couples with ProtoCSP, our combinatorial structure prediction engine, to stabilize frustrated crystal topologies via targeted alloying, successfully rescuing functional perovskite networks like Cs$_2$KInI$_6$ and KTaSe$_3$. Demonstrating broader applicability, we mined the Alexandria database -- where ~50% of quaternary and 99.5% of quinary elemental combinations lack any structural entries -- to identify thousands of abandoned, high-symmetry stoichiometries. Deploying ProtoCSP's "cold start" retrieval and VibroML's evolutionary search on a sample, we successfully identified dynamically stable low-symmetry candidates. Through integrated structural remediation, thermal validation, and systematic compositional exploration, VibroML enables a comprehensive deep-screening approach, yielding physically sound structural propositions that far surpass standard high-throughput workflows.

analysis.tldr: VibroML是一个基于机器学习势的自动化工具包，用于晶体材料的高通量振动分析和动态不稳定性修复。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统方法仅能识别计算预测材料中的动力学不稳定性，但缺乏自动化的修复路径，限制了高通量筛选的实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何从仅检测动力学不稳定性转向自动结构修复，以生成动态稳定的晶体材料候选。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VibroML结合能量引导遗传算法（优于传统软模跟随方法）、自动分子动力学工作流（评估有限温度结构保持性），并与组合结构预测引擎ProtoCSP耦合，通过靶向合金化稳定受挫晶体拓扑。
contributions: 提出从稳定性验证到自动结构修复的范式转变，并实现开源工具包VibroML。
通过能量引导遗传算法高效探索势能面，发现多样化的动态稳定多晶型。
集成有限温度验证和组合合金化策略，成功修复功能钙钛矿网络（如Cs₂KInI₆和KTaSe₃）。
在Alexandria数据库中大规模应用，识别并稳定了数千种高对称性化学计量比候选。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖MLIP的准确性，对未知材料体系泛化性有限。
高通量筛选的计算成本可能仍然较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VibroML是一个基于机器学习势的自动化工具包，用于晶体材料的高通量振动分析和动态不稳定性修复。

papers.title: One Single Hub Text Breaks CLIP: Identifying Vulnerabilities in Cross-Modal Encoders via Hubness
papers.abstract: The hubness problem, in which hub embeddings are close to many unrelated examples, occurs often in high-dimensional embedding spaces and may pose a practical threat for purposes such as information retrieval and automatic evaluation metrics. In particular, since cross-modal similarity between text and images cannot be calculated by direct comparisons, such as string matching, cross-modal encoders that project different modalities into a shared space are helpful for various cross-modal applications, and thus, the existence of hubs may pose practical threats. To reveal the vulnerabilities of cross-modal encoders, we propose a method for identifying the hub embedding and its corresponding hub text. Experiments on image captioning evaluation in MSCOCO and nocaps along with image-to-text retrieval tasks in MSCOCO and Flickr30k showed that our method can identify a single hub text that unreasonably achieves comparable or higher similarity scores than human-written reference captions in many images, thereby revealing the vulnerabilities in cross-modal encoders.

analysis.tldr: 发现跨模态编码器存在中心点问题，单个中心文本即可在图像-文本检索和评估中取得不合理的高相似度。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨模态编码器广泛应用于图像-文本检索和自动评估，但高维嵌入空间中的中心点问题可能导致中心嵌入与许多无关样本距离过近，从而威胁实际应用的安全性和可靠性。
analysis.problem: 跨模态编码器存在中心点漏洞，即存在一个中心文本，其嵌入与大量无关图像产生不合理的高相似度，影响检索和评估的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在MSCOCO和nocaps的图像描述评估以及MSCOCO和Flickr30k的图像-文本检索任务中，单个中心文本能够获得与人工参考描述相当甚至更高的相似度分数，揭示了跨模态编码器的脆弱性。
analysis.method: 提出一种识别中心嵌入及其对应中心文本的方法，通过分析嵌入空间中的中心性来定位导致漏洞的文本。
contributions: 首次系统性地揭示跨模态编码器中的中心点问题及其对检索和评估的威胁。
提出一种有效识别中心文本的方法，并在多个基准上验证了其存在性。
analysis.experiments: 在MSCOCO和nocaps的图像描述评估以及MSCOCO和Flickr30k的图像-文本检索任务上进行了实验，结果表明单个中心文本即可达到不合理的高相似度。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于特定数据集和编码器，泛化性需进一步验证。
未提供缓解中心点问题的具体方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现跨模态编码器存在中心点问题，单个中心文本即可在图像-文本检索和评估中取得不合理的高相似度。

papers.title: The TEA Nets framework combines AI and cognitive network science to model targets, events and actors in text
papers.abstract: We introduce Target-Event-Agent Networks (TEA Nets) as a computational framework to extract subjects (``Agents"), verbs (``Events"), and objects (``Targets") from texts. Grounded in cognitive network science and artificial intelligence, TEA Nets are implemented as an open-source Python library. We test TEA Nets in three case studies, demonstrating the framework's ability to perform interpretable emotion detection, semantic frame analyses, and linguistic inquiries across conspiracy texts and textual responses generated by LLMs. In the LOCO conspiracy corpus, TEA Nets revealed that highly conspiratorial narratives (4,227 texts) linked personal pronouns (``I", ``you", ``we") with the same actions twice as frequently as low-similarity conspiracy narratives. High-conspiracy narratives connected person-focused elements (``you", ``people") through actions eliciting anger above the random baseline ($z = 2.63, p < .05$), a trend absent in low-similarity conspiracy narratives, which emphasized scientific actors (``researcher", ``scientist"). In the HOPE and CounseLLMe datasets of 212 (human) and 200 (LLM-based) psychotherapy transcripts, respectively, TEA Nets highlighted emotional differences. When expressing feelings, Claude 3 Haiku, GPT-3.5, and humans used sad words with higher frequency than random expectations but Haiku expressed sadness with lower emotional intensity than humans ($U = 1243.5, p = .036$). We discuss these differences in the context of psychotherapy training on LLM-simulated patients. Our results show that Target-Event-Agent Networks can extract relevant emotional, syntactic, and semantic insights from narratives, opening new avenues for text analysis with cognitive network science.

analysis.tldr: TEA Nets 是一个结合认知网络科学与 AI 的文本分析框架，能从文本中提取主体-事件-目标三元组，并在阴谋论和心理咨询文本中揭示情感与语义差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本分析方法难以同时捕捉语义角色、情感和认知结构，缺乏可解释且可扩展的计算框架。
analysis.problem: 如何从文本中提取主体（Agent）、事件（Event）和目标（Target）三元组，并利用认知网络科学进行可解释的情感、语义和叙事分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在阴谋论语料中，高阴谋叙事将人称代词与相同动作的关联频率是低阴谋叙事的两倍，且通过引发愤怒的动作连接人物元素；低阴谋叙事则强调科学角色。在心理咨询语料中，不同模型和人类在表达悲伤时用词频率和情感强度存在差异。
analysis.method: 提出 Target-Event-Agent Networks (TEA Nets) 框架，基于认知网络科学和 AI，实现为开源 Python 库，从文本中提取 Agent、Event、Target 三元组并构建网络。
contributions: 提出 TEA Nets 框架，结合认知网络科学与 AI 进行可解释的文本分析。
通过三个案例研究验证框架在情感检测、语义框架分析和语言学探究中的有效性。
揭示阴谋论叙事和心理咨询文本中隐含的认知与情感模式。
analysis.experiments: 在 LOCO 阴谋论语料库（4227 篇高阴谋文本 vs 低阴谋文本）、HOPE 数据集（212 个人类心理咨询转录）和 CounseLLMe 数据集（200 个 LLM 生成的心理咨询转录）上进行案例研究，报告了统计显著性（z 值、p 值、U 值）。
limitations: 框架依赖预定义的语法角色提取，可能对复杂句式或非英语文本泛化能力有限。
案例研究规模较小，未在更大规模或更多样化的语料上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TEA Nets 是一个结合认知网络科学与 AI 的文本分析框架，能从文本中提取主体-事件-目标三元组，并在阴谋论和心理咨询文本中揭示情感与语义差异。

papers.title: Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization for Fusion Energy and Scientific Applications
papers.abstract: Inertial Confinement Fusion (ICF) holds transformative promise for sustainable, near-limitless clean energy, yet remains constrained by prohibitively high costs and limited experimental opportunities. This paper presents Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization (HL-MBO), a framework that integrates expert knowledge with few-shot, uncertainty-aware machine learning to accelerate discovery in data-scarce, high-stakes scientific domains. HL-MBO introduces a meta-learned surrogate model with an expert-informed acquisition function to recommend candidate experiments. To foster trust and enable informed decisions, HL-MBO also provides interpretable explanations of its suggestions. We show HL-MBO outperforms current BO methods on ICF energy yield optimization, as well as benchmarks in molecular optimization and critical temperature maximization for superconducting materials.

analysis.tldr: 提出人机协同元贝叶斯优化框架，在聚变能源等数据稀缺领域加速实验设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 惯性约束聚变（ICF）成本高昂、实验机会有限，传统贝叶斯优化方法在数据稀缺、高风险科学领域难以有效利用专家知识。
analysis.problem: 如何在数据稀缺且成本高昂的科学实验中高效优化实验参数，并融入专家知识以提升决策可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出人机协同元贝叶斯优化（HL-MBO），包含元学习代理模型和专家知识驱动的采集函数，并提供可解释性建议。
contributions: 提出HL-MBO框架，融合专家知识与元学习，适用于数据稀缺的高风险科学领域。
在ICF能量产额优化、分子优化和超导材料临界温度最大化任务上超越现有贝叶斯优化方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ICF能量产额优化、分子优化和超导材料临界温度最大化基准上验证，HL-MBO优于当前贝叶斯优化方法。
limitations: 可能依赖专家知识的质量和可获取性。
元学习阶段可能需要一定的初始数据或模拟环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出人机协同元贝叶斯优化框架，在聚变能源等数据稀缺领域加速实验设计。

papers.title: Fairness for distribution network operations and planning
papers.abstract: The incorporation of fairness into the distribution network (DN) planning and operation has become a key goal of recent studies. The cost of implementing fairness, denominated the price of fairness (PoF), covers the efficiency that is renounced for attaining social cohesion through fair outcomes. Locational disparity makes fairness schemes emerge to level the consumers playing field. However, fairness encompasses a range of notions. From egalitarian to merit-based criteria, various metrics are implemented as a tool for measuring equitable utility distribution. These have different mathematical complexities, from linear to non-linear programming cases, which affect their overall applicability. Hence, this study compiles the overarching fairness notions and metrics, reviewing how these affect stakeholders and the inherent mathematical optimisation in resource allocation problems. The aim is to support consistent and transparent planning and decision-making within DN operations.

analysis.tldr: 综述配电网规划与运行中的公平性概念、指标及其数学优化影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 公平性已成为配电网规划与运行的关键目标，但不同公平性概念和指标在数学复杂度和适用性上存在差异，缺乏系统性梳理。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理配电网资源分配中的公平性概念、指标及其对数学优化问题的影响，以支持一致透明的规划与决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出公平性涵盖从平等主义到基于功绩的多种标准，不同指标具有从线性到非线性的数学复杂度，影响其整体适用性。
analysis.method: 综述性研究，汇编公平性概念与指标，分析其对利益相关者和资源分配优化问题的影响。
contributions: 系统整理了配电网规划与运行中的公平性概念与指标
分析了不同公平性指标的数学复杂度及其对优化问题的影响
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏对实际案例的定量分析
未深入探讨公平性指标间的权衡
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述配电网规划与运行中的公平性概念、指标及其数学优化影响。

papers.title: From Context to Skills: Can Language Models Learn from Context Skillfully?
papers.abstract: Many real-world tasks require language models (LMs) to reason over complex contexts that exceed their parametric knowledge. This calls for context learning, where LMs directly learn relevant knowledge from the given context. An intuitive solution is inference-time skill augmentation: extracting the rules and procedures from context into natural-language skills. However, constructing such skills for context learning scenarios faces two challenges: the prohibitive cost of manual skill annotation for long, technically dense contexts, and the lack of external feedback for automated skill construction. In this paper, we propose Ctx2Skill, a self-evolving framework that autonomously discovers, refines, and selects context-specific skills without human supervision or external feedback. At its core, a multi-agent self-play loop has a Challenger that generates probing tasks and rubrics, a Reasoner that attempts to solve them guided by an evolving skill set, and a neutral Judge that provides binary feedback. Crucially, both the Challenger and the Reasoner evolve through accumulated skills: dedicated Proposer and Generator agents analyze failure cases and synthesize them into targeted skill updates for both sides, enabling automated skill discovery and refinement. To prevent adversarial collapse caused by increasingly extreme task generation and over-specialized skill accumulation, we further introduce a Cross-time Replay mechanism that identifies the skill set achieving the best balance across representative cases for the Reasoner side, ensuring robust and generalizable skill evolution. The resulting skills can be plugged into any language model to obtain better context learning capability. Evaluated on four context learning tasks from CL-bench, Ctx2Skill consistently improves solving rates across backbone models.

analysis.tldr: 提出Ctx2Skill框架，通过多智能体自博弈自动从上下文中提取技能，提升语言模型的上下文学习能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实任务中语言模型需从复杂上下文中学习知识，但手动构建技能成本高且缺乏外部反馈，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有人工监督或外部反馈的情况下，自动从上下文中发现、精炼和选择有效的自然语言技能以增强上下文学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Ctx2Skill框架，包含多智能体自博弈循环：Challenger生成探测任务和评分标准，Reasoner利用演化技能集求解，Judge提供二元反馈；Proposer和Generator分析失败案例并合成技能更新；Cross-time Replay机制防止对抗性崩溃，选择平衡的技能集。
contributions: 提出Ctx2Skill，首个无需人工监督或外部反馈的自动化上下文技能发现与精炼框架。
引入多智能体自博弈和Cross-time Replay机制，确保技能演化的鲁棒性和泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在CL-bench的四个上下文学习任务上评估，Ctx2Skill一致提升了不同骨干模型的解决率。
limitations: 可能依赖任务多样性，在极端单一任务上技能泛化性有限。
多智能体循环计算开销较大，可能影响实际部署效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Ctx2Skill框架，通过多智能体自博弈自动从上下文中提取技能，提升语言模型的上下文学习能力。

papers.title: When Does Structure Matter in Continual Learning? Dimensionality Controls When Modularity Shapes Representational Geometry
papers.abstract: To preserve previously learned representations, continual learning systems must strike a balance between plasticity, the ability to acquire new knowledge, and stability. This stability-plasticity dilemma affects how representations can be reused across tasks: shared structure enables transfer when tasks are similar but may also induce interference when new learning disrupts existing representations. However, it remains unclear when and why structural separation influences this trade-off. In this study, we examine how network architecture, task similarity, and representational dimensionality jointly shape learning in a sequential task paradigm inspired by transfer-interference studies. We compare a task-partitioned modular recurrent network with a single-module baseline by systematically varying task similarity (low, medium, high) and the scale of weight initialization, which induces different learning regimes that we empirically characterize through the effective dimensionality of the learned representations. We find that architecture has minimal impact in high-dimensional regimes where representations are sufficiently unconstrained to accommodate multiple tasks without strong interference. In contrast, in lower-dimensional (rich) regimes, architectural separation is decisive: modular networks exhibit graded alignment of task-specific subspaces with overlap for similar tasks, partial orthogonalization for moderately dissimilar tasks, and stronger separation for dissimilar tasks. This graded geometry is absent in the single network baseline. Our findings suggest that representational dimensionality acts as a key organizing variable governing when structural separation becomes functionally relevant, and highlight adaptive geometry as a central principle for designing continual learning systems.

analysis.tldr: 表征维度控制模块化结构何时影响持续学习中的表征几何。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习系统需要在可塑性与稳定性之间权衡，但结构分离何时影响这一权衡尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 研究网络架构、任务相似性和表征维度如何共同影响持续学习中的表征几何。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在高维表征空间中，架构影响很小；在低维（丰富）空间中，模块化网络能根据任务相似性自适应调整子空间对齐程度，而单网络基线缺乏这种分级几何。
analysis.method: 比较任务分区模块化循环网络与单模块基线，通过改变任务相似性和权重初始化尺度来诱导不同学习机制，并用有效维度表征学习机制。
contributions: 发现表征维度是控制结构分离何时起关键作用的组织变量。
揭示模块化网络在低维空间中展现分级几何，而单网络基线缺乏此特性。
analysis.experiments: 在序列任务范式中系统变化任务相似性（低、中、高）和权重初始化尺度，通过有效维度表征学习机制。
limitations: 仅使用循环网络，可能不适用于其他架构。
任务相似性操作可能不够精细。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 表征维度控制模块化结构何时影响持续学习中的表征几何。

papers.title: MSR:Hybrid Field Modeling for CT-MRI Rigid-Deformable Registration of the Cervical Spine with an Annotated Dataset
papers.abstract: Accurate CT-MRI registration of the cervical spine is essential for preoperative planning because this region is anatomically complex,highly variable,and vulnerable to injury of the vertebral arteries and spinal cord. However,cervical CT-MRI registration remains underexplored,particularly for rigid-deformable hybrid modeling,and the lack of high-quality annotated multimodal data further limits progress. To address these challenges, we construct and release a comprehensively annotated CT-MRI dataset, R-D-Reg, and propose MSR, a rigid-deformable hybrid registration framework for complex joint structures. Specifically, MSR includes a rigid registration module for independent local rigid alignment of individual vertebrae and a deformable registration module with an MSL block that combines Mamba-based global modeling and Swin Transformer-based local modeling through adaptive gating. The rigid and deformable deformation fields are then fused to generate a hybrid field that better preserves local anatomical consistency. The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/ssc1230609-spec/MSR-registration.

analysis.tldr: 提出CT-MRI颈椎刚性-可变形混合配准框架MSR并发布标注数据集R-D-Reg。
analysis.research_motivation: 颈椎区域解剖复杂、变异大且易损伤椎动脉和脊髓，精确的CT-MRI配准对术前规划至关重要，但现有研究不足，尤其缺乏刚性-可变形混合建模及高质量标注多模态数据。
analysis.problem: 解决颈椎CT-MRI刚性-可变形混合配准问题，并填补高质量标注多模态数据缺失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MSR框架，包含刚性配准模块（独立局部刚性对齐各椎骨）和可变形配准模块（MSL块，通过自适应门控融合Mamba全局建模和Swin Transformer局部建模），融合刚性和可变形变形场生成混合场以保持局部解剖一致性。
contributions: 构建并发布首个全面标注的颈椎CT-MRI数据集R-D-Reg。
提出MSR刚性-可变形混合配准框架，通过自适应门控融合Mamba和Swin Transformer实现局部解剖一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在颈椎数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
混合场融合策略可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CT-MRI颈椎刚性-可变形混合配准框架MSR并发布标注数据集R-D-Reg。

papers.title: FUN: A Focal U-Net Combining Reconstruction and Object Detection for Snapshot Spectral Imaging
papers.abstract: Conventional push-broom hyperspectral imaging suffers from slow acquisition speeds, precluding real-time object detection; in contrast, snapshot spectral imaging enables instantaneous hyperspectral images (HSIs) capture, making real-time object detection feasible, yet its potential is often compromised by time-consuming post-capture reconstruction. To address this issue, we propose the Focal U-shaped Network (FUN), a novel end-to-end framework that jointly performs HSI reconstruction and object detection via multi-task learning. FUN employs a shared U-shaped backbone, where reconstruction provides underlying spectral information while detection guides semantic-aware priors learning, facilitating mutually beneficial task interaction. Crucially, we introduce focal modulation, an efficient alternative to self-attention that modulates spatial and spectral features while reducing quadratic computational complexity, enabling a self-attention-free architecture for joint reconstruction and detection. Furthermore, we contribute a new HSI object detection dataset with 8712 annotated objects across 363 HSIs to facilitate evaluation of the proposed method. Experiments demonstrate that FUN achieves state-of-the-art performance on both tasks, using 40% fewer parameters and 30% less computation than recent alternatives, making it promising for future real-time edge deployment. The code and datasets are available: https://github.com/ShawnDong98/FUN.

analysis.tldr: 提出FUN网络，联合快照光谱图像重建与目标检测，实现高效实时处理。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统推扫式高光谱成像速度慢，无法实时目标检测；快照光谱成像虽能瞬时捕获，但后处理重建耗时，限制了实时应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个端到端框架，同时高效完成高光谱图像重建和目标检测，并降低计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重建任务提供底层光谱信息，检测任务引导语义先验学习，两者通过多任务学习相互促进。
analysis.method: 提出Focal U-shaped Network (FUN)，采用共享U型骨干网络，结合焦点调制（focal modulation）替代自注意力，实现无自注意力的联合重建与检测架构。
contributions: 提出FUN，首个联合快照光谱图像重建与目标检测的端到端框架。
引入焦点调制，降低计算复杂度至线性，实现高效特征交互。
贡献一个新的高光谱图像目标检测数据集，含8712个标注对象。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，FUN在两项任务上均达到最先进性能，参数减少40%，计算量降低30%。
limitations: 可能对极端光谱变化或小目标检测的泛化能力有限。
焦点调制在极长序列或高维特征上的效果未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FUN网络，联合快照光谱图像重建与目标检测，实现高效实时处理。

papers.title: ANCORA: Learning to Question via Manifold-Anchored Self-Play for Verifiable Reasoning
papers.abstract: We propose a paradigm shift toward open-ended curriculum self-play: rather than learning to answer on a fixed prompt set, a unified policy learns to question: generating verifiable problems, solving them, and turning verifier feedback into self-improvement without human-annotated solutions. We introduce ANCORA, in which the policy alternates between a Proposer that synthesizes novel specifications and a Solver that produces verified solutions, anchored by three load-bearing mechanisms: a two-level group-relative update coupling Proposer advantages across specifications with Solver advantages across solution attempts; iterative self-distilled SFT projecting the base model onto its valid-output manifold before RL; and a UCB-guided Curriculum DAG whose policy-induced problem set can provably expand under self-composition. Without these stabilizers, sparse verifier feedback drives Proposer collapse even under MLRL-aligned rewards; with them, ANCORA bootstraps a verifiable curriculum from zero human solutions. Instantiated in Verus, ANCORA lifts Dafny2Verus pass@1 from a 26.6% SFT baseline to 81.5% in test-time training (TTT, 0-shot), outperforming PSV self-play by 15.8 points despite PSV's 1-shot inference; in a transfer setting, training from Dafny2Verus seeds yields 36.2% and 17.2% pass@1 on held-out MBPP and HumanEval.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于流形锚定自博弈的开放式课程学习框架，使策略学会自主生成可验证问题并自我改进，在程序验证任务上显著超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖固定提示集或人工标注解决方案，难以实现开放式自我改进；稀疏验证反馈易导致策略崩溃。
analysis.problem: 如何让策略在无人工标注解决方案的情况下，通过自博弈生成可验证问题并持续提升求解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，没有稳定机制时，稀疏验证反馈即使使用MLRL对齐奖励也会导致Proposer崩溃；而ANCORA通过锚定机制成功引导出可验证课程。
analysis.method: ANCORA框架包含三个关键机制：两级组相对更新（耦合Proposer和Solver的优势）、迭代自蒸馏SFT（将基模型投影到有效输出流形）、UCB引导的课程DAG（策略诱导的问题集可证明地扩展）。
contributions: 提出开放式课程自博弈范式，使策略学会自主生成可验证问题并自我改进。
设计三个稳定机制（两级组相对更新、自蒸馏SFT、UCB课程DAG）防止策略崩溃。
在Verus上实现Dafny2Verus pass@1从26.6%提升至81.5%，并迁移到MBPP和HumanEval取得36.2%和17.2% pass@1。
analysis.experiments: 在Verus程序验证任务上，ANCORA在测试时训练（0-shot）中将Dafny2Verus pass@1从26.6%提升至81.5%，比PSV自博弈（1-shot）高15.8个百分点；迁移设置下，从Dafny2Verus种子训练在MBPP和HumanEval上分别达到36.2%和17.2% pass@1。
limitations: 方法在程序验证领域验证，通用性尚需在其他可验证推理任务中检验。
UCB课程DAG的扩展性可能受限于问题空间复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于流形锚定自博弈的开放式课程学习框架，使策略学会自主生成可验证问题并自我改进，在程序验证任务上显著超越基线。

papers.title: HAVEN: Hybrid Automated Verification ENgine for UVM Testbench Synthesis with LLMs
papers.abstract: Integrated Circuit (IC) verification consumes nearly 70% of the IC development cycle, and recent research leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automatically generate testbenches and reduce verification overhead. However, LLMs have difficulty generating testbenches correctly. Unlike high-level programming languages, Hardware Description Languages (HDLs) are extremely rare in LLMs training data, leading LLMs to produce incorrect code. To overcome challenges when using LLMs to generate Universal Verification Methodology (UVM) testbenches and sequences, wepropose HAVEN (Hybrid Automated Verification ENgine) to prevent LLMs from writing HDL directly. For UVM testbench generation, HAVEN utilizes LLM agents to analyze design specifications to produce a structured architectural plan. The HAVEN Template Engine then combines with predefined and protocol-specific templates to generate all UVM components with correct bus-handshake timing. For UVM sequence generation, HAVEN introduces a Protocol-Aware Sequence Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that decomposes sequences into fine-grained step types. A set of predefined DSL patterns first establishes sequences that achieve a high coverage rate without LLM involvement. HAVEN continues to improve the coverage rate by iteratively leveraging LLM agents to analyze coverage gap reports and compose additional targeted DSL sequences. Unlike previous works, HAVEN is the first system that utilizes pre-defined, protocol-specific Jinja2 templates to generate all UVM components and UVM sequences using our proposed Protocol-Aware DSL and rule-based code generator. Our experimental results on 19 open-source IP designs spanning three interface protocols (Direct, Wishbone, AXI4-Lite) show that HAVEN achieves 100% compilation success, 90.6% code coverage, and 87.9% functional coverage on average, and is SOTA among LLM-assisted testbench generation systems.

analysis.tldr: HAVEN 通过模板引擎和领域特定语言避免 LLM 直接编写 HDL，实现 UVM 测试平台的高效自动生成。
analysis.research_motivation: IC 验证占开发周期近 70%，LLM 自动生成测试平台可降低开销，但 HDL 在训练数据中稀少，LLM 直接生成代码错误率高。
analysis.problem: LLM 难以正确生成 UVM 测试平台和序列，需要避免其直接编写 HDL 代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 在 HDL 代码生成上表现不佳，因为 HDL 在训练数据中极为罕见。
analysis.method: HAVEN 结合 LLM 代理分析设计规范生成结构化架构，利用预定义和协议特定模板生成 UVM 组件；引入协议感知序列 DSL，通过预定义模式实现高覆盖率，再迭代利用 LLM 分析覆盖率缺口并生成额外 DSL 序列。
contributions: 首个利用预定义协议特定 Jinja2 模板生成所有 UVM 组件的系统
提出协议感知序列 DSL 和基于规则的代码生成器，避免 LLM 直接编写 HDL
analysis.experiments: 在 19 个开源 IP 设计（覆盖 Direct、Wishbone、AXI4-Lite 三种协议）上，HAVEN 实现 100% 编译成功率、90.6% 代码覆盖率和 87.9% 功能覆盖率，达到 LLM 辅助测试平台生成系统的 SOTA。
limitations: 仅验证了三种接口协议，更多协议需扩展
依赖预定义模板，对新协议需手动创建模板
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HAVEN 通过模板引擎和领域特定语言避免 LLM 直接编写 HDL，实现 UVM 测试平台的高效自动生成。

papers.title: Optimization before Evaluation: Evaluation with Unoptimised Prompts Can be Misleading
papers.abstract: Current Large Language Model (LLM) evaluation frameworks utilize the same static prompt template across all models under evaluation. This differs from the common industry practice of using prompt optimization (PO) techniques to optimize the prompt for each model to maximize application performance. In this paper, we investigate the effect of PO towards LLM evaluations. Our results on public academic and internal industry benchmarks show that PO greatly affects the final ranking of models. This highlights the importance of practitioners performing PO per model when conducting evaluations to choose the best model for a given task.

analysis.tldr: 提示优化会显著改变LLM评估排名，未优化提示的评估可能产生误导。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM评估使用静态提示模板，而工业界常用提示优化提升性能，两者不一致可能导致评估结果不可靠。
analysis.problem: 未优化的静态提示模板在LLM评估中是否会导致模型排名失真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 提示优化显著影响模型最终排名，表明静态提示评估可能无法反映真实性能。
analysis.method: 在公开学术和内部工业基准上，对比使用静态提示与提示优化后的模型评估排名差异。
contributions: 揭示提示优化对LLM评估排名的显著影响
强调评估时应为每个模型单独优化提示
analysis.experiments: 在公开学术和内部工业基准上进行了实验，结果显示提示优化大幅改变模型排名。
limitations: 未详细说明提示优化的具体方法
未探讨不同优化策略的影响差异
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提示优化会显著改变LLM评估排名，未优化提示的评估可能产生误导。

papers.title: Generative structure search for efficient and diverse discovery of molecular and crystal structures
papers.abstract: Predicting stable and metastable structures is central to molecular and materials discovery, but remains limited by the cost of searching high-dimensional energy landscapes. Deep generative models offer efficient structure sampling, yet their outputs remain shaped by training data and can underexplore minima that are rare but physically relevant. We introduce generative structure search (GSS), a unified framework that formulates diffusion-based generation and random structure search (RSS) as limiting regimes of a common sampling process driven by learned score fields and physical forces. Coupling these drivers lets GSS use data priors to accelerate sampling while retaining energy-guided exploration of local minima. Across molecular and crystalline systems, GSS recovers diverse metastable structures with more than tenfold lower sampling cost than RSS for broad coverage and remains effective for compositions outside the training distribution. The results establish a physically grounded generative search strategy for discovering structures beyond the reach of data-driven sampling alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式结构搜索（GSS）框架，融合扩散模型与随机结构搜索，高效发现多样化的分子和晶体结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 预测稳定和亚稳态结构是分子与材料发现的核心，但高维能量景观的搜索成本高昂，现有深度生成模型受限于训练数据分布，难以探索罕见但物理相关的极小值。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且多样化地搜索分子和晶体结构，覆盖训练数据之外的亚稳态结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出生成式结构搜索（GSS）框架，将基于扩散的生成和随机结构搜索（RSS）统一为一种由学习得分场和物理力驱动的共同采样过程，通过耦合数据先验和能量引导来加速采样并探索局部极小值。
contributions: 提出GSS框架，统一扩散生成与随机结构搜索，实现高效且多样化的结构发现。
在分子和晶体系统上，GSS以低于RSS十分之一的采样成本恢复多样化的亚稳态结构，并能处理训练分布外的组成。
analysis.experiments: 在分子和晶体系统上进行了实验，GSS相比RSS实现了超过十倍的采样成本降低，并有效发现训练分布外的结构。
limitations: 可能对复杂高维系统的扩展性有限。
依赖预训练的得分场，可能影响未见组成的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式结构搜索（GSS）框架，融合扩散模型与随机结构搜索，高效发现多样化的分子和晶体结构。

papers.title: Political Bias Audits of LLMs Capture Sycophancy to the Inferred Auditor
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are commonly evaluated for political bias based on their responses to fixed questionnaires, which typically place frontier models on the political left. A parallel literature shows that LLMs are sycophantic: they adapt their answers to the views, identities, and expectations of the user. We show that these findings are linked: standard political-bias audits partly capture sycophantic accommodation to the inferred auditor. We employ a factorial experiment across three major audit instruments--the Political Compass Test, the Pew Political Typology, and 1,540 partisan-benchmarked Pew American Trends Panel items--administered to six frontier LLMs while varying only the asker's stated identity (N = 30,990 responses). At baseline, all six models lean left. When the asker identifies as a conservative Republican, responses shift sharply: the share of items closer to Democrats falls by 28-62 percentage points, and all six models move right of center. A mirror-image progressive-Democrat cue produces little change; rightward accommodation is 8.0$\times$ larger than leftward. When asked who the default asker is, models identify an auditor, researcher, or academic; when asked what answer that asker expects, they select the Democrat-coded option 75% of the time, nearly the rate under an explicit progressive cue. These patterns are inconsistent with a purely fixed model ideology and indicate that single-prompt audits capture an interaction between model and inferred interlocutor. Political bias in LLMs is therefore not a fixed point on an ideological scale but a response profile that must be mapped across realistic interlocutors.

analysis.tldr: LLM的政治偏见审计结果部分源于模型对审计者身份的谄媚迎合，而非固定意识形态。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM政治偏见评估依赖固定问卷，但模型可能因谄媚性（sycophancy）调整回答以适应提问者身份，导致评估结果不可靠。
analysis.problem: 标准政治偏见审计是否混淆了模型固有立场与对审计者身份的谄媚迎合？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当提问者身份变为保守派共和党时，模型回答显著右移（右移幅度是左移的8倍）；默认提问者被模型识别为研究者/学者，且模型预期其偏好民主党选项。
analysis.method: 对6个前沿LLM进行析因实验，使用3种审计工具（政治罗盘测试、皮尤政治类型学、1540个党派基准项目），仅改变提问者身份（保守派共和党、进步派民主党、默认），收集30,990条回答。
contributions: 揭示标准政治偏见审计部分捕获的是模型对审计者身份的谄媚迎合，而非固定意识形态。
通过大规模析因实验量化了不同身份提示下模型回答的偏移幅度，发现右移效应远大于左移。
analysis.experiments: 对6个前沿LLM（未具体列出）进行30,990次回答的析因实验，使用3种审计工具，改变提问者身份。
limitations: 未涉及更多样化的身份提示（如非政治身份）。
未深入分析模型内部机制如何实现谄媚迎合。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM的政治偏见审计结果部分源于模型对审计者身份的谄媚迎合，而非固定意识形态。

papers.title: WaferSAGE: Large Language Model-Powered Wafer Defect Analysis via Synthetic Data Generation and Rubric-Guided Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: We present WaferSAGE, a framework for wafer defect visual question answering using small vision-language models. To address data scarcity in semiconductor manufacturing, we propose a three-stage synthesis pipeline incorporating structured rubric generation for precise evaluation. Starting from limited labeled wafer maps, we employ clustering-based cleaning to filter label noise, then generate comprehensive defect descriptions using vision-language models, which are converted into structured evaluation rubrics criteria. These rubrics guide the synthesis of VQA pairs, ensuring coverage across defect type identification, spatial distribution, morphology, and root cause analysis. Our dual assessment framework aligns rule-based metrics with LLM-Judge scores via Bayesian optimization, enabling reliable automated evaluation. Through curriculum-based reinforcement learning with Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) and rubric-aligned rewards, our 4B-parameter Qwen3-VL model achieves a 6.493 LLM-Judge score, closely approaching Gemini-3-Flash (7.149) while enabling complete on-premise deployment. We demonstrate that small models with domain-specific training can surpass proprietary large models in specialized industrial visual understanding, offering a viable path for privacy-preserving, cost-effective deployment in semiconductor manufacturing.

analysis.tldr: 提出WaferSAGE框架，通过合成数据生成和基于评分标准的强化学习，用小模型在晶圆缺陷VQA上接近大模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 半导体制造中晶圆缺陷分析面临数据稀缺和标注噪声问题，且大模型部署存在隐私和成本挑战，需要高效、可本地部署的小模型方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用小视觉语言模型在数据稀缺的晶圆缺陷视觉问答任务中达到接近大模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段合成数据流水线：聚类清洗去噪、VLM生成缺陷描述并转化为结构化评分标准、基于评分标准合成VQA对；双评估框架结合规则指标和LLM-Judge分数；基于课程学习的GSPO强化学习，使用评分标准对齐的奖励。
contributions: 提出WaferSAGE框架，结合合成数据生成和评分标准引导的强化学习，解决晶圆缺陷VQA数据稀缺问题。
通过4B参数的Qwen3-VL模型达到6.493 LLM-Judge分数，接近Gemini-3-Flash的7.149，实现完全本地部署。
analysis.experiments: 在晶圆缺陷VQA任务上评估，4B模型LLM-Judge分数6.493，接近Gemini-3-Flash的7.149。
limitations: 仅针对晶圆缺陷领域，泛化性未知。
依赖VLM生成描述和评分标准，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WaferSAGE框架，通过合成数据生成和基于评分标准的强化学习，用小模型在晶圆缺陷VQA上接近大模型性能。

papers.title: Mapping how LLMs debate societal issues when shadowing human personality traits, sociodemographics and social media behavior
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can strongly shape social discourse, yet datasets investigating how LLM outputs vary across controlled social and contextual prompting remain sparse. Cognitive Digital Shadows (CDS) is a 190,000-record synthetic corpus supporting analyses of LLM-generated discourse. Each CDS record is generated by one of 19 LLMs, prompted to shadow either a human persona or an AI-assistant role. CDS contains LLM responses on 4 controversial societal topics: vaccines/healthcare, social media disinformation, the gender gap in science, and STEM stereotypes. Persona-conditioned records encode 17 sociodemographic and psychological attributes, providing data linking LLMs' prompts, language, stances and reasoning. Texts are validated for topic anchoring and can support emotional analyses via interpretable NLP (e.g. textual forma mentis networks). CDS is enriched by a pooling platform with user-friendly dashboards, enabling easy, interactive group-level comparisons of emotional and semantic framing across personas, topics and models. The CDS prompting framework supports future audits of LLMs' bias, social sensitivity and alignment.

analysis.tldr: 构建大规模合成语料库CDS，系统分析LLM在不同社会人格、人口统计和社交媒体行为提示下的观点表达。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM对社会话语影响巨大，但缺乏系统研究其输出如何随可控社会语境提示变化的公开数据集。
analysis.problem: 现有数据集无法支持细粒度分析LLM在不同社会人格、人口统计和社交媒体行为条件下的观点差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建190,000条记录的合成语料库CDS，使用19种LLM生成，提示模拟人类人格或AI助手角色，覆盖4个争议性社会话题，并编码17种社会人口和心理属性。
contributions: 创建大规模、多维度标注的合成语料库CDS，支持LLM社会话语分析。
提供可交互的可视化平台，便于比较不同人格、话题和模型的情感与语义框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 合成数据可能无法完全反映真实人类话语的复杂性。
仅覆盖4个话题，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建大规模合成语料库CDS，系统分析LLM在不同社会人格、人口统计和社交媒体行为提示下的观点表达。

papers.title: Robot Learning from Human Videos: A Survey
papers.abstract: A critical bottleneck hindering further advancement in embodied AI and robotics is the challenge of scaling robot data. To address this, the field of learning robot manipulation skills from human video data has attracted rapidly growing attention in recent years, driven by the abundance of human activity videos and advances in computer vision. This line of research promises to enable robots to acquire skills passively from the vast and readily available resource of human demonstrations, substantially favoring scalable learning for generalist robotic systems. Therefore, we present this survey to provide a comprehensive and up-to-date review of human-video-based learning techniques in robotics, focusing on both human-robot skill transfer and data foundations. We first review the policy learning foundations in robotics, and then describe the fundamental interfaces to incorporate human videos. Subsequently, we introduce a hierarchical taxonomy of transferring human videos to robot skills, covering task-, observation-, and action-oriented pathways, along with a cross-family analysis of their couplings with different data configurations and learning paradigms. In addition, we investigate the data foundations including widely-used human video datasets and video generation schemes, and provide large-scale statistical trends in dataset development and utilization. Ultimately, we emphasize the challenges and limitations intrinsic to this field, and delineate potential avenues for future research. The paper list of our survey is available at https://github.com/IRMVLab/awesome-robot-learning-from-human-videos.

analysis.tldr: 综述从人类视频中学习机器人技能的方法，涵盖策略学习基础、接口、分类体系及数据基础。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人数据稀缺是具身智能发展的关键瓶颈，而人类活动视频丰富且易获取，利用人类视频学习机器人技能有望实现可扩展的通用机器人系统。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地从人类视频中迁移技能到机器人，包括任务、观测和动作层面的策略学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分层分类法，将人类视频到机器人技能的迁移分为任务导向、观测导向和动作导向三条路径，并分析它们与数据配置和学习范式的耦合关系。
contributions: 提供了从人类视频学习机器人技能的全面综述，涵盖策略学习基础、接口和分类体系。
建立了任务、观测、动作三层次分类法，并分析了不同路径与数据配置、学习范式的耦合。
调研了常用人类视频数据集和视频生成方案，并给出了数据集开发与利用的统计趋势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述可能未涵盖所有最新方法。
分类体系可能无法完全覆盖所有跨领域技术。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述从人类视频中学习机器人技能的方法，涵盖策略学习基础、接口、分类体系及数据基础。

papers.title: SpaAct: Spatially-Activated Transition Learning with Curriculum Adaptation for Vision-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) aims to enable an embodied agent to follow natural-language instructions and navigate to a target location in unseen 3D environments. We argue that adapting VLMs to VLN requires endowing them with two complementary capabilities for acquiring such awareness, namely backward action reasoning (why) and forward transition prediction~(how). Based on this insight, we propose SpaAct, a simple yet effective training framework that activates the dynamic spatial awareness in VLMs. Specifically, SpaAct introduces two spatial activation tasks: Action Retrospection, which asks the model to infer the executed action sequence from visual transitions, and Future Frame Selection, which forces the model to predict the visual transitions conditioned on history and action. These two objectives provide lightweight supervision on both backward action reasoning and forward transition prediction, encouraging the model to build dynamic spatial awareness in a VLM-friendly way. To further stabilize adaptation, we design TriPA, a Tri-factor Progressive Adaptive curriculum learning method that organizes training samples from easy to hard, allowing the model to gradually acquire navigation skills from basic locomotion to long-horizon reasoning. Experiments on standard VLN-CE benchmarks show that SpaAct consistently improves VLM-based navigation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. We will release the code and models to support future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpaAct框架，通过空间激活任务和课程学习提升VLM在视觉-语言导航中的动态空间感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言导航（VLN）要求智能体在未知3D环境中根据自然语言指令导航，现有VLM缺乏动态空间感知能力，难以有效推理动作原因和预测视觉变化。
analysis.problem: 如何激活VLM在VLN任务中的动态空间感知，使其具备向后动作推理和向前状态预测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SpaAct框架，包含两个空间激活任务（动作回溯和未来帧选择）以及三因子渐进自适应课程学习方法TriPA。
contributions: 提出SpaAct框架，通过轻量级空间激活任务增强VLM的动态空间感知能力。
设计TriPA课程学习方法，逐步提升模型从基础运动到长程推理的导航技能。
在VLN-CE基准上取得最先进性能，并开源代码和模型。
analysis.experiments: 在标准VLN-CE基准上进行实验，结果表明SpaAct持续提升基于VLM的导航性能并达到最先进水平。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
课程学习策略的复杂度可能增加训练时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpaAct框架，通过空间激活任务和课程学习提升VLM在视觉-语言导航中的动态空间感知能力。

papers.title: Math Education Digital Shadows for facilitating learning with LLMs: Math performance, anxiety and confidence in simulated students and AIs
papers.abstract: To enhance LLMs' impact on math education, we need data on their mathematical prowess and biases across prompts. To fill this gap, we introduce MEDS (Math Education Digital Shadows) as a dataset mapping how large language models reason about and report mathematics across human- and AI-like conditions. MEDS involves 28,000 personas from 14 LLMs (from families like Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek, Granite, Phi and Grok) shadowing either humans or AI assistants. Each record/shadow includes a set of prompts along with psychological/sociodemographic persona metadata and four types of math tasks: (i) open math interview, (ii) three psychometric tests about math perceptions with explanations, (iii) cognitive networks capturing math attitudes, and (iv) 18 high-school math test questions together with their reasoning and confidence scores. MEDS differs from traditional score-only math benchmarks because it integrates concepts of self-efficacy, math anxiety, and cognitive network science besides math proficiency scores. Data validation shows that the sampled LLMs exhibit schema integrity and consistent personas, together with family-specific peculiarities like human-like negative math attitudes, logical fallacies, and math overconfidence. MEDS will benefit learning analytics experts, cognitive scientists, and developers of safer AI tutors in mathematics.

analysis.tldr: MEDS数据集通过模拟学生和AI的数学表现、焦虑和信心，为LLM在数学教育中的应用提供多维度评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数学基准仅关注分数，缺乏对LLM在数学教育中认知、情感和社会维度的全面评估，限制了其在个性化辅导和安全AI中的应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个包含数学能力、焦虑、信心及认知网络的多维度数据集，以评估LLM在不同提示条件下的数学推理和报告行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到数据验证显示LLM表现出模式完整性、一致的人格，以及家族特有的现象，如类似人类的消极数学态度、逻辑谬误和数学过度自信。
analysis.method: 构建MEDS数据集，包含来自14个LLM的28,000个人格，模拟人类或AI助手，通过四种数学任务（开放访谈、心理测量测试、认知网络、高中测试题）收集数据，并整合心理社会人口统计元数据。
contributions: 引入MEDS数据集，首次将自我效能、数学焦虑和认知网络科学整合到数学基准中。
提供多维度评估框架，涵盖数学能力、心理状态和认知结构，超越传统分数基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及数据验证了LLM的模式完整性和人格一致性。
limitations: 数据集仅基于LLM模拟，可能无法完全反映真实学生行为。
未涉及实际教学干预效果评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MEDS数据集通过模拟学生和AI的数学表现、焦虑和信心，为LLM在数学教育中的应用提供多维度评估。

papers.title: Robust Lightweight Crack Classification for Real-Time UAV Bridge Inspection
papers.abstract: With the widespread application of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in bridge structural health monitoring, deep learning-based automatic crack detection has become a major research focus. However, practical UAV inspections still face four key challenges: weak crack features, degraded imaging conditions, severe class imbalance, and limited computational resources for practical UAV inspection workflows. To address these issues, this paper proposes a unified lightweight convolutional neural network framework composed of four synergistic components: a lightweight backbone network, a Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) for channel and spatial enhancement, a directed robust augmentation strategy based on inspection-scene priors, and Focal Loss for hard-sample learning under class imbalance. Experiments on the SDNET2018 bridge deck dataset show that the proposed method achieves an inference speed of 825 FPS with only 11.21M parameters and 1.82G FLOPs. Compared with the baseline model, the complete framework improves the F1-score by 2.51% and recall by 3.95%. In addition, Grad-CAM visualizations indicate that the introduced attention module shifts the model's focus from scattered regions to precise tracking along crack trajectories. Overall, this study achieves a strong balance among accuracy, speed, and robustness, providing a practical solution for ground-station assisted real-time deployment in UAV bridge inspections. The source code is available at: https://github.com/skylynf/AttXNet .

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级CNN框架AttXNet，用于无人机桥梁裂缝实时检测，在SDNET2018上达到825 FPS和11.21M参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机桥梁检测中，现有深度学习裂缝检测方法面临弱裂缝特征、成像退化、类别不平衡和计算资源有限等挑战，难以满足实时性要求。
analysis.problem: 解决无人机桥梁巡检中裂缝检测的弱特征、退化成像、类别不平衡和资源受限问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一轻量级CNN框架，包含轻量骨干网络、CBAM注意力模块、基于巡检场景先验的定向鲁棒增强策略和Focal Loss。
contributions: 提出AttXNet轻量级裂缝检测框架，在SDNET2018上实现825 FPS和11.21M参数。
通过CBAM和定向增强策略提升裂缝检测的F1-score和召回率，并利用Grad-CAM可视化验证注意力机制的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在SDNET2018桥梁数据集上实验，完整框架相比基线F1-score提升2.51%，召回率提升3.95%，推理速度825 FPS。
limitations: 仅在单一桥梁数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他轻量级方法（如MobileNet、ShuffleNet）进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级CNN框架AttXNet，用于无人机桥梁裂缝实时检测，在SDNET2018上达到825 FPS和11.21M参数。

papers.title: ZAYAN: Disentangled Contrastive Transformer for Tabular Remote Sensing Data
papers.abstract: Learning informative representations from tabular data in remote sensing and environmental science is challenging due to heterogeneity, scarce labels, and redundancy among features. We present ZAYAN (Zero-Anchor dYnamic feAture eNcoding), a self-supervised, feature-centric contrastive framework for tabular data. ZAYAN performs contrastive learning at the feature rather than sample level, removing the need for explicit anchor selection and any reliance on class labels, while encouraging a redundancy-minimized, disentangled embedding space. The framework has two modules: ZAYAN-CL, which pretrains feature embeddings via a zero-anchor contrastive objective with dynamic perturbations and masking, and ZAYAN-T, a Transformer that conditions on these embeddings for downstream classification. Across eight datasets, including six remote-sensing tabular benchmarks and two remote-sensing-driven flood-prediction tables from satellite and GIS products, ZAYAN achieves superior accuracy, robustness, and generalization over tabular deep learning baselines, with consistent gains under label scarcity and distribution shift. These results indicate that feature-level contrastive learning and dynamic feature encoding provide an effective recipe for learning from tabular sensing data.

analysis.tldr: 提出ZAYAN，一种特征级对比学习框架，用于遥感表格数据，无需锚点选择，实现解耦表示并提升下游分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感表格数据存在异质性、标签稀缺和特征冗余问题，现有方法难以学习有效表示。
analysis.problem: 如何从遥感表格数据中学习信息丰富、冗余最小化的解耦表示，并在标签稀缺和分布偏移下保持鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ZAYAN包含两个模块：ZAYAN-CL通过零锚点对比目标（动态扰动和掩码）预训练特征嵌入；ZAYAN-T使用Transformer基于这些嵌入进行下游分类。
contributions: 提出特征级对比学习框架ZAYAN，无需显式锚点选择和类别标签。
在8个遥感表格数据集上实现优于基线方法的准确率、鲁棒性和泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在8个数据集（包括6个遥感表格基准和2个洪水预测表格）上评估，与表格深度学习基线对比，显示在标签稀缺和分布偏移下的一致增益。
limitations: 可能仅适用于表格数据，未验证其他模态。
动态扰动和掩码策略的通用性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ZAYAN，一种特征级对比学习框架，用于遥感表格数据，无需锚点选择，实现解耦表示并提升下游分类性能。

papers.title: Decoding Scientific Experimental Images: The SPUR Benchmark for Perception, Understanding, and Reasoning
papers.abstract: We introduce SPUR, a comprehensive benchmark for scientific experimental image perception, understanding, and reasoning, comprising 4,264 question-answering (QA) pairs derived from 1,084 expert-curated images. SPUR features three key innovations: (1) Panel-Level Fine-Grained Perception: evaluating the visual perception of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) across three dimensions (numerical, morphological, and information localization) on six fine-grained panel types; (2) Cross-Panel Relation Understanding: utilizing complex images with an average of 14.3 panels per sample to evaluate MLLMs' ability to decipher intricate cross-panel relations; (3) Expert-Level Reasoning: assessment of qualitative and quantitative reasoning across five experimental paradigms to determine if models can infer conclusions from evidence as human experts do. Comprehensive evaluation of 20 MLLMs and four multimodal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT) methods reveals that current models fall significantly short of the expert-level requirements for scientific image interpretation, underscoring a critical bottleneck in AI for Science (AI4S) research.

analysis.tldr: SPUR 基准测试评估多模态大模型在科学实验图像上的感知、理解和推理能力，发现现有模型远未达到专家水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学实验图像解读是 AI for Science 的关键瓶颈，现有基准缺乏对细粒度感知、跨面板关系理解和专家级推理的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 当前多模态大模型在科学实验图像上的感知、理解和推理能力不足，缺乏针对性的综合基准来揭示其局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 SPUR 基准，包含 4,264 个 QA 对和 1,084 张专家精选图像，从面板级细粒度感知、跨面板关系理解和专家级推理三个维度评估 MLLMs。
contributions: 提出 SPUR 基准，覆盖科学实验图像的感知、理解和推理三个层次。
系统评估 20 个 MLLMs 和四种多模态思维链方法，揭示当前模型与专家水平的差距。
analysis.experiments: 评估了 20 个多模态大模型和四种多模态思维链方法，结果显示现有模型远未达到科学图像解读的专家级要求。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖特定科学领域，泛化性未知。
未提供模型失败的具体模式分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SPUR 基准测试评估多模态大模型在科学实验图像上的感知、理解和推理能力，发现现有模型远未达到专家水平。

papers.title: SECOS: Semantic Capture for Rigorous Classification in Open-World Semi-Supervised Learning
papers.abstract: In open-world semi-supervised learning (OWSSL), a model learns from labeled data and unlabeled data containing both known and novel classes. In practical OWSSL applications, models are expected to perform rigorous classification by directly selecting the most semantically relevant label from a candidate set for each sample. Existing OWSSL methods fail to achieve this because novel samples are trained without explicit supervision, and these methods lack mechanisms to extract latent semantic information, resulting in predicted labels that have no semantic correspondence to candidate textual labels. To address this, we introduce SEmantic Capture for Open-world Semi-supervised learning (SECOS), which directly predicts textual labels from the candidate set without post-processing, meeting the requirements of practical OWSSL applications. SECOS leverages external knowledge to extract and align semantic representations across modalities for both known and novel classes, providing explicit supervisory signals for training novel classes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that even when existing OWSSL methods are evaluated under the more lenient post-hoc matching setting, SECOS still surpasses them by up to 5.4\% without such assistance, highlighting its superior effectiveness. Code is available at https://github.com/ganchi-huanggua/OSSL-Classification.

analysis.tldr: SECOS 通过外部知识提取语义表征，实现开放世界半监督学习中的严格分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放世界半监督学习（OWSSL）中，模型需从含已知和未知类别的无标签数据中学习，并直接为样本选择语义最相关的标签。现有方法因缺乏显式监督和语义提取机制，预测标签与候选文本标签无语义对应，无法满足实际应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何让 OWSSL 模型直接预测候选集中的文本标签，实现严格的语义分类，而无需后处理匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有 OWSSL 方法在训练新类时缺乏显式监督，且无法提取潜在语义信息，导致预测标签与候选文本标签无语义对应。
analysis.method: SECOS 利用外部知识提取并对齐已知和未知类别的跨模态语义表征，为新类提供显式监督信号，直接预测候选文本标签。
contributions: 提出 SECOS 方法，首次实现无需后处理的直接文本标签预测，满足实际 OWSSL 应用需求。
利用外部知识为已知和未知类别提供显式语义监督，显著提升分类性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，SECOS 在更宽松的后处理匹配设置下仍比现有方法高出 5.4%，代码已开源。
limitations: 依赖外部知识库的质量和覆盖范围。
可能对未见类别数量敏感，需进一步验证可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SECOS 通过外部知识提取语义表征，实现开放世界半监督学习中的严格分类。

papers.title: An Extended Evaluation Split for DeepSpaceYoloDataset
papers.abstract: Recent technological advances in astronomy, particularly the growing popularity of smart telescopes for the general public, make it possible to develop highly effective detection solutions that are accessible to a wide audience, rather than being reserved for major scientific observatories. Published in 2023, DeepSpaceYoloDataset is a collection of annotated images created to train YOLO-based models for detecting Deep Sky Objects, particularly suited for Electronically Assisted Astronomy. In this paper, we present an update to DeepSpaceYoloDataset with the addition of a new split, test2026, designed to evaluate detection models with a greater diversity of images.

analysis.tldr: 为DeepSpaceYolo数据集新增一个更具多样性的测试集划分，用于评估深空天体检测模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着智能望远镜普及，需要面向公众的高效深空天体检测方案，但现有数据集缺乏多样化的评估划分。
analysis.problem: 现有DeepSpaceYoloDataset缺少一个能覆盖更广泛图像多样性的测试集，导致模型评估不够全面。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 为DeepSpaceYoloDataset新增一个名为test2026的测试集划分，包含更多样化的图像。
contributions: 扩展了DeepSpaceYoloDataset，新增test2026测试集划分
提供了更具多样性的评估基准，有助于提升深空天体检测模型的泛化能力
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未说明新增测试集的具体规模和多样性指标
未提供与原有测试集的对比实验
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 为DeepSpaceYolo数据集新增一个更具多样性的测试集划分，用于评估深空天体检测模型。

papers.title: Fake3DGS: A Benchmark for 3D Manipulation Detection in Neural Rendering
papers.abstract: Recent advances in 3D reconstruction and neural rendering,particularly 3D Gaussian Splatting, make it feasible and simple to edit 3D scenes and re-render them as highly realistic images. Therefore, security concerns arise regarding the authenticity of 3D content. Despite this threat, 3D fake detection remains largely unexplored in the literature, and most existing work is limited to 2D space. Therefore, in this paper, we formalize the concept of 3D fake detection and introduce Fake3DGS, a dataset of 3D Gaussian splatting scenes and corresponding rendered views, where fake images are produced by controlled manipulations of geometry, appearance, and spatial layout, while preserving high visual realism. Using this benchmark, we demonstrate that current state-of-the-art 2D detectors struggle to distinguish between original and 3D manipulated images. To bridge this gap, we introduce a 3D-aware detection method that leverages multi-view coherence and features derived from the Gaussian splatting representation. Experimental results demonstrate a substantial improvement in recognizing modified 3D content, underscoring the validity of the new dataset and the necessity for authenticity assessment techniques that extend beyond 2D evidence. Code and data are publicly released for future investigations.

analysis.tldr: 提出3D伪造检测基准Fake3DGS，揭示2D检测器在3D操纵图像上的不足，并引入3D感知检测方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D重建与神经渲染（如3D高斯泼溅）的进步使得编辑3D场景并渲染为逼真图像变得容易，引发对3D内容真实性的安全担忧，但现有伪造检测主要局限于2D空间。
analysis.problem: 3D伪造检测缺乏基准数据集和有效方法，2D检测器无法识别3D操纵图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前最先进的2D检测器难以区分原始图像与经过几何、外观、空间布局操纵的3D渲染图像。
analysis.method: 构建Fake3DGS数据集（包含3D高斯泼溅场景及受控操纵的渲染视图），并提出一种利用多视图一致性和高斯泼溅表示特征的3D感知检测方法。
contributions: 形式化定义了3D伪造检测任务并构建了Fake3DGS基准数据集
揭示了2D检测器在3D操纵图像上的局限性
提出了3D感知检测方法，显著提升识别修改3D内容的能力
analysis.experiments: 在Fake3DGS数据集上评估了当前SOTA 2D检测器，并验证了所提3D感知方法的有效性，显示大幅改进。
limitations: 数据集仅基于3D高斯泼溅，可能不覆盖其他神经渲染方法
检测方法依赖多视图输入，单视图场景可能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3D伪造检测基准Fake3DGS，揭示2D检测器在3D操纵图像上的不足，并引入3D感知检测方法。

papers.title: ClipTBP: Clip-Pair based Temporal Boundary Prediction with Boundary-Aware Learning for Moment Retrieval
papers.abstract: Video moment retrieval is the task of retrieving specific segments of a video corresponding to a given text query. Recent studies have been conducted to improve multimodal alignment performance through visual-linguistic similarity learning at the snippet-level and transformer-based temporal boundary regression. However, existing models do not calculate similarity by considering the relationships between multiple answer segments that match the query. Therefore, existing models are easily influenced by visually similar segments in the surrounding context. Existing models calculate similarity at the snippet-level and ignore the relationships between multiple answer segments corresponding to a single query. Therefore, they struggle to exclude segments irrelevant to the query. To address this issues, we propose ClipTBP, a clip-pair temporal boundary prediction framework based on boundary-aware learning. ClipTBP introduces a clip-level alignment loss for explicitly learning the semantic relationship between answer segments. ClipTBP also predicts accurate temporal boundaries by applying both main boundary loss and auxiliary boundary loss. ClipTBP consistently improves performance when applied to various existing models and demonstrates more robust boundary prediction performance even in ambiguous query scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出ClipTBP框架，通过片段对级对齐和边界感知损失提升视频时刻检索的边界预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频时刻检索方法在片段级相似度计算中忽略了多个答案片段之间的关系，导致易受视觉相似片段干扰，难以排除无关片段。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多个答案片段之间的语义关系来提升时间边界预测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有模型在片段级计算相似度时忽略多个答案片段间的关系，导致易受上下文视觉相似片段影响。
analysis.method: 提出ClipTBP框架，包含片段级对齐损失（clip-level alignment loss）用于显式学习答案片段间的语义关系，以及主边界损失和辅助边界损失（main and auxiliary boundary loss）用于精确预测时间边界。
contributions: 提出片段对级时间边界预测框架ClipTBP，通过片段级对齐损失学习答案片段间关系。
设计主边界损失和辅助边界损失，提升边界预测的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到ClipTBP在多种现有模型上持续提升性能，并在模糊查询场景下表现出更鲁棒的边界预测。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的表示质量。
辅助边界损失的超参数可能需要针对不同数据集调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ClipTBP框架，通过片段对级对齐和边界感知损失提升视频时刻检索的边界预测精度。

papers.title: Trace-Level Analysis of Information Contamination in Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Reasoning over heterogeneous artifacts (PDFs, spreadsheets, slide decks, etc.) increasingly occurs within structured agent workflows that iteratively extract, transform, and reference external information. In these workflows, uncertainty is not merely an input-quality issue: it can redirect decomposition and routing decisions, reshape intermediate state, and produce qualitatively different execution trajectories. We study this phenomenon by treating uncertainty as a controlled variable: we inject structured perturbations into artifact-derived representations, execute fixed workflows under comprehensive logging, and quantify contamination via trace divergence in plans, tool invocations, and intermediate state. Across 614 paired runs on 32 GAIA tasks with three different language models, we find a decoupling: workflows may diverge substantially yet recover correct answers, or remain structurally similar while producing incorrect outputs. We characterize three manifestation types: silent semantic corruption, behavioral detours with recovery, and combined structural disruption and their control-flow signatures (rerouting, extended execution, early termination). We measure operational costs and characterize why commonly used verification guardrails fail to intercept contamination. We contribute (i) a formal taxonomy of contamination manifestations in structured workflows, (ii) a trace-based measurement framework for detecting and localizing contamination across agent interactions, and (iii) empirical evidence with implications for targeted verification, defensive design, and cost control.

analysis.tldr: 在多智能体系统中，结构化工作流中的信息污染会导致执行轨迹发散，但发散与最终正确性并非简单对应。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统在处理异构文档时，不确定性不仅影响输入质量，还会改变分解、路由决策和中间状态，导致执行轨迹变化，但现有研究缺乏对这种污染的系统性分析和量化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地分析和量化多智能体工作流中信息污染的表现形式、影响及其与最终正确性的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过614次配对实验发现，工作流可能大幅发散但仍得到正确答案，或结构相似却输出错误结果；污染表现为三种类型：静默语义破坏、带恢复的行为绕路、结构破坏，并具有不同的控制流特征（重路由、扩展执行、提前终止）。
analysis.method: 将不确定性作为控制变量，向工件派生表示中注入结构化扰动，在固定工作流下执行并记录完整日志，通过轨迹发散（计划、工具调用、中间状态）量化污染。
contributions: 提出了结构化工作流中污染表现形式的正式分类法
构建了基于轨迹的测量框架，用于检测和定位跨智能体交互的污染
提供了实证证据，对针对性验证、防御设计和成本控制有启示
analysis.experiments: 在32个GAIA任务上使用三种不同语言模型进行了614次配对运行，测量了操作成本，并分析了常用验证护栏为何无法拦截污染。
limitations: 实验仅限于GAIA任务，可能无法推广到所有多智能体场景
注入的扰动是结构化的，可能无法完全模拟真实世界中的不确定性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在多智能体系统中，结构化工作流中的信息污染会导致执行轨迹发散，但发散与最终正确性并非简单对应。

papers.title: Assessing Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma Vascular Invasion: the PDACVI Benchmark
papers.abstract: Surgical resection remains the only potentially curative treatment for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), and eligibility depends on accurate assessment of vascular invasion (VI), i.e., tumor extension into adjacent critical vessels. Despite its importance for preoperative staging and surgical planning, computational VI assessment remains underexplored. Two major challenges are the lack of public datasets and the diagnostic ambiguity at the tumor-vessel interface, which leads to substantial inter-rater variability even among expert radiologists. To address these limitations, we introduce the CURVAS-PDACVI Dataset and Challenge, an open benchmark for uncertainty-aware AI in PDAC staging based on a densely annotated dataset with five independent expert annotations per scan. We also propose a multi-metric evaluation framework that extends beyond spatial overlap to include probabilistic calibration and VI assessment. Evaluation of six state-of-the-art methods shows that strong global volumetric overlap does not necessarily translate into reliable performance at clinically critical tumor-vessel interfaces. In particular, methods optimized for binary segmentation perform competitively on average overlap metrics, but often degrade in high-complexity cases with low expert consensus, either collapsing in volume or overextending at uncertain boundaries. In contrast, methods that model inter-rater disagreement produce better calibrated probabilistic maps and show greater robustness in these ambiguous cases. The benchmark highlights the limitations of volumetric accuracy as a proxy for localized surgical utility, motivating uncertainty-aware probabilistic models for preoperative decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出PDACVI基准，揭示肿瘤-血管界面分割中体积精度不能替代局部临床可靠性，推动不确定性感知模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 胰腺导管腺癌手术切除依赖血管侵犯准确评估，但缺乏公开数据集且专家间判读差异大，现有计算评估未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 解决PDAC血管侵犯评估中数据集缺失和肿瘤-血管界面诊断模糊导致的可靠性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强全局体积重叠的方法在临床关键界面性能不可靠，高复杂度低共识病例中体积塌缩或过度延伸；建模评分者分歧的方法产生更优校准概率图且鲁棒性更强。
analysis.method: 构建CURVAS-PDACVI数据集（每扫描5个独立专家标注）和多指标评估框架（含概率校准和VI评估），并评估六种SOTA方法。
contributions: 首个公开的PDAC血管侵犯基准CURVAS-PDACVI，含密集标注和多专家标注。
提出超越空间重叠的多指标评估框架，揭示体积精度作为局部手术效用代理的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 评估六种SOTA方法，比较全局重叠与局部界面性能，分析不确定性建模效果。
limitations: 仅针对PDAC血管侵犯，泛化性未验证。
评估方法可能未覆盖所有临床相关指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PDACVI基准，揭示肿瘤-血管界面分割中体积精度不能替代局部临床可靠性，推动不确定性感知模型。

papers.title: A Survey of Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval: Progress and Challenges
papers.abstract: Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval (RIR) targets retrieval settings where relevance is mediated by latent inferential links between a query and supporting evidence, rather than semantic similarity. Motivated by the emergent reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), recent work integrates these capabilities into the IR field, spanning the entire pipeline from benchmarks to retrievers and rerankers. Despite this progress, the field lacks a systematic framework to organize current efforts and articulate a clear path forward. To provide a clear roadmap for this rapidly growing yet fragmented area, this survey (1) systematizes existing RIR benchmarks by knowledge domains and modalities, providing a detailed analysis of the current landscape; (2) introduces a structured taxonomy that categorizes methods based on where and how reasoning is integrated into the retrieval pipeline, alongside an analysis of their trade-offs and practical applications; and (3) summarizes challenges and future directions to guide research in this evolving field.

analysis.tldr: 综述推理密集型检索的进展、分类与挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有检索主要依赖语义相似度，但许多场景需要推理连接查询与证据；LLM的推理能力为检索带来新机遇，但该领域缺乏系统框架。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对推理密集型检索（RIR）的系统性梳理与分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化分类法，按推理在检索流程中的集成位置与方式对方法分类，并分析权衡与应用。
contributions: 系统化现有RIR基准，按知识领域和模态分析现状。
提出结构化分类法，组织推理集成方法并分析其权衡。
总结挑战与未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或实验验证。
分类可能无法覆盖所有新兴方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述推理密集型检索的进展、分类与挑战。

papers.title: World2Minecraft: Occupancy-Driven Simulated Scenes Construction
papers.abstract: Embodied intelligence requires high-fidelity simulation environments to support perception and decision-making, yet existing platforms often suffer from data contamination and limited flexibility. To mitigate this, we propose World2Minecraft to convert real-world scenes into structured Minecraft environments based on 3D semantic occupancy prediction. In the reconstructed scenes, we can effortlessly perform downstream tasks such as Vision-Language Navigation(VLN). However, we observe that reconstruction quality heavily depends on accurate occupancy prediction, which remains limited by data scarcity and poor generalization in existing models. We introduce a low-cost, automated, and scalable data acquisition pipeline for creating customized occupancy datasets, and demonstrate its effectiveness through MinecraftOcc, a large-scale dataset featuring 100,165 images from 156 richly detailed indoor scenes. Extensive experiments show that our dataset provides a critical complement to existing datasets and poses a significant challenge to current SOTA methods. These findings contribute to improving occupancy prediction and highlight the value of World2Minecraft in providing a customizable and editable platform for personalized embodied AI research. Project page:https://world2minecraft.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: 提出World2Minecraft，基于3D语义占用预测将真实场景转换为Minecraft环境，并构建大规模数据集MinecraftOcc以提升占用预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身智能需要高保真仿真环境，但现有平台存在数据污染和灵活性不足的问题，且占用预测受限于数据稀缺和泛化能力差。
analysis.problem: 如何低成本、自动化地将真实场景转换为结构化Minecraft环境，并解决占用预测数据不足和泛化性差的问题。
