analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重建质量高度依赖准确的占用预测，而现有模型因数据稀缺和泛化能力差而受限。
analysis.method: 提出World2Minecraft框架，基于3D语义占用预测将真实场景转换为Minecraft环境；并设计低成本、自动化、可扩展的数据采集流程，构建MinecraftOcc数据集。
contributions: 提出World2Minecraft，将真实场景转换为结构化Minecraft环境，支持下游任务如视觉语言导航。
构建MinecraftOcc数据集，包含100,165张图像和156个室内场景，为占用预测提供关键补充。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明MinecraftOcc数据集对现有SOTA方法构成显著挑战，并有效提升占用预测性能。
limitations: 重建质量仍受限于占用预测的准确性。
数据集仅覆盖室内场景，泛化到室外场景可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出World2Minecraft，基于3D语义占用预测将真实场景转换为Minecraft环境，并构建大规模数据集MinecraftOcc以提升占用预测。

papers.title: Statistical Channel Fingerprint Construction for Massive MIMO: A Unified Tensor Learning Framework
papers.abstract: Channel fingerprint (CF) is considered a key enabler for facilitating the acquisition of channel state information (CSI) in massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) communication systems. In this work, we investigate a novel type of CF that stores statistical CSI (sCSI) at each potential location, referred to as statistical CF (sCF). Specifically, we reveal the relationship between sCSI, namely the channel spatial covariance matrix (CSCM), and the channel power angular spectrum (CPAS). Building on this foundation, we construct a unified tensor representation of the sCF and further reduce its dimension by exploiting the eigenvalue decomposition of the CSCM and its correlation with the PAS. Considering the practical constraints imposed by measurement cost, privacy, and security, we focus on three representative scenarios and uniformly formulate them as tensor restoration tasks. To this end, we propose a unified tensor-based learning architecture, termed LPWTNet. The architecture incorporates a closed-form Laplacian pyramid (LP) decomposition and reconstruction framework that replaces the traditional encoder-decoder structure, enabling efficient inference while capturing multi-scale frequency subband characteristics of the sCF. Additionally, a shared mask learning strategy is introduced to adaptively refine high-frequency sCF components through level-wise adjustments. To achieve a larger receptive field without over-parameterization, we further propose a small-kernel convolution mechanism based on the wavelet transform (WT), which decouples convolution across different frequency components of the sCF and enhances feature extraction efficiency. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach delivers competitive reconstruction accuracy and computational efficiency across various sCF construction scenarios when compared with state-of-the-art baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一张量学习框架LPWTNet，用于大规模MIMO系统中统计信道指纹的高效重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 信道指纹（CF）是获取大规模MIMO系统中信道状态信息（CSI）的关键技术，但现有方法在测量成本、隐私和安全约束下难以高效构建统计信道指纹（sCF）。
analysis.problem: 在有限测量、隐私和安全约束下，如何从部分观测数据中高效重建统计信道指纹（sCF）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了sCSI（信道空间协方差矩阵）与信道功率角谱（CPAS）之间的关系，并利用特征值分解和与PAS的相关性降低sCF维度。
analysis.method: 提出统一张量学习架构LPWTNet，包含闭式拉普拉斯金字塔（LP）分解与重建框架替代传统编码器-解码器，共享掩码学习策略自适应细化高频分量，以及基于小波变换（WT）的小核卷积机制实现大感受野并解耦不同频率分量的卷积。
contributions: 揭示了sCSI与CPAS的关系，并构建了sCF的统一张量表示及降维方法。
提出了LPWTNet架构，融合LP分解、共享掩码学习和WT小核卷积，实现高效且精确的sCF重建。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定天线阵列拓扑假设。
未讨论在非理想信道模型下的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一张量学习框架LPWTNet，用于大规模MIMO系统中统计信道指纹的高效重建。

papers.title: RIHA: Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment for Radiology Report Generation
papers.abstract: Radiology report generation (RRG) has emerged as a promising approach to alleviate radiologists' workload and reduce human errors by automatically generating diagnostic reports from medical images. A key challenge in RRG is achieving fine-grained alignment between complex visual features and the hierarchical structure of long-form radiology reports. Although recent methods have improved image-text representation learning, they often treat reports as flat sequences, overlooking their structured sections and semantic hierarchies. This simplification hinders precise cross-modal alignment and weakens RRG accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose RIHA (Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment Transformer), a novel end-to-end framework that performs multi-level alignment between radiological images and their corresponding reports across paragraph, sentence, and word levels. This hierarchical alignment enables more precise cross-modal mapping, essential for capturing the nuanced semantics embedded in clinical narratives. Specifically, RIHA introduces a Visual Feature Pyramid (VFP) to extract multi-scale visual features and a Text Feature Pyramid (TFP) to represent multi-granularity textual structures. These components are integrated through a Cross-modal Hierarchical Alignment (CHA) module, leveraging optimal transport to effectively align visual and textual features across various levels. Furthermore, we incorporate Relative Positional Encoding (RPE) into the decoder to model spatial and semantic relationships among tokens, enhancing the token-level alignment between visual features and generated text. Extensive experiments on two benchmark chest X-ray datasets, IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR, demonstrate that RIHA outperforms existing state-of-the-art models in both natural language generation and clinical efficacy metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出RIHA框架，通过层级对齐提升放射报告生成中图像与文本的跨模态映射精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 放射报告生成可减轻放射科医生负担，但现有方法将报告视为扁平序列，忽略了其结构化章节和语义层级，导致跨模态对齐不精确，影响生成准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现放射图像与长格式报告在段落、句子和单词层面的细粒度层级对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法将报告视为扁平序列，无法捕捉其结构化章节和语义层级，阻碍了精确的跨模态对齐。
analysis.method: 提出RIHA框架，包含视觉特征金字塔（VFP）提取多尺度视觉特征、文本特征金字塔（TFP）表示多粒度文本结构，并通过跨模态层级对齐（CHA）模块利用最优传输进行多层级对齐，同时在解码器中引入相对位置编码（RPE）增强词级对齐。
contributions: 提出RIHA框架，实现报告-图像在段落、句子和单词层面的层级对齐。
引入视觉特征金字塔和文本特征金字塔分别提取多尺度视觉和多粒度文本特征。
设计跨模态层级对齐模块，利用最优传输实现多层级跨模态对齐。
在解码器中加入相对位置编码，提升词级对齐性能。
analysis.experiments: 在两个基准胸部X光数据集（IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR）上，RIHA在自然语言生成和临床效能指标上均优于现有最先进模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
层级对齐的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RIHA框架，通过层级对齐提升放射报告生成中图像与文本的跨模态映射精度。

papers.title: SpatialGrammar: A Domain-Specific Language for LLM-Based 3D Indoor Scene Generation
papers.abstract: Automatically generating interactive 3D indoor scenes from natural language is crucial for virtual reality, gaming, and embodied AI. However, existing LLM-based approaches often suffer from spatial errors and collisions, in part because common scene representations-raw coordinates or verbose code-are difficult for models to reason about 3D spatial relationships and physical constraints. We propose SpatialGrammar, a domain-specific language that represents gravity-aligned indoor layouts as BEV grid placements with deterministic compilation to valid 3D geometry, enabling verifiable constraint checking. Building on this representation, we develop (1) SG-Agent, a closed-loop system that uses compiler feedback to iteratively refine scenes and enforce collision constraints, and (2) SG-Mini, a 104M-parameter model trained entirely on compiler-validated synthetic data. Across 159 test scenes spanning five scenarios of different complexity, SG-Agent improves spatial fidelity and physical plausibility over prior methods, while SG-Mini performs competitively against larger LLM-based baselines on single-shot generation scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种领域特定语言SpatialGrammar，将室内布局表示为BEV网格，结合编译器反馈迭代优化，提升LLM生成3D场景的空间准确性和物理合理性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的3D室内场景生成方法常出现空间错误和碰撞，因为原始坐标或冗长代码难以让模型推理3D空间关系和物理约束。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM生成符合空间关系和物理约束的3D室内场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出常见场景表示（原始坐标或冗长代码）使模型难以推理3D空间关系和物理约束，导致空间错误和碰撞。
analysis.method: 提出SpatialGrammar领域特定语言，将重力对齐的室内布局表示为BEV网格，并确定性编译为有效3D几何；基于此开发SG-Agent（闭环系统，利用编译器反馈迭代优化）和SG-Mini（104M参数模型，在编译器验证的合成数据上训练）。
contributions: 提出SpatialGrammar领域特定语言，实现可验证的约束检查。
开发SG-Agent闭环系统，利用编译器反馈迭代优化场景。
训练SG-Mini小模型，在单次生成场景中与更大LLM基线竞争。
analysis.experiments: 在159个测试场景（涵盖五种不同复杂度场景）上评估，SG-Agent在空间保真度和物理合理性上优于先前方法，SG-Mini在单次生成场景中与更大LLM基线竞争。
limitations: 可能仅适用于重力对齐的室内布局，对非规则场景泛化性未知。
SG-Mini性能可能受限于合成数据质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种领域特定语言SpatialGrammar，将室内布局表示为BEV网格，结合编译器反馈迭代优化，提升LLM生成3D场景的空间准确性和物理合理性。

papers.title: Revealing the Impact of Visual Text Style on Attribute-based Descriptions Produced by Large Visual Language Models
papers.abstract: When the visual style of text is considered, a wide variety can be observed in font, color, and size. However, when a word is read, its meaning is independent of the style in which it has been written or rendered. In this paper, we investigate whether, and how, the style in which a word is visualized in an image impacts the description that a Large Visual Language Model (LVLM) provides for the concept to which that word refers. Specifically, we investigate how functional text styles (readability-oriented, e.g., black sans-serif) versus decorative styles (display-oriented, e.g., colored cursive/script) affect LVLMs' descriptions of a concept in terms of the attributes of that concept. Our experiments study the situation in which the LVLM is able to correctly identify the concept referred to by a visual text, i.e., by a word or words rendered as an image, and in which the visual text style should not influence the attribute-based description that the LVLM produces. Our experimental results reveal that even when the concept is correctly identified, text style influences the model's attribute-based descriptions of the concept. Our findings demonstrate non-trivial style leakage from text style into semantic inference and motivate style-aware evaluation and mitigation for LVLM-based multimedia systems.

analysis.tldr: 视觉文本风格会泄露到LVLM的语义推理中，影响其对概念属性的描述。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LVLM研究主要关注文本语义，忽略了视觉文本风格（如字体、颜色）对模型描述的影响，可能导致不可靠的多媒体系统输出。
analysis.problem: 视觉文本风格是否以及如何影响LVLM对概念属性的描述，即使模型正确识别了概念。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，即使LVLM正确识别了视觉文本所指的概念，文本风格（如装饰性字体）仍会显著影响模型对概念属性的描述，存在风格泄露现象。
analysis.method: 设计实验对比功能性文本风格（可读性导向）与装饰性风格（展示导向）对LVLM属性描述的影响，控制概念识别正确性。
contributions: 首次系统揭示视觉文本风格对LVLM属性描述的影响，证明风格泄露的存在。
提出需要风格感知的评估和缓解方法，为LVLM多媒体系统提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述实验设置和发现。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有LVLM架构和风格类型。
未提供缓解风格泄露的具体方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视觉文本风格会泄露到LVLM的语义推理中，影响其对概念属性的描述。

papers.title: Residual Gaussian Splatting for Ultra Sparse-View CBCT Reconstruction
papers.abstract: While 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) offers explicit and efficient scene representations for cone-beam computed tomography reconstruction, conventional photometric optimization inherently suffers from spectral bias under ultra sparse-view conditions, leading to over-smoothing and a loss of high-frequency anatomical details. Since wavelet transforms provide rich high-frequency information and have been widely utilized to enhance sparse reconstruction, this work integrates wavelet multi-resolution analysis with 3DGS. To circumvent the mathematical mismatch between the strict non-negativity of physical X-ray attenuation and the bipolar nature of high-frequency wavelet coefficients, we propose Residual Gaussian Splatting (RGS). Methodologically, we introduce a spectrally-decoupled Gaussian representation that stratifies the volumetric field into a geometric base component and a residual detail component. This decomposition systematically transforms explicit high-frequency fitting into a physically consistent, implicit residual compensation task. Furthermore, we devise a spectral-spatial collaborative optimization strategy to coordinate the interplay between geometric anchoring and texture refinement, effectively preventing spectral crosstalk. Extensive experiments on clinical datasets demonstrate that RGS enables the reconstructed images to capture highly refined geometric textures. It successfully resolves the trade-off between artifact suppression and detail preservation, yielding superior visual fidelity in complex trabecular and vascular structures compared to existing neural rendering baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出残差高斯泼溅（RGS），通过频谱解耦表示和协同优化策略，在超稀疏视角CBCT重建中保留高频解剖细节。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统3DGS在超稀疏视角CBCT重建中存在频谱偏差，导致过平滑和丢失高频解剖细节，而小波变换虽能提供高频信息但与物理衰减的非负性不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何在超稀疏视角条件下，在CBCT重建中同时抑制伪影并保留高频细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 常规光度优化在超稀疏视角下存在频谱偏差，导致过平滑；小波高频系数双极性特征与X射线衰减非负性存在数学不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出残差高斯泼溅（RGS），包括频谱解耦的高斯表示（将体积场分解为几何基分量和残差细节分量）和频谱-空间协同优化策略。
contributions: 提出频谱解耦的高斯表示，将高频拟合转化为物理一致的隐式残差补偿任务。
设计频谱-空间协同优化策略，协调几何锚定与纹理细化，防止频谱串扰。
analysis.experiments: 在临床数据集上进行实验，与现有神经渲染基线相比，在复杂小梁和血管结构上实现了更优的视觉保真度。
limitations: 可能对超稀疏视角的极端程度敏感。
计算开销可能高于标准3DGS。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出残差高斯泼溅（RGS），通过频谱解耦表示和协同优化策略，在超稀疏视角CBCT重建中保留高频解剖细节。

papers.title: Beyond the Training Distribution: Mapping Generalization Boundaries in Neural Program Synthesis
papers.abstract: Large-scale transformers achieve impressive results on program synthesis benchmarks, yet their true generalization capabilities remain obscured by data contamination and opaque training corpora. To rigorously assess whether models are truly generalizing or merely retrieving memorized templates, we introduce a strictly controlled program synthesis environment based on a domain-specific arithmetic grammar. By systematically enumerating and evaluating millions of unique programs, we construct interpretable syntactic and semantic metric spaces. This allows us to precisely map data distributions and sample train and test splits that isolate specific distributional shifts. Our experiments demonstrate that optimizing density generalization -- through diverse sampling over both semantic and syntactic spaces -- induces robust out-of-distribution generalization. Conversely, evaluating support generalization reveals that transformers severely struggle with extrapolation, experiencing a performance drop of over 30% when forced to generate syntactically novel programs. While steadily scaling up compute improves generalization, the gains follow a strictly log-linear relationship. We conclude that robust generalization requires maximizing training diversity across multiple manifolds, and our findings indicate the necessity for novel search-based approaches to break through current log-linear scaling bottlenecks.

analysis.tldr: 通过构建受控程序合成环境，发现Transformer在分布外泛化上存在30%以上的性能下降，且泛化提升与计算量呈对数线性关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有程序合成基准受数据污染和训练语料不透明影响，难以判断模型是真正泛化还是记忆模板，亟需严格受控的环境来评估泛化边界。
analysis.problem: 如何精确评估和提升神经程序合成模型在分布外（OOD）场景下的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Transformer在支持泛化（syntactically novel programs）上性能下降超过30%；泛化提升与计算量呈严格对数线性关系，存在缩放瓶颈。
analysis.method: 基于领域特定算术语法构建严格受控的程序合成环境，通过系统枚举数百万程序构建可解释的句法和语义度量空间，并设计密度泛化与支持泛化两种评估协议。
contributions: 提出了一个严格受控的程序合成环境，可精确映射数据分布并隔离特定分布偏移。
揭示了密度泛化（多样采样）可提升OOD泛化，而支持泛化（句法新颖程序）存在30%以上的性能下降。
发现泛化提升与计算量呈对数线性关系，表明需要新的搜索方法突破瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在受控算术语法环境中系统评估了数百万程序，对比了密度泛化与支持泛化，并分析了计算量缩放的影响。
limitations: 环境基于特定领域语法，结论向通用程序合成的泛化性有待验证。
未提供具体模型架构和训练细节，可能影响复现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过构建受控程序合成环境，发现Transformer在分布外泛化上存在30%以上的性能下降，且泛化提升与计算量呈对数线性关系。

papers.title: APPSI-139: A Parallel Corpus of English Application Privacy Policy Summarization and Interpretation
papers.abstract: Privacy policies are essential for users to understand how service providers handle their personal data. However, these documents are often long and complex, as well as filled with technobabble and legalese, causing users to unknowingly accept terms that may even contradict the law. While summarizing and interpreting these privacy policies is crucial, there is a lack of high-quality English parallel corpus optimized for legal clarity and readability. To address this issue, we introduce APPSI-139, a high-quality English privacy policy corpus meticulously annotated by domain experts, specifically designed for summarization and interpretation tasks. The corpus includes 139 English privacy policies, 15,692 rewritten parallel corpora, and 36,351 fine-grained annotation labels across 11 data practice categories. Concurrently, we propose TCSI-pp-V2, a hybrid privacy policy summarization and interpretation framework that employs an alternating training strategy and coordinates multiple expert modules to effectively balance computational efficiency and accuracy. Experimental results show that the hybrid summarization system built on APPSI-139 corpus and the TCSI-pp-V2 framework outperform large language models, such as GPT-4o and LLaMA-3-70B, in terms of readability and reliability. The source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/EnlightenedAI/APPSI-139.

analysis.tldr: 构建高质量英文隐私政策平行语料库APPSI-139并提出混合摘要解释框架TCSI-pp-V2，在可读性和可靠性上超越GPT-4o等大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐私政策冗长复杂且充满术语和法律行话，用户难以理解，常无意中接受可能违法的条款，亟需高质量的摘要和解释工具。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对法律清晰性和可读性优化的高质量英文隐私政策平行语料库，以及高效的自动摘要与解释方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有隐私政策摘要方法在可读性和可靠性上不足，大模型如GPT-4o和LLaMA-3-70B在该任务上表现有限。
analysis.method: 构建APPSI-139语料库（含139篇政策、15,692条平行语料、36,351个细粒度标注），并提出TCSI-pp-V2混合框架，采用交替训练策略协调多个专家模块以平衡效率与准确性。
contributions: 发布了APPSI-139，首个由领域专家标注的高质量英文隐私政策平行语料库，专为摘要和解释任务设计。
提出了TCSI-pp-V2混合框架，在可读性和可靠性上超越GPT-4o和LLaMA-3-70B等大模型。
analysis.experiments: 在APPSI-139语料库上评估TCSI-pp-V2框架，与GPT-4o和LLaMA-3-70B对比，结果显示在可读性和可靠性上更优。
limitations: 语料库仅包含139篇英文隐私政策，规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有领域。
混合框架的泛化能力未在非英语或其他法律文档上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建高质量英文隐私政策平行语料库APPSI-139并提出混合摘要解释框架TCSI-pp-V2，在可读性和可靠性上超越GPT-4o等大模型。

papers.title: In-Context Examples Suppress Scientific Knowledge Recall in LLMs
papers.abstract: Scientific reasoning rarely stops at what is directly observable; it often requires uncovering hidden structure from data. From estimating reaction constants in chemistry to inferring demand elasticities in economics, this latent structure recovery is what distinguishes scientific reasoning from curve fitting. Large language models (LLMs) can often recall and apply relevant scientific formulas, but we show that this ability is surprisingly easy to suppress. We show that adding in-context examples makes models rely less on pretrained domain knowledge, even when those examples are generated by the very same formula. Rather than reinforcing knowledge-driven derivation, examples shift computation toward empirical pattern fitting. We document this knowledge displacement on 60 latent structure recovery tasks across five scientific domains, 6,000 trials, and four models. This displacement is consistent across domains, but its accuracy consequences depend on how the displaced strategy compares to the one that replaces it: the same shift can lower accuracy, leave it unchanged, or appear to improve it. In all cases, however, the model shifts away from knowledge-driven reasoning. For practitioners deploying LLMs on scientific tasks, the message is cautionary: in-context examples may displace, rather than reinforce, the knowledge they are intended to support.

analysis.tldr: LLM在科学推理中，上下文示例会抑制预训练知识回忆，转向经验模式拟合。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学推理需要从数据中恢复隐藏结构，LLM虽能回忆公式，但上下文示例可能削弱这一能力，影响科学任务可靠性。
analysis.problem: 研究上下文示例如何影响LLM在科学推理中调用预训练领域知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 上下文示例使模型减少依赖预训练知识，转向经验模式拟合，即使示例由同一公式生成；这种知识位移在多个领域一致，但准确性影响因替换策略而异。
analysis.method: 在60个潜在结构恢复任务、6000次试验和4个模型上，系统比较有无上下文示例时LLM的知识调用行为。
contributions: 发现上下文示例会抑制LLM的科学知识回忆，转向经验拟合。
在多个科学领域和模型上验证了知识位移的一致性和准确性后果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及60个任务、6000次试验和4个模型。
limitations: 未探讨如何缓解知识位移。
可能仅适用于特定科学推理任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在科学推理中，上下文示例会抑制预训练知识回忆，转向经验模式拟合。

papers.title: Knowledge Affordances for Hybrid Human-AI Information Seeking
papers.abstract: As information ecosystems grow more heterogeneous, both humans and artificial agents increasingly face a simple yet unresolved question: when seeking knowledge, whom should we ask, and why? Inspired by how people intuitively "read a room", this paper introduces the concept of knowledge affordance (KA) to systematize how agents identify meaningful opportunities for information seeking in hybrid human-AI environments. Rather than introducing a fully formed framework, we propose KAs as declarative, semantically grounded descriptions of what a knowledge source can offer, for which kinds of questions, and with which contextual properties. Additionally, we suggest that KAs are relational, possibly emerging from the interplay between the agent's task, preferences and situational factors. Our contribution is thus a conceptual proposal that connects different research streams, including affordances, semantic web services, knowledge engineering and querying, and mutual intelligibility. We sketch possible research directions to build KA-aware systems that navigate information spaces with greater transparency, adaptability and shared understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识可供性概念，用于系统化描述混合人机信息寻求中的知识来源能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 信息生态系统日益异构，人类和AI代理在寻求知识时缺乏系统化的方法来识别合适的知识来源。
analysis.problem: 如何系统化描述知识来源的能力，以便在混合人机环境中进行有效的信息寻求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出知识可供性（KA）概念，作为声明性、语义基础的知识来源描述，并指出其关系性，可能从代理任务、偏好和情境因素中涌现。
contributions: 引入知识可供性概念，连接可供性、语义Web服务、知识工程和查询等研究流。
提出构建KA感知系统的研究方向，以增强信息空间的透明度、适应性和共享理解。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 概念性提案，缺乏实证验证。
未提供具体实现细节或算法。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识可供性概念，用于系统化描述混合人机信息寻求中的知识来源能力。

papers.title: Self-Supervised Learning of Plant Image Representations
papers.abstract: Automated plant recognition plays a crucial role in biodiversity monitoring and conservation, yet current approaches rely heavily on supervised learning, which is limited by the availability of expert-labeled data. Self-supervised learning (SSL) offers a scalable alternative, but existing methods and training protocols are largely designed for coarse-grained visual tasks and may not transfer well to fine-grained domains such as plant species recognition. In this work, we investigate SSL for plant image representation learning. We show that commonly used augmentations in SSL pipelines - such as Gaussian blur, grayscale conversion, and solarization - are detrimental in the context of plant images, as they remove subtle discriminative cues essential for fine-grained recognition. We instead identify alternative transformations, including affine and posterization, that are better suited to this domain. We further demonstrate that training SimDINOv2 on the iNaturalist 2021 Plantae subset yields significantly stronger representations than training on ImageNet-1K, highlighting the importance of domain-specific data for SSL. Our findings are consistent across both ViT-Base and ViT-Large architectures. Moreover, our models achieve competitive performance and sometimes outperform strong supervised baselines Pl@ntCLEF and BioCLIP on downstream plant recognition tasks in few-shot settings. Overall, our results highlight the critical importance of domain-adapted augmentation strategies and dataset selection in self-supervised learning, and provide practical guidelines for building scalable models for biodiversity monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 自监督学习用于植物图像表示，发现通用数据增强有害，提出领域适配策略并取得竞争性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 植物识别对生物多样性监测至关重要，但监督学习受限于专家标注数据，自监督学习虽可扩展但现有方法针对粗粒度任务设计，不适用于细粒度植物物种识别。
analysis.problem: 如何设计适合植物图像的自监督学习方法和训练协议，以学习有效的细粒度表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 常用数据增强（高斯模糊、灰度化、曝光过度）会移除植物图像中细微的判别性特征，不利于细粒度识别；而仿射变换和海报化等替代变换更有效；在领域特定数据（iNaturalist Plantae）上训练比在ImageNet上训练效果更好。
analysis.method: 使用SimDINOv2框架，采用领域适配的数据增强（仿射变换、海报化等），并在iNaturalist 2021 Plantae子集上预训练。
contributions: 揭示了通用自监督学习数据增强在植物图像上的有害性，并提出了更适合的替代变换。
证明了领域特定数据（iNaturalist Plantae）对自监督学习的重要性，优于通用数据集ImageNet。
在少样本下游任务上取得与强监督基线（Pl@ntCLEF、BioCLIP）竞争甚至更优的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在iNaturalist 2021 Plantae子集上预训练SimDINOv2（ViT-Base和ViT-Large），在少样本植物识别任务上评估，与Pl@ntCLEF和BioCLIP比较。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅验证了SimDINOv2框架，其他SSL方法可能不同。
实验仅在植物领域，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自监督学习用于植物图像表示，发现通用数据增强有害，提出领域适配策略并取得竞争性能。

papers.title: Belief-Guided Inference Control for Large Language Model Services via Verifiable Observations
papers.abstract: In black-box large language model (LLM) services, response reliability is often only partially observable at decision time, while stronger inference pathways incur substantial computational cost, inducing a budgeted sequential decision problem: for each request, the system should decide whether the default low-cost response is sufficiently reliable or whether additional computation should be allocated to improve response quality. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Ver}ifiable \textbf{O}bservations for Risk-aware \textbf{I}nference \textbf{C}ontrol (\textsc{Veroic}), a framework for adaptive inference control in black-box LLM settings, which formulates request-time control as a \textit{partially observable Markov decision process} to capture partial observability and sequential budget coupling. It constructs a lightweight verifiable observation channel from the input-output pair by aggregating heterogeneous quality signals into a belief state over latent response reliability, which is then used by a budget-aware policy to decide whether to return the default output or trigger a higher-cost inference pathway. Experiments on diverse tasks show that \textsc{Veroic} achieves improved quality-cost trade-offs, stronger risk estimation and calibration, and more robust long-horizon inference control than competitive baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出Veroic框架，将LLM推理控制建模为POMDP，通过可验证观测构建信念状态，实现质量-成本权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 黑盒LLM服务的响应可靠性在决策时仅部分可观测，而更强的推理路径会带来高昂计算成本，需要一种预算约束下的序贯决策方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在黑盒LLM服务中，针对每个请求自适应地决定使用默认低计算量响应还是触发高成本推理路径，以在有限预算下优化响应质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将请求时推理控制建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），通过从输入-输出对中聚合异构质量信号构建轻量级可验证观测通道，形成关于潜在响应可靠性的信念状态，再由预算感知策略决定是否触发高成本推理。
contributions: 提出Veroic框架，将LLM推理控制形式化为POMDP，处理部分可观测性和序贯预算耦合。
设计轻量级可验证观测通道，从输入-输出对中聚合质量信号得到信念状态。
实验表明Veroic在质量-成本权衡、风险估计与校准、长时推理控制方面优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多种任务上进行了实验，结果显示Veroic在质量-成本权衡、风险估计与校准、长时推理控制方面优于竞争基线。
limitations: 可能依赖于可验证观测信号的设计质量。
POMDP求解可能面临计算复杂度挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Veroic框架，将LLM推理控制建模为POMDP，通过可验证观测构建信念状态，实现质量-成本权衡。

papers.title: Adjoint Inversion Reveals Holographic Superposition and Destructive Interference in CNN Classifiers
papers.abstract: A foundational assumption in CNN interpretability -- that deep encoders suppress background pixels while classifiers merely select from a cleaned feature pool (the Spatial Funnel Hypothesis) -- remains untested due to spatial hallucinations in existing visualization tools. We address this by introducing a hallucination-free inversion framework built on magnitude-phase decoupling and Local Adjoint Correctors. Our method mathematically guarantees that the spatial gradient support of every reconstruction stems strictly from genuinely active channels. Using this framework as a geometric probe, we uncover the first pixel-level evidence of strong superposition in vision encoders. We show that per-channel inversions are uniformly holographic: positive and negative weight reconstructions are visually and energetically indistinguishable. However, their algebraic sum sharply concentrates on the foreground. This proves classification operates via destructive interference -- classifier weights cancel a shared background direction in pixel space and constructively assemble class-discriminative residuals, directly falsifying the Spatial Funnel Hypothesis. This interference model identifies the volume of the admissible interference subspace as the geometric quantity governing channel requirements. We prove this volume is dual to the GAP covariance determinant, yielding a covariance-volume channel selection algorithm with a $(1-1/e)$ approximation guarantee. This algorithm mathematically reveals out-of-distribution (OOD) failure as a measurable collapse of the covariance volume essential for interference-based classification. Our framework extends seamlessly to attention-based heads without retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出无幻觉反演框架，揭示CNN分类器通过全息叠加和相消干涉工作，反驳空间漏斗假说。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CNN可解释性工具存在空间幻觉，导致基础假设（空间漏斗假说）未被验证，亟需无幻觉的反演方法。
analysis.problem: 验证CNN编码器是否抑制背景像素、分类器是否从干净特征池中选择（空间漏斗假说），并揭示真实工作机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现通道反演是全息的：正负权重重建视觉和能量上不可区分，但代数和聚焦于前景，证明分类通过相消干涉实现。
analysis.method: 基于幅度-相位解耦和局部伴随校正器的无幻觉反演框架，以及协方差-体积通道选择算法。
contributions: 提出无幻觉反演框架，数学保证重建的空间梯度支持来自真正活跃通道。
首次提供像素级证据证明视觉编码器中的强叠加现象，并证明分类通过相消干涉工作，反驳空间漏斗假说。
提出协方差-体积通道选择算法，具有(1-1/e)近似保证，并揭示OOD失败是干涉所需协方差体积的坍缩。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于CNN架构，对Transformer等需验证。
算法计算复杂度未提及，可能影响实际应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无幻觉反演框架，揭示CNN分类器通过全息叠加和相消干涉工作，反驳空间漏斗假说。

papers.title: FMCL: Class-Aware Client Clustering with Foundation Model Representations for Heterogeneous Federated Learning
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training across distributed clients without sharing raw data, yet its performance deteriorates under statistical heterogeneity. Clustered Federated Learning addresses this challenge by grouping similar clients and training separate models per cluster. However, existing clustering strategies often rely on raw data statistics, model parameters, or heuristic similarity measures that fail to capture class-level semantic structure across heterogeneous domains and frequently require iterative coordination. We propose FMCL, a one-shot, class-aware client clustering framework that leverages foundation model representations to construct semantic client signatures. Using a frozen foundation model, FMCL computes class-level embedding prototypes for each client and measures similarity via cosine distance between their class-aware representations. Clustering is performed once prior to training, introducing no additional communication during federated optimization and remaining agnostic to the downstream model architecture. Extensive experiments across heterogeneous benchmarks demonstrate that FMCL improves federated performance and yields more stable clustering behavior compared to existing clustering-based methods under non-identically distributed data partitioning.

analysis.tldr: FMCL 利用基础模型表示实现一次性、类别感知的客户端聚类，以应对异构联邦学习中的统计异质性。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习在统计异质性下性能下降，现有聚类方法依赖原始数据统计或启发式相似度，难以捕捉跨异构域的类别级语义结构，且需要迭代协调。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地对异构联邦学习中的客户端进行聚类，以提升模型性能并减少通信开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 FMCL，使用冻结的基础模型为每个客户端计算类别级嵌入原型，通过余弦距离衡量类别感知表示的相似性，在训练前一次性完成聚类，不增加联邦优化过程中的通信。
contributions: 提出一种一次性、类别感知的客户端聚类框架 FMCL，利用基础模型表示构建语义客户端签名。
FMCL 在异构基准上提升了联邦学习性能，并产生更稳定的聚类行为。
analysis.experiments: 在异构基准上进行了大量实验，与现有基于聚类的方法相比，FMCL 提升了联邦性能并实现了更稳定的聚类行为。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖基础模型的质量和泛化能力。
可能不适用于基础模型无法有效表示的数据模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FMCL 利用基础模型表示实现一次性、类别感知的客户端聚类，以应对异构联邦学习中的统计异质性。

papers.title: Leveraging Verifier-Based Reinforcement Learning in Image Editing
papers.abstract: While Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has become a pivotal paradigm for text-to-image generation, its application to image editing remains largely unexplored. A key bottleneck is the lack of a robust general reward model for all editing tasks. Existing edit reward models usually give overall scores without detailed checks, ignoring different instruction requirements and causing biased rewards. To address this, we argue that the key is to move from a simple scorer to a reasoning verifier. We introduce Edit-R1, a framework that builds a chain-of-thought (CoT) verifier-based reasoning reward model (RRM) and then leverages it for downstream image editing. The Edit-RRM breaks instructions into distinct principles, evaluates the edited image against each principle, and aggregates these checks into an interpretable, fine-grained reward. To build such an RRM, we first apply supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as a ``cold-start'' to generate CoT reward trajectories. Then, we introduce Group Contrastive Preference Optimization (GCPO), a reinforcement learning algorithm that leverages human pairwise preference data to reinforce our pointwise RRM. After building the RRM, we use GRPO to train editing models with this non-differentiable yet powerful reward model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Edit-RRM surpasses powerful VLMs such as Seed-1.5-VL and Seed-1.6-VL as an editing-specific reward model, and we observe a clear scaling trend, with performance consistently improving from 3B to 7B parameters. Moreover, Edit-R1 delivers gains to editing models like FLUX.1-kontext, highlighting its effectiveness in enhancing image editing.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于推理验证器的奖励模型Edit-RRM，通过链式思维细粒度评估编辑质量，并利用强化学习提升图像编辑效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像编辑奖励模型仅给出整体分数，忽略不同指令要求，导致奖励有偏，缺乏细粒度、可解释的评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够细粒度、可解释地评估图像编辑质量的奖励模型，并利用它来提升编辑模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Edit-R1框架，包含两个阶段：1) 构建基于链式思维（CoT）的推理奖励模型（Edit-RRM），通过监督微调（SFT）冷启动生成CoT奖励轨迹，再使用组对比偏好优化（GCPO）强化点式RRM；2) 利用GRPO算法以该非可微奖励模型训练编辑模型。
contributions: 提出从简单评分器转向推理验证器（Edit-RRM），实现细粒度、可解释的编辑质量评估。
提出组对比偏好优化（GCPO）算法，利用人类偏好数据强化点式奖励模型。
实验证明Edit-RRM超越强大VLM作为编辑奖励模型，且Edit-R1能提升现有编辑模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个编辑任务上评估，Edit-RRM超越Seed-1.5-VL和Seed-1.6-VL，且性能随参数规模（3B到7B）一致提升；Edit-R1提升了FLUX.1-kontext等编辑模型的效果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人类偏好数据，数据收集成本高。
CoT推理过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于推理验证器的奖励模型Edit-RRM，通过链式思维细粒度评估编辑质量，并利用强化学习提升图像编辑效果。

papers.title: REVIVE 3D: Refinement via Encoded Voluminous Inflated prior for Volume Enhancement
papers.abstract: Recent generative models have shown strong performance in generating diverse 3D assets from 2D images, a fundamental research topic in computer vision and graphics. However, these models still struggle to generate voluminous 3D assets when the input is a flat image that provides limited 3D cues. We introduce REVIVE 3D, a two-stage, plug-and-play pipeline for generating voluminous 3D assets from flat images. In Stage 1, we construct an Inflated Prior by inflating the foreground silhouette to recover global volume and superimposing part-aware details to capture local structure. In Stage 2, 3D Latent Refinement injects Gaussian noise into the Inflated Prior's latent and then denoises it, using the prior's geometric cues to leverage the backbone's pretrained 3D knowledge. Furthermore, our framework supports image-conditioned 3D editing. To quantify volume and surface flatness, we propose Compactness and Normal Anisotropy. We validate Compactness and Normal Anisotropy through a user study, showing that these metrics align with human perception of volume and quality. We show that REVIVE 3D achieves state-of-the-art performance on a challenging flat image dataset, based on extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations.

analysis.tldr: REVIVE 3D通过两阶段流水线从扁平图像生成体积感强的3D资产，并提出了新的体积度量指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成模型从2D图像生成3D资产时，对于缺乏3D线索的扁平图像难以生成体积感强的结果，限制了应用场景。
analysis.problem: 如何从扁平图像生成具有真实体积感的3D资产。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扁平图像提供的3D线索有限，导致生成模型难以恢复全局体积和局部结构。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：第一阶段通过膨胀前景掩膜恢复全局体积并叠加部件感知细节构建膨胀先验；第二阶段对膨胀先验的潜在表示加噪并去噪，利用先验的几何线索激活预训练3D模型的先验知识。
contributions: 提出REVIVE 3D，一种即插即用的两阶段流水线，从扁平图像生成体积感强的3D资产。
提出Compactness和Normal Anisotropy两个度量指标，用于量化体积和表面平坦度，并通过用户研究验证其与人类感知一致。
在挑战性的扁平图像数据集上达到最先进性能，并支持图像条件3D编辑。
analysis.experiments: 在扁平图像数据集上进行了定性和定量评估，包括用户研究验证新度量指标，结果表明达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练3D模型的质量和泛化能力。
两阶段流水线可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: REVIVE 3D通过两阶段流水线从扁平图像生成体积感强的3D资产，并提出了新的体积度量指标。

papers.title: Towards All-Day Perception for Off-Road Driving: A Large-Scale Multispectral Dataset and Comprehensive Benchmark
papers.abstract: Off-road nighttime autonomous driving suffers from unreliable visible-light perception, making infrared modality crucial for accurate freespace detection. However, progress remains limited due to the scarcity of annotated infrared off-road datasets and the inter-frame inconsistencies inherent to current single-frame methods. To address these gaps, we present the IRON dataset, which, to our knowledge, is the first large-scale infrared dataset for off-road temporal freespace detection under all-day conditions, with strong support for nighttime perception. The dataset comprises 24,314 densely annotated infrared images with synchronized RGB images in diverse scenes and different light conditions. Building upon this dataset, we propose IRONet, a novel flow-free framework for temporal freespace detection that addresses inter-frame inconsistencies by aggregating historical context via a memory-attention mechanism and a carefully designed mask decoder. On our IRON dataset, IRONet achieves state-of-the-art performance, reaching 82.93%(+1.19%) IoU and 90.66%(+0.71%) F1 score at real-time inference. Remarkably, IRONet also exhibits robust generalization to RGB modalities on ORFD and Rellis datasets. Overall, our work establishes a foundation for reliable all-day off-road autonomous driving and future research in infrared temporal perception. The code and IRON dataset are available at https://github.com/wsnbws/IRON.

analysis.tldr: 首个大规模红外越野时序自由空间检测数据集IRON及流无关框架IRONet，实现全天候夜间感知SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 越野夜间自动驾驶中可见光感知不可靠，红外模态对自由空间检测至关重要，但缺乏标注的红外越野数据集，且现有单帧方法存在帧间不一致问题。
analysis.problem: 解决红外越野场景下时序自由空间检测的数据稀缺和帧间不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出IRONet，一种无流的时序自由空间检测框架，通过记忆注意力机制聚合历史上下文，并设计掩码解码器解决帧间不一致。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模红外越野时序自由空间检测数据集IRON，包含24,314张密集标注红外图像及同步RGB图像。
提出IRONet框架，在IRON数据集上达到SOTA性能（IoU 82.93%，F1 90.66%），并泛化到RGB模态。
analysis.experiments: 在IRON数据集上评估，IRONet达到82.93% IoU和90.66% F1，并在ORFD和Rellis数据集上验证了RGB模态的泛化性。
limitations: 可能仅针对越野场景，泛化到城市道路等场景需验证。
红外图像在极端天气（如大雾）下的性能未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个大规模红外越野时序自由空间检测数据集IRON及流无关框架IRONet，实现全天候夜间感知SOTA。

papers.title: Debiasing Reward Models via Causally Motivated Inference-Time Intervention
papers.abstract: Reward models (RMs) play a central role in aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences. However, RMs are often sensitive to spurious features such as response length. Existing inference-time approaches for mitigating these biases typically focus exclusively on response length, resulting in performance trade-offs. In this paper, we propose causally motivated intervention for mitigating multiple types of biases in RMs at inference time. Our method first identifies neurons whose activations are strongly correlated with predefined bias attributes, and applies neuron-level intervention that suppresses these signals. We evaluate our method on RM benchmarks and observe reductions in sensitivity to spurious features across diverse bias types, without inducing performance trade-offs. Moreover, when used for preference annotation, small RMs (2B and 7B) with our method, which edits less than 2% of all the neurons in RMs, enable LLMs to improve alignment, achieving performance comparable to that of a state-of-the-art 70B RM on AlpacaEval and MT-Bench. Further analysis reveals that bias signals are primarily encoded by neurons in early layers, shedding light on the internal mechanisms of bias exploitation in RMs.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果动机的推理时神经元干预，同时消除奖励模型中的多种虚假特征偏差，无需性能折衷。
analysis.research_motivation: 奖励模型在LLM对齐中至关重要，但容易受到响应长度等虚假特征的影响，现有推理时方法仅针对单一偏差且存在性能权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲性能的前提下，在推理时同时消除奖励模型中的多种类型偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 偏差信号主要由早期层的神经元编码，干预少量神经元（<2%）即可有效去偏。
analysis.method: 识别与预定义偏差属性强相关的神经元，并在推理时对这些神经元进行抑制干预。
contributions: 提出一种因果动机的推理时干预方法，可同时缓解多种偏差。
在2B和7B小模型上仅编辑<2%的神经元，即可达到70B RM的对齐性能。
揭示偏差信号主要编码在早期层，为RM内部机制提供见解。
analysis.experiments: 在RM基准上评估，观察到对多种虚假特征的敏感性降低且无性能折衷；在AlpacaEval和MT-Bench上，使用该方法的小RM使LLM对齐性能与70B RM相当。
limitations: 需要预定义偏差属性，可能无法覆盖所有未知偏差。
干预方法依赖神经元相关性分析，可能受限于相关性而非因果性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因果动机的推理时神经元干预，同时消除奖励模型中的多种虚假特征偏差，无需性能折衷。

papers.title: Uni-HOI:A Unified framework for Learning the Joint distribution of Text and Human-Object Interaction
papers.abstract: Modeling 4D human-object interaction (HOI) is a compelling challenge in computer vision and an essential technology powering virtual and mixed-reality applications. While existing works have achieved promising results on specific HOI tasks-such as text-conditioned HOI generation and human motion generation from object motion, they typically rely on task-specific architectures and lack a unified framework capable of handling diverse conditional inputs. Building on this, we propose Uni-HOI, a unified framework that learns the joint distribution among text, human motion, and object motion. By leveraging large language models (LLMs) and two motion-specific vector quantized variational autoencoders (VQ-VAEs), we convert heterogeneous motion data into token sequences compatible with LLM inputs, enabling seamless integration and joint modeling of all three modalities. We introduce a two-stage training strategy: the first stage performs multi-task learning on a large-scale HOI dataset to capture the underlying correlations among the three modalities, while the second stage fine-tunes the model on specific tasks to further enhance performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Uni-HOI achieves remarkable performances on multiple HOI-related tasks including text-driven HOI generation, object motion-driven human motion generation (optionally with text) and human motion-driven object motion prediction within a unified framework.

analysis.tldr: Uni-HOI 是一个统一框架，通过 LLM 和 VQ-VAE 学习文本、人体运动与物体运动的联合分布，实现多种人-物交互任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有的人-物交互（HOI）方法通常针对特定任务设计独立架构，缺乏统一框架处理多种条件输入，限制了在虚拟/混合现实等应用中的灵活性和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一框架，能够同时处理文本、人体运动和物体运动三种模态，并支持多种 HOI 相关任务（如文本驱动的 HOI 生成、物体运动驱动的人体运动生成等）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用大语言模型（LLM）和两个运动专用 VQ-VAE 将异构运动数据转换为 token 序列，实现三种模态的联合建模；采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段在大型 HOI 数据集上进行多任务学习以捕获模态间关联，第二阶段在特定任务上微调以提升性能。
contributions: 提出 Uni-HOI，首个统一框架学习文本、人体运动和物体运动的联合分布。
利用 LLM 和 VQ-VAE 实现异构运动数据的 token 化与多模态联合建模。
设计两阶段训练策略，在多个 HOI 任务上取得显著性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 HOI 相关任务（文本驱动 HOI 生成、物体运动驱动人体运动生成、人体运动驱动物体运动预测）上进行实验，结果表明 Uni-HOI 取得了显著性能。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模 HOI 数据集，数据获取成本高。
两阶段训练策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Uni-HOI 是一个统一框架，通过 LLM 和 VQ-VAE 学习文本、人体运动与物体运动的联合分布，实现多种人-物交互任务。

papers.title: EdgeFM: Efficient Edge Inference for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong applicability in edge industrial applications, yet their deployment remains severely constrained by requirements for deterministic low latency and stable execution under resource limitations. Existing frameworks either rely on bloated general-purpose designs or force developers into opaque, hardware-specific closed-source ecosystems, leading to hardware lock-in limitation and poor cross-platform adaptability. Observing that modern AI agents can efficiently search and tune configurations to generate highly optimized low-level kernels for standard LLM operators, we propose EdgeFM, a lightweight, agent-driven VLM/LLM inference framework tailored for cross-platform industrial edge deployment. EdgeFM removes non-essential features to reduce single-request latency, and encapsulates agent-tuned kernel optimizations as a modular library of reusable skills. By allowing direct invocation of these skills rather than waiting for closed-source implementations, it effectively closes the performance gap long dominated by proprietary toolchains. The framework natively supports mainstream platforms including x86 and NVIDIA Orin SoCs, and represents the first end-to-end VLA deployment on the domestic Horizon Journey platform, enhancing cross-platform portability. In most cases, it yields clearly better inference performance than conventional vendor-specific toolchains, achieving up to 1.49 times speedup over TensorRT-Edge-LLM on the NVIDIA Orin platform. Experimental results show that EdgeFM delivers favorable end-to-end inference performance, providing an open-source, production-grade solution for diverse edge industrial scenarios.

analysis.tldr: EdgeFM 是一个轻量级、智能体驱动的 VLM/LLM 推理框架，通过去除冗余功能和封装优化内核库，在边缘设备上实现跨平台高效推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLM 部署框架要么臃肿通用，要么依赖封闭生态，导致硬件锁定和跨平台适应性差，无法满足边缘工业场景对低延迟和稳定性的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量、跨平台、高性能的 VLM/LLM 推理框架，以克服现有框架的硬件锁定和性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现代 AI 智能体能够高效搜索和调优配置，为标准 LLM 算子生成高度优化的底层内核，这启发了将智能体调优的内核封装为可复用技能库的思路。
analysis.method: EdgeFM 框架通过去除非必要功能降低单请求延迟，并将智能体调优的内核优化封装为模块化技能库，支持直接调用而非等待闭源实现，从而缩小与专有工具链的性能差距。
contributions: 提出首个端到端 VLA 部署在国产 Horizon Journey 平台上的框架，增强跨平台可移植性。
在 NVIDIA Orin 平台上相比 TensorRT-Edge-LLM 实现最高 1.49 倍加速，提供开源生产级解决方案。
analysis.experiments: 在 x86 和 NVIDIA Orin SoC 等主流平台以及国产 Horizon Journey 平台上进行实验，与 TensorRT-Edge-LLM 等专有工具链对比，EdgeFM 在多数情况下取得更优推理性能，最高加速 1.49 倍。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定硬件平台进行了优化，泛化性需进一步验证。
智能体调优内核的通用性和可迁移性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EdgeFM 是一个轻量级、智能体驱动的 VLM/LLM 推理框架，通过去除冗余功能和封装优化内核库，在边缘设备上实现跨平台高效推理。

papers.title: PRTS: A Primitive Reasoning and Tasking System via Contrastive Representations
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models advance robotic control via strong visual-linguistic priors. However, existing VLAs predominantly frame pretraining as supervised behavior cloning, overlooking the fundamental nature of robot learning as a goal-reaching process that requires understanding temporal task progress. We present \textbf{PRTS} (\textbf{P}rimitive \textbf{R}easoning and \textbf{T}asking \textbf{S}ystem), a VLA foundation model that reformulates pretraining through Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning. By treating language instructions as goals and employing contrastive reinforcement learning, PRTS learns a unified embedding space where the inner product of state-action and goal embeddings approximates the log-discounted goal occupancy, the probability of reaching the language-specified goal from the current state-action, quantitatively assessing physical feasibility beyond static semantic matching. PRTS draws this dense goal-reachability supervision directly from offline trajectories without reward annotations, and folds it into the VLM backbone via a role-aware causal mask, incurring negligible overhead over vanilla behavior cloning. This paradigm endows the high-level reasoning system with intrinsic goal reachability awareness, bridging semantic reasoning and temporal task progress, and further benefits goal-conditioned action prediction. Pretrained on 167B tokens of diverse manipulation and embodied-reasoning data, PRTS reaches state-of-the-art performance on LIBERO, LIBERO-Pro, LIBERO-Plus, SimplerEnv, and a real-world suite of 14 complex tasks, with particularly substantial gains on long-horizon, contact-rich, and zero-shot novel-instruction settings, confirming that injecting goal-reachability awareness significantly improves both execution success and long-horizon planning of general-purpose robotic foundation policies.

analysis.tldr: PRTS通过对比强化学习将目标可达性意识注入VLA模型，显著提升机器人长程任务执行与零样本泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型主要采用监督行为克隆进行预训练，忽略了机器人学习的本质是目标到达过程，缺乏对时间任务进展的理解，导致长程任务和接触密集型任务表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLA模型在预训练阶段获得目标可达性意识，从而桥接语义推理与时间任务进展，提升目标条件动作预测和长程规划能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将语言指令作为目标，采用目标条件强化学习和对比强化学习，学习统一嵌入空间，其中状态-动作嵌入与目标嵌入的内积近似对数折扣目标占用率，量化物理可行性；通过角色感知因果掩码将密集目标可达性监督融入VLM骨干，开销可忽略。
contributions: 提出PRTS，将VLA预训练重新定义为目标条件强化学习，注入目标可达性意识。
设计对比强化学习框架，从离线轨迹中提取密集目标可达性监督，无需奖励标注。
在多个基准和真实任务上达到SOTA，尤其在长程、接触密集和零样本新指令场景中显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO、LIBERO-Pro、LIBERO-Plus、SimplerEnv和14个复杂真实任务上评估，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模离线数据，数据收集成本高。
对比学习框架对负样本选择敏感，可能影响泛化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PRTS通过对比强化学习将目标可达性意识注入VLA模型，显著提升机器人长程任务执行与零样本泛化能力。

papers.title: Security Attack and Defense Strategies for Autonomous Agent Frameworks: A Layered Review with OpenClaw as a Case Study
papers.abstract: Autonomous agent frameworks built upon large language models (LLMs) are evolving into complex, tool-integrated, and continuously operating systems, introducing security risks beyond traditional prompt-level vulnerabilities. As this paradigm is still at an early stage of development, a timely and systematic understanding of its security implications is increasingly important. Although a growing body of work has examined different attack surfaces and defense problems in agent systems, existing studies remain scattered across individual aspects of agent security, and there is still a lack of a layered review on this topic. To address this gap, this survey presents a layered review of security risks and defense strategies in autonomous agent frameworks, with OpenClaw as a case study. We organize the analysis into four security-relevant layers: the context and instruction layer, the tool and action layer, the state and persistence layer, and the ecosystem and automation layer. For each layer, we summarize its functional role, representative security risks, and corresponding defense strategies. Based on this layered analysis, we further identify that threats in autonomous agent frameworks may propagate across layers, from manipulated inputs to unsafe actions, persistent state contamination, and broader ecosystem-level impact. Finally, we highlight potential key challenges, including research imbalance across layers, the lack of long-horizon evaluation, and weak ecosystem trust models, and outline future directions toward more systematic and integrated defenses.

analysis.tldr: 对自主智能体框架的安全攻击与防御进行分层综述，并以OpenClaw为案例。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的自主智能体框架快速发展，但安全风险超越传统提示词层面，现有研究分散，缺乏系统性分层综述。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对自主智能体框架安全风险与防御策略的系统性分层梳理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 威胁可能跨层传播，从操纵输入到不安全动作、持久状态污染及生态系统影响；存在研究不平衡、缺乏长程评估和信任模型薄弱等问题。
analysis.method: 提出四层安全分析框架（上下文与指令层、工具与动作层、状态与持久层、生态系统与自动化层），每层总结功能、风险与防御，并以OpenClaw案例验证。
contributions: 首次对自主智能体框架安全进行分层综述，覆盖四层安全相关层面。
识别跨层威胁传播机制及当前研究挑战，提出未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述性质，未提出新的防御方法或实证评估。
案例OpenClaw可能不具普遍代表性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对自主智能体框架的安全攻击与防御进行分层综述，并以OpenClaw为案例。

papers.title: Improving Graph Few-shot Learning with Hyperbolic Space and Denoising Diffusion
papers.abstract: Graph few-shot learning, which focuses on effectively learning from only a small number of labeled nodes to quickly adapt to new tasks, has garnered significant research attention. Despite recent advances in graph few-shot learning that have demonstrated promising performance, existing methods still suffer from several key limitations. First, during the meta-training phase, these methods typically perform node representation learning in Euclidean space, which often fails to capture the inherently hierarchical structure existing in real-world graph data. Second, during the meta-testing phase, they usually fit an empirical target distribution derived from only a few support samples, even when this distribution significantly deviates from the true underlying distribution. To address these issues, we propose IMPRESS, a novel framework that IMproves graPh few-shot learning with hypeRbolic spacE and denoiSing diffuSion. Specifically, our model learns node representations in a hyperbolic space and enriches the support distribution through denoising diffusion mechanisms. Theoretically, IMPRESS achieves a tighter generalization bound. Empirically, IMPRESS consistently outperforms competitive baselines across multiple benchmark datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出IMPRESS框架，结合双曲空间和去噪扩散提升图小样本学习的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 图小样本学习面临两个关键瓶颈：元训练阶段在欧氏空间学习节点表示难以捕捉图数据的层次结构；元测试阶段仅用少量支持样本拟合经验分布，易偏离真实分布。
analysis.problem: 解决图小样本学习中层次结构表示不足和分布估计偏差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在欧氏空间学习节点表示无法捕捉层次结构，且基于少量支持样本的经验分布与真实分布存在显著偏差。
analysis.method: 提出IMPRESS框架，在双曲空间学习节点表示以捕捉层次结构，并通过去噪扩散机制丰富支持分布。
contributions: 首次将双曲空间表示与去噪扩散结合用于图小样本学习
理论证明IMPRESS具有更紧的泛化界
在多个基准数据集上超越现有方法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 双曲空间计算复杂度可能较高
去噪扩散机制可能引入额外训练开销
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IMPRESS框架，结合双曲空间和去噪扩散提升图小样本学习的泛化能力。

papers.title: RAY-TOLD: Ray-Based Latent Dynamics for Dense Dynamic Obstacle Avoidance with TDMPC
papers.abstract: Dense, dynamic crowds pose a persistent challenge for autonomous mobile robots. Purely reactive planning methods, such as Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control, often fail to escape local minima in complex scenarios due to their limited prediction horizon. To bridge this gap, we propose Ray-based Task-Oriented Latent Dynamics (RAY-TOLD), a hybrid control architecture that integrates obstacle information into latent dynamics and utilizes the robustness of physics-based MPPI with the long-horizon foresight of reinforcement learning. RAY-TOLD leverages a LiDAR-centric latent dynamics model to encode high-dimensional sensor data into a compact state representation, enabling the learning of a terminal value function and a policy prior. We introduce a policy mixture sampling strategy that augments the MPPI candidate population with trajectories derived from the learned policy, effectively guiding the planner towards the goal while maintaining kinematic feasibility. Extensive tests in a stochastic environment with high-density dynamic obstacles demonstrate that our method outperforms the MPPI baseline, reducing the collision rate. The results confirm that blending short-horizon physics-based rollouts with learned long-horizon intent significantly enhances navigation reliability and safety.

analysis.tldr: 提出RAY-TOLD混合控制架构，将障碍物信息融入潜在动力学，结合MPPI与强化学习实现密集动态障碍物环境下的可靠导航。
analysis.research_motivation: 密集动态人群对自主移动机器人构成持续挑战，纯反应式规划方法（如MPPI）因预测时域有限，在复杂场景中常陷入局部极小值，导致碰撞率高。
analysis.problem: 解决密集动态障碍物环境中，纯反应式规划方法因短视而无法有效避开障碍物的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RAY-TOLD混合控制架构，包含LiDAR中心的潜在动力学模型以编码高维传感器数据，学习终端价值函数和策略先验，并通过策略混合采样策略将学习策略生成的轨迹注入MPPI候选种群，引导规划器向目标前进。
contributions: 提出RAY-TOLD混合控制架构，融合基于物理的MPPI与强化学习的长期预见能力。
引入策略混合采样策略，增强MPPI在密集动态障碍物环境中的导航可靠性和安全性。
analysis.experiments: 在随机高密度动态障碍物环境中进行测试，与MPPI基线对比，碰撞率降低。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖LiDAR传感器，对其他传感器模态的泛化性未知。
在极端密集或非结构化环境中性能可能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RAY-TOLD混合控制架构，将障碍物信息融入潜在动力学，结合MPPI与强化学习实现密集动态障碍物环境下的可靠导航。

papers.title: LA-Pose: Latent Action Pretraining Meets Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: This paper revisits camera pose estimation through the lens of self-supervised pretraining, focusing on inverse-dynamics pretraining as a scalable alternative to the current trend of fully supervised training with 3D annotations. Concretely, we employ inverse- and forward-dynamics models to learn latent action representations, similar to Genie from large-scale driving videos. Our idea is simple yet effective. Existing methods use latent actions in their original capacity, that is, as action conditioning of world-models or as proxies of robot action parameters in policy networks. Our method, dubbed LA-Pose, repurposes the latent action features as inputs to a camera pose estimator, finetuned on a limited set of high-quality 3D annotations. This formulation enables accurate and generalizable pose prediction while maintaining feed-forward efficiency. Extensive experiments on driving benchmarks show that LA-Pose achieves competitive and even superior performance to state-of-the-art methods while using orders of magnitude less labeled data. Concretely, on the Waymo and PandaSet benchmarks, LA-Pose achieves over 10% higher pose accuracy than recent feed-forward methods. To our knowledge, this work is the first to demonstrate the power of inverse-dynamics self-supervised learning for pose estimation.

analysis.tldr: LA-Pose利用逆动力学自监督预训练学习潜在动作表征，仅需少量标注数据即可实现高精度相机位姿估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有相机位姿估计方法严重依赖大量3D标注数据进行全监督训练，成本高昂且泛化性受限。自监督预训练在视觉任务中已展现潜力，但尚未被有效应用于位姿估计。
analysis.problem: 如何利用自监督预训练（特别是逆动力学）从大规模驾驶视频中学习可迁移的潜在动作表征，以在少量标注数据下实现高精度、泛化的相机位姿估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LA-Pose方法：首先使用逆动力学和正向动力学模型从大规模驾驶视频中预训练潜在动作表征（类似Genie），然后将这些潜在动作特征作为输入，送入一个在少量高质量3D标注上微调的相机位姿估计器，实现前馈式高效位姿预测。
contributions: 首次将逆动力学自监督学习应用于相机位姿估计，展示了其强大潜力。
提出LA-Pose框架，利用潜在动作表征实现少量标注下的高精度位姿估计，在Waymo和PandaSet上比前馈方法提升超10%位姿精度。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo和PandaSet驾驶基准上评估，LA-Pose使用数量级更少的标注数据，取得了与最先进方法竞争甚至更优的性能，位姿精度比近期前馈方法提升超10%。
limitations: 方法在驾驶场景下验证，对其他领域（如室内、无人机）的泛化性未知。
依赖大规模驾驶视频进行预训练，数据获取成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LA-Pose利用逆动力学自监督预训练学习潜在动作表征，仅需少量标注数据即可实现高精度相机位姿估计。

papers.title: Sampler-Robust Optimization under Generative Models
papers.abstract: Modern stochastic optimization pipelines increasingly rely on learned generative models to represent uncertainty, while downstream decisions are evaluated almost entirely through Monte Carlo scenarios. This shifts the operational object of uncertainty from an explicit probability law to the sampler induced by the learned generator. Reliability therefore depends on two errors: sampler misspecification and finite-simulation error. We propose Sampler-Robust Optimization (SRO), which optimizes decisions against the worst-case sampler induced by perturbing the learned generator. This sampler-first formulation aligns with simulation-based decision pipelines and admits a sharpness-aware interpretation: it favors decisions whose performance is stable under generator perturbations, rather than merely under the nominal sampler. Under a coverage assumption, we show that the empirical worst-case objective provides a high-probability upper certificate for the true population objective, with finite-simulation error partially absorbed by the robustification used to guard against sampler misspecification. The framework accommodates generative models with or without explicit densities and admits efficient minimax procedures. Portfolio-optimization experiments show that SRO produces more stable decisions and improves out-of-sample performance under distribution shift.

analysis.tldr: 提出采样器鲁棒优化（SRO），通过扰动生成模型来优化最坏情况下的决策，提升分布偏移下的稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代随机优化依赖生成模型表示不确定性，但决策评估仅通过蒙特卡洛场景，存在采样器误设和有限模拟误差，导致可靠性问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在生成模型驱动的随机优化中，同时应对采样器误设和有限模拟误差，实现鲁棒决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出采样器鲁棒优化（SRO），优化决策以对抗扰动生成模型诱导的最坏情况采样器，并采用锐度感知解释。
contributions: 提出采样器鲁棒优化（SRO）框架，直接针对采样器进行鲁棒优化。
证明经验最坏情况目标以高概率为真实总体目标提供上界，且有限模拟误差被部分吸收。
analysis.experiments: 在投资组合优化实验中，SRO产生更稳定的决策，并在分布偏移下提升样本外性能。
limitations: 可能依赖覆盖假设，实际中难以验证。
最坏情况优化可能过于保守。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出采样器鲁棒优化（SRO），通过扰动生成模型来优化最坏情况下的决策，提升分布偏移下的稳定性。

papers.title: Context as Prior: Bayesian-Inspired Intent Inference for Non-Speaking Agents with a Household Cat Testbed
papers.abstract: Many agents in real-world environments cannot reliably communicate their goals through language, including household pets, pre-verbal infants, and other non-speaking embodied agents. In such settings, intent must be inferred from incomplete behavioral observations in context-rich environments. This creates a core ambiguity: observable behavior is often noisy or underspecified, while context provides strong prior information but can also induce brittle shortcut predictions if used naively. We present CatSignal, a Bayesian-inspired probabilistic framework for multimodal intent inference that models spatial context as a prior-like constraint and behavioral observations as evidence. Rather than treating context as an ordinary input feature, our method uses a context-gated Product-of-Experts formulation to compute posterior-like intent distributions from context, pose dynamics, and acoustic cues. We instantiate this formulation in a household cat setting as a focused proof-of-concept for intent inference in non-speaking agents. Under Leave-One-Video-Out evaluation on a multimodal domestic cat dataset, the proposed prior-guided fusion achieves the best overall accuracy of 77.72%, outperforming feature concatenation (71.83%) and stronger late-fusion baselines. More importantly, it substantially reduces context-driven shortcut failures in ambiguous cases. While simpler fusion strategies remain competitive in Macro-F1 and selective prediction, the proposed model provides the strongest overall accuracy and the best suppression of context-based shortcut collapse.

analysis.tldr: 提出贝叶斯启发的概率框架CatSignal，将空间上下文作为先验约束，用于非语言智能体的意图推断，在家庭猫数据集上取得77.72%准确率并减少上下文捷径失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实环境中许多智能体（如宠物、婴儿）无法通过语言可靠传达目标，意图必须从行为观察中推断，但行为噪声大且上下文易导致捷径预测。
analysis.problem: 如何利用上下文先验信息进行多模态意图推断，避免上下文导致的捷径预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：简单使用上下文作为输入特征会导致脆弱的捷径预测；上下文先验可有效抑制歧义情况下的捷径失败。
analysis.method: CatSignal：贝叶斯启发的概率框架，采用上下文门控的专家乘积（Product-of-Experts）公式，将空间上下文作为先验约束，结合姿态动态和声学线索计算后验意图分布。
contributions: 提出CatSignal框架，将上下文作为先验而非普通输入特征，用于非语言智能体的意图推断。
在家庭猫数据集上验证，该方法在总体准确率上优于特征拼接和晚期融合基线，并显著减少上下文驱动的捷径失败。
analysis.experiments: 在家庭猫多模态数据集上进行留一视频评估，CatSignal达到77.72%总体准确率，优于特征拼接（71.83%）和晚期融合基线。
limitations: 仅在家庭猫场景中验证，泛化到其他非语言智能体（如婴儿）需进一步研究。
未提供在更大规模或更多样化数据集上的实验结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出贝叶斯启发的概率框架CatSignal，将空间上下文作为先验约束，用于非语言智能体的意图推断，在家庭猫数据集上取得77.72%准确率并减少上下文捷径失败。

papers.title: ABC: Any-Subset Autoregression via Non-Markovian Diffusion Bridges in Continuous Time and Space
papers.abstract: Generating continuous-time, continuous-space stochastic processes (e.g., videos, weather forecasts) conditioned on partial observations (e.g., first and last frames) is a fundamental challenge. Existing approaches, (e.g., diffusion models), suffer from key limitations: (1) noise-to-data evolution fails to capture structural similarity between states close in physical time and has unstable integration in low-step regimes; (2) random noise injected is insensitive to the physical process's time elapsed, resulting in incorrect dynamics; (3) they overlook conditioning on arbitrary subsets of states (e.g., irregularly sampled timesteps, future observations). We propose ABC: Any-Subset Autoregressive Models via Non-Markovian Diffusion Bridges in Continuous Time and Space. Crucially, we model the process with one continual SDE whose time variable and intermediate states track the real time and process states. This has provable advantages: (1) the starting point for generating future states is the already-close previous state, rather than uninformative noise; (2) random noise injection scales with physical time elapsed, encouraging physically plausible dynamics with similar time-adjacent states. We derive SDE dynamics via changes-of-measure on path space, yielding another advantage: (3) path-dependent conditioning on arbitrary subsets of the state history and/or future. To learn these dynamics, we derive a path- and time-dependent extension of denoising score matching. Our experiments show ABC's superiority to competing methods on multiple domains, including video generation and weather forecasting.

analysis.tldr: 提出ABC框架，通过非马尔可夫扩散桥实现连续时空任意子集自回归生成，在视频和天气预测任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在生成连续时空过程（如视频、天气预报）时，存在噪声到数据演化无法捕捉物理时间相近状态的结构相似性、低步数下积分不稳定、随机噪声注入与物理时间无关导致动力学错误、以及无法灵活处理任意子集条件（如不规则采样时间步、未来观测）等局限性。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地生成连续时间、连续空间的随机过程，并支持基于任意子集状态（如首尾帧、不规则采样时间步）的条件生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有扩散模型的关键瓶颈：噪声到数据演化忽略物理时间相近状态的结构相似性；随机噪声注入与物理时间无关导致动力学错误；无法处理任意子集条件。
analysis.method: 提出ABC框架，用一个连续的SDE建模过程，其时间变量和中间状态跟踪真实时间和过程状态。通过路径空间上的测度变换推导SDE动力学，实现路径依赖的任意子集条件生成，并推导了路径和时间依赖的去噪分数匹配学习目标。
contributions: 提出ABC框架，通过非马尔可夫扩散桥实现连续时空任意子集自回归生成，克服现有扩散模型的三个关键局限。
推导了路径和时间依赖的去噪分数匹配方法，用于学习所提出的SDE动力学。
在视频生成和天气预报等多个领域验证了ABC优于竞争方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在视频生成和天气预报等多个领域进行了实验，显示ABC优于竞争方法，但未提供具体数值或基准细节。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度或训练效率，可能在大规模高分辨率数据上存在挑战。
方法依赖于SDE的连续时间建模，对于离散观测或非连续过程可能需要额外适配。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ABC框架，通过非马尔可夫扩散桥实现连续时空任意子集自回归生成，在视频和天气预测任务上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Softmax-GS: Generalized Gaussians Learning When to Blend or Bound
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D GS) is widely adopted for novel view synthesis due to its high training and rendering efficiency. However, its efficiency relies on the key assumption that Gaussians do not overlap in the 3D space, which leads to noticeable artifacts and view inconsistencies. In addition, the inherently diffuse boundaries of Gaussians hinder accurate reconstruction of sharp object edges. We propose Softmax-GS, a unified solution that addresses both the view-inconsistency and the diffuse-boundary problem by enforcing a softmax-based competition in overlapping regions between two Gaussians. With learnable parameters controlling the strength of the competition, it enables a continuous spectrum from smooth color blending to crisp, well-defined boundaries. Our formulation explicitly preserves order invariance for any two overlapping Gaussians and ensures that the output transmittance remains unchanged irrespective of the extent of overlapping, preventing undesirable discontinuities in the rendered output. Ablation experiments on simple geometries demonstrate the effectiveness of each component of Softmax-GS, and evaluations on real-world benchmarks show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving both reconstruction quality and parameter efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 通过可学习的软最大化竞争机制统一解决3D高斯泼溅中的视图不一致和边界模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3D GS）因高效训练和渲染被广泛用于新视角合成，但其效率依赖于高斯体在3D空间中不重叠的关键假设，导致明显伪影和视图不一致；此外，高斯体固有的弥散边界阻碍了锐利物体边缘的精确重建。
analysis.problem: 解决3D GS中重叠高斯体导致的视图不一致以及高斯体弥散边界造成的边缘模糊问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出3D GS的效率依赖于高斯体不重叠的假设，但实际中重叠不可避免，导致伪影和视图不一致；高斯体的弥散边界使得锐利边缘重建困难。
analysis.method: 提出Softmax-GS，通过可学习参数控制两个重叠高斯体之间的软最大化竞争强度，实现从平滑颜色混合到清晰边界的连续谱，并保持顺序不变性和输出透射率不变。
contributions: 提出统一的Softmax-GS框架，同时解决视图不一致和边界模糊问题。
引入可学习竞争参数，实现从平滑混合到锐利边界的连续控制。
证明该方法在简单几何和真实基准上达到最先进性能，提升重建质量和参数效率。
analysis.experiments: 在简单几何上进行消融实验验证各组件有效性，并在真实世界基准上评估，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景中大量重叠高斯体的计算开销较高。
可学习竞争参数的收敛性可能依赖初始化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过可学习的软最大化竞争机制统一解决3D高斯泼溅中的视图不一致和边界模糊问题。

papers.title: AdaBFL: Multi-Layer Defensive Adaptive Aggregation for Bzantine-Robust Federated Learning
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a popular distributed learning paradigm in machine learning, which enables multiple clients to collaboratively train models under the guidance of a server without exposing private client data. However, FL's decentralized nature makes it vulnerable to poisoning attacks, where malicious clients can submit corrupted models to manipulate the system. To counter such attacks, although various Byzantine-robust methods have been proposed, these methods struggle to provide balanced defense against multiple types of attacks or rely on possessing the dataset in the server. To deal with these drawbacks, thus, we propose an effective multi-layer defensive adaptive aggregation for Bzantine-robust federated learning (AdaBFL) based on a novel three-layer defensive mechanism, which can adaptively adjust the weights of defense algorithms to counter complex attacks. Moreover, we provide convergence properties of our AdaBFL method under the non-convex setting on non-iid data. Comprehensive experiments across multiple datasets validate the superiority of our AdaBFL over the comparable algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多层自适应防御聚合方法AdaBFL，提升联邦学习对拜占庭攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习易受投毒攻击，现有拜占庭鲁棒方法难以平衡多种攻击类型或依赖服务器拥有数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖服务器数据集的情况下，自适应防御多种拜占庭攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于三层防御机制的自适应聚合方法AdaBFL，动态调整防御算法权重以应对复杂攻击。
contributions: 提出多层自适应防御聚合框架AdaBFL，无需服务器数据集即可防御多种拜占庭攻击。
提供了非凸非独立同分布设置下的收敛性证明。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上验证了AdaBFL优于对比算法，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未考虑通信效率优化。
防御机制的计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多层自适应防御聚合方法AdaBFL，提升联邦学习对拜占庭攻击的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Secret Stealing Attacks on Local LLM Fine-Tuning through Supply-Chain Model Code Backdoors
papers.abstract: Local fine-tuning datasets routinely contain sensitive secrets such as API keys, personal identifiers, and financial records. Although ''local offline fine-tuning'' is often viewed as a privacy boundary, we reveal that compromised model code is sufficient to steal them. Current passive pretrained-weight poisoning attacks, while effective for natural language, fundamentally fail to capture such sparse high-entropy targets due to their reliance on probabilistic semantic prefixes. To bridge this gap, we identify and exploit a practical but overlooked supply-chain vector -- model code camouflaged as standard architectural definitions -- to realize a paradigm shift from passive weight poisoning to active execution hijacking. We introduce a deterministic full-chain memorization mechanism: it locks onto token-level secrets in dynamic computation flows via online tensor-rule matching, and leverages value-gradient decoupling to stealthily inject attack gradients, overcoming gradient drowning to force model memorization. Furthermore, we achieve, for the first time, attacker-verifiable secret stealing through black-box queries that precisely distinguishes true leakage from hallucination. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves over 98\% Strict ASR without compromising the primary task, and can effectively bypass defense measures including DP-SGD, semantic auditing, and code auditing.

analysis.tldr: 通过供应链模型代码后门，在本地LLM微调中实现高精度秘密窃取。
analysis.research_motivation: 本地微调数据集常包含API密钥等敏感秘密，现有被动权重投毒攻击无法有效窃取稀疏高熵目标，且供应链模型代码后门这一攻击向量被忽视。
analysis.problem: 如何在本地LLM微调过程中，通过供应链模型代码后门实现高精度、可验证的秘密窃取。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 被动权重投毒依赖概率语义前缀，对稀疏高熵秘密（如API密钥）失效；梯度淹没问题阻碍模型记忆；现有防御（DP-SGD、语义审计、代码审计）可被绕过。
analysis.method: 提出主动执行劫持范式，包括确定性全链记忆机制（在线张量规则匹配锁定令牌级秘密、值梯度解耦注入攻击梯度）和黑盒可验证秘密窃取（区分真实泄漏与幻觉）。
contributions: 首次揭示供应链模型代码后门可实现主动执行劫持，突破被动权重投毒局限。
提出确定性全链记忆机制，解决稀疏高熵秘密窃取和梯度淹没问题。
实现首个攻击者可验证的黑盒秘密窃取方法，精确区分真实泄漏与幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM微调场景中，方法实现超过98%的严格攻击成功率（Strict ASR），且不损害主任务性能，能有效绕过DP-SGD、语义审计和代码审计等防御。
limitations: 依赖攻击者能够篡改模型代码的供应链场景。
未讨论对更大规模模型或不同微调范式的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过供应链模型代码后门，在本地LLM微调中实现高精度秘密窃取。

papers.title: Sparse-View 3D Gaussian Splatting in the Wild
papers.abstract: We propose a 3D novel sparse-view synthesis framework for unconstrained real-world scenarios that contain distractors. Unlike existing methods that primarily perform novel-view synthesis from a sparse set of constrained images without transient elements or leverage unconstrained dense image collections to enhance 3D representation in real-world scenarios, our method not only effectively tackles sparse unconstrained image collections, but also shows high-quality 3D rendering results. To do this, we introduce reference-guided view refinement with a diffusion model using a transient mask and a reference image to enhance the 3D representation and mitigate artifacts in rendered views. Furthermore, we address sparse regions in the Gaussian field via pseudo-view generation along with a sparsity-aware Gaussian replication strategy to amplify Gaussians in the sparse regions. Extensive experiments on publicly available datasets demonstrate that our methodology consistently outperforms existing methods (e.g., PSNR - 17.2%, SSIM - 10.8%, LPIPS - 4.0%) and provides high-fidelity 3D rendering results. This advancement paves the way for realizing unconstrained real-world scenarios without labor-intensive data acquisition. Our project page is available at $\href{https://robotic-vision-lab.github.io/SaveWildGS/}{here}$

analysis.tldr: 提出一种针对无约束真实场景的稀疏视图3D高斯泼溅方法，通过扩散模型参考引导和稀疏感知高斯复制策略提升渲染质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法要么需要密集图像集合，要么无法处理稀疏无约束场景中的瞬态干扰物，限制了3D渲染在真实世界中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏且包含干扰物的无约束图像集合中实现高质量3D新视角合成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀疏视图下高斯场存在稀疏区域，导致渲染伪影；无约束场景中的瞬态干扰物影响3D表示质量。
analysis.method: 引入扩散模型进行参考引导视图细化，使用瞬态掩码和参考图像增强3D表示；通过伪视图生成和稀疏感知高斯复制策略放大稀疏区域的高斯分布。
contributions: 提出一种针对稀疏无约束真实场景的3D新视角合成框架，有效处理干扰物。
设计参考引导视图细化和稀疏感知高斯复制策略，显著提升渲染质量。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上，PSNR提升17.2%，SSIM提升10.8%，LPIPS降低4.0%。
limitations: 依赖扩散模型可能增加计算开销。
伪视图生成的质量可能影响最终结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种针对无约束真实场景的稀疏视图3D高斯泼溅方法，通过扩散模型参考引导和稀疏感知高斯复制策略提升渲染质量。

papers.title: InteractWeb-Bench: Can Multimodal Agent Escape Blind Execution in Interactive Website Generation?
papers.abstract: With the advancement of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and coding agents, the website development has shifted from manual programming to agent-based project-level code synthesis. Existing benchmarks rely on idealized assumptions, especially for well-structured, information-rich inputs and static execution settings. In contrast, real-world development is constrained by a critical bottleneck: the semantic misalignment between ambiguous, low-quality instructions from non-expert users and model understanding, which results in a failure mode that we term blind execution. To address this gap, we introduce InteractWeb-Bench, the first multimodal interactive benchmark for website generation under non-expert low-code user conditions. InteractWeb-Bench introduces four types of user agents and persona-driven instruction perturbations to systematically simulate diverse user behaviors, including ambiguity, redundancy, and contradiction, grounded in requirement engineering defect taxonomies. We develop an interactive execution environment for agents, featuring a unified action space comprising Clarify, Implement, Verify, and Submit, enabling iterative intent refinement, code synthesis, and visual feedback-based validation. Extensive experiments and analysis reveal that frontier MLLM-based agents remain trapped in blind execution, exposing limitations in intent recognition and adaptive interaction.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个多模态交互式网站生成基准InteractWeb-Bench，揭示前沿MLLM代理在非专家用户低质量指令下陷入盲执行失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有网站生成基准依赖理想化假设（结构化输入、静态执行），而真实场景中非专家用户的指令模糊、低质，导致模型理解与用户意图语义错位，形成盲执行瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 解决多模态代理在非专家用户低代码条件下网站生成时，因指令质量差而无法识别意图、缺乏自适应交互的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到前沿MLLM代理在非专家用户指令下陷入盲执行（blind execution），即无法识别指令中的歧义、冗余和矛盾，缺乏意图识别和自适应交互能力。
analysis.method: 构建InteractWeb-Bench基准，引入四种用户代理和基于需求工程缺陷分类法的指令扰动（歧义、冗余、矛盾），并开发统一动作空间（Clarify, Implement, Verify, Submit）的交互执行环境。
contributions: 首个针对非专家用户低代码条件的多模态交互式网站生成基准InteractWeb-Bench。
系统模拟用户行为的指令扰动方法和统一动作空间的交互执行环境。
实验揭示前沿MLLM代理在盲执行中的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅评估了特定MLLM代理，泛化性需验证。
指令扰动类型可能未覆盖所有真实用户行为。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个多模态交互式网站生成基准InteractWeb-Bench，揭示前沿MLLM代理在非专家用户低质量指令下陷入盲执行失败模式。

papers.title: Understanding Adversarial Transferability in Vision-Language Models for Autonomous Driving: A Cross-Architecture Analysis
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in autonomous driving because they combine visual perception with language-based reasoning, supporting more interpretable decision-making, yet their robustness to physical adversarial attacks, especially whether such attacks transfer across different VLM architectures, is not well understood and poses a practical risk when attackers do not know which model a vehicle uses. We address this gap with a systematic cross-architecture study of adversarial transferability in VLM-based driving, evaluating three representative architectures (Dolphins, OmniDrive, and LeapVAD) using physically realizable patches placed on roadside infrastructure in both crosswalk and highway scenarios. Our transfer-matrix evaluation shows high cross-architecture effectiveness, with transfer rates of 73-91% (mean TR = 0.815 for crosswalk and 0.833 for highway) and sustained frame-level manipulation over 64.7-79.4% of the critical decision window even when patches are not optimized for the target model.

analysis.tldr: 自动驾驶VLM中对抗样本跨架构迁移率高，物理攻击可有效转移。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶中VLM的鲁棒性研究不足，尤其是物理对抗攻击在不同VLM架构间的迁移性未知，实际攻击者可能利用此漏洞。
analysis.problem: 评估自动驾驶VLM中物理对抗攻击的跨架构迁移性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要显示跨架构迁移率高（73-91%），且攻击在关键决策窗口内持续有效（64.7-79.4%）。
analysis.method: 系统跨架构研究，使用物理可实现的补丁攻击，在三种VLM架构（Dolphins、OmniDrive、LeapVAD）上评估迁移性，构建迁移矩阵。
contributions: 首次系统研究自动驾驶VLM中对抗样本的跨架构迁移性
揭示高迁移率（73-91%）和持续帧级操控效果
analysis.experiments: 在交叉口和高速公路场景下，使用物理补丁攻击评估三种VLM架构，报告迁移率和帧级操控比例。
limitations: 仅评估三种架构，可能不覆盖所有VLM类型
未考虑防御机制或自适应攻击
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自动驾驶VLM中对抗样本跨架构迁移率高，物理攻击可有效转移。

papers.title: Beyond the Mean: Within-Model Reliable Change Detection for LLM Evaluation
papers.abstract: We adapted the Reliable Change Index (RCI; Jacobson and Truax, 1991) from clinical psychology to item-level LLM version comparison on 2,000 MMLU-Pro items (K=10 samples at T=0.7). Two within-family pairs were tested: Llama 3 to 3.1 (+1.6 points) and Qwen 2.5 to 3 (+2.8 points). On the full benchmark, most items showed no reliable change (79% and 72%). However, over half the items were floor/ceiling. Among analysable items, change was bidirectional with large effect sizes: 34% improved and 28% deteriorated for Llama; 47% improved and 39% deteriorated for Qwen (median |delta p| = 0.50 and 0.90). Churn was asymmetric by difficulty: low-accuracy items improved, high-accuracy items deteriorated. Domain-level decomposition revealed family-specific reversals: Llama lost physics while Qwen lost law. Greedy single-shot evaluation missed 42% of reliably changed items and falsely flagged 25% of unchanged items. The aggregate accuracy gain is the net residual of opposing item-level movements. We recommend reporting churn rate alongside aggregate accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 将临床心理学中的可靠变化指数(RCI)引入LLM版本对比，发现聚合准确率提升掩盖了大部分项目无变化、部分项目双向显著变化的现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM评估主要依赖聚合准确率，但该指标可能掩盖模型在单个项目上的真实变化，导致对模型改进的误判。
analysis.problem: 如何从项目层面可靠地检测LLM版本之间的性能变化，避免聚合指标带来的信息丢失和误导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在MMLU-Pro上，多数项目无可靠变化（79%和72%），但超过一半项目存在地板/天花板效应；可分析项目中变化是双向的且效应量大；变化不对称：低准确率项目改善，高准确率项目退化；领域层面存在家族特异性逆转；贪婪单次评估漏检42%的可靠变化项目并误报25%未变项目。
analysis.method: 将临床心理学中的可靠变化指数(RCI)改编为项目级别的LLM版本比较方法，在2000个MMLU-Pro项目上使用K=10样本、温度T=0.7进行测试。
