contributions: 首次将RCI引入LLM评估，提供项目级别的可靠变化检测方法
揭示聚合准确率提升是项目级别双向变化的净残差，建议报告流失率(churn rate)作为补充指标
analysis.experiments: 在MMLU-Pro的2000个项目上测试了两个同族模型对：Llama 3→3.1（+1.6分）和Qwen 2.5→3（+2.8分），分析了项目级变化、领域分解和贪婪评估的缺陷。
limitations: 仅测试了两个模型族和单一基准，泛化性需验证
RCI的阈值选择可能影响结果，需进一步探讨
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将临床心理学中的可靠变化指数(RCI)引入LLM版本对比，发现聚合准确率提升掩盖了大部分项目无变化、部分项目双向显著变化的现象。

papers.title: Leading Across the Spectrum of Human-AI Relationships: A Conceptual Framework for Increasingly Heterogeneous Teams
papers.abstract: What shapes a consequential decision when human and artificial intelligence work on it together? The answer is becoming harder to see. A decision may look human-led after AI has set the frame, or appear automated while human judgment still carries decisive force. This paper offers a leadership-facing spectrum to see those relationships within a bounded mandate: Pure Human, Centaur (human-dominant, with AI in the loop), Co-equal, Minotaur (AI-dominant, with humans in the loop), and Pure AI. The spectrum asks where leadership work occurs: who frames the problem, who redirects the work, and who can answer for what follows. The five positions are landmarks that help leaders recognize configurations as they layer, drift, or change in a single decision. The central risk is misrecognition: leaders may keep a human-centered story in place after decision-shaping authority has shifted elsewhere. They may believe oversight remains meaningful when it has become ceremonial, or keep humans in the loop when their involvement could make the decision worse. The framework introduces co-adaptability, the capacity of a configuration to improve as human and non-human participants adjust together, and places it within heterogeneous teaming, where participants may vary by number, substrate, model architecture, capability, speed, memory, and form of participation. The aim is practical: to help strategic leaders and those designing or deploying AI systems recognize the configuration at work, notice when it shifts, and judge whether it fits the decision before them. These configurations will shape how power, responsibility, and trust are distributed in organizational life. Whether the futures they help create remain governable and worth inhabiting will depend on leaders who can see, early enough, where and how consequential decisions are actually being shaped.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个从纯人类到纯AI的五段式领导力光谱，帮助识别和调整人机协作中的决策配置。
analysis.research_motivation: 在人机协作决策中，领导权归属日益模糊，领导者可能误判实际决策权已转移，导致责任和信任错配。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地识别和评估人机协作中决策领导权的实际分布及其动态变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出人机协作中领导权可能漂移、分层或变化，存在误认风险（如人类中心叙事掩盖AI实际主导，监督沦为仪式性）。
analysis.method: 提出一个包含纯人类、半人马（人类主导）、对等、弥诺陶洛斯（AI主导）、纯AI五个位置的光谱框架，并引入共适应性和异质团队概念。
contributions: 提出人机关系领导力光谱，涵盖五种配置模式。
引入共适应性和异质团队概念，强调动态调整和多样性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架为概念性，缺乏实证验证。
实际应用中配置识别和转换可能复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个从纯人类到纯AI的五段式领导力光谱，帮助识别和调整人机协作中的决策配置。

papers.title: COHERENCE: Benchmarking Fine-Grained Image-Text Alignment in Interleaved Multimodal Contexts
papers.abstract: In recent years, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress on a wide range of multimodal benchmarks. Despite these advances, most existing benchmarks mainly focus on single-image or multi-image comprehension. In real-world scenarios such as document reading, information is often presented as interleaved multimodel contexts. This requires MLLMs not only to recognize the content of individual images, but also to identify relevant textual and visual evidence, establish fine-grained alignments between them, and reason over these aligned signals in interleaved contexts based on contextual evidence. However, there is still a lack of systematic benchmarks for quantifying the fine-grained understanding ability of MLLMs in interleaved image-text contexts. To fill this gap, we propose COHERENCE, a benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of MLLMs to recover fine-grained image-text correspondences in interleaved multimodal contexts. COHERENCE covers interleaved image-text content from four representative domains and contains 6,161 high-quality questions. Moreover, we perform a six-type error analysis, enabling fine-grained attribution of failures in interleaved image-text understanding to the specific capabilities missing in current MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出COHERENCE基准，评估多模态大模型在交错图文上下文中细粒度对齐能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准主要评测单图或多图理解，缺乏对交错图文上下文中细粒度对齐能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何量化多模态大模型在交错图文上下文中恢复细粒度图像-文本对应关系的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含四个领域6,161个问题的基准COHERENCE，并设计六类错误分析。
contributions: 提出COHERENCE基准，填补交错图文细粒度对齐评估空白。
提供六类错误分析，归因模型失败的具体能力缺失。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准覆盖领域有限，可能不涵盖所有交错场景。
错误分析类别可能无法完全覆盖所有失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COHERENCE基准，评估多模态大模型在交错图文上下文中细粒度对齐能力。

papers.title: Robust Learning on Heterogeneous Graphs with Heterophily: A Graph Structure Learning Approach
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous graphs with heterophily have emerged as a powerful abstraction for modeling complex real-world systems, where nodes of different types and labels interact in diverse and often non-homophilous ways. Despite recent advances, robust representation learning for such graphs remains largely unexplored, particularly in the presence of noisy or misleading connectivity. In this work, we investigate this problem and identify structural noise as a critical challenge that significantly degrades model performance. To address this issue, we propose a unified framework, Heterogeneous Graph Unified Learning (HGUL), which jointly handles heterophily and noisy graph structures. The framework consists of three complementary modules: a kNN-based graph construction module that recovers reliable local neighborhoods, a graph structure learning module that adaptively refines the adjacency by filtering noisy edges, and a heterogeneous affinity learning module that captures class-level relationships via an extended affinity matrix derived from a polynomial graph kernel. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that HGUL consistently outperforms existing methods on clean graphs and maintains strong robustness under varying levels of structural noise. The results further underscore the importance of jointly modeling heterophily and noise in heterogeneous graph learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出HGUL框架，通过图结构学习联合处理异质图中的异质性和结构噪声，提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 异质图广泛用于建模复杂系统，但现有方法未充分研究鲁棒表示学习，尤其是面对噪声或误导性连接时性能显著下降。
analysis.problem: 异质图中异质性和结构噪声共存导致模型性能退化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出结构噪声是导致模型性能显著下降的关键挑战。
analysis.method: 提出HGUL框架，包含三个模块：基于kNN的图构建恢复局部邻域、图结构学习自适应过滤噪声边、异质亲和度学习通过多项式图核捕获类级关系。
contributions: 首次系统研究异质图中异质性和结构噪声的联合鲁棒学习问题。
提出HGUL框架，集成图结构学习与异质亲和度学习，有效处理噪声和异质性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，HGUL在干净图上持续优于现有方法，并在不同结构噪声水平下保持强鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖kNN参数选择，对超参数敏感。
多项式图核的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HGUL框架，通过图结构学习联合处理异质图中的异质性和结构噪声，提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: A Real-time Scale-robust Network for Glottis Segmentation in Nasal Transnasal Intubation
papers.abstract: Nasotracheal intubation (NTI) is a critical clinical procedure for establishing and maintaining patient airway patency. Machine-assisted NTI has emerged as a pivotal approach for optimizing procedural efficiency and minimizing manual intervention. However, visual detection algorithms employed for NTI navigation encounter significant challenges, including complex anatomical environments and suboptimal illumination conditions surrounding the glottis. Additionally, the glottis presents considerable scale variability throughout the procedure, initially appearing as a small, difficult-to-capture structure before expanding to occupy nearly the entire field of view. Moreover, traditional visual detection methods often have high computational costs, making real-time, high-precision detection on portable devices challenging. To enhance NTI efficacy and address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel glottis segmentation framework optimized for vision-assisted NTI applications. First, we designed a lightweight, multi-receptive field feature extraction module to reduce intra-class differences, achieving robustness to scale variations of the glottis. This module was then stacked to form the backbone and neck of our network. Subsequently, we developed an advanced label assignment method and redefined the number of samples to further reduce intra-class differences and enhance accuracy in the complex NTI environment. Experiments on three distinct datasets demonstrate that our network surpasses state-of-the-art algorithms, achieving a segmentation mDice of 92.9\% with a compact model size of 19 MB and an inference speed exceeding 170 frames per second. % Our code and datasets will be open-sourced on GitHub after the manuscript is accepted. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/HBUT-CV/GlottisNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级、尺度鲁棒的实时声门分割网络，用于鼻气管插管导航。
analysis.research_motivation: 鼻气管插管（NTI）是维持气道通畅的关键临床操作，机器辅助NTI可提升效率并减少人工干预，但现有视觉检测算法面临复杂解剖环境、光照不足、声门尺度剧烈变化以及高计算成本等挑战，难以在便携设备上实现实时高精度检测。
analysis.problem: 解决NTI导航中声门分割的尺度变化、复杂环境干扰和实时性要求之间的矛盾。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 声门在手术过程中尺度变化显著，初始为难以捕捉的小结构，随后扩展至几乎充满视野；传统方法计算成本高，难以在便携设备上实时运行。
analysis.method: 设计轻量级多感受野特征提取模块（堆叠形成骨干和颈部），结合改进的标签分配方法和样本数量重定义，以降低类内差异并提升复杂环境下的分割精度。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、多感受野特征提取模块，增强对声门尺度变化的鲁棒性。
开发先进的标签分配方法和样本数量重定义策略，进一步降低类内差异，提升NTI复杂环境下的分割精度。
在三个数据集上超越SOTA，模型仅19 MB，推理速度超过170 FPS，实现实时高精度分割。
analysis.experiments: 在三个不同数据集上进行实验，分割mDice达92.9%，模型大小19 MB，推理速度超过170 FPS。
limitations: 可能仅在特定NTI场景下验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
未提及对极端光照或遮挡情况的鲁棒性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级、尺度鲁棒的实时声门分割网络，用于鼻气管插管导航。

papers.title: VeraRetouch: A Lightweight Fully Differentiable Framework for Multi-Task Reasoning Photo Retouching
papers.abstract: Reasoning photo retouching has gained significant traction, requiring models to analyze image defects, give reasoning processes, and execute precise retouching enhancements. However, existing approaches often rely on non-differentiable external software, creating optimization barriers and suffering from high parameter redundancy and limited generalization. To address these challenges, we propose VeraRetouch, a lightweight and fully differentiable framework for multi-task photo retouching. We employ a 0.5B Vision-Language Model (VLM) as the central intelligence to formulate retouching plans based on instructions and scene semantics. Furthermore, we develop a fully differentiable Retouch Renderer that replaces external tools, enabling direct end-to-end pixel-level training through decoupled control latents for lighting, global color, and specific color adjustments. To overcome data scarcity, we introduce AetherRetouch-1M+, the first million-scale dataset for professional retouching, constructed via a new inverse degradation workflow. Furthermore, we propose DAPO-AE, a reinforcement learning post-training strategy that enhances autonomous aesthetic cognition. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VeraRetouch achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks while maintaining a significantly smaller footprint, enabling mobile deployment. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/OpenVeraTeam/VeraRetouch.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级全可微分框架VeraRetouch，结合0.5B VLM和可微分渲染器实现多任务推理修图，并发布百万级数据集AetherRetouch-1M+。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理修图方法依赖不可微分的外部软件，导致优化困难、参数冗余且泛化性差，亟需轻量级端到端可微方案。
analysis.problem: 如何构建轻量级、全可微分的多任务推理修图框架，克服数据稀缺并实现移动端部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用0.5B VLM作为中央智能生成修图计划，设计全可微分Retouch Renderer替代外部工具，通过解耦控制潜变量实现端到端像素级训练；提出逆退化流程构建百万级数据集AetherRetouch-1M+；引入DAPO-AE强化学习后训练策略增强自主审美认知。
contributions: 提出VeraRetouch，首个轻量级全可微分多任务推理修图框架，支持移动端部署。
构建AetherRetouch-1M+，首个百万级专业修图数据集，通过逆退化流程生成。
提出DAPO-AE强化学习后训练策略，提升模型自主审美认知能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上达到SOTA，模型体积显著更小，支持移动端部署。
limitations: 可能对极端光照或复杂场景的泛化能力有限。
0.5B VLM的推理能力可能受限于模型规模。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级全可微分框架VeraRetouch，结合0.5B VLM和可微分渲染器实现多任务推理修图，并发布百万级数据集AetherRetouch-1M+。

papers.title: Measurement Risk in Supervised Financial NLP: Rubric and Metric Sensitivity on JF-ICR
papers.abstract: As LLMs become credible readers of earnings calls, investor-relations Q\&A, guidance, and disclosure language, supervised financial NLP benchmarks increasingly function as decision evidence for model selection and deployment. A hidden assumption is that gold labels make such evidence objective. This assumption breaks down when the benchmark ruler itself is sensitive to rubric wording, metric choice, or aggregation policy. We study this measurement risk on Japanese Financial Implicit-Commitment Recognition (JF-ICR; a pinned 253-item test split x 4 frontier LLMs x 5 rubrics x 3 temperatures x 5 ordinal metrics). Three findings follow. First, rubric wording materially changes model-assigned labels: R2--R3 agreement ranges from 70.0% to 83.4%, with the dominant movement near the +1 / 0 implicit-commitment boundary. This pattern is consistent with a pragmatic-boundary interpretation, but is not a validated linguistic-causality claim because the present rubric variants confound semantics, examples, and verbosity. Second, not every metric remains informative under the JF-ICR class distribution. Within-one accuracy is too easy because near misses receive credit and the majority class dominates; worst-class accuracy is too noisy because the rarest class has only two examples. Exact accuracy, macro-F1, and weighted \k{appa} are therefore the identifiable metrics under our operational rule. Third, ranking claims become more defensible only after this metric-identifiability audit: Bradley--Terry, Borda, and Ranked Pairs agree on the identifiable metric subset, while the full five-metric sweep produces disagreement on the closest pair. The contribution is not a new leaderboard, but a reporting discipline for supervised financial benchmarks whose gold labels exist and whose evaluation ruler still requires governance.

analysis.tldr: 金融NLP监督基准的测量风险：标注词、指标选择和聚合策略会显著改变模型排名结论。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被用于分析金融文本，监督基准的标注标签被视为客观证据，但基准本身对标注词、指标选择和聚合策略敏感，这种测量风险未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 量化并揭示金融NLP监督基准中测量风险的存在及其影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标注词变化导致标签一致性仅70%-83.4%，且变动集中在+1/0边界；部分指标（如within-one accuracy）因类别分布失效，最稀有类别仅2个样本导致最差类别准确率噪声大。
analysis.method: 在JF-ICR数据集上，使用4个前沿LLM、5种标注词、3个温度、5种序数指标进行系统实验，通过指标可识别性审计和排名聚合方法分析测量风险。
contributions: 揭示了金融NLP监督基准中标注词、指标选择和聚合策略带来的测量风险。
提出了指标可识别性审计流程，识别出精确准确率、宏F1和加权Kappa为可靠指标。
证明了排名聚合方法仅在可识别指标子集上一致，全指标集会导致排名分歧。
analysis.experiments: 在JF-ICR数据集上，使用4个LLM、5种标注词、3个温度、5种序数指标进行实验，报告了标注词一致性、指标分布敏感性及排名聚合结果。
limitations: 标注词变体混淆了语义、示例和冗长度，无法分离因果。
仅针对单一金融NLP任务（JF-ICR），泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 金融NLP监督基准的测量风险：标注词、指标选择和聚合策略会显著改变模型排名结论。

papers.title: DOT-Sim: Differentiable Optical Tactile Simulation with Precise Real-to-Sim Physical Calibration
papers.abstract: Simulating optical tactile sensors presents significant challenges due to their high deformability and intricate optical properties. To address these issues and enable a physically accurate simulation, we propose DOT-Sim: Differentiable Optical Tactile Simulation. Unlike prior simulators that rely on simplified models of deformable sensors, DOT-Sim accurately captures the physical behavior of soft sensors by modeling them as elastic materials using the Material Point Method (MPM). DOT-Sim enables rapid calibration of optical tactile sensor simulation using a small number of demonstrations within minutes, which is substantially faster than existing methods. Compared to current baselines, our approach supports much larger and non-linear deformations. To handle the optical aspect, we propose a novel approach to simulating optical responses by learning a residual image relative to the real-world idle state. We validate the physical and visual realism of our method through a series of zero-shot sim-to-real tasks. Our experiments show that DOT-Sim (1) accurately replicates the physical dynamics of a DenseTact optical tactile sensor in reality, (2) generates realistic optical outputs in contact-rich scenarios, (3) enables direct deployment of simulation-trained classifiers in the real world, achieving 85% classification accuracy on challenging objects and 90% accuracy in embedded tumor-type detection, and (4) allows precise trajectory following with a policy trained from demonstrations in simulation, with an average error of less than 0.9 mm.

analysis.tldr: 提出可微光学触觉仿真器DOT-Sim，通过MPM弹性建模和残差图像学习实现高精度物理校准与零样本迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学触觉传感器因高变形性和复杂光学特性难以精确仿真，现有方法依赖简化模型，物理保真度不足且校准耗时。
analysis.problem: 如何实现光学触觉传感器的高保真物理仿真与快速校准，并支持零样本迁移到真实任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用物质点法(MPM)将软传感器建模为弹性材料，并学习残差图像模拟光学响应，实现快速物理校准。
contributions: 提出可微光学触觉仿真框架DOT-Sim，首次将MPM用于触觉传感器弹性建模。
提出残差图像学习方法，高效模拟光学响应。
在零样本迁移任务中验证物理与视觉真实性，实现高精度分类和轨迹跟踪。
analysis.experiments: 在DenseTact传感器上验证，零样本分类准确率85%（挑战物体）和90%（肿瘤检测），轨迹跟踪误差<0.9mm。
limitations: 仅针对特定传感器DenseTact验证，泛化性未知。
残差图像学习可能依赖传感器空闲状态，对动态光照鲁棒性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可微光学触觉仿真器DOT-Sim，通过MPM弹性建模和残差图像学习实现高精度物理校准与零样本迁移。

papers.title: Judge, Then Drive: A Critic-Centric Vision Language Action Framework for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Recent advances in vision language action (VLA) models have shown remarkable potential for autonomous driving by directly mapping multimodal inputs to control signals. However, previous VLA-based methods have not explicitly exploited the critic capability of VLAs to refine driving decisions, even though such capability has been well demonstrated in other LLM-based domains, thereby limiting their performance in complex closed-loop scenarios. In this work, we present a theoretically inspired two-stage framework, CriticVLA, which extends the role of VLAs from acting to judging. CriticVLA first generates a rough trajectory and then refines it through multimodal evaluation and single-step optimization guided by a VLA-based critic, yielding higher-quality driving behaviors. To support this process, we construct a large-scale synthetic dataset of 12.9 million annotated trajectories covering diverse driving scenarios, which enhances the critic's reasoning and refinement abilities. Extensive closed-loop experiments on the Bench2Drive benchmark show that CriticVLA significantly surpasses state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a 73.33% total success rate and delivering about 30% improvement in challenging scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出CriticVLA框架，让VLA模型先规划再评判优化，在自动驾驶闭环测试中取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型在自动驾驶中直接映射输入到控制信号，未利用其评判能力来优化决策，限制了复杂闭环场景下的性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用VLA模型的评判能力来细化驾驶决策，提升闭环场景下的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLA模型在其他LLM领域已展现评判能力，但在自动驾驶中未被显式利用。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架CriticVLA：首先生成粗略轨迹，然后通过多模态评估和基于VLA评判器的单步优化进行细化。
contributions: 提出CriticVLA框架，将VLA角色从行动扩展到评判，通过评判优化提升驾驶行为质量。
构建包含1290万条标注轨迹的大规模合成数据集，增强评判器的推理和细化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Bench2Drive基准上进行大量闭环实验，总成功率达73.33%，在挑战场景中提升约30%。
limitations: 依赖合成数据集，可能无法完全覆盖真实场景的多样性。
单步优化可能无法处理需要多步推理的复杂情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CriticVLA框架，让VLA模型先规划再评判优化，在自动驾驶闭环测试中取得显著提升。

papers.title: Hyperspectral Image Classification via Efficient Global Spectral Supertoken Clustering
papers.abstract: Hyperspectral image classification demands spatially coherent predictions and precise boundary delineation. Yet prevailing superpixel-based methods face an inherent contradiction: clustering aggregates similar pixels into regions, but the subsequent classifier operates pixel-wise, undermining regional consistency. Consequently, existing approaches do not guarantee region-level, boundary-aligned classification. To address this limitation, we propose the Dual-stage Spectrum-Constrained Clustering-based Classifier (DSCC), an end-to-end framework that explicitly decouples clustering from classification by first grouping spectral similar and spatially proximate pixels into spectral supertokens and then performing token-level prediction. At its core, DSCC computes an image-level multi-criteria feature distance between pixels and centers, followed by a locality-aware assignment regularization, enabling the generation of boundary-preserving spectral supertokens. A density-isolation based center selection further yields representative, well-separated centers, reducing redundancy and improving robustness to scale variation. To accommodate mixed land-cover compositions within each token, we introduce a soft-label scheme that encodes class proportions and improves robustness for mixed-class tokens. DSCC attains a CF1 of 0.728 at 197.75 FPS on the WHU-OHS dataset, offering a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off compared with state-of-the-art methods. Extensive experiments further validate the effectiveness and generality of the proposed dual-stage paradigm for hyperspectral image classification. The source code is available at https://github.com/laprf/DSCC.

analysis.tldr: 提出双阶段光谱约束聚类分类器DSCC，通过光谱超令牌实现高光谱图像的高效边界对齐分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超像素方法存在聚类与像素级分类的内在矛盾，无法保证区域级边界对齐分类，导致空间一致性和边界精度不足。
analysis.problem: 高光谱图像分类中，如何实现区域级、边界对齐的分类，同时兼顾精度与效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 超像素方法将相似像素聚类成区域，但后续分类器逐像素操作，破坏了区域一致性。
analysis.method: 提出DSCC框架，包含双阶段：第一阶段通过多准则特征距离和局部感知分配正则化生成边界保持的光谱超令牌；第二阶段进行令牌级预测，并引入软标签方案处理混合地物。
contributions: 提出双阶段光谱约束聚类分类器DSCC，显式解耦聚类与分类，实现区域级边界对齐分类。
设计密度隔离中心选择和软标签方案，提升中心代表性和混合类鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在WHU-OHS数据集上，DSCC达到0.728 CF1和197.75 FPS，优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，如超令牌数量。
软标签方案可能在高混合度区域精度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双阶段光谱约束聚类分类器DSCC，通过光谱超令牌实现高光谱图像的高效边界对齐分类。

papers.title: TADI: Tool-Augmented Drilling Intelligence via Agentic LLM Orchestration over Heterogeneous Wellsite Data
papers.abstract: We present TADI (Tool-Augmented Drilling Intelligence), an agentic AI system that transforms drilling operational data into evidence-based analytical intelligence. Applied to the Equinor Volve Field dataset, TADI integrates 1,759 daily drilling reports, selected WITSML real-time objects, 15,634 production records, formation tops, and perforations into a dual-store architecture: DuckDB for structured queries over 12 tables with 65,447 rows, and ChromaDB for semantic search over 36,709 embedded documents. Twelve domain-specialized tools, orchestrated by a large language model via iterative function calling, support multi-step evidence gathering that cross-references structured drilling measurements with daily report narratives. The system parses all 1,759 DDR XML files with zero errors, handles three incompatible well naming conventions, and is backed by 95 automated tests plus a 130-question stress-question taxonomy spanning six operational categories. We formalize the agent's behavior as a sequential tool-selection problem and propose the Evidence Grounding Score (EGS) as a simple grounding-compliance proxy based on measurements, attributed DDR quotations, and required answer sections. The complete 6,084-line, framework-free implementation is reproducible given the public Volve download and an API key, and the case studies and qualitative ablation analysis suggest that domain-specialized tool design, rather than model scale alone, is the primary driver of analytical quality in technical operations.

analysis.tldr: TADI 是一个基于 LLM 的智能钻井分析系统，通过多工具编排和异构数据集成，在 Equinor Volve 数据集上实现了零错误解析和高质量分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 钻井作业产生大量异构数据（结构化测量、非结构化报告等），现有方法难以有效整合并从中提取可操作的洞察，亟需一种能跨数据源进行多步证据收集的智能系统。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型（LLM）编排多个领域专用工具，从异构钻井数据中自动生成有依据的分析结论。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，领域专用工具设计比单纯增大模型规模更能提升技术操作的分析质量；系统成功处理了三种不兼容的井命名约定，并实现了零错误解析。
analysis.method: 提出 TADI 系统，采用双存储架构（DuckDB 用于结构化查询，ChromaDB 用于语义搜索），由 LLM 通过迭代函数调用编排 12 个领域专用工具，支持多步证据收集；并形式化为顺序工具选择问题，提出证据基础分数（EGS）作为合规性代理。
contributions: 提出了 TADI，一个基于 LLM 的智能钻井分析系统，集成异构数据源并实现零错误解析。
形式化了顺序工具选择问题，并提出了证据基础分数（EGS）用于评估分析质量。
在 Equinor Volve 数据集上进行了案例研究和定性消融分析，验证了领域专用工具设计的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在 Equinor Volve 数据集上进行了案例研究和定性消融分析，系统解析了 1,759 个 DDR XML 文件（零错误），处理了 15,634 条生产记录等，并构建了 130 个问题的压力测试分类法。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集（Equinor Volve）上验证，泛化性未知。
定性消融分析为主，缺乏定量对比实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TADI 是一个基于 LLM 的智能钻井分析系统，通过多工具编排和异构数据集成，在 Equinor Volve 数据集上实现了零错误解析和高质量分析。

papers.title: CasLayout: Cascaded 3D Layout Diffusion for Indoor Scene Synthesis with Implicit Relation Modeling
papers.abstract: Synthesizing realistic 3D indoor scenes remains challenging due to data scarcity and the difficulty of simultaneously enforcing global architectural constraints and local semantic consistency. Existing approaches often overlook structural boundaries or rely on fully connected relation graphs that introduce redundant generation errors. Inspired by human design cognition, we present CasLayout, a cascaded diffusion framework that decomposes the joint scene generation task into four conditional sub-stages with explicit physical and semantic roles: (1) predicting furniture quantity and categories, (2) refining object sizes and feature embeddings, (3) modeling spatial relationships in a latent space, and (4) generating Oriented Bounding Boxes (OBBs). This decoupled architecture reduces data requirements and enables flexible integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) for zero-shot tasks such as image-to-scene generation. To maintain physical validity within complex floor plans, we explicitly model building elements (e.g., walls, doors, and windows) as conditional constraints. Furthermore, to address the high entropy of dense relation graphs, we introduce a sparse relation graph formulation aligned with human spatial descriptions. By encoding these sparse graphs into a compact latent space using a bidirectional Variational Autoencoder (VAE), the proposed framework provides enhanced relational controllability, allowing generated layouts to better respect functional organization. Experiments demonstrate that CasLayout achieves state-of-the-art performance in fidelity and diversity while enabling improved controllability in practical applications.

analysis.tldr: CasLayout通过级联扩散框架和隐式关系建模，实现了高保真、可控的3D室内场景布局生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D室内场景合成面临数据稀缺和全局架构约束与局部语义一致性难以同时满足的挑战，现有方法常忽略结构边界或依赖全连接关系图引入冗余生成错误。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成符合物理约束和语义一致性的3D室内场景布局，并提升可控性和数据效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全连接关系图导致高熵和冗余错误；现有方法难以同时处理全局架构约束和局部语义一致性。
analysis.method: 提出CasLayout级联扩散框架，将联合场景生成分解为四个条件子阶段（家具数量/类别预测、尺寸/特征精化、空间关系隐式建模、OBB生成），并引入稀疏关系图和双向VAE编码，支持LLM/VLM零样本集成。
contributions: 提出级联扩散框架，分解生成任务为四个子阶段，降低数据需求并提升可控性。
引入稀疏关系图公式和双向VAE隐式编码，增强关系可控性并减少冗余错误。
显式建模建筑元素作为条件约束，确保物理有效性，并支持LLM/VLM零样本图像到场景生成。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明CasLayout在保真度和多样性上达到最先进性能，并提升了实际应用中的可控性。
limitations: 级联架构可能引入误差累积。
稀疏关系图的构建可能依赖先验知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CasLayout通过级联扩散框架和隐式关系建模，实现了高保真、可控的3D室内场景布局生成。

papers.title: TIO-SHACL: Comprehensive SHACL validation for TMF Intent Ontologies
papers.abstract: Intent-based networking promises to revolutionize telecommunications network management by enabling operators to specify high-level goals rather than low-level configurations. The TM Forum Intent Ontology (tio) provides a standardized vocabulary for expressing network intents, yet lacks formal validation mechanisms to ensure intent correctness before its admission. We present tio-shacl, the first comprehensive SHACL (Shapes Constraint Language) validation framework for the TMF Intent Ontology. Our contribution includes 56 node shapes and 69 property shapes across all 15 tio v3.6.0 ontology modules, a reusable constraint library with 25 parameterized SPARQL-based constraint components, and novel validation patterns for recursive logical operators, quantity-based constraints, and cross-expectation relationships. We pursued 100% vocabulary coverage (87 classes, 109 properties, 72 functions), cross-implementation compatibility across three major SHACL engines, and validation accuracy on a corpus of 133 test cases. tio-shacl is publicly available under MIT license at https://github.com/EricssonResearch/tio-shacl and enables automated syntactic and semantic validation of network intents, addressing a critical gap in the field.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对TMF意图本体的全面SHACL验证框架，覆盖全部15个模块，实现100%词汇覆盖。
analysis.research_motivation: 意图驱动网络管理需要确保意图的正确性，但现有TMF意图本体缺乏形式化验证机制，导致意图在接纳前无法自动校验。
analysis.problem: 如何为TMF意图本体提供全面的语法和语义验证，覆盖所有类、属性和函数，并确保跨引擎兼容性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于SHACL构建验证框架，包括56个节点形状、69个属性形状、25个参数化SPARQL约束组件，以及针对递归逻辑运算符、数量约束和跨期望关系的新验证模式。
contributions: 首个覆盖TMF意图本体全部15个模块的SHACL验证框架
提出可复用的约束库和新型验证模式
analysis.experiments: 在133个测试用例上验证了准确性，并在三个主流SHACL引擎上测试了跨实现兼容性。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有语义边界情况
依赖SHACL引擎性能
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对TMF意图本体的全面SHACL验证框架，覆盖全部15个模块，实现100%词汇覆盖。

papers.title: Safe Bilevel Delegation (SBD): A Formal Framework for Runtime Delegation Safety in Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: As large language model (LLM) agents are deployed in high-stakes environments, the question of how safely to delegate subtasks to specialized sub-agents becomes critical. Existing work addresses multi-agent architecture selection at design time or provides broad empirical guidelines, but neither provides a runtime mechanism that dynamically adjusts the safety-efficiency trade-off as task context changes during execution. We propose Safe Bilevel Delegation (SBD), a formal framework for runtime delegation safety in hierarchical multi-agent systems. SBD formulates task delegation as a bilevel optimization problem: an outer meta-weight network phi learns context-dependent safety-efficiency weights lambda(s) in [0,1]; an inner loop optimizes the delegation policy pi subject to a probabilistic safety constraint P(safe) >= 1-delta. The continuous delegation degree alpha in [0, 1] controls how much decision authority is transferred to each sub-agent, interpolating smoothly between full human override (alpha=0) and fully autonomous execution (alpha=1). We establish three theoretical results: (1) Safety Monotonicity--higher outer safety weight produces a weakly safer inner policy; (2) Inner Policy Convergence--projected gradient descent on the inner problem converges linearly under standard smoothness assumptions; (3) an Accountability Propagation bound that distributes responsibility across multi-hop delegation chains with a provable per-agent ceiling. We instantiate SBD in three high-stakes domains--medical AI (MIMIC-III), financial risk control (S and P 500), and educational agent supervision (ASSISTments)--specifying datasets, safety constraint sets, baselines, and evaluation protocols. This manuscript presents the formal framework and theoretical results in full; empirical validation following the protocols described herein is planned and will be reported in a forthcoming revision.

analysis.tldr: 提出安全双层委托（SBD）框架，通过双层优化在运行时动态调整多智能体系统的安全-效率权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工作仅在设计时选择多智能体架构或提供经验性指导，缺乏运行时机制动态调整安全-效率权衡，难以应对高安全场景下的任务上下文变化。
analysis.problem: 如何在高风险环境中运行时安全地将子任务委托给专门子智能体，并动态平衡安全性与效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将任务委托建模为双层优化问题：外层元权重网络学习上下文相关的安全-效率权重，内层优化委托策略并满足概率安全约束，通过连续委托度控制决策转移程度。
contributions: 提出安全双层委托（SBD）框架，形式化运行时委托安全。
建立三个理论结果：安全单调性、内层策略收敛性、问责传播界。
在三个高风险领域（医疗AI、金融风控、教育监督）指定了数据集、安全约束集、基线和评估协议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了实验设置和计划。
limitations: 理论结果依赖于标准平滑性假设，可能不适用于所有实际场景。
实证验证尚未完成，框架的实际效果有待后续报告。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出安全双层委托（SBD）框架，通过双层优化在运行时动态调整多智能体系统的安全-效率权衡。

papers.title: AG-TAL: Anatomically-Guided Topology-Aware Loss for Multiclass Segmentation of the Circle of Willis Using Large-Scale Multi-Center Datasets
papers.abstract: Accurate multiclass segmentation of the Circle of Willis (CoW) is essential for neurovascular disease management but remains challenging due to complex vascular topology and variable morphology. Existing deep learning methods often suffer from vascular discontinuities and inter-class misclassification, while current topological loss functions incur prohibitive computational costs in 3D multiclass settings. To address these limitations, we propose an Anatomically-Guided Topology-Aware Loss (AG-TAL) and introduce a large-scale, multi-center CoW dataset with unified annotations to facilitate robust model training. AG-TAL specifically integrates a radius-aware Dice loss to address class imbalance in small vessels, a breakage-aware clDice loss that utilizes group convolutions to efficiently preserve local connectivity, and an adjacency-aware co-occurrence loss that leverages anatomical priors to enforce distinct boundaries between neighboring arteries. Evaluated using 5-fold cross-validation, AG-TAL achieved an average Dice score of 80.85% for all CoW arteries, with small arteries notably higher by 1.05-3.09% compared to state-of-the-art methods. Across six independent datasets, the performance of AG-TAL achieved Dice scores ranging from 74.46% to 81.17% for all CoW arteries, with improvements of 2.20% to 9.98% for small arteries compared to other methods. This study demonstrates the superiority of AG-TAL in identifying multiclass CoW arteries and its ability to generalize well to multiple independent datasets. Furthermore, reliability analyses and clinical applications in an Alzheimer's disease cohort validate the AG-TAL's robustness and its potential for discovering imaging-based morphological biomarkers.

analysis.tldr: 提出解剖引导的拓扑感知损失（AG-TAL）用于Willis环多类分割，结合大规模多中心数据集，显著提升小血管分割连续性。
analysis.research_motivation: Willis环（CoW）的精确多类分割对神经血管疾病管理至关重要，但现有深度学习方法常出现血管断裂和类别间误分类，且拓扑损失函数在3D多类场景下计算成本过高。
analysis.problem: 解决CoW多类分割中血管拓扑不连续、小血管类别不平衡及相邻动脉边界模糊的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AG-TAL损失函数，包含半径感知Dice损失（处理小血管类别不平衡）、断裂感知clDice损失（利用组卷积保持局部连通性）和邻接感知共现损失（利用解剖先验强制相邻动脉边界）。
contributions: 提出AG-TAL损失函数，集成三种组件有效解决CoW多类分割的拓扑和类别问题。
构建大规模多中心CoW数据集并统一标注，促进模型鲁棒训练。
在5折交叉验证和6个独立数据集上取得优于SOTA的结果，小血管Dice提升1.05-9.98%。
analysis.experiments: 使用5折交叉验证，AG-TAL在CoW所有动脉上平均Dice为80.85%，小血管较SOTA提升1.05-3.09%；在6个独立数据集上所有动脉Dice为74.46-81.17%，小血管提升2.20-9.98%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定解剖先验，泛化到其他血管结构需调整。
组卷积可能增加计算开销，虽比现有拓扑损失高效但仍有成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解剖引导的拓扑感知损失（AG-TAL）用于Willis环多类分割，结合大规模多中心数据集，显著提升小血管分割连续性。

papers.title: TypeBandit: Type-Level Context Allocation and Reweighting for Effective Attribute Completion in Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous graphs are widely used to model multi-relational systems, but missing node attributes remain a major bottleneck for downstream learning. In this paper, we identify and formalize type-dependent information asymmetry: the phenomenon that different node types provide substantially different levels of useful signal for attribute completion. Motivated by this observation, we propose TypeBandit, a lightweight, model-agnostic methodology for heterogeneous attribute completion. TypeBandit combines topology-aware initialization, type-level bandit sampling, and joint representation learning. It allocates a finite global sampling budget across node types, samples representative nodes within each type, and uses the resulting sampled type summaries as shared contextual signals during representation construction. By operating at the type level rather than over each target node's local neighborhood, TypeBandit keeps the adaptive state compact and practical for large heterogeneous graphs. A key advantage of TypeBandit is architectural flexibility. Rather than requiring a new heterogeneous graph neural network architecture, TypeBandit acts as a type-aware front end for representative heterogeneous GNN backbones, including R-GCN, HetGNN, HGT, and SimpleHGN. We further introduce a hybrid pretraining scheme that combines structural degree priors with feature propagation, yielding a more reliable initializer than degree-only pretraining. Under a fixed-split protocol on DBLP, IMDB, and ACM, TypeBandit provides dataset-dependent but practically meaningful gains. Additional ablation, stability, efficiency, semantic-propagation, and sampled OGBN-MAG experiments support TypeBandit as a practical strategy for heterogeneous attribute completion when type-specific information is unevenly distributed and sampling resources are limited.

analysis.tldr: TypeBandit通过类型级上下文分配与重加权，有效解决异构图中的属性缺失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 异构图广泛用于建模多关系系统，但缺失节点属性是下游学习的瓶颈，且不同节点类型提供的信息量差异大，现有方法未充分利用类型级信息。
analysis.problem: 异构图中的属性缺失问题，特别是类型依赖的信息不对称导致属性补全效果不佳。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到不同节点类型在属性补全中提供的有用信号水平存在显著差异，即类型依赖的信息不对称现象。
analysis.method: 提出TypeBandit，一种轻量级、模型无关的方法，结合拓扑感知初始化、类型级bandit采样和联合表示学习，通过类型级上下文分配和重加权进行属性补全。
contributions: 形式化了类型依赖的信息不对称现象，并基于此提出TypeBandit方法。
TypeBandit作为类型感知前端，可灵活适配多种异构图神经网络骨干（如R-GCN、HetGNN等）。
引入混合预训练方案，结合结构度先验和特征传播，提供更可靠的初始化。
analysis.experiments: 在DBLP、IMDB、ACM数据集上采用固定划分协议进行实验，并进行了消融、稳定性、效率、语义传播和OGBN-MAG采样实验，显示实际增益。
limitations: 增益依赖于数据集，可能不是所有场景都显著。
方法复杂度可能随类型数量增加而上升。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TypeBandit通过类型级上下文分配与重加权，有效解决异构图中的属性缺失问题。

papers.title: CoAX: Cognitive-Oriented Attribution eXplanation User Model of Human Understanding of AI Explanations
papers.abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) aims to improve user understanding and decisions when using AI models. However, despite innovations in XAI, recent user evaluations reveal that this goal remains elusive. Understanding human cognition can help explain why users struggle to effectively use AI explanations. Focusing on reasoning on structured (tabular) data, we examined various reasoning strategies for different XAI methods (none, feature importance, feature attribution) in the decision task of anticipating AI decisions (i.e., forward simulation). We i) elicited reasoning strategies from a formative user study, and ii) collected decisions from a summative user study. Using cognitive modeling, we implemented the processes underlying each reasoning strategy and evaluated their alignment with human decision-making. We found that our models better fit human decisions than baseline machine learning proxies, providing insights into which reasoning strategies are (in)effective. We then demonstrate how the fitted model can be used to form hypotheses and investigate research questions that are costly to study with real human participants. This work contributes to debugging human understanding of XAI, informing the future development of more usable and interpretable AI explanations.

analysis.tldr: 通过认知建模揭示用户使用不同XAI方法时的推理策略，并验证模型能拟合人类决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管XAI技术不断进步，用户评估显示其提升理解与决策的目标仍未达成，需要理解人类认知过程以改进XAI。
analysis.problem: 用户为何难以有效利用AI解释，以及不同XAI方法（无解释、特征重要性、特征归因）如何影响用户的推理策略和决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户在使用不同XAI方法时采用不同的推理策略，且这些策略的认知模型比传统机器学习代理更好地拟合人类决策。
analysis.method: 通过形成性用户研究引出推理策略，再通过总结性用户研究收集决策数据，利用认知建模实现每种推理策略的底层过程，并评估其与人类决策的对齐程度。
contributions: 提出认知导向的归因解释用户模型（CoAX），用于理解人类对AI解释的理解。
通过认知建模揭示不同XAI方法下用户推理策略的有效性，并展示模型可用于生成假设和降低研究成本。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对结构化（表格）数据和前向模拟决策任务，泛化性有限。
认知模型可能未涵盖所有用户推理策略，且未在真实复杂场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过认知建模揭示用户使用不同XAI方法时的推理策略，并验证模型能拟合人类决策。

papers.title: Gait Recognition via Deep Residual Networks and Multi-Branch Feature Fusion
papers.abstract: Gait recognition has emerged as a compelling biometric modality for surveillance and security applications, offering inherent advantages such as non-intrusiveness, resistance to disguise, and long-range identification capability. However, prevailing approaches struggle to comprehensively capture and exploit the rich biometric cues embedded in human locomotion, particularly under covariate interference including viewpoint variation, clothing change, and carrying conditions. In this paper, we present a high-precision gait recognition framework that deeply extracts and synergistically fuses gait dynamics with body shape characteristics through a multi-branch architecture grounded in deep residual learning. Specifically, we first employ the High-Resolution Network (HRNet) to perform robust skeletal keypoint estimation, preserving fine-grained spatial information even under low-resolution inputs. We then construct three complementary feature branches -- body proportion, gait velocity, and skeletal motion -- from the extracted pose sequences. A 50-layer Residual Network (ResNet-50) backbone is leveraged within a deep feature extraction module to capture hierarchically rich and discriminative representations. To effectively integrate heterogeneous feature streams, we design a Multi-Branch Feature Fusion (MFF) module inspired by channel-wise attention mechanisms, which dynamically allocates contribution weights across branches through learned activation parameters. Extensive experiments on the cross-view multi-condition CASIA-B benchmark demonstrate that our method achieves a Rank-1 accuracy of 94.52\% under normal walking, with the best recognition performance among skeleton-based methods for the coat-wearing condition.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于深度残差网络和多分支特征融合的步态识别框架，在CASIA-B上达到94.52% Rank-1准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 步态识别在监控安防中具有非侵入、抗伪装等优势，但现有方法难以全面捕捉步态中的生物特征，尤其在视角、衣着等干扰下性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何从人体步态中深度提取并有效融合动态步态与身体形状特征，以提升在协变量干扰下的识别精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用HRNet进行骨骼关键点估计，构建身体比例、步态速度和骨骼运动三个互补特征分支，通过ResNet-50提取深度特征，并设计基于通道注意力的多分支特征融合模块动态分配权重。
contributions: 提出基于HRNet的鲁棒骨骼关键点估计方法，保留低分辨率下的细粒度空间信息。
设计多分支特征融合模块，通过通道注意力机制动态融合异构特征流。
在CASIA-B数据集上取得领先性能，尤其在穿衣条件下表现最佳。
analysis.experiments: 在跨视角多条件CASIA-B基准上进行实验，正常行走下Rank-1准确率为94.52%，在穿衣条件下达到骨架方法最佳性能。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论计算复杂度或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于深度残差网络和多分支特征融合的步态识别框架，在CASIA-B上达到94.52% Rank-1准确率。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Scientific Foundation Model Collaboration
papers.abstract: Agentic large language model systems have demonstrated strong capabilities. However, their reliance on language as the universal interface fundamentally limits their applicability to many real-world problems, especially in scientific domains where domain-specific foundation models have been developed to address specialized tasks beyond natural language. In this work, we introduce Eywa, a heterogeneous agentic framework designed to extend language-centric systems to a broader class of scientific foundation models. The key idea of Eywa is to augment domain-specific foundation models with a language-model-based reasoning interface, enabling language models to guide inference over non-linguistic data modalities. This design allows predictive foundation models, which are typically optimized for specialized data and tasks, to participate in higher-level reasoning and decision-making processes within agentic systems. Eywa can serve as a drop-in replacement for a single-agent pipeline (EywaAgent) or be integrated into existing multi-agent systems by replacing traditional agents with specialized agents (EywaMAS). We further investigate a planning-based orchestration framework in which a planner dynamically coordinates traditional agents and Eywa agents to solve complex tasks across heterogeneous data modalities (EywaOrchestra). We evaluate Eywa across a diverse set of scientific domains spanning physical, life, and social sciences. Experimental results demonstrate that Eywa improves performance on tasks involving structured and domain-specific data, while reducing reliance on language-based reasoning through effective collaboration with specialized foundation models.

analysis.tldr: Eywa框架通过语言模型推理接口扩展科学基础模型，实现异构模型协作。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言智能体系统依赖语言作为通用接口，难以处理科学领域中非语言模态的专业任务，而领域特定的基础模型虽擅长专业数据但缺乏推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型与异构科学基础模型协作，使后者参与高层推理和决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Eywa框架，为领域基础模型添加基于语言模型的推理接口，支持单智能体（EywaAgent）、多智能体（EywaMAS）和规划编排（EywaOrchestra）三种模式。
contributions: 提出异构智能体框架Eywa，扩展语言中心系统到科学基础模型。
设计三种协作模式：单智能体、多智能体、规划编排。
在物理、生命、社会科学多个领域验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在物理、生命、社会科学多个领域的任务上评估，结果显示Eywa在结构化与领域特定数据任务上性能提升，并减少对语言推理的依赖。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量领域基础模型。
规划编排的复杂度可能带来额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Eywa框架通过语言模型推理接口扩展科学基础模型，实现异构模型协作。

papers.title: Profiles of AI Dependency: A Latent Class Analysis of Filipino Students' Academic Competencies
papers.abstract: The increasing dependency among Filipino college students on artificial intelligence (AI) poses concerns about the potential decline of fundamental academic competencies. This study examines the extent of AI dependency and its perceived effects on students' critical thinking, writing skills, learning independence, research skills, and academic engagement. Using a cross-sectional research design, data was collected from 651 students enrolled in higher education institutions (HEIs) in Pampanga, Philippines accredited by the Commission on Higher Education. The survey data was analyzed using Latent Class Analysis (LCA) to identify AI dependency patterns. Findings indicated that students show moderate to high AI dependency, specifically in research and writing tasks. LCA identified four distinct profiles: highly engaged independent learners, selective AI users, moderate AI users, and AI-dependent learners. Notably, AI-dependent learners demonstrated the weakest academic competencies, with significant dependency on AI-generated outputs. The study highlights the need to foster educational policies that integrate AI literacy while preserving essential academic skills. HEIs must also balance technological advancements with curriculum adaptations to promote critical thinking and ethical use of AI. Future research may explore the longitudinal impacts and intervention strategies to mitigate academic skill erosion caused by AI dependency.

analysis.tldr: 对菲律宾大学生AI依赖性的潜在类别分析，发现四种依赖类型，其中高依赖者学术能力最弱。
analysis.research_motivation: AI工具在大学生中日益普及，可能导致基本学术能力下降，需要系统理解AI依赖的模式及其对学术能力的影响。
analysis.problem: 识别菲律宾大学生中AI依赖的不同模式，并评估这些模式与学术能力（批判性思维、写作、学习独立性、研究技能、学术参与）的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 学生表现出中到高程度的AI依赖，尤其在研究和写作任务中；LCA识别出四种依赖类型：高度投入的独立学习者、选择性AI用户、中度AI用户和AI依赖型学习者；AI依赖型学习者的学术能力最弱。
analysis.method: 采用横截面研究设计，对651名菲律宾大学生进行问卷调查，使用潜在类别分析（LCA）识别AI依赖模式。
contributions: 首次使用LCA方法系统识别菲律宾大学生AI依赖的四种潜在类别。
揭示了AI依赖与学术能力下降之间的关联，为教育政策制定提供实证依据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了LCA识别出的四种类别及其与学术能力的关系。
limitations: 横截面设计无法推断因果关系。
样本仅限于菲律宾一所地区的高校，可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对菲律宾大学生AI依赖性的潜在类别分析，发现四种依赖类型，其中高依赖者学术能力最弱。

papers.title: Exploring the Adoption Intention in Using AI-Enabled Educational Tools Among Preservice Teachers in the Philippines: A Partial-Least Square Modeling
papers.abstract: This study examines the factors influencing pre-service teachers' behavioral intention to use AI-enabled educational tools during their practicum, using the Unified Theory of Acceptance and Use of Technology 2 (UTAUT2) as the theoretical framework. The model includes the core UTAUT2 constructs such as performance expectancy, effort expectancy, hedonic motivation, social influence, facilitating conditions, price value, and habit. It also incorporates additional predictors including computer self-efficacy, computer anxiety, and computer playfulness. Data were collected from 563 pre-service teachers using a structured questionnaire and analyzed using Partial Least Squares Structural Equation Modeling (PLS-SEM). The results indicate that performance expectancy and hedonic motivation are the strongest predictors of behavioral intention. Computer self-efficacy, computer anxiety, and computer playfulness significantly influenced effort expectancy, although effort expectancy did not directly predict behavioral intention. Performance expectancy was significantly predicted by extrinsic motivation, job fit, relative advantage, and outcome expectations. Constructs such as social influence and facilitating conditions showed limited or inverse effects. These findings suggest that internal motivational, cognitive, and emotional factors are more influential than external or institutional factors in shaping the adoption of AI-enabled tools. The study highlights the importance of promoting personal relevance, confidence, and enjoyment in teacher preparation programs to encourage technology integration.

analysis.tldr: 基于UTAUT2模型，发现绩效期望和享乐动机是菲律宾职前教师使用AI教育工具意愿的最强预测因子。
analysis.research_motivation: AI教育工具在教师培训中的应用日益重要，但影响职前教师采纳意愿的关键因素尚不明确，尤其缺乏发展中国家的实证研究。
analysis.problem: 识别影响菲律宾职前教师在实习期间使用AI教育工具行为意向的关键因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 绩效期望和享乐动机是主要驱动力，而社会影响和便利条件作用有限或呈反向效应；计算机自我效能、焦虑和趣味性显著影响努力期望，但努力期望不直接预测行为意向。
analysis.method: 采用UTAUT2扩展模型，通过结构化问卷收集563名职前教师数据，使用PLS-SEM进行分析。
contributions: 在菲律宾教育背景下验证并扩展了UTAUT2模型，纳入计算机自我效能、焦虑和趣味性等变量。
揭示了内部动机和情感因素比外部因素对AI工具采纳更重要，为教师培训项目提供实践指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了路径系数显著性等统计结果。
limitations: 样本仅限于菲律宾某地区职前教师，可能限制泛化性。
采用横截面自报告数据，无法推断因果关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于UTAUT2模型，发现绩效期望和享乐动机是菲律宾职前教师使用AI教育工具意愿的最强预测因子。

papers.title: Dynamic-TD3: A Novel Algorithm for UAV Path Planning with Dynamic Obstacle Trajectory Prediction
papers.abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) finds extensive application in autonomous drone navigation within complex, high-risk environments. However, its practical deployment faces a safety-exploration dilemma: soft penalty mechanisms encourage risky trial-and-error, while most constraint-based methods suffer degraded performance under sensor noise and intent uncertainty. We propose Dynamic-TD3, a physically enhanced framework that enforces strict safety constraints while maintaining maneuverability by modeling navigation as a Constrained Markov Decision Process (CMDP). This framework integrates an Adaptive Trajectory Relational Evolution Mechanism (ATREM) to capture long-range intentions and employs a Physically Aware Gated Kalman Filter (PAG-KF) to mitigate non-stationary observation noise. The resulting state representation drives a dual-criterion policy that balances mission efficiency against hard safety constraints via Lagrangian relaxation. In experiments with aggressive dynamic threats, this approach demonstrates superior collision avoidance performance, reduced energy consumption, and smoother flight trajectories.

analysis.tldr: 提出Dynamic-TD3算法，通过物理增强框架和轨迹预测解决无人机路径规划中的安全-探索困境。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度强化学习在无人机自主导航中应用广泛，但面临安全-探索困境：软惩罚机制鼓励冒险试错，而约束方法在传感器噪声和意图不确定性下性能下降。
analysis.problem: 在动态障碍物和传感器噪声环境下，实现无人机路径规划的安全性与机动性的平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将导航建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），集成自适应轨迹关系演化机制（ATREM）捕捉长期意图，采用物理感知门控卡尔曼滤波（PAG-KF）减轻非平稳观测噪声，并通过拉格朗日松弛平衡任务效率与硬安全约束。
contributions: 提出Dynamic-TD3框架，结合物理增强约束和轨迹预测。
设计ATREM和PAG-KF模块，提升对动态障碍物和噪声的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在具有激进动态威胁的实验中，该方法展示了优越的碰撞避免性能、降低的能量消耗和更平滑的飞行轨迹。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的物理模型，泛化性待验证。
计算复杂度可能较高，实时性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Dynamic-TD3算法，通过物理增强框架和轨迹预测解决无人机路径规划中的安全-探索困境。

papers.title: JI-ADF: Joint-Individual Learning with Adaptive Decision Fusion for Multimodal Skin Lesion Classification
papers.abstract: Skin lesion classification is essential for early dermatological diagnosis, yet many existing computer-aided systems rely primarily on dermoscopic images and underutilize the multimodal evidence routinely available in clinical practice. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{JI-ADF}, a trimodal deep learning framework that integrates dermoscopic images, clinical photographs, and structured patient metadata for clinically grounded skin lesion classification. The proposed architecture combines joint multimodal representation learning with modality-specific auxiliary supervision and an adaptive decision fusion mechanism that dynamically calibrates modality contributions on a per-sample basis. To enhance cross-modal reasoning while preserving modality-specific evidence, we further introduce a multimodal fusion attention (MMFA) module. We evaluate JI-ADF on the large-scale MILK10k benchmark, which reflects real-world clinical acquisition conditions and severe class imbalance. The proposed method demonstrates strong and well-balanced performance across lesion categories, improving sensitivity and Dice score while maintaining high specificity and good calibration. Extensive analyses, including modality ablation, calibration evaluation, and Grad-CAM visualization, further confirm the robustness and clinically meaningful behavior of the model. These results indicate that JI-ADF provides a reliable and practical foundation for multimodal skin lesion classification in real-world clinical settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出JI-ADF三模态框架，通过联合-个体学习与自适应决策融合提升皮肤病变分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有计算机辅助系统主要依赖皮肤镜图像，未能充分利用临床实践中常规可用的多模态证据（如临床照片和结构化元数据），限制了诊断准确性和临床适用性。
analysis.problem: 如何有效整合皮肤镜图像、临床照片和结构化元数据三种模态，实现鲁棒且临床可靠的皮肤病变分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出JI-ADF框架，包含联合多模态表征学习、模态特定辅助监督、自适应决策融合机制（动态校准每个样本的模态贡献）以及多模态融合注意力（MMFA）模块。
contributions: 提出三模态深度学习框架JI-ADF，整合皮肤镜图像、临床照片和结构化元数据。
设计自适应决策融合机制，实现逐样本动态模态贡献校准。
引入多模态融合注意力模块增强跨模态推理。
analysis.experiments: 在MILK10k基准上评估，该基准反映真实临床采集条件和严重类别不平衡。方法在各类别上表现均衡，提升了敏感性和Dice分数，同时保持高特异性和良好校准。进行了模态消融、校准评估和Grad-CAM可视化分析。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模多模态数据集，在数据稀缺场景下泛化性未知。
自适应融合机制的计算开销可能影响实时部署。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出JI-ADF三模态框架，通过联合-个体学习与自适应决策融合提升皮肤病变分类性能。

papers.title: Investigating More Explainable and Partition-Free Compositionality Estimation for LLMs: A Rule-Generation Perspective
papers.abstract: Compositional generalization tests are often used to estimate the compositionality of LLMs. However, such tests have the following limitations: (1) they only focus on the output results without considering LLMs' understanding of sample compositionality, resulting in explainability defects; (2) they rely on dataset partition to form the test set with combinations unseen in the training set, suffering from combination leakage issues. In this work, we propose a novel rule-generation perspective for compositionality estimation for LLMs. It requires LLMs to generate a program as rules for dataset mapping and provides estimates of the compositionality of LLMs using complexity-based theory. The perspective addresses the limitations of compositional generalization tests and provides a new way to analyze the compositionality characterization of LLMs. We conduct experiments and analysis of existing advanced LLMs based on this perspective on a string-to-grid task, and find various compositionality characterizations and compositionality deficiencies exhibited by LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 从规则生成视角评估LLM组合性，避免传统测试的可解释性缺陷和组合泄露问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有组合泛化测试仅关注输出结果，忽略模型对样本组合性的理解，且依赖数据集划分导致组合泄露，缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何更可解释且无划分依赖地估计LLM的组合性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出规则生成视角：要求LLM生成程序作为数据集映射规则，并基于复杂度理论估计组合性。
contributions: 提出规则生成视角用于LLM组合性估计，克服传统测试的可解释性缺陷和组合泄露问题。
在字符串到网格任务上实验，发现LLM表现出多种组合性特征和不足。
analysis.experiments: 在字符串到网格任务上对现有先进LLM进行实验，发现多种组合性表征和缺陷。
limitations: 仅在一个特定任务上验证，泛化性未知。
规则生成视角可能受限于LLM的程序生成能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从规则生成视角评估LLM组合性，避免传统测试的可解释性缺陷和组合泄露问题。

papers.title: Iterative Definition Refinement for Zero-Shot Classification via LLM-Based Semantic Prototype Optimization
papers.abstract: Web filtering systems rely on accurate web content classification to block cyber threats, prevent data exfiltration, and ensure compliance. However, classification is increasingly difficult due to the dynamic and rapidly evolving nature of the modern web. Embedding-based zero-shot approaches map content and category descriptions into a shared semantic space, enabling label assignment without labeled training data, but remain highly sensitive to definition quality. Poorly specified or ambiguous definitions create semantic overlap in the embedding space, leading to systematic misclassification. In this paper, we propose a training-free, adaptive iterative definition refinement framework that improves zero-shot web content classification by progressively optimizing category definitions rather than updating model parameters. Using LLMs as feedback-driven definition optimizers, we investigate three refinement strategies namely example-guided, confusion-aware, and history-aware, each refining class descriptions using structured signals from misclassified instances. Furthermore, we introduce a human-labeled benchmark of 10 URL categories with 1,000 samples per class and evaluate across 13 state-of-the-art embedding foundation models. Results demonstrate that iterative definition refinement consistently improves classification performance across diverse architectures, establishing definition quality as a critical and underexplored factor in embedding-based systems. The dataset is available at https://github.com/naeemrehmat/B2MWT-10C.

analysis.tldr: 通过LLM迭代优化类别定义，无需训练即可提升零样本网页分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代网页动态变化快，基于嵌入的零样本分类对类别定义质量高度敏感，模糊定义导致语义重叠和系统性误分类。
analysis.problem: 如何在不更新模型参数的情况下，通过优化类别定义来提升零样本网页分类的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 类别定义质量是嵌入分类系统的关键瓶颈，模糊定义导致语义重叠和误分类。
analysis.method: 提出无需训练的迭代定义精炼框架，利用LLM作为反馈驱动的定义优化器，采用示例引导、混淆感知和历史感知三种策略，基于误分类实例的结构化信号逐步优化类别定义。
contributions: 提出迭代定义精炼框架，无需训练即可提升零样本分类性能。
引入包含10个URL类别、每类1000样本的人工标注基准。
在13个嵌入模型上验证了定义精炼的一致有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在13个最先进的嵌入基础模型上评估，使用10类URL分类基准（每类1000样本），结果显示迭代定义精炼持续提升分类性能。
limitations: 依赖LLM的反馈质量，可能受限于LLM的推理能力。
仅针对网页分类任务验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过LLM迭代优化类别定义，无需训练即可提升零样本网页分类性能。

papers.title: SQuadGen: Generating Simple Quad Layouts via Chart Distance Fields
papers.abstract: 3D shapes from scanning, reconstruction, or AI-generated content often lack simple quad mesh layouts -- critical for efficient editing and modeling. Existing quad-remeshing techniques typically produce complex layouts with irregular loops, leading to tedious manual cleanup and extensive algorithm tuning. We introduce SQuadGen, a diffusion-based generative framework that leverages Chart Distance Fields (CDF) to synthesize simple quad layouts on 3D shapes. Our approach addresses two key challenges: (1) the discrete nature of mesh connectivity, which hinders learning, and (2) the scarcity of large-scale datasets with simple quad meshes. To overcome the first, we propose CDF, a continuous surface-based representation enabling effective learning and synthesis of quad layouts. To address the second, we define loop-aware simplicity metrics and construct a large-scale dataset of high-quality quad layouts recovered from public 3D repositories through a robust quad-recovery pipeline. Extensive evaluations across diverse 3D inputs show that SQuadGen consistently outperforms existing methods, producing robust, artist-friendly simple quad layouts.

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散生成框架SQuadGen，利用图表距离场合成3D形状的简单四边形布局。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D形状（来自扫描、重建或AI生成）通常缺乏简单四边形网格布局，而现有四边形重网格技术生成的布局复杂、含不规则环，需要大量手动清理和算法调参，效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成3D形状的简单四边形布局，克服网格连接的离散性难以学习以及缺乏大规模简单四边形网格数据集的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出图表距离场（CDF）作为连续表面表示，使四边形布局的学习和合成成为可能；定义环感知简单性度量，并通过鲁棒四边形恢复流程从公共3D仓库构建大规模高质量简单四边形布局数据集；采用扩散生成框架SQuadGen合成布局。
contributions: 提出图表距离场（CDF），一种连续表面表示，有效支持四边形布局的学习与合成。
定义环感知简单性度量，并构建大规模高质量简单四边形布局数据集。
提出SQuadGen扩散生成框架，在多种3D输入上优于现有方法，生成鲁棒且艺术家友好的简单四边形布局。
analysis.experiments: 在多种3D输入上进行广泛评估，SQuadGen持续优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖数据集质量，对极端复杂形状的泛化能力未知。
扩散模型的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散生成框架SQuadGen，利用图表距离场合成3D形状的简单四边形布局。

papers.title: Spectral Dynamic Attention Network for Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Hyperspectral image super-resolution is essential for enhancing the spatial fidelity of HSI data, yet existing deep learning methods often struggle with substantial spectral redundancy and the limited non-linear modeling capacity of standard feed-forward networks (FFNs). To address these challenges, we propose Spectral Dynamic Attention Network (SDANet), a framework designed to adaptively suppress redundant spectral interactions. SDANet integrates two key components: 1) Dynamic Channel Sparse Attention (DCSA) module that computes channel-wise correlations and selectively preserves the most informative attention responses through dynamic and data-dependent sparsification. 2) Frequency-Enhanced Feed-Forward Network (FE-FFN) that jointly models spatial and frequency-domain representations to enhance non-linear expressiveness. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that SDANet achieves state-of-the-art HISR performance while maintaining competitive efficiency. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/oucailab/SDANet.

analysis.tldr: 提出频谱动态注意力网络，通过动态通道稀疏注意力和频率增强前馈网络提升高光谱图像超分辨率性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像超分辨率对提升空间保真度至关重要，但现有深度学习方法难以处理光谱冗余和标准前馈网络非线性建模能力有限的问题。
analysis.problem: 解决高光谱图像超分辨率中光谱冗余抑制和非线性表达能力不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SDANet，包含动态通道稀疏注意力（DCSA）模块和频率增强前馈网络（FE-FFN），分别用于自适应抑制冗余光谱交互和联合建模空间与频域表示。
contributions: 提出动态通道稀疏注意力机制，通过数据依赖的稀疏化选择性保留重要注意力响应。
设计频率增强前馈网络，增强非线性表达能力。
analysis.experiments: 在两个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，同时保持有竞争力的效率。
limitations: 可能对高光谱数据的光谱波段数量敏感。
动态稀疏化可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频谱动态注意力网络，通过动态通道稀疏注意力和频率增强前馈网络提升高光谱图像超分辨率性能。

papers.title: Representative Spectral Correlation Network for Multi-source Remote Sensing Image Classification
papers.abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) and SAR/LiDAR data offer complementary spectral and structural information for land-cover classification. However, their effective fusion remains challenging due to two major limitations: The spectral redundancy in high-dimensional HSI and the heterogeneous characteristics between multi-source data. To this end, we propose Representative Spectral Correlation Network (RSCNet), a novel multi-source image classification framework specifically designed to address the above challenges through spectral selection and adaptive interaction. The network incorporates two key components: (1) Key Band Selection Module (KBSM) that adaptively selects task-relevant spectral bands from the original HSI under cross-source guidance, thereby alleviating redundancy and mitigating information loss from conventional PCA-based spectral reduction. Moreover, the learned band subset exhibits highly discriminative spectral structures that align with discriminative semantic cues, promoting compact yet expressive representations. (2) Cross-source Adaptive Fusion Module (CAFM) that performs cross-source attention weighting and local-global contextual refinement to enhance cross-source feature interaction. Experiments on three public benchmark datasets demonstrate that our RSCNet achieves superior performance compared with state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining substantially lower computational complexity. Our codes are publicly available at https://github.com/oucailab/RSCNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出代表性光谱相关网络（RSCNet），通过关键波段选择和跨源自适应融合实现高光谱与SAR/LiDAR数据高效融合分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像（HSI）与SAR/LiDAR数据融合可提供互补信息，但面临HSI光谱冗余和异构数据特征差异两大挑战，现有方法如PCA降维会丢失信息，且融合效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合高光谱与SAR/LiDAR多源遥感数据，解决光谱冗余和异构特征差异问题，实现高精度地物分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统PCA降维会导致信息损失，而直接融合异构数据效果不佳；通过跨源引导选择关键波段可保留判别性光谱结构，自适应融合能增强跨源特征交互。
analysis.method: 提出RSCNet，包含关键波段选择模块（KBSM）和跨源自适应融合模块（CAFM）。KBSM在跨源引导下自适应选择任务相关波段，CAFM通过跨源注意力加权和局部-全局上下文精炼增强特征交互。
contributions: 提出关键波段选择模块，在跨源引导下自适应选择判别性光谱波段，减少冗余并避免信息损失。
设计跨源自适应融合模块，通过注意力加权和上下文精炼实现异构数据有效融合。
在三个公开数据集上取得优于SOTA的性能，且计算复杂度更低。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开基准数据集上进行了实验，与最先进方法比较，RSCNet取得了更优性能，同时计算复杂度显著降低。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对跨源数据配准精度敏感。
关键波段选择的可解释性有待进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出代表性光谱相关网络（RSCNet），通过关键波段选择和跨源自适应融合实现高光谱与SAR/LiDAR数据高效融合分类。

papers.title: YOSE: You Only Select Essential Tokens for Efficient DiT-based Video Object Removal
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Diffusion Transformer (DiT)-based video generation technologies have shown impressive results for video object removal. However, these methods still suffer from substantial inference latency. For instance, although MiniMax Remover achieves state-of-the-art visual quality, it operates at only around 10FPS, primarily due to dense computations over the entire spatiotemporal token space, even when only a small masked region actually requires processing. In this paper, we present YOSE, You Only Select Essential Tokens, an efficient fine-tuning framework. YOSE introduces two key components: Batch Variable-length Indexing (BVI) and Diffusion Process Simulator (DiffSim) Module. BVI is a differentiable dynamic indexing operator that adaptively selects essential tokens based on mask information, enabling variable-length token processing across samples. DiffSim provides a diffusion process approximation mechanism for unmasked tokens, which simulates the influence of unmasked regions within DiT self-attention to maintain semantic consistency for masked tokens. With these designs, YOSE achieves mask-aware acceleration, where the inference time scales approximately linearly with the masked regions, in contrast to full-token diffusion methods whose computation remains constant regardless of the mask size. Extensive experiments demonstrate that YOSE achieves up to 2.5X speedup in 70% of cases while maintaining visual quality comparable to the baseline. Code is available at: https://github.com/Wucy0519/YOSE-CVPR26.

analysis.tldr: YOSE通过选择性处理关键令牌实现DiT视频对象去除的2.5倍加速，同时保持视觉质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于DiT的视频对象去除方法推理延迟高，因为即使只有小掩码区域需要处理，仍对整个时空令牌空间进行密集计算。
analysis.problem: 如何高效加速DiT视频对象去除，使计算量随掩码区域大小线性缩放而非恒定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法如MiniMax Remover虽视觉质量好但仅约10FPS，瓶颈在于全令牌密集计算，而实际只有掩码区域需要处理。
analysis.method: 提出YOSE框架，包含批处理可变长度索引（BVI）和扩散过程模拟器（DiffSim）模块。BVI动态选择关键令牌，DiffSim模拟未掩码令牌对自注意力的影响以保持语义一致性。
contributions: 提出YOSE，一种高效的微调框架，实现掩码感知加速，推理时间与掩码区域大小近似线性相关。
设计BVI和DiffSim模块，分别实现动态令牌选择和扩散过程模拟。
实验表明在70%情况下实现高达2.5倍加速，且视觉质量与基线相当。
analysis.experiments: 在视频对象去除任务上进行了实验，报告了2.5倍加速和视觉质量对比，但未提供具体数据集和指标数值。
limitations: 加速仅在70%情况下达到2.5倍，其余情况可能加速比更低。
方法依赖于掩码信息，可能对掩码质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: YOSE通过选择性处理关键令牌实现DiT视频对象去除的2.5倍加速，同时保持视觉质量。

papers.title: Toward Autonomous SOC Operations: End-to-End LLM Framework for Threat Detection, Query Generation, and Resolution in Security Operations
papers.abstract: Security Operations Centers (SOCs) face mounting operational challenges. These challenges come from increasing threat volumes, heterogeneous SIEM platforms, and time-consuming manual triage workflows. We present an end-to-end threat management framework that integrates ensemble-based detection, syntax-constrained query generation, and retrieval-augmented resolution support to automate critical security workflows. Our detection module evaluates both traditional machine learning classifiers and large language models (LLMs), then combines the three best-performing LLMs to create an ensemble model, achieving 82.8% accuracy while maintaining 0.120 false positive rate on SIEM logs. We introduce the SQM (Syntax Query Metadata) architecture for automated evidence collection. It uses platform-specific syntax constraints, metadata-based retrieval, and documentation-grounded prompting to generate executable queries for IBM QRadar and Google SecOps. SQM achieves a BLEU score of 0.384 and a ROUGE-L score of 0.731. These results are more than twice as good as the baseline LLM performance. For incident resolution and recommendation generation, we demonstrate that integrating SQM-derived evidence improves resolution code prediction accuracy from 78.3% to 90.0%, with an overall recommendation quality score of 8.70. In production SOC environments, our framework reduces average incident triage time from hours to under 10 minutes. This work demonstrates that domain-constrained LLM architectures with retrieval augmentation can meet the strict reliability and efficiency requirements of operational security environments at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端LLM框架，集成集成检测、语法约束查询生成和检索增强解决，实现SOC自动化，将事件分类时间从小时降至10分钟以内。
analysis.research_motivation: SOC面临威胁量增加、SIEM平台异构、手动分类耗时等挑战，现有方法效率低、可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化SOC关键工作流，包括威胁检测、证据查询生成和事件解决，同时满足运营环境的严格可靠性和效率要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出端到端框架：1) 集成检测模块，组合三个最佳LLM实现集成模型；2) SQM架构，利用平台特定语法约束、元数据检索和文档提示生成可执行查询；3) 检索增强解决，集成SQM证据提升解决代码预测。
contributions: 提出端到端LLM框架自动化SOC威胁检测、查询生成和解决。
引入SQM架构，通过语法约束和元数据检索实现高BLEU和ROUGE-L分数的查询生成。
在真实生产环境中验证，将事件分类时间从小时降至10分钟以内。
analysis.experiments: 在SIEM日志上，集成检测模型准确率82.8%，假阳性率0.120；SQM查询生成BLEU 0.384，ROUGE-L 0.731，优于基线两倍；解决代码预测准确率从78.3%提升至90.0%，推荐质量评分8.70。生产环境将分类时间从小时降至10分钟以内。
limitations: 仅针对IBM QRadar和Google SecOps平台，泛化性待验证。
未讨论对抗攻击或误报处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端LLM框架，集成集成检测、语法约束查询生成和检索增强解决，实现SOC自动化，将事件分类时间从小时降至10分钟以内。

papers.title: PINN-Cast: Exploring the Role of Continuous-Depth NODE in Transformers and Physics Informed Loss as Soft Physical Constraints in Short-term Weather Forecasting
papers.abstract: Operational weather prediction has long relied on physics-based numerical weather prediction (NWP), whose accuracy comes at the cost of substantial compute and complex simulation workflows. Recent transformer-based forecasters offer efficient data-driven alternatives, however transformers are physics-agnostic models. Additionally, standard transformer encoders evolve representations through discrete layer updates that may be less suited to modeling smooth latent dynamics. In this work, we propose a continuous-depth transformer encoder for weather forecasting that integrates Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (Neural ODE) dynamics within each encoder block. Specifically, we replace discrete residual updates with ODE-based updates solved using adaptive numerical integration. We also introduce a two-branch attention module that combines conventional patch-wise self-attention with an auxiliary branch that applies a derivative operator to attention logits, providing an additional change-sensitive interaction signal. To further align forecasts with governing principles, we propose a customized physics-informed training objective that enforces physical consistency as a soft constraint. We evaluate the proposed method against a standard discrete transformer baseline and an existing continuous-time Neural ODE forecasting variant, demonstrating the importance of PINN-Cast in short term weather forecasting.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续深度Transformer编码器（PINN-Cast），用神经常微分方程替换离散残差更新，并引入物理信息损失作为软约束，用于短期天气预报。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统数值天气预报计算成本高、流程复杂，而现有Transformer模型缺乏物理知识，且离散层更新不适合建模平滑潜在动态。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个兼具连续深度建模能力和物理一致性的数据驱动天气预报模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准Transformer编码器通过离散层更新表征，可能不适合建模平滑潜在动态；且Transformer是物理无关模型，难以保证预测的物理一致性。
analysis.method: 提出PINN-Cast，包括：1）连续深度Transformer编码器，用基于ODE的更新替换离散残差更新，通过自适应数值积分求解；2）双分支注意力模块，结合常规逐块自注意力和对注意力logits施加导数算子的辅助分支；3）物理信息训练目标，将物理一致性作为软约束。
contributions: 提出连续深度Transformer编码器，将神经常微分方程集成到每个编码器块中。
设计双分支注意力模块，增强对变化敏感的信号交互。
引入定制化物理信息训练目标，作为软约束提升预测的物理一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加计算复杂度，因为ODE求解需要自适应数值积分。
物理信息约束的权重选择可能敏感，需要调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续深度Transformer编码器（PINN-Cast），用神经常微分方程替换离散残差更新，并引入物理信息损失作为软约束，用于短期天气预报。

papers.title: Pragmos: A Process Agentic Modeling System
papers.abstract: The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) has significantly transformed tasks across Software Engineering. In the context of Business Process Management, LLMs are now being explored as tools to derive process models directly from textual descriptions. Existing approaches range from chatbot-driven systems that assist with iterative, text-based modeling to fully automated end-to-end modeling assistants. However, we argue that process modeling is inherently complex and cannot be effectively addressed through black-box solutions. Instead, we envision modeling as an open-ended conversational activity, best supported by an interactive, iterative process involving both humans and LLM. In our approach, the modeling task is decomposed into smaller, manageable steps. Each step results in intermediate artifacts and explicitly documents the rationale behind each modeling decision. During this process, we incrementally uncover simple behavioral relations that guide the construction of the model. Given the current limitations of LLMs in reasoning about complex dependencies, we complement them with specialized tools developed in the field to structure process models based on behavioral relations. This hybrid approach enables the generation of sound, yet comprehensible models that evolve through transparent and explainable steps. In this paper, we present our research agenda and introduce Pragmos, a prototype system that operationalizes this vision. Pragmos demonstrates how LLMs can collaborate with human users as both domain and modeling experts to co-create evolving process models through a structured and explainable workflow.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种人机协作的流程建模系统Pragmos，将建模任务分解为可解释的步骤，结合LLM与专用工具生成可理解的流程模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的流程建模方法多为黑盒或全自动，但流程建模本质复杂，需要交互式、可解释的人机协作过程。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个交互式、可解释的流程建模系统，将复杂建模任务分解为可管理步骤，并利用LLM与专用工具协同生成合理且可理解的模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将建模任务分解为小步骤，每步生成中间产物并记录决策理由；逐步发现简单行为关系指导模型构建；LLM与基于行为关系的专用工具混合使用。
contributions: 提出将流程建模视为开放对话活动的人机协作范式
开发Pragmos原型系统，实现结构化、可解释的逐步建模流程
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 系统仍处于原型阶段，未在真实场景中验证
LLM对复杂依赖关系的推理能力有限，可能影响模型质量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种人机协作的流程建模系统Pragmos，将建模任务分解为可解释的步骤，结合LLM与专用工具生成可理解的流程模型。

papers.title: End-to-End Evaluation and Governance of an EHR-Embedded AI Agent for Clinicians
papers.abstract: Clinical AI systems require not just point-in-time evaluation but continuous governance: the ongoing practice of monitoring, evaluating, iterating, and re-evaluating performance throughout deployment. We present an end-to-end framework of governance that integrates rubric validation, live deployment feedback, technical performance monitoring, and cost tracking, with controlled experimentation gating system changes before deployment. Applied to Hyperscribe, an EHR-embedded agent that converts ambient audio into structured chart updates, twenty clinicians authored 1,646 validated rubrics across 823 cases. Seven Hyperscribe versions were evaluated through controlled experiments, with median scores improving from 84% to 95%. Analysis of 107 live feedback entries over three months showed feedback composition shifting from 79% error reports and 14% positive observations to 30% errors and 45% positive observations as engineering interventions resolved failures. Median processing time per audio segment was 8.1 seconds with a 99.6% effective completion rate after retry mechanisms absorbed transient model errors. These results demonstrate that continuous, multi-channel governance of deployed clinical AI is both achievable and effective.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个端到端框架，用于临床AI代理的持续治理，通过多通道评估和迭代提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床AI系统需要持续治理，而不仅仅是单次评估，以确保部署后的安全性和有效性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个集成评估、监控和迭代的框架，对嵌入EHR的AI代理进行端到端的治理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要显示，通过治理框架，错误报告比例下降，正面观察比例上升，处理时间稳定，完成率高。
analysis.method: 提出一个包含rubric验证、实时部署反馈、技术性能监控和成本跟踪的治理框架，并通过受控实验进行版本迭代。
contributions: 提出了一个用于临床AI代理的端到端治理框架。
通过实际部署案例（Hyperscribe）验证了框架的有效性，展示了性能提升和反馈组成的变化。
analysis.experiments: 在Hyperscribe系统上进行了实验：20名临床医生在823个案例中创建了1646个验证rubric；通过受控实验评估了7个版本，中位分数从84%提升到95%；分析了107条实时反馈，错误报告比例从79%降至30%，正面观察从14%升至45%；中位处理时间8.1秒，有效完成率99.6%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的EHR嵌入式AI代理。
治理框架的通用性需要更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个端到端框架，用于临床AI代理的持续治理，通过多通道评估和迭代提升性能。

papers.title: BoostLoRA: Growing Effective Rank by Boosting Adapters
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods face a tradeoff between adapter size and expressivity: ultra-low-parameter adapters are confined to fixed low-rank subspaces, capping performance even with extended training. We propose BoostLoRA, a gradient-boosting framework that overcomes this limit by iteratively training and merging minimal adapters on the examples the current model gets wrong. A ROTATE SVD basis strategy assigns each round to an orthogonal subspace, so cumulative effective rank grows linearly with the number of rounds while each adapter remains ultra-low-rank. After merging, adapters are discarded, leaving zero inference overhead. On Qwen2.5-3B, BoostLoRA reaches 89.1% on GSM8K and 68.8% on MATH-500, surpassing both the best single-shot ultra-low parameter adapter (TinyLoRA) and full fine-tuning; on code generation it reaches 57.2% on MBPP and 80.4% on HumanEval while full fine-tuning drops below the zero-shot baseline. We also demonstrate cross-architecture transfer on protein binding classification with ESM2-650M and cross-entropy training. BoostLoRA is, to our knowledge, the first PEFT method whose effective rank grows with training, separating per-round parameter cost from total representational capacity.

analysis.tldr: BoostLoRA通过梯度提升和旋转SVD策略，使超低秩适配器的有效秩随训练轮次线性增长，在多个任务上超越全参数微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 参数高效微调方法在适配器大小和表达能力之间存在权衡：超低参数适配器被限制在固定的低秩子空间中，即使延长训练也无法突破性能上限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加推理开销的前提下，让超低秩适配器获得与全参数微调相当甚至更强的表达能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BoostLoRA框架，采用梯度提升思想：迭代训练最小适配器，并在当前模型出错的样本上合并；使用ROTATE SVD基策略，使每轮适配器位于正交子空间，累积有效秩随轮次线性增长；合并后丢弃适配器，零推理开销。
contributions: 首次提出有效秩随训练增长的PEFT方法，将每轮参数成本与总表示能力分离。
在数学推理、代码生成和蛋白质结合分类任务上，BoostLoRA超越超低参数适配器和全参数微调。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-3B上，GSM8K达89.1%，MATH-500达68.8%；代码生成MBPP达57.2%，HumanEval达80.4%；在ESM2-650M上验证跨架构迁移。
limitations: 可能对任务类型敏感，需要多轮迭代训练。
未在更大规模模型或更多模态上验证。
