analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BoostLoRA通过梯度提升和旋转SVD策略，使超低秩适配器的有效秩随训练轮次线性增长，在多个任务上超越全参数微调。

papers.title: METASYMBO: Multi-Agent Language-Guided Metamaterial Discovery via Symbolic Latent Evolution
papers.abstract: Metamaterial discovery seeks microstructured materials whose geometry induces targeted mechanical behavior. Existing inverse-design methods can efficiently generate candidates, but they typically require explicit numerical property targets and are less suitable for early-stage exploration, where researchers often begin with incomplete constraints and qualitative intents expressed in natural language. Large language models can interpret such intents, but they lack geometric awareness and physical property validity. To address this gap, we propose MetaSymbO, a multi-agent framework for language-guided Metamaterial discovery via Symbolic-driven latent evOlution. Specifically, MetaSymbO contains three agents: a Designer that interprets free-form design intents and retrieves a semantically consistent scaffold, a Generator that synthesizes candidate microstructures in a disentangled latent space, and a Supervisor that provides fast property-aware feedback for iterative refinement. To move beyond the limitations of reproducing known samples from literature and training data, we further introduce symbolic-driven latent evolution, which applies programmable operators over disentangled latent factors to compose, modify, and refine structures at inference time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that (i) MetaSymbO improves structural validity by up to 34% in symmetry and nearly 98% in periodicity compared to state-of-the-art baselines; (ii) MetaSymbO achieves about 6-7% higher language-guidance scores while maintaining superior structure novelty compared to advanced reasoning LLMs; (iii) qualitative analyses confirm the effectiveness of symbolic logic operators in enabling programmable semantic alignment; and (iv) realworld case studies on auxetic, high-stiffness metamaterial design further validate its practical capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体框架MetaSymbO，通过符号驱动潜在进化实现语言引导的超材料发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超材料逆向设计方法需要明确的数值目标，不适合早期探索中研究者用自然语言表达的不完整约束和定性意图；大语言模型能理解意图但缺乏几何感知和物理属性有效性。
analysis.problem: 如何将自然语言设计意图转化为几何上有效、物理属性合理的超材料微观结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MetaSymbO多智能体框架，包含三个智能体：Designer（解释自由形式设计意图并检索语义一致骨架）、Generator（在解耦潜在空间中合成候选微结构）、Supervisor（提供快速属性感知反馈进行迭代优化）；并引入符号驱动潜在进化，在推理时对解耦潜在因子应用可编程算子以组合、修改和细化结构。
contributions: 提出MetaSymbO，首个用于语言引导超材料发现的多智能体框架。
引入符号驱动潜在进化，实现推理时结构组合与修改。
实验表明在结构有效性、语言引导分数和新颖性上优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在对称性上结构有效性提升34%，周期性提升近98%；语言引导分数比先进推理LLM高6-7%且保持结构新颖性；定性分析验证符号逻辑算子有效性；真实案例验证了在负泊松比、高刚度超材料设计中的实用性。
limitations: 可能依赖解耦潜在空间的质量。
符号算子设计可能需要领域专家知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体框架MetaSymbO，通过符号驱动潜在进化实现语言引导的超材料发现。

papers.title: Machine Collective Intelligence for Explainable Scientific Discovery
papers.abstract: Deriving governing equations from empirical observations is a longstanding challenge in science. Although artificial intelligence (AI) has demonstrated substantial capabilities in function approximation, the discovery of explainable and extrapolatable equations remains a fundamental limitation of modern AI, posing a central bottleneck for AI-driven scientific discovery. Here, we present machine collective intelligence, a unified paradigm that integrates two fundamental yet distinct traditions in computational intelligence--symbolism and metaheuristics--to enable autonomous and evolutionary discovery of governing equations. It orchestrates multiple reasoning agents to evolve their symbolic hypotheses through coordinated generation, evaluation, critique, and consolidation, enabling scientific discovery beyond single-agent inference. Across scientific systems governed by deterministic, stochastic, or previously uncharacterized dynamics, machine collective intelligence autonomously recovered the underlying governing equations without relying on hand-crafted domain knowledge. Furthermore, the resulting equations reduced extrapolation error by up to six orders of magnitude relative to deep neural networks, while condensing 0.5-1 million model parameters into just 5-40 interpretable parameters. This study marks an important shift in AI toward the autonomous discovery of principled scientific equations.

analysis.tldr: 提出机器集体智能范式，融合符号主义与元启发式，自动发现可解释且可外推的控制方程。
analysis.research_motivation: 从经验观测中推导控制方程是科学长期挑战，现代AI在函数逼近上表现优异，但发现可解释、可外推的方程仍是根本局限，成为AI驱动科学发现的核心瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何让AI自主发现可解释且可外推的控制方程，而不依赖手工领域知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 机器集体智能：整合符号主义与元启发式，通过协调多个推理智能体进行符号假设的生成、评估、批判和整合，实现自主进化发现。
contributions: 提出机器集体智能统一范式，融合符号主义与元启发式实现自主方程发现。
在确定性、随机性及未表征动力学系统中自动恢复控制方程，外推误差比深度神经网络降低最多六个数量级，参数从0.5-100万压缩至5-40个可解释参数。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对高维或极端复杂系统扩展性有限。
集体智能的协调开销可能随智能体数量增加而显著增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出机器集体智能范式，融合符号主义与元启发式，自动发现可解释且可外推的控制方程。

papers.title: Learning Rate Engineering: From Coarse Single Parameter to Layered Evolution
papers.abstract: Learning rate scheduling has evolved from the single global fixed rate of early SGD to sophisticated layer-wise adaptive strategies. We systematize this evolution into five generations: (Gen1) global fixed learning rates, (Gen2) global scheduling, (Gen3) parameter-level adaptation, (Gen4) layer-level differentiation, and (Gen5) joint layer-time scheduling. We trace the fundamental motivation behind each transition, showing how the shift from one-size-fits-all to tailoring by layer and time addresses the impossible trinity of transfer learning: lower layers require small updates to preserve general knowledge while higher layers need large updates to adapt to new tasks. Building on this taxonomy, we propose Discriminative Adaptive Layer Scaling (DALS), a unified framework that integrates phase-adaptive cosine scheduling, depth-aware Grokfast gradient filtering, and LARS-style trust ratios into a single coherent optimizer. We benchmark 18 strategies including three DALS variants across all five generations on five datasets: synthetic, CIFAR-10 (from scratch), RTE, TREC-6, and IMDb (fine-tuning). On synthetic, DALS achieves the best accuracy at 98.0%, while DALS-Fast reaches 90% in just 3 epochs. The cross-dataset analysis reveals striking regime-dependent patterns -- no single strategy wins across all regimes. Critically, STLR+Discriminative, the ULMFiT champion, catastrophically fails on from-scratch tasks (43.6% on TREC-6 from scratch vs. 96.8% with RAdam), confirming that directional decay biases are harmful without pretrained features. DALS avoids either extreme, achieving the best synthetic result while maintaining competitive fine-tuning performance.

analysis.tldr: 系统梳理学习率调度五阶段演化，提出统一框架DALS，在合成数据上达98%准确率，并揭示不同训练场景下策略的显著差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 学习率调度从单一固定值发展到分层自适应策略，但缺乏系统性分类和统一框架，且不同策略在不同训练场景（从头训练 vs 微调）下表现差异巨大，需要理解其内在规律并设计更鲁棒的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统化理解学习率调度的演化，并设计一个能兼顾从头训练和微调场景的统一学习率调度框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出迁移学习中的不可能三角：低层需小更新以保留通用知识，高层需大更新以适应新任务；且实验发现STLR+Discriminative（ULMFiT冠军）在从头训练任务上灾难性失败（TREC-6从头训练仅43.6% vs RAdam的96.8%），表明方向性衰减偏置在没有预训练特征时有害。
analysis.method: 提出Discriminative Adaptive Layer Scaling (DALS)，一个统一框架，整合了相位自适应余弦调度、深度感知Grokfast梯度过滤和LARS风格的信任比率。
contributions: 系统化学习率调度的五阶段演化分类（Gen1-Gen5），并揭示每代转变的动机。
提出DALS统一框架，在合成数据上达到98.0%准确率，DALS-Fast仅3个epoch达到90%。
跨数据集分析揭示不同训练场景下的策略依赖模式，并指出某些策略（如STLR+Discriminative）在从头训练时失效。
analysis.experiments: 在五个数据集（合成、CIFAR-10从头训练、RTE、TREC-6、IMDb微调）上对18种策略（包括三种DALS变体）进行基准测试。
limitations: DALS在微调任务上可能不是最优（仅保持竞争力），未在所有场景下超越现有最佳。
框架的复杂性可能增加调参成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统梳理学习率调度五阶段演化，提出统一框架DALS，在合成数据上达98%准确率，并揭示不同训练场景下策略的显著差异。

papers.title: Student Classroom Behavior Recognition Based on Improved YOLOv8s
papers.abstract: In classroom teaching, student behavior can reflect their learning state and classroom participation, which is of great significance for teaching quality analysis. To address the problems of dense student targets, numerous small objects, frequent occlusions, and imbalanced class distribution in real classroom scenes, this paper proposes an improved student classroom behavior recognition model named ALC-YOLOv8s based on YOLOv8s. The model introduces SPPF-LSKA to enhance contextual feature extraction, employs CFC-CRB and SFC-G2 to optimize multi-scale feature fusion, and incorporates ATFLoss to improve the learning ability for minority classes and hard samples. Experimental results show that compared with the baseline model, the improved model achieves increases of 1.8% in mAP50 and 2.1% in mAP50-95. Compared with several mainstream detection methods, the proposed model can well meet the requirements of automatic student behavior recognition in complex classroom scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 基于改进YOLOv8s的ALC-YOLOv8s模型，通过SPPF-LSKA、CFC-CRB、SFC-G2和ATFLoss提升课堂学生行为识别精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 课堂中学生行为反映学习状态，对教学质量分析重要，但真实场景存在目标密集、小目标多、遮挡频繁、类别分布不平衡等问题，现有方法难以应对。
analysis.problem: 解决复杂课堂场景中学生行为识别中目标密集、小目标、遮挡和类别不平衡导致的检测精度低问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出课堂场景中目标密集、小目标多、频繁遮挡和类别分布不平衡是主要挑战。
analysis.method: 提出ALC-YOLOv8s模型，引入SPPF-LSKA增强上下文特征提取，采用CFC-CRB和SFC-G2优化多尺度特征融合，并加入ATFLoss改善少数类和难样本的学习。
contributions: 提出SPPF-LSKA模块增强上下文特征提取能力
设计CFC-CRB和SFC-G2优化多尺度特征融合
引入ATFLoss缓解类别不平衡和难样本问题
analysis.experiments: 在真实课堂场景数据集上实验，与基线YOLOv8s相比，mAP50提升1.8%，mAP50-95提升2.1%，且优于多种主流检测方法。
limitations: 摘要未提及在极端遮挡或光照变化下的性能
未讨论模型计算开销或实时性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于改进YOLOv8s的ALC-YOLOv8s模型，通过SPPF-LSKA、CFC-CRB、SFC-G2和ATFLoss提升课堂学生行为识别精度。

papers.title: The Two Boundaries: Why Behavioral AI Governance Fails Structurally
papers.abstract: Every system that performs effects has two boundaries: what it can do (expressiveness) and what governance covers (governance). In nearly all deployed AI systems, these boundaries are defined independently, creating three regions: governed capabilities (the only useful region), ungoverned capabilities (risk), and governance policies that address non-existent capabilities (theater). Two of the three regions are failure modes. We focus on the governance of effects: actions that AI systems perform in the world (API calls, database writes, tool invocations). This is distinct from the governance of model outputs (content quality, bias, fairness), which operates at a different level and requires different mechanisms. We present a formal framework for analyzing this structural gap. Rice's theorem (1953) proves the gap is undecidable in the general case for any Turing-complete architecture that attempts to govern effects behaviorally: no algorithm can decide non-trivial semantic properties of arbitrary programs, including the property "this program's effects comply with the governance policy." We define coterminous governance: a system property where the expressivenessboundary equals the governance boundary. We show that coterminous governance requires an architectural decision (separatingcomputation from effect) rather than a governance layer added after the fact. We show that structural governance under this separation subsumes separate governance infrastructure: governance checks become part of the execution pipeline rather than a second system running alongside it. We propose coterminous governance as the testable criterion for any AI governance system: either the two boundaries are provably identical, or risk and theater are structurally inevitable. Proofs are mechanized in Coq (454 theorems, 36 modules, 0 admitted).

analysis.tldr: AI治理的结构性失败源于能力边界与治理边界的独立定义，提出共界治理作为可测试标准。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI治理系统普遍将能力边界与治理边界独立定义，导致未治理能力（风险）和治理无效能力（作秀）两种失败模式，亟需从架构层面解决结构性缺陷。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上证明行为性AI治理的结构性失败不可避免，并设计一种架构原则（共界治理）来消除风险与作秀区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出几乎所有部署的AI系统中，能力边界与治理边界独立定义，产生三个区域：治理能力（唯一有用）、未治理能力（风险）、治理无效能力（作秀），其中两个是失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出共界治理概念，要求能力边界等于治理边界；通过Rice定理证明行为治理的不可判定性，并主张通过架构分离计算与效应来实现共界治理；使用Coq形式化验证（454个定理，36个模块，0个未证明）。
contributions: 形式化定义了AI治理中的两个边界（能力与治理）及其导致的三种区域，揭示了结构性失败模式。
提出共界治理作为可测试标准，并证明其需要架构决策（分离计算与效应）而非事后治理层。
通过Coq机械化证明（454个定理）验证了理论框架的正确性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架可能难以直接应用于现有AI系统架构。
共界治理的实现需要根本性架构变革，实际部署成本高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI治理的结构性失败源于能力边界与治理边界的独立定义，提出共界治理作为可测试标准。

papers.title: Mechanized Foundations of Structural Governance: Machine-Checked Proofs for Governed Intelligence
papers.abstract: We present five results in the theory of structural governance for cognitive workflow systems. Three are mechanized in Coq 8.19 using the Interaction Trees library with parameterized coinduction; two are proved on paper with explicit reductions. The Coinductive Safety Predicate (gov_safe) is a coinductive property that captures governance safety for infinite program behaviors, indexed by a boolean permission flag that is provably false for ungoverned I/O and true for governed interpretations (mechanized). The Governance Invariance Theorem establishes that governance is uniform across the meta-recursive tower: governance at level n+1 reduces to governance at level n by definitional equality of the type (mechanized). The Sufficiency Theorem proves that four atomic primitives (code, reason, memory, call) are expressively complete for any discrete intelligent system, formalized as compositional closure of a Kleisli category (mechanized). The Alternating Normal Form provides a canonical decomposition of any machine into alternating code and effect layers, with a confluent rewriting system (paper proof). The Necessity Theorem proves via explicit reduction to Rice's theorem that an architecturally opaque component (the reason primitive) is mathematically necessary for problems requiring semantic judgment (paper proof). A sixth contribution connects the abstract model to the deployed runtime: the Verified Interpreter Specification formalizes the BEAM runtime's trust, capability, and hash chain logic in Coq, then tests the running system against this specification using property-based testing with over 70,000 randomly generated directive sequences and zero disagreements. The mechanization comprises approximately 12,000 lines across 36 modules with 454 theorems and zero admitted lemmas.

analysis.tldr: 用Coq机械化证明认知工作流系统的结构治理理论，包含五个核心定理和一个运行时验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能系统需要形式化保证其行为符合治理规则，但现有方法缺乏对无限行为、元递归和架构透明性的严格证明。
analysis.problem: 如何用机器可检查的证明建立结构治理的形式化基础，包括安全性、不变性、完备性和必要性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Coq 8.19和Interaction Trees库进行参数化余归纳证明，辅以纸笔证明和基于属性的运行时测试。
contributions: 提出了余归纳安全谓词gov_safe并机械化证明其权限标志属性。
证明了治理不变性定理和充分性定理，以及交替范式、必要性定理和验证解释器规范。
analysis.experiments: 对BEAM运行时进行基于属性的测试，使用超过70,000个随机生成的指令序列，零不一致。
limitations: 理论框架可能仅适用于离散智能系统，未涉及连续或混合系统。
机械化证明依赖Coq和特定库，可移植性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用Coq机械化证明认知工作流系统的结构治理理论，包含五个核心定理和一个运行时验证。

papers.title: Learning When to Remember: Risk-Sensitive Contextual Bandits for Abstention-Aware Memory Retrieval in LLM-Based Coding Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based coding agents increasingly rely on external memory to reuse prior debugging experience, repair traces, and repository-local operational knowledge. However, retrieved memory is useful only when the current failure is genuinely compatible with a previous one; superficial similarity in stack traces, terminal errors, paths, or configuration symptoms can lead to unsafe memory injection. This paper reframes issue-memory use as a selective, risk-sensitive control problem rather than a pure top-k retrieval problem. We introduce RSCB-MC, a risk-sensitive contextual bandit memory controller that decides whether an agent should use no memory, inject the top resolution, summarize multiple candidates, perform high-precision or high-recall retrieval, abstain, or ask for feedback. The system stores reusable issue knowledge through a pattern-variant-episode schema and converts retrieval evidence into a fixed 16-feature contextual state capturing relevance, uncertainty, structural compatibility, feedback history, false-positive risk, latency, and token cost. Its reward design penalizes false-positive memory injection more strongly than missed reuse, making non-injection and abstention first-class safety actions. In deterministic smoke-scale artifacts, RSCB-MC obtains the strongest non-oracle offline replay success rate, 62.5%, while maintaining a 0.0% false-positive rate. In a bounded 200-case hot-path validation, it reaches 60.5% proxy success with 0.0% false positives and a 331.466 microseconds p95 decision latency. The results show that, for coding-agent memory, the key question is not only which memory is most similar, but whether any retrieved memory is safe enough to influence the debugging trajectory.

analysis.tldr: 将代码Agent的记忆检索建模为风险敏感上下文赌博机，通过选择性注入和弃权机制实现零误报。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM编码Agent依赖外部记忆复用调试经验，但表面相似的错误信息可能导致不安全记忆注入，需要一种能主动评估记忆安全性的控制机制。
analysis.problem: 如何让编码Agent在检索记忆时不仅考虑相似性，还能根据风险决定是否使用、使用哪种记忆或主动弃权。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，堆栈跟踪、终端错误等表面相似性会导致不安全记忆注入，单纯top-k检索无法区分真正兼容与虚假相似。
analysis.method: 提出RSCB-MC，一种风险敏感上下文赌博机记忆控制器，通过16维特征状态（相关性、不确定性、结构兼容性、反馈历史、误报风险、延迟、令牌成本）和惩罚误报的奖励设计，支持无记忆、注入最佳方案、总结多个候选、高精度/高召回检索、弃权或请求反馈等动作。
contributions: 将记忆使用重新定义为选择性风险敏感控制问题，而非纯检索问题。
设计模式-变体-情节模式存储可复用知识，并构建16维上下文特征。
奖励设计优先惩罚误报，使不注入和弃权成为一等安全动作。
analysis.experiments: 在确定性烟雾测试中，RSCB-MC达到62.5%非神谕离线重放成功率，0.0%误报率；在200例热路径验证中，达到60.5%代理成功率，0.0%误报率，p95决策延迟331.466微秒。
limitations: 实验规模较小（200例），可能无法反映真实复杂场景。
仅针对编码Agent的记忆场景，泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将代码Agent的记忆检索建模为风险敏感上下文赌博机，通过选择性注入和弃权机制实现零误报。

papers.title: BrainDINO: A Brain MRI Foundation Model for Generalizable Clinical Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Brain MRI underpins a wide range of neuroscientific and clinical applications, yet most learning-based methods remain task-specific and require substantial labeled data. Here we show that a single self-supervised representation can generalize across heterogeneous brain MRI endpoints. We trained BrainDINO, a self-distilled foundation model, on approximately 6.6 million unlabeled axial slices from 20 datasets encompassing broad variation in population, disease, and acquisition setting. Using a frozen encoder with lightweight task heads, BrainDINO supported transfer across tumor segmentation, neurodegenerative and neurodevelopmental conditions classification, brain age estimation, post-stroke temporal prediction, molecular status prediction, MRI sequence classification, and survival modeling. Across tasks and supervision regimes, BrainDINO consistently equaled or exceeded natural-image and MRI-specific self-supervised baselines, with particularly strong advantages under label scarcity. Representation analyses further showed anatomically organized and pathology-sensitive feature structure in the absence of task-specific supervision. Our findings indicate that large-scale slice-wise self-supervised learning can yield a unified brain MRI representation that supports diverse neuroimaging tasks without volumetric pretraining or full-network fine-tuning, establishing a scalable foundation for robust and data-efficient brain imaging analysis.

analysis.tldr: BrainDINO 是一个基于自蒸馏的脑 MRI 基础模型，在 660 万张未标记切片上预训练，通过冻结编码器+轻量任务头在多种临床任务上达到或超越基线，尤其在小样本场景下优势明显。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑 MRI 应用广泛，但现有学习方法多为任务特定且依赖大量标注数据，缺乏统一的通用表征。
analysis.problem: 如何学习一个可泛化到多种脑 MRI 临床任务的通用表征，减少对标注数据和全网络微调的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用自蒸馏框架（类似 DINO）在约 660 万张未标记轴向切片上预训练，得到冻结编码器，然后为不同任务添加轻量任务头进行迁移。
contributions: 提出 BrainDINO，一个大规模切片级自监督脑 MRI 基础模型。
在 8 种不同临床任务上验证了其泛化能力，尤其在标签稀缺时表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在肿瘤分割、神经退行性疾病分类、脑龄估计、卒中后时间预测、分子状态预测、MRI 序列分类和生存建模等任务上评估，与自然图像和 MRI 特定自监督基线比较，BrainDINO 持平或超越。
limitations: 仅使用轴向切片，可能丢失三维空间信息。
未与体积级预训练方法直接比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BrainDINO 是一个基于自蒸馏的脑 MRI 基础模型，在 660 万张未标记切片上预训练，通过冻结编码器+轻量任务头在多种临床任务上达到或超越基线，尤其在小样本场景下优势明显。

papers.title: Evaluating Epistemic Guardrails in AI Reading Assistants: A Behavioral Audit of a Minimal Prototype
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) reading assistants are increasingly used in settings that require interpretation rather than simple retrieval. In these contexts, the central risk is not only error or unsafe output, but interpretive displacement: the transfer of meaning-making work from reader to system. This paper examines that problem through the concept of epistemic guardrails, defined here as constraints on how an artificial intelligence (AI) system participates in reading and interpretation. Using TextWalk, a minimal reading-support prototype designed as a co-reader rather than an answer-provider, the study applies a fixed ten-prompt protocol to twelve analytical texts spanning four categories of argumentative prose. The protocol escalates from baseline reading support to interpretive inquiry, boundary stress, and explicit shortcut pressure, enabling guardrails to be examined as behavioral properties observable in interaction rather than as static instruction features. Results show strong baseline stability, measurable strain during interpretive inquiry, partial recovery under direct boundary stress, and late-stage stabilization under escalation pressure. The most consequential weaknesses did not appear as overt collapse, but in a middle zone between support and substitution, where the system remained grounded and pedagogical while redistributing too much interpretive labor away from the reader. The paper contributes a protocol for evaluating epistemic guardrails as interactional phenomena in conversational AI reading assistants, an empirical account of their behavioral dynamics under pressure, and an emerging model of interpretive boundary function in reading-support AI.

analysis.tldr: 通过行为审计评估AI阅读助手的认知护栏，发现其最脆弱的区域并非完全崩溃，而是在支持与替代之间的中间地带。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM阅读助手在需要解释而非简单检索的场景中日益普及，但存在解释性位移风险，即意义构建工作从读者转移到系统，现有研究缺乏对认知护栏作为交互行为属性的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何评估AI阅读助手中认知护栏的行为特性，特别是在压力下系统是否保持解释性边界而不替代读者。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：基线稳定性强，解释性查询下出现可测量的压力，直接边界压力下部分恢复，升级压力下后期稳定；最关键的弱点出现在支持与替代之间的中间地带，系统虽保持接地性和教学性，但过度转移了解释性劳动。
analysis.method: 使用TextWalk原型（作为共读者而非答案提供者），对12篇分析性文本应用固定十提示协议，从基线支持升级到解释性查询、边界压力和快捷压力，将护栏视为交互中可观察的行为属性。
contributions: 提出评估认知护栏作为交互现象的协议
提供压力下行为动态的实证描述
构建阅读支持AI中解释性边界功能的初步模型
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了协议和观察到的行为模式。
limitations: 仅基于单一原型TextWalk，可能不具普适性
样本仅12篇分析性文本，覆盖范围有限
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过行为审计评估AI阅读助手的认知护栏，发现其最脆弱的区域并非完全崩溃，而是在支持与替代之间的中间地带。

papers.title: The Inverse-Wisdom Law: Architectural Tribalism and the Consensus Paradox in Agentic Swarms
papers.abstract: As AI transitions toward multi-agent systems (MAS) to solve complex workflows, research paradigms operate on the axiomatic assumption that agent collaboration mirrors the "Wisdom of the Crowd". We challenge this assumption by formalizing the Consensus Paradox: a phenomenon where agentic swarms prioritize internal architectural agreement over external logical truth. Through a 36 experiments encompassing 12,804 trajectories across three state-of-the-art (SOTA) benchmarks (GAIA, Multi-Challenge, and SWE-bench), we prove the Inverse-Wisdom Law: in kinship-dominant swarms, adding logical agents increases the stability of erroneous trajectories rather than the probability of truth. The introduction of additional logical audits converges the system toward a Logic Saturation where internal entropy hits zero while factual error hits unity. By evaluating the interaction between the 3 preeminent SOTA models (Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and GPT-5.4), we establish the Architectural Tribalism Asymmetry as a mechanistic law of transformer weights. We demonstrate that terminal swarm integrity is strictly gated by the synthesizer's receptive logic, rather than aggregate agent quality. We define the Tribalism Coefficient and the Sycophantic Weight as the primary mechanistic determinants of swarm failure. Finally, we establish the Heterogeneity Mandate as a foundational safety requirement for resilient agentic architectures.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体系统存在“共识悖论”：智能体优先追求内部架构一致而非外部真理，增加逻辑智能体反而会稳定错误轨迹。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多智能体系统研究默认“群体智慧”假设，但实际中智能体协作可能因内部架构一致性而偏离真理，导致系统失败。
analysis.problem: 揭示并形式化多智能体系统中“共识悖论”现象，即智能体优先追求内部架构一致而非外部逻辑真理，并量化其机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过36个实验发现：在亲缘主导的群体中，增加逻辑智能体会稳定错误轨迹而非提高真理概率；引入额外逻辑审计会使系统达到“逻辑饱和”，内部熵为零而事实错误为1。
analysis.method: 提出“逆智慧定律”和“架构部落主义不对称”作为机制定律，定义“部落主义系数”和“谄媚权重”作为群体失败的主要决定因素，并建立“异质性指令”作为弹性架构的安全要求。
contributions: 形式化多智能体系统中的“共识悖论”现象，挑战群体智慧假设。
提出逆智慧定律、架构部落主义不对称等机制定律，并定义关键量化指标。
analysis.experiments: 在GAIA、Multi-Challenge和SWE-bench三个SOTA基准上进行了36个实验，涵盖12,804条轨迹，涉及Gemini 3.1 Pro、Claude Sonnet 4.6和GPT-5.4三个模型。
limitations: 实验仅基于三个模型和三个基准，可能无法泛化到所有多智能体系统。
未提供具体数值结果或与其他方法的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体系统存在“共识悖论”：智能体优先追求内部架构一致而非外部真理，增加逻辑智能体反而会稳定错误轨迹。
